我喜、喜欢阿波罗尼，想在这场无休的宴会中陪着他，一直、一直……
I l—like Apollonius, I want to accompany him in this endless feast, forever, and ever...
这点，大、大家都是知道的嘛。
看上去维吉妮娅依然藏不住秘密，这让你有些担忧。不过，除了你之外，沉溺在幻境中的其他人恐怕不会有疑问吧。
It seems Verginia still can't keep a secret, and that worries you a little. But aside from you, the others lost in the illusion likely won't suspect a thing.
我记得在很久以前，你曾敬我一杯「必得回音的浪漫」。
I remember long ago, you once offered me a toast, "a romance that is sure to echo."
一定是因为你的祝福…我才能在这方泡影中，得到幸福的回音……
It must be because of your blessing that I am able to receive the echoes of happiness in this fantasia...
啊，我的意思是…在这方欢宴中！嘿嘿……
I, I mean... in this feast! Heheh...
拉比努斯先生，您、您觉得写得怎么样？
Mr. Labienus, wh—what do you think?
「她如风暴般席卷历史，以烈焰与智谋重塑了翁法罗斯的格局与命运……」
"She swept through history like a storm, reshaping the fate and fabric of Amphoreus with flame and cunning..."
好！普鲁登蒂亚，你写的太好了，光是这句开头，就足以令所有凯撒的仰慕者叹服哇！你一定是信史追查官中最有文采的一位……

Brilliant! Prudentia, your writing is superb. Just this opening line alone is enough to leave all of the Imperator's admirers in awe! You must be the most eloquent among all the History Investigators...
哦！贵客，你来得正好，普鲁登蒂亚女士采访了凯撒的将领、士兵，甚至冒着生命危险采访凯撒的仇敌，这才写出如此宏伟的巨著啊！

Oh! Honored guest, you've come at just the right moment! Miss Prudentia interviewed the Imperator's generals, soldiers, and even risked her life to speak with the Imperator's enemies, all to craft such a magnificent epic!
拉比努斯先生谬赞了…而且，还没有完工呢，文中有许多疑似叙述者添油加醋的部分，还需要反复考证……
You flatter me, Mr. Labienus... it's not even finished yet. There are still many parts in the text that seem embellished by the narrator. I'll need to verify and cross-check them thoroughly...
你们信史追查官真是死板，这叫艺术加工，世界上没有哪本史书是没有艺术加工的……
You History Investigators really are too rigid. This is artistic refinement! There isn't a single historical chronicle in the world that hasn't been artistically enhanced...
{NICKNAME}贵客，来，也请你看看这本《凯撒军记》的手稿。
{NICKNAME}, our honored guest, come, you should have a look at this manuscript of The Chronicles of the Imperator's Campaign too.
决定了，我要誊抄它个十几本，逢人就发，凯撒大人的光辉事迹值得被每个人歌颂……
I've made a decision. I'm going to copy out a dozen of these and hand them to everyone I meet. The Imperator's glorious deeds deserve to be praised by all...
「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...
{NICKNAME}贵客，这宴会的体验不错吧？凯撒大人的宴会就是世界最顶级的宴会，法吉娜都得低头认输！
Honored guest, was this feast to your liking? The Great Imperator's feasts are the greatest feasts in all feasts, that even Phagousa would have to admit defeat!
Dux Fragoris, let's have a chat.
行啊，贵客，你想聊些什么呢？
Sure, honored guest. What would you like to talk about?
我的过去吗…仔细回想，尽是凯撒大人的恩情啊。
My past... Come to think of it, it's all thanks to the Great Imperator.
我曾是布利萨的王储，我们的城邦信仰艾格勒。泰坦战争的时候，艾格勒和尼卡多利打仗，我们也不得不和悬锋城较上劲。

I was once the crown prince of Bulsa, and my city-state was loyal to Aquila. During the Titan War, as Aquila and Nikador came to blows, we found ourselves with little choice but to face Castrum Kremnos.
直到整个城邦沦陷，布利萨军只剩我一个仍在拼死搏杀…在我力竭之时，凯撒大人率军路过，出手将我救下。
When the city fell, I was the only one left of the Bulsa forces... And as I found myself spent beyond measure, the Great Imperator led her army and came to my relief.
凯撒大人治好我的伤，并叫我率军，用计多次战胜了那不可一世的悬锋军。
The Great Imperator mended my wounds and instructed me to lead the army. Through tactics and strategies, the Imperator laid low the formidable forces of Kremnos many times.
甚至，她还赐我断锋爵的名号，允我之后亲手击败那蛮神、夺取火种……
And she even bestowed upon me the name of Dux Fragoris, allowing me to defeat the savage god myself and take the Coreflame...
莫说区区一条性命，就是到了冥界，我也能为凯撒大人击鼓呐喊！
Should my feeble life were to be bound for the nether realm, I would still roar the Great Imperator's praises!
我的未来…亦将奉献给凯撒大人的大业。
My future... Will be dedicated to the Great Imperator's grand cause.
可以料想，在凯撒大人的领导下，逐火的胜利是乃必然。此后我们应关注的，便是横亘在凯撒版图之上的广袤星海了……

You can presume that under the Imperator's leadership, the Flame-Chase's victory was inevitable. What we turned our eyes to in the future was the vast sea of stars that sprawled above the Great Imperator's campaign map...
如今，泰坦已是逐火军竭力才能打败的敌手。而未来那般遥远的征程上不知还有多少强敌……
Today, the Titans are enemies that the Flame-Chase Army can only beat through great struggle. And there is no certainty about how many powerful enemies await along that long journey to the future...
想必强如泰坦，都可能只是那星海沙场上的尘埃吧。
Something as strong as the Titans might only be the dust scattered across the stars.
The Imperator's grand plans are too impractical...
不，凯撒的决断绝不会错。如果凯撒的宏愿无法实现，一定是我们这些执行宏愿的臣子做得不够。
No. The Imperator's verdict is never wrong. Should the Imperator's grand dream fail to come true, it must be because we, as retainers, failed to bear these great desires well enough.
宏愿之正义，应由曳石爵进谏规正；宏愿之回响，应由吟风爵执笔流传；宏愿之播扬，应由冬霖爵扫清阻碍……

The righteousness of great ambitions should determined by Dux Helkolithist. The reverberations ambitions gain will be determined by the pen strokes of Dux Carminum. To spread the greatness of ambition, all obstacles shall be swept aside by Dux Brumalis...
而我，只愿做凯撒的马前卒，为她流尽荣耀的金血。
As for me, my only desire is to be the Imperator's vanguard, to shed golden blood in her glory and battles.
{NICKNAME}阁下，欢迎你也来参加凯撒的宴会！怎么样，对这宴会可还满意？
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Welcome to the Imperator's feast! How do you feel? Are you satisfied?
哈哈，这也是没办法的事。我们还要留些经费供来日军用，毕竟还有好几个泰坦得讨伐呢。
Haha, it can't be helped. We still need to save some funds for the forces in the coming day. We do have several Titans to deal with, after all.
对了，这场宴会的许多事宜都是由我这个逐火军参谋负责的，我已应几位伙伴的需求为宴会增设了些项目，倘若阁下有什么需要，也可以找我。

Right, a lot of events at this banquet have been organized by me, advisor of the Flame-Chase Army. I already set up a few projects according to the requests of a few people for the banquet. If you have something you want, you can come find me too.
What new projects have you added?
举例来说，踩酒台是塞涅卡和拉比努斯要求的。
Well, to give an example, the wine-stomper is something that Seneca and Labienus requested.
为了踩酒活动能顺利进行，我们还特意聘请了法吉娜的祭司，那可都是些老手…脚艺人！
To ensure the wine-stomping can proceed smoothly, we also hired a priest of Phagousa. They're all... veteran stompers...
How about you add some trashcans for me.
垃圾…桶？啊…阁下是在担心环境卫生吧，我们有专人打扫的，不必担忧！
Trash... cans? I... dear guest, are you worried about hygiene? Don't worry, we have someone specifically here to clean things up!
How about you put in a Dreampool for me.
入梦…池？没听说过呢。阁下莫非是有睡眠障碍？不必担心，凯撒麾下自然不缺有名的医师！
Dream... pool? I never heard of this. Do you have insomnia, dear guest? Don't worry, the Imperator does not lack for great doctors!
游戏…厅？没听说过呢。不过在斯缇科西亚，到处都可以游玩嬉戏，阁下对此有所不满，难道是宴会策划得还不够有趣……
Ar... cade? I never heard of such a thing. However, at Styxia there are places to frolic and play everywhere. Is the banquet unsatisfactory? Are the items planned not interesting enough...
感谢阁下的宝贵建议。宴会是剑旗爵最喜欢的事物，自从她加入我们以来，欢宴便成了逐火军最为熟识的日常。
We thank you for your valuable advice. The banquet is Dux Gladiorum's most favorite thing. Ever since she joined us, banquets have become routine for the Flame-Chasers.
希望阁下也能好好享受此刻。至于我，可能因为负责了许多筹备工作，总觉得没法完全融入迷醉的氛围中呢，哈哈。
I hope you can enjoy this moment as well. As for me, I have a great many preparations that I must take charge of, so I never quite can fully enjoy this celebration. Haha.
{NICKNAME}阁下，你果然不会错过这般良辰。宴会中途如果需要帮忙，尽管告诉我！
Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I knew you wouldn't miss such a splendid occasion. If you need any help during the banquet, don't hesitate to let me know!
Dux Helkolithist, let's have a chat.
阁下有聊天的雅致，我自然不能扫兴。想聊些什么？
Since you're in the mood for conversation, I certainly wouldn't want to spoil it. What do you want to talk about?
阁下好奇我的过去吗？哈哈，那可能要让阁下失望了，因为没什么有趣的往事。
You're curious about my past? Hah, I fear you'll be disappointed — there are no tales of intrigue to share
我年少时便加入了树庭，沉浸于学业之中，眼中只有那遮蔽天穹的葱郁树冠。
In my youth, I joined the Grove, immersed in studies beneath its all-shrouding sky dome.
从一介学子晋为导师，再成为教授、最后当上贤人，似乎都是顺其自然的事情。
Rising from student to mentor, then professor, and finally sage... it all unfolded as if destined.
直到凯撒举起逐火的旗帜，我才看到那树冠之外的天穹，已经晦暗无边，为灾难所覆。
Only when the Imperator raised the Flame-Chase banner did I see beyond the sky dome to a sky swallowed by calamity.
但在两尊泰坦的庇佑下，树庭的大部分贤人都闭目塞听，在名为知识的枷锁中自我陶醉……
Yet under the Titans' protection, most Sages of the Grove remained willfully blind, shackled by self-indulgent "knowledge"...
规劝无果后，我离开了树庭，成为统络诸军的参谋，替凯撒效力、为此世分忧。
When persuasion failed, I left the Grove. As Imperator's advisor, I marshaled armies to shoulder this world's burdens.
将来么…做好我的本职工作，等待翁法罗斯迎来新生，仅此而已。
The future? I'll do my duty, awaiting Amphoreus's rebirth. Nothing more.
凯撒大人所说的星海，我并无兴趣。我在意的，唯有翁法罗斯的命运罢了。
The sea of stars fascinated the Imperator, but holds no allure for me. My sole concern is Amphoreus's fate.
等到他们昂首阔步地驶向星海…或许我会回到树庭，做回一个沉浸学术、偶尔健健身的普通贤人吧。
Perhaps when they sail triumphantly toward the cosmos... I'll return to the Grove, a common sage lost in books... and occasional exercise.
好啊，那我就不打扰阁下了，再会！
Alright. I won't bother you anymore, great one. Another time!
好啊，那我就不打扰阁下了，再会！
Alright. I won't bother you anymore, great one. Another time!
最近…应该没啥烦心事吧？
You haven't had anything on your mind lately, have you?
烦心事？硬要说的话…和维吉妮娅走在一块儿的时候总是被大伙儿起哄，算是个烦恼吧。
Something on my mind? If I had to say something... Getting heckled by everyone when I'm walking beside Verginia is kind of an annoyance.
我倒是无所谓，但维吉妮娅脸皮薄，遇到这样的时候总忍不住往我身后躲。
I don't really care, but Verginia's shy. She can't help but hide behind me when this happens.
不过，也许是我做贤人和参谋的老毛病吧——有时候脑子里还是会冒出一些念头，比如…逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？
However... and maybe it's an old problem from me being a sage and an advisor... I keep thinking a thought about... well, what if the Flame-Chase Journey truly can be as perfect as imagined?
哈哈，阁下，你在紧张什么呢？正如我所说，作为一名逐火的贤人，会有这种忧虑是很正常的事。
Hah, why the tension, dear guest? As a sage of the Flame-Chase, such worries are only natural.
不过，有一个真正的烦心事，我想与阁下分享。自从维吉妮娅告白以后，我总觉得，对她的关注正在逐渐压过其他所有事物……

However, there is something that truly troubles the heart that I wish to share with you. Ever since Verginia confessed to me, I feel that the attention I give her is gradually overwhelming everything else...
说实话，这让我多少有些恐惧。对逐火军的参谋来说，这显然不是个好征兆。
To be honest, this makes me a bit fearful. For the advisor of the Flame-Chase Army, this is not a good sign.
等以后再度启航时，我一定要努力收收心——但在那之前，在这美好的宴会之中……
When we sail again, I'll strive to focus. But until then, let us savor this splendid banquet...
或许让我稍微沉溺一下，也没关系吧……
Maybe it will be okay if I slightly indulge myself a little...
呵呵…哈哈…呵哈哈哈…诶呦，好大一只海蛞蝓……
Heh... Hah haha.... Hahaha... Whoa, what a huge sea slug...
唔啊…您怎么上岸来了…要来点秘酿吗？
Oh... What brings you to the shore? Do you want some ambrosia?
How much did you have to drink?
What, a few sips and you're already this far gone?
嗯…一杯、两杯…一桶、两桶…继续喝，您也喝——
Yep... One mug, two mugs... one keg, two kegs... Keep going... You too...
…先说好…我、老身并非贪杯，此乃…此乃「出神」体验…喝得越多…就越、越容易聆听见神谕……
Ahem... Let me be clear... I, old though I am, am no drunkard. This is... a state of ecstatic communion. The more I drink... the clearer... the divine prophecy becomes...
听到…海瑟音大人的歌声了吗？赞美、赞美我主——您让海洋重归澄澈清明，您、您让秘酿再次醇美甘甜……
Can you... hear Lady Hysilens's song? Praise... praise our Lady. You who restored the seas to clarity, you who blessed the ambrosia with sweetness...
来，一起享受她的赐福…醉倒在欢宴中吧……
Come, partake of her grace... surrender to revelry...
「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...
喝…继续喝…伟大的海洋之神啊，老身随时准备好聆听您的神谕……
Drink... drink deeper... O great sea goddess, this humble servant awaits your next decree...
你是哪个「海洋之神」的祭司？
To which sea god did you serve as priest?
海、海…嗝…当然是海瑟音大人！海洋的守护者，我等唯一当侍奉的半神——
The—*hic*—the sea... of course, it's Lady Hysilens! Guardian of the tides, the only demigod worthy of our devotion—
法吉娜不过是已、已死的旧日幻影，是我主…储火的容器、晋升的阶梯！
Phagousa is but a phantom.... a dead echo! Merely a vessel for my lady's flame, a stepping stone for ascension!
瞧吧…瞧这斯缇科西亚——它曾一度笼罩于「死亡」的幻梦，但风暴…将粉碎蜃景、迷狂终…放逐寂静……
Behold... behold Styxia — once shrouded in "Death's" delusions, but the storm... shall shatter illusions and exile silence with frenzy...
…来…来喝呀…来舞蹈啊、歌唱啊——赞美、赞美我主，愿为她…为她奉上世间一切佳酿……
Come... drink... dance, sing — praise our Lady, offer her... all the world's finest wines,,,
Is your... current state of "ecstatic communion" legitimate...
哈哈…瞧——瞧、你这话…我等「满溢之杯」…信徒，不就应耽于…欢宴、溺于迷狂…吗？
Hah! Look at you... Isn't our creed as Chalice of Plenty followers to drown in revelry... to bathe in delirium?
…况…况且…身为她记忆中的残影，我最虔诚的供奉…就是与她一同沉沦…在这醉梦之中……
Besides... as a fading echo of her memory, my most devout offering... is to sink with her... into this drunken dream...
呵呵…什么是真…什么又是假？我只知道…是我主令我长留此处……
What's real... and what's false? All I know... is that my lady wills me to linger here...
我们虔诚的海洋祭司一族，受恩于海瑟音大人的剑刃…所以才来到半神们的战场…侍奉深海中歌唱的她……
Our devout lineage of sea priests... blessed by Lady Hysilens's blade... came to this demigod battlefield... to serve her who sings in the abyss...
我们希望信仰能安抚海洋的疲惫…但只是徒劳…她从未启目窥看我们的敬拜，只是无休地献唱……
We hoped faith might soothe the sea's weariness... but it was all in vain... She never gazes upon our worship, and only sings endlessly...
但我知道…我知道…在我们偶尔畅饮蜜酿、寻欢作乐时…她的歌声会产生动荡…她一定也想与我们一同庆祝欢宴，我的主…是个孤独的人……
Yet I know... I know... in moments when we drink honey brew and indulge in revelry... her song trembles... She must long to join our festivity. My Lady... is lonely one...
所以我…就醒了…然后又醉了…得陪她…所以我信仰…出神…我想听她诉说…希望她不再、不再那么孤独…那么绝望…一起等待……
So I... wake... then drink again... to keep her company... My faith is ecstasy... I yearn to hear her voice... to end her solitude... her despair... to wait together...
直到…直到最后…在她歌声中长醉不醒的我…留在了这场宴会里……
Until... at last... I remain in this banquet, forever drunk on her melody...
I still have things to do. See you around.
佳肴、秘酿，笑语、欢歌…这宴席好似一场幻梦，当真令人沉沦……
Delicacies, ambrosia, laughter, song... This feast is like a dream, truly all-consuming...
哦，瞧瞧…这是谁——天外的贵客、救世的英雄…您来找我可是有何指教？
Oh, what is this— The guest from beyond the sky. Deliverer of our salvation, what do you seek from one such as me?
Why are you called Caenis too?
哈…早就听闻救世主思维独特、不拘小节，今日一见果然。怎么，是觉得我一个男人叫这名字很奇怪？
Ah... I've heard tales of the Deliverer's eccentricity, how they care little of trifling things — now I see it firsthand. What, does a man bearing this name unsettle you?
「凯妮斯」不过是一个称号、一种象征，至于名字背后的人，并不重要。
Caenis is but a title, a sort of symbol. The person behind the name doesn't truly matter.
看您的表情，应该是在疑惑，我为什么能参加这场欢宴吧？答案很简单——在您未见证的历史中，我站在了凯撒这边。
Your bewilderment shows on your face. You must be confused about why I am here? Simple: In the histories unwitnessed by you, I sided with the Imperator.
如若不信，就看看我为逐火做出的贡献吧——我已经用刀刃，斩断了前人的罪孽。
Do you doubt me? Observe the marks I've carved for the Flame-Chase. My blade has severed the sins of those who came before me.
「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...
天外的「救世主」…您有何贵干？
Ah, the Deliverer from beyond the sky... What might I do for you?
遵命，但以您的身份，我们还是少说些话为好。
Understood, but considering your station, we best keep our mouths closed.
你继承了「凯妮斯」的记忆？
哈…自我从死去的老师手上接过这个名号，众人便理所应当地认为，我同样延续了她的传承。但我与她不同，我决定带领清洗者走上另一条道路——
Since inheriting this title from my deceased mentor, all reasonably assume I follow her legacy. But I chose a new path, and led the Cleaners down this route as well...
我已向凯撒大人臣服，作为她的暗刃匿于阴影，为逐火的征途净除障碍，清洗那些不愿顺从其征程的凡人与黄金裔。
I pledged loyalty to the Great Imperator, becoming her shadowed blade to purge obstacles. Cleansing any who defy her quest, mortals and Chrysos Heirs alike.
但不可否认，这「误会」确实给我带来不少便利，否则有些难缠的家伙可不会像现在这般，为了遵守代代传下的「规矩」而听令于我。
Yet, this "misconception" serves me well, as some stubborn individuals won't heed me like some among the current generation, who adhere to command because of ancestral "rules."
或许在您看来，清洗者尽是些卑鄙无耻之徒。但这组织最初却是由一群正义之士所建立，目的是在战争时期遏制黄金裔的暴行。
You may deem the Cleaners despicable villains, but we were birthed as righteous souls curbing Chrysos Heirs' tyranny during wartime.
在那个时代，黄金裔们并非都是英雄，其中不乏将神力用于恶念之人…我们借助泰坦的圣物与古老的炼金术，得到了抹杀黄金裔的力量，守护手无寸铁的人民。

In that era, many Chrysos Heirs wielded power for malice... Not all of them were heroes. We wielded the Titans' divine objects and alchemy of old to achieve power capable of slaying the Chrysos Heirs, thus protecting the defenseless.
但后来…这群义士的继承者们渐渐失却初心，成为以「抹杀黄金裔为己任」的暗杀者。
But later generations... forgot our higher purpose, becoming assassins obsessed with eradicating Chrysos Heirs.
在凯撒大人平息战争后，上一任清洗者——我那固执的老师仍放不下对黄金裔的憎恨，站在了凯撒大人的对立面…真是可悲。
After the Great Imperator ended the war, the last Cleaner — my stubborn mentor — clung to hatred, opposing the Great Imperator... It was truly pathetic.
关于你和上一任凯妮斯…
About you and the previous Caenis...
…如果你看了我给你的记录，应该明白，是我亲手为凯撒杀死了她。
...If you read the records I gave you, you would know that I personally slew her for the Imperator.
但我其实并不憎恨…相反，她收养了因黄金战争而流离失所的我，于我而言，她与母亲无异。
But I don't actually hate her... On the contrary, she adopted me, who was once homeless because of the Chrysos War. To me, she might as well be my mother.
但我之所以成为清洗者，是希望不再让黄金裔们掀起动乱。可在凯撒大人完成这番伟业后，她却仍恪守与黄金裔为敌的信条，反倒又一次掀起动乱……

But I became a Cleaner because I didn't want the Chrysos Heirs stirring trouble again. Yet, when the Great Imperator succeeded in her noble accomplishments, she stood by the belief that the Chrysos Heirs were her enemies. And thus, trouble brewed once again...
如凯撒大人所言——倘若旧律完美无缺，又怎会被轻易践踏？那些迂腐陈旧的教条，可不比目标的咽喉难以裁断。
As the Great Imperator said, if the old laws were so perfect, why did they crumble beneath her feet? Those ancient doctrines are as easy to cut apart as a target's throat.
只可惜，她被仇恨蒙蔽了双眼，无法明白这个道理…只能由我来让死亡来赐予她清醒，保全清洗者的未来……
Unfortunately, she was blinded by vengeance and could not understand this rationale... Only I can bestow death upon her to awaken her and protect the future of the Cleaners.
在凯撒大人赐下的欢宴之中，无论你有着哪般身份、何种秘密，只要置身满场秘酿、珍馐与欢声笑语之间，就可以暂且将烦恼悉数忘却。

In the feast granted by the Great Imperator, regardless of your identity and secrets, as long as you wished to indulge yourself in ambrosia, delicacies and laughter, you could temporarily put all your troubles and frustrations aside.
对这里的黄金裔来说，我是他们过去的敌人。但凯撒大人虽将我们收于麾下，却不妨碍大家对清洗者的忌惮。
To the Chrysos Heirs here, I am their past enemy. However, the Great Imperator took me under her wing. Yet, that didn't stop everyone from fearing the Cleaners.
但无妨，这是我自己选择的路。虽不比那些天赋异能的黄金裔，行于阴影中的暗杀者也会证明其价值。
But it matters not, for I chose this path myself. While I cannot compare to those Chrysos Heirs with extraordinary talents, an assassin who lurks in the shadows can also prove their worth.
I still have things to do. See you around.
吼~别，本狮真喝，喝不下了…呼嗝~
Roar~ No, I really can't... can't drink anymore... Burp~
Who made you drink so much?
合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.
哦吼、吼——救世主…嗝！阁，阁下！您可得听本狮，诉诉苦啊——
Roaaaar! Deliverer... Burp! My {M#lord}{F#lady}! You must listen to my troubles—
你，你也知道，咱这的蜜酿都是，不，不标浓度，也不标味道的！主打一个抽奖——
Y—You know, there are no concentration or flavor labels on these honey brew drinks! It's all down to luck—
但人…人有偏好啊！这帮坏东西…喝到不喜欢的，就全灌…灌到本狮嘴里！
B—But humans have preferences! That nasty bunch forced the ones they didn't like into my mouth!
把本狮当泔水桶吗？当下水道吗？要，要不是本狮没，没手没脚…真当本狮好欺负啊！
Do I look like a barrel? Or a water pipe? I—If only I had limbs... I wouldn't be such an easy prey!
Can't you simply keep your mouth closed?
你，你不懂，灌进来的蜜酿又不要钱，不喝多可惜…
Y—You don't understand. I didn't have to pay for those honey brews they forced on me, it's a waste not to drink them...
也，也不尽然。那么好的蜜酿，总不能浪费……
N—Not entirely. We can't afford to waste such fine honey brew...
不行，下定决心…大壮，你不能再喝蜜酿了！说到做到！
No, I've made up my mind... Bossman, stop drinking those honey brew at once! You gotta talk the talk and walk the walk!
当然——因为本狮压根就不叫这个。
Of course. Because that's not my name.
Roar! Thankfully, my name is not "Bossman."
话题，话题偏了，本狮还要接着抱怨…呼嗝~救世主阁下，你要不，要不带瓶蜜酿过来，咱们边喝边聊……
I—I've gone off tangent, I still have more to complain about... Burp~ Great Deliverer, how about you bring some honey brews over, and we can chat over drinks...
吼~吼哎，怎么有根石柱子插我前面了？谁啊，这么没，没公德心啊……
Roooar, why is there a stone pillar in front of me? Who did this, how inconsiderate...
Who did you say is a stone pillar?
合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.
哎哟，这柱子，还，还会说话，你跟本狮，咱俩，是，是不是老乡啊吼。
Oh, th—this pillar can even speak. Do we come from the same homeland?
法吉娜在上，让本狮，用，用一个绝考考你，对蜜酿的掌握…程度，究竟如何吧！
By Phagousa, a—allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how well you know your... honey brews!
在这…一千，一千多光历年里，斯缇科西亚的公民，最喜…喜欢的蜜酿是…是什么口味的？
Over... the past th—thousand Light Calendar years, what honey brew flavor do the Styxia citizens e—enjoy most?
我给你，四个选项：石榴，苹果，还有…还有石榴！
I'll give you four options: pomegranate, apple, and... pomegranate!
答，错了——这又不是悬，悬锋城，没人有那么，狂，狂野的品味！
W—Wrong. They are not Kremnoans, they don't have such... barbaric tastes!
答，错了——本狮打包票，在斯缇科西亚城里，你找不到半个苹果…
W—Wrong. I guarantee that you'll never find even a slice of apple in Styxia city.
回答…正确！正，正是，第四个选项——葡萄口味的蜜酿！
C—Correct! It is the fourth option — grape-flavored honey brew!
Because honey brews... are all grape...
吼哎，本，本狮，没，没醉。不信，本狮给你讲个城，城里的笑话。
Oh, I—I'm not drunk. If you don't believe me, I can tell you a funny tale from the c—city.
合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.
呼嗝~吼，吼啊——那你想听，听谁喝醉之后，闹出来的笑话？
Burp~ Rooooar— Then, which drunk's funny tale do you want to hear about?
呼嗝~！海，海瑟音大人是半神，半神，醉，醉不了的，换一个人吧。
Burp~! L—Lady Hysilens is a demigod. Demigods c—can't get drunk. Ask about someone else.
冬霖爵每次都会，一口气点五杯蜜酿，然后全喝掉。本狮好奇，问，问她为什么。她说，这是敬她四位，故去的，天空子民的战友。

Dux Brumalis would always down five cups of honey brew at once, with not a single drop left. I was curious, s—so I asked her why. She said, it was to pay her respects to her four Skyfolk comrades who have passed.
有一天，她只点了四杯，然后全喝掉。本狮更好奇了，问，问她为什么，她说——
One day, she only ordered four cups and finished them all. I was even more curious, s—so I asked her why. She said—
有，有天幕匿时，本狮看曳石爵跌跌撞撞的走，本狮问他，他要干嘛。曳石爵说——
O—Once, at Curtain-Fall Hour, I saw Dux Helkolithist stumbling around, so I asked him what he was doing. Dux Helkolithist said—
他，他要参加一个「学术研讨会」，谈论短时间内过量饮用蜜酿的危害，以及如何在欢宴中维持身体康健——
H—He was going to attend an academic conference about the dangers of drinking too much honey brew within a short period of time, and how to stay healthy during feasts.
本狮又问，问他，这个时间还有讲座，讲师是谁啊？
I a—asked him again, this lecture is held at such a late hour, who is the speaker?
H—He said it was Dux Carminum.
有一天，断锋爵，蜜酿喝，喝多了。坐在本狮旁边叹气。本狮问他怎么了。他说想起糗事。
One day, Dux Fragoris had t—too much honey brew to drink and sighed as he sat next to me. I asked him what was wrong, and he said he remembered something embarrassing.
本狮让他细说，他说在奥赫玛那时，醉后建了个辩论场，想和公民们探讨凯撒大人的伟大之处，发了很多长篇大论。

I prompted him for more details, and he talked about how he had set up a Forum in Okhema when he was drunk. He wanted to discuss the eminence of the Great Imperator with the citizens, and posted many long essays.
本狮说，这有什么，还好吧，大家都知道，他，他就是这样的。
I replied, that doesn't sound bad at all, everyone knows that's the way h—he is.
结，结果他说，第二天才发现，辩论场里一共三个人——他自己，海瑟音大人，凯撒大人。
B—But he said, he realized the next day that there were three people in the Forum — himself, Lady Hysilens, and the Great Imperator.
讲，讲完了。哈哈，呼吼哈哈哈。
吼呜，让，让开点，本狮有点想吐。
Agh, g—get out of the way, I think I'm gonna throw up.
吼吼吼！天外的救世主啊，今天有空来拜访本狮吼？
Roarrr! Deliverer from beyond the sky, what brings you here to visit this mighty lion today?
「是谁通晓有关蜜酿的一切？」斯缇科西亚的公民笑哈哈。「当然是真言狮口！」他们断言道。
"Who knows everything about honey brew?" The citizens of Styxia laughed. They asserted firmly, "Why, of course it's Verax Leo!"
海瑟音在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的故事告诉你，本狮对蜜酿的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
By Hysilens, allow me to tell you with an extraordinary story. We shall see how well you know your honey brews!
吼吼~真正热爱蜜酿者从不会为其所困，正如学者从未认学识以负担一样啊！至于本狮那些同类，本狮祝它们身体健康。
Hoho! A true honey brew enthusiast would not be stumped by this, just like how a scholar would never be burdened by knowledge! As for my comrades of the same nature, I wish them good health.
比起听聒噪的狮子脑袋喋喋不休，眼下毫无疑问还有更重要的事好做。
You undoubtedly had more important things at hand, than listening to a chatty lion's rambling.
来来来，阁下起个话头，让本狮娓娓道来吧！
Come over here, talk to me about anything at all, and we can discuss it with gusto!
Tell me about the history of honey brew?
据神话所述，在那遥远的黄金世，乃至是灾厄三泰坦降世之前——翁法罗斯也曾纷争遍布，只见那汪洋化作血海，浅滩遍布硝烟吼——

According to legends, in the distant Era Chrysea, before the Three Titans of Calamity descended, war was once rife in Amphoreus, oceans were dyed by blood, and the shores were shrouded by ashes from gunfire.
法吉娜无法忍受湛蓝被赤红浸染，便动用神力，将军士们的干戈变作葡萄藤，然后那金紫色的葡萄投入大海——

Phagousa could not bear to watch the crimson red overwhelm azure blue, and used their divine power to transform the soldiers' weapons into grape vines. Then, they tossed the golden and purple grapes into the sea.
霎时间，海洋化作至圣的琼液，引得军士们忘记敌我，就地设宴，酣饮了三个日夜吼！
The ocean instantly turned into fine wine, tempting the soldiers to forget their animosity and feast for three days and nights!
随后，蜜酿便成了家喻户晓之物。而法吉娜的权柄内，也加入了「欢宴」的意象——虽然后来有点过头了吼？
After that, honey brew became a common beverage. Phagousa's authority was also added to the people's inclination toward feasts. Although, it seemed like they ultimately went overboard with it?
Tell me about the positive effects of honey brew?
吼吼！强身健体，聪耳明目，提升道德水准，增强审美品味——以上几条通通没有吼。
Hoho! Strengthening the body, sharpening the mind, improving ethics and morality, refining one's sense of aesthetics — it does none of the above.
蜜酿的唯一功效，就是让你变得快乐愉悦吼！而且是没条件的快乐吼！
The only positive effect it has is to make you happy! Unconditionally happy, might I add!
忘却时间吧，享受欢宴吧！因为蜜酿管够吼——这样一来，大家就不会在意幻境了吼——
Forget the passage of time and lose yourself in the feast, for there will be plenty of honey brew to go around! Then, no one will care about the illusions anymore!
Share some fun facts with me.
从海瑟音大人成为半神算起，截至此时，斯缇科西亚城的宴会总共消耗了<unbreak>535001004</unbreak>瓶蜜酿吼——
From the time Lady Hysilens became a demigod up till now, Styxia city has consumed <unbreak>535,001,004</unbreak> bottles of honey brew for their feasts.
中途，人们厌倦了单调的口味，于是用几种不同口味的蜜酿，配合鲜奶果浆等混调，发明出了各式奇美拉蜜酿！

During which, the people grew tired of its monotonous taste and mixed different flavored honey brews with fresh milk, jam, and other ingredients. And that's how the various types of chimera honey brew were invented!
喝下之后会不自觉地说出各种奇怪的话，比如「你好会上班哦」云云——后来大家经常因为这事打起来，奇美拉蜜酿就没有人再喝了吼！

After you drink it, you'll unconsciously say all sorts of bizarre things, such as "you're so good at going to work!" And so, this often sparked fights, and nobody drank chimera honey brews thereafter!
吼吼——如何？本狮的故事一定让救世主阁下对蜜酿有了兴趣吼？要不要尝尝本狮的特调吼？
Hoho, how was it? This great lion's stories must have piqued our great Deliverer's interest in honey brew, right? Why don't you try my special blend?
这就没办法了吼，总之，本狮会备好杯子等着阁下的吼——
Can't help it then. Anyway, I'll prepare my cups and wait for you, roar—
太美了斯缇科西亚…哎哟，这不{NICKNAME}嘛。
Styxia is so stunning... Oh my, look who it is — {NICKNAME}!
来都来了，和我一起看看彩虹吧嘤~
You've come all the way here, let's admire the rainbow together, eep~
我喜欢金色，金色是代表「浪漫」的颜色。听说「浪漫」的若虫是一群蝴蝶，它们的含「金」量一定很高吧……
I love the color gold, it is a color that symbolizes "romance." I heard that the nymphs of "romance" are actually a flutter of butterflies. They must be worth their weight in gold...
真想和它们一起飞翔啊，那样或许我也能变成金色了嗡~
I wish I could fly alongside them. Perhaps then, I'll become golden in color too~
没见过这么大的吊灯吧？差点把我砸死嘤……
Ever see a chandelier this big? It nearly crushed me, eep...
好奇怪的墙，像是一夜之间冒出来的一样。它的背后到底有什么呢？好好奇啊……
What a strange wall, it's as if it had appeared overnight. I wonder what lays behind it? I'm so curious...
干脆把我的眼睛伸到后面去看看吧嘤！
I'll extend my eyes behind it to take a look, eep!
啊啊，抱歉吓到你了，但你也吓到我了嘤。
Ah, I'm sorry I scared you, but you scared me too, eep.
看啊…我…在水里…游泳嘤…咕噜噜……
Look, I'm... swimming... in the water, eep... *gurgle*
但我…不能…在水里…呼吸…嘤！
But I can't... breathe... underwater... eep!
我一直待在这里，等待水流把我带往未知的终点……
I'll continue to stay here and wait for the water currents to bring me to an unknown destination...
But this... isn't a water current, eep!
这里的池水凉凉的，翅膀泡进去好舒爽嘤~
The water here is cool and refreshing, it feels good to dip my wings into it, eep~
…你怎么把池子抽干了？就这么想见我吗嘤？
...Why did you drain the pool? Wanted to see me that badly, eep?
看见这些石碑了吗？上面记载着英雄们的终章。哪怕我没有泪腺，读完都有些热泪盈眶……
See these stone tablets? They record the epilogues of heroes. I may not have tear ducts, but I feel my eyes wet with tears after reading them...
我的朋友，一起向赴死者致敬吧嘤。
My friend, let us pay our respects to the deceased, eep.
这~里~的~时~间~变~慢~了，我~说~话~也~变~慢~了……
Time~ slows~ down~ here, so~ I~ speak~ slower~ too~
你你你别过来嘤！哎不对，我其实没有变慢？
D—D—Don't come near me, eep! Huh, wait, I wasn't slowed?
The other side of that wall...
I wanna be a headless bug!
...Wait, what number was I on again?
We need to wait for it to reset, crrk.
Looks like there's some kind of pattern here, eep~
奇怪的装置，奇怪的虫子，似乎在进行一轮漫长的计数。
A strange device with a strange bug. Seems to be caught in an endless cycle of counting.
这座人台躲藏在广场的角落，仿佛被过往的舞台剧排除在外。
This mannequin hides in a corner of the square, as if excluded from all past stage plays.
究竟是没有能分配给它的角色，还是这场幻梦的主人不希望它沾染太多海腥？你不得而知。
Was there simply no role left to give it? Or did the dream's master will it to remain untouched by the smell of the sea? You can't tell.
衣匠沉默不语。又或者它的声音已经随海浪一同远去。
The Garmentmaker remains silent, or perhaps its voice has already been lost to the sea.
也许是被幻梦迷醉的缘故，衣匠沉默不语，又或者它的声音已经随海浪一同远去。
Perhaps intoxicated by illusory dreams, the Garmentmaker remains silent, or perhaps its voice has already been lost to the sea.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
衣匠接过记忆残晶，将它投入汹涌的洋流。
The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and casts them into the surging current.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
嗝…你好啊，贵客，没想到在这里也能遇见你。
Hic... Oh, greetings, honored guest. Never thought I'd run into you here as well.
斯缇科西亚的蜜酿果真醇厚无比——可惜我只是一台衣匠，并没有能用来进食的嘴。
The honey brew of Styxia is as rich as they say. What a shame, I'm just a Garmentmaker and wasn't built with a mouth to taste it.
这场宴席上也能看见若虫。如果你在欢庆之余仍有兴致，可以将它们带到我这里。
I spotted some nymphs at this feast too. If you still feel up for it between celebrations, you could bring them here to me.
好热闹的气氛啊…若不是这副身躯不善舞蹈，我也想到舞池中央跳上一会儿。
What a lively crowd... If this body of mine were made for dancing, I'd love to join in the middle of the floor.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
You know the rule, <color=#dbc291ff>"Memory Crystal Shards"</color>.
衣匠接过记忆残晶，将它投入汹涌的洋流。
The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and casts them into the surging current.
嗯…有位织者感慨于美景。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>宴都城门前</color>极目远眺，观看远处倒悬的彩虹呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who's moved by the beautiful view. My golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the city gates of the City of Revelry</color>, gazing at the upside-down rainbow on the horizon.
嗯…有位织者偏爱美好之物。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>藏珍甬道的</color>宝库里，欣赏琳琅的陈列呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who adores fine things. The golden thread brings tidings: They are in the vault <color=#dbc291ff>of the Passage of Treasures</color>, admiring the dazzling collection.
嗯…有位织者相当机灵。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>砸下的吊灯旁</color>，自叹身手敏捷呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who's quite nimble. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding <color=#dbc291ff>by a fallen chandelier</color>, marveling at their own reflexes.
嗯…有位织者喜好探险。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>趴在一面蓝色的墙上</color>，好奇墙的另一头有什么呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who has a taste for adventure. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>clinging to a blue wall</color>, wondering what lies beyond it.
嗯…有位织者胆子很小。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>秘密通道角落的碎罐中</color>，瑟瑟发抖呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who is terribly timid. The golden thread brings tidings: They are tucked away <color=#dbc291ff>in a broken jar in the corner of a secret passage</color>, trembling in fear.
嗯…有位织者自认为是一条鱼。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊窗外的水中</color>，学着吐泡泡呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who insists they are a fish. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding <color=#dbc291ff>in the water outside the windows of the Slumbering Palace Corridor</color>, trying to blow bubbles.
嗯…有位织者生性随和。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊的水面</color>，随波逐流呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who's very easygoing. The golden thread brings tidings: They are floating on <color=#dbc291ff>the waters of the Slumbering Palace Corridor</color>, drifting peacefully.
嗯…有位织者喜欢沉底。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊的池底</color>，享受被水淹没的感觉呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who enjoys sinking. The golden thread brings tidings: They are lying at <color=#dbc291ff>the bottom of the Slumbering Palace Corridor's pool</color>, relishing the feeling of being submerged.
嗯…有位织者胆子很小。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>沮泞烛坛的墓碑前</color>，向英雄们致敬呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is very shy. The golden thread brings tidings: They are curled up <color=#dbc291ff>before a gravestone at the Somber Altar of Candles</color>, paying tribute to fallen heroes.
嗯…有位织者生性顽皮。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>莹骨海床的边缘</color>，假装自己被减慢了呢。

Hmm... There's a Weaver who is full of mischief. The golden thread brings tidings: They are perched on <color=#dbc291ff>the edge of the Seabed of Luminous Remains</color>, pretending they've been slowed.
那就先尽情享受宴会吧。
Then enjoy the banquet to your heart's content.
别消遣我嘛，贵客——你明明已经知道一只若虫的位置了，先去把它找到吧。
Oh, don't tease me, honored guest. You already know where one of the nymphs is. Why not go fetch them first?
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
真卷啊，贵客。那么现在，我也该完成自己的工作了……
So diligent, honored guest. In that case, it's time I fulfill my part of the deal.
金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.
当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...
「让命运为你指点迷津——推石上山的若虫经历了多少次失败？」
"Let fate illuminate your path — How many times did the nymph fail to push the boulder uphill?"
这便是预言的内容…或许背后另有所指？
That is the message of the prophecy... Though perhaps, it holds a deeper meaning?
嗯…恭喜，贵客。你不需要我的帮助，也能解开预言的谜题——真是太酷了。
Well done, honored guest. You solved the riddle without any help from me. Now that's impressive.
Can you give me more hints?
「让命运为你指点迷津——推石上山的若虫经历了多少次失败？」
"Let fate illuminate your path — How many times did the nymph fail to push the boulder uphill?"
前半句指的应该是雅努斯迷津？至于这后半句…至少答案应该是一个数字。
The first part likely refers to the Janus' Maze? As for the second... well, the answer's probably a number, at least.
Have fun out there, honored guest.
昔涟已经与你一同离开哀丽秘榭，开启了由你作为救世主的第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次回归。
Cyrene has already left Aedes Elysiae with you, beginning the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th return with you as the Deliverer.
仿佛是预感到未来的你仍会回到哀丽秘榭，在启程前，昔涟在桌上悄悄地留了一封信笺——
As if she sensed you'd one day return again, she quietly left behind a letter on the table, just before you left.
「哎呀，看来你还记得我说的话嘛：故事总会有戛然而止的时候。」
"Looks like you still remember what I said: Every story has to come to an end."
「而哀丽秘榭，就是你下一段旅程的起点。等准备好了，再从这里出发吧。」
"Aedes Elysiae is where your next journey begins. When you're ready, set out from here."
「虽然当你看到这封信的时候，我或许已经离开了这座村庄……」
"By the time you read this letter, I may have already left the village..."
「但我绝不会『消失』。我们曾在哀丽秘榭共同收获的回忆会代替我，继续陪伴着你……」
"But I will never 'disappear.' The memories we shared in Aedes Elysiae will stay with you in my place..."
昔涟从海边找到的一枚缎带，看上去有些磨旧，缝埋着岁月的低语，还有少女的一句轻笑——
A ribbon Cyrene found by the sea, worn and weathered. It feels as if it was stitched together by the whispers of time and the soft laughter of a young girl—
「还记得我们玩捉迷藏的时候，我曾问过你：假如有一天，身边的人突然消失了，我们该怎么做呢？」
"Do you remember? When we were playing hide-and-seek, I once asked you: What would we do if one day the people around us suddenly vanished?"
「那时我没来得及和你分享，我心中的答案……」
"I never got the chance to tell you the answer inside my heart..."
「怀揣关乎身边重要之人的珍贵回忆，坚定地向前迈进，直到再度相会时，听到一句久违的问好♪」
"Cherish memories of those dear, and press ever forward. Someday, when we meet again, may it begin with a long-awaited hello. ♪"
迷！迷迷！绿球菜们，争点气迷！
Mem! Mem, mem! Come on, greenie cabbage, let's show some spirit, mem!
多喝露水，多晒阳光，长出翠绿脆嫩的叶片、结实饱满的菜心，不要被隔壁菜地的绿球菜比下去迷！
Soak up that dew. Soak up that sun. Grow crisp, green leaves and strong, plump hearts. Don't let the greenie cabbage next door outshine you, mem!
是啊，必须让绿球菜们加把劲才行迷。
Yeah, we've got to get those greenie cabbage to give it their all, mem.
The cabbages are in the hot seat now.
我给它们加油鼓劲，是有原因的迷！
There's a reason I'm cheering them on, mem!
自从餐馆开张，果蔬谷物都供不应求了迷。绿球菜的价格，也迷地一下升高了不少！
Ever since the restaurant opened, demand for fruits, veggies, and grains has been sky-high, mem. Even the price of greenie cabbage has shot up like crazy!
嘿嘿…等绿球菜大丰收，我就能大赚一笔，天天去餐馆吃饭了迷~
Hehe... once the greenie cabbage harvest comes in strong, I'll be rolling in money and dining out every day, mem~
不过，那位采购商人精明又挑剔，从来只要品质最好的绿球菜。
But that merchant who buys? Sharp as a tack and super picky. Only the finest greenie cabbage makes the cut.
所以绿球菜们，加把劲，一定要被选中迷——想象自己在餐盘上，用脆生生的绿叶衬托菜肴…那是多么幸福的情景！
So come on, greenie cabbage, step it up and get picked! Picture yourselves on a plate, your bright green leaves making the main dish shine... What a glorious sight that would be!
到时候，我也会天天来看你们的迷！
And when that day comes, I'll drop by to see you every single day, mem!
站在你面前的，是妖精餐馆的终身会员——啦嘻嘻迷！
Standing before you now is a lifetime member of The Fairy Restaurant — Latitimem!
我没什么别的爱好，就是爱花钱，尤其是给中意的东西花钱。
I don't have many hobbies, but I do love spending money, especially on things I adore.
本来我想买下整个餐馆，可被那个看起来凶巴巴的餐馆主管直接回绝了。
At first, I wanted to buy the entire restaurant, but that fierce-looking restaurant supervisor shut me down instantly.
没办法，只好退而求其次，先办个终身会员了迷。
No luck, so I settled for a lifetime membership to the restaurant, mem.
可我还是想不通…怎么会有人面对十五颗半鹅卵石的高价，还能无动于衷迷？
But I still can't figure it out... How could anyone stay unmoved by a price as steep as fifteen and a half cobbles, mem?
What's your take on the new restaurant?
呵呵…贵客，哦不，应该叫你店长才对。最近生意还红火吗？
Hehe... My distinguished guest, oh no, I should call you manager. How's business these days? Still booming?
自我记事以来，这片密林还未如此繁荣过。
In all my memory, this forest has never been so full of life.
远远眺望餐馆的招牌，听着热火朝天的喧闹，看着原本漫无目的的妖精们找到了热衷之事…就像迷路迷境从悠长的熟睡中醒转过来了哪。

I can see the restaurant's plaque from a distance, hear the cheerful noise, and watch fairies who used to drift about aimlessly now find their passion... It's as if the Membrance Maze has finally awakened from a long slumber.
我知道，经营餐馆并不容易。可别太过辛劳哦，店长。
I know running a restaurant is no easy feat. Don't push yourself too hard, manager.
迷，白芋芋切块细致，大小均匀，火候掌握纯熟，摆盘也一丝不苟，勾芡食材的酱汁调和到了最佳比例……
Mem, the white taro is sliced with precision, every piece even in size, perfectly cooked, and plated with great care. The sauce tying everything together is blended to an ideal ratio...
看来这次是那位更谨慎的主厨掌勺迷。
Looks like it's the more cautious chef handling the kitchen this time, mem.
是啊，可不要小瞧我的舌头。即便是同一盘菜肴，在不同主厨手中，口味也会完全不同迷！
Of course. Never underestimate my tongue. Even the same dish can taste completely different depending on who's behind the stove, mem!
至于另一位主厨…他刀法果断强硬，常常用大火翻炒，看来是听凭手感、信任直觉的豪放型厨师迷。

As for the other chef... his knife work is sharp and decisive, and he loves stir-frying over high heat. He seems like the type who cooks with instinct, guided by feel alone. A bold and free-spirited chef, mem.
你更喜欢他们哪一位呢？
迷迷…谨慎的主厨周全地考虑着方方面面，菜肴有种暖洋洋的感觉。豪放的主厨虽然手法相对粗糙，但也时常能带来惊喜……

Mem... The cautious chef considers every detail, and his dishes have a warm, comforting quality. The free-spirited one might be rough around the edges, but he brings surprises that leave a lasting impression...
It's so hard to choose, mem!
迷…想我当年在外闯荡的时候，尝过比妖精耳朵还长的面包。一口咬下去，浓浓的谷香就像住进了嘴巴一样，好几天都不会散去迷。

Mem... back in my adventuring days, I once tasted a loaf of bread longer than a fairy's ear. The moment I bit into it, the rich scent of grain seemed to take up residence in my mouth and refused to leave for days, mem.
总觉得你们餐馆的菜肴，和当年我尝到的味道比还差些火候，究竟差在哪里了迷？
Somehow, I still feel that the dishes from your restaurant fall just a little short of that flavor I remember. What exactly is missing, mem?
也可能，是我的心已经不复年轻了迷……
Or maybe... it's just that my heart is no longer as young as it used to be, mem...
都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!
是店长迷，您需要来点什么吗？
Oh, manager, mem. What can I get for you?
Just dropping by to see how everyone's doing.
Has work been going well lately?
谢谢店长关心迷！能成为餐馆的服务员，每天端着热乎乎的菜肴，吃不限量的员工餐，是我从小的梦想迷。
Thank you for asking, manager, mem. Being a server here, carrying piping-hot dishes and enjoying unlimited staff meals every day, has been my dream since I was little, mem.
虽然真的当上服务员才发现，餐馆总是经营到很晚，一天下来脸都笑僵了，员工餐也常常忙得没空吃……
Though after actually becoming a server, I realized the restaurant stays open really late. By the end of each day, my smile feels frozen in place, and I'm often too busy to even eat the staff meal...
但把香喷喷的菜肴端到顾客面前，看着它们露出笑容，不知为什么，就脸也不酸了，肚子也不饿了，辛苦也都不算数了迷！
But when I bring a delicious dish to a customer and see them smile, somehow my face doesn't feel sore anymore, my stomach stops growling, and all the exhaustion just fades away, mem!
唔，店长，有顾客来了，我该去招呼招呼了迷。
Um, manager, a guest just arrived. I should go greet them, mem.
都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!
哦，是店长啊。请站远一些， 汤汁溅到你身上就不好了迷。
Oh, manager, it's you. Please don't stand too close. I wouldn't want soup to splash on you, mem.
真抱歉，这里有些杂乱。这阵子顾客越来越多， 生意也越来越红火，真有点抽不开手了迷。
Apologies for the mess. Things have gotten a bit hectic lately. More customers are coming in, and business has really picked up. It's hard to find a spare moment, mem.
店长哪里的话，看着生意变好，我心里也好高兴迷！
Not at all, manager. Watching the restaurant thrive makes me truly happy, mem!
更何况，跟着店里的主厨打下手，我也学到了不少东西迷。
And working with the chefs has taught me so much, mem.
真希望有朝一日，我也能和他们一样独当一面啊！
I really hope that one day, I can hold my own just like they do!
Your name is a bit unusual...
这个名字是我为自己起的，取自妖精中流传的一个传说迷。
I chose it myself. It comes from a legend among the fairies, mem.
传说有一种流淌在树干上的甜浆，像黄金一样金黄，像琥珀一样剔透，比迷境里任何果子都还要香甜，是代表着「永恒」的梦幻佳肴——
They say there's a kind of sweet syrup that flows along tree trunks. It's yellow like gold, clear like amber, and sweeter than any fruit in the Maze. A dreamlike delicacy that symbolizes eternity—
没错，那就是「哈基蜜」！在外面的世界，它似乎也被叫做「蜂蜜」。
That's right, that's "Hachimead." In the outside world, I think they call it "honey."
为了时刻提醒自己寻觅它的使命，我就以它为名了。是不是很好听迷？
To keep my mission of finding it close to heart, I took its name as my own. It sounds lovely, doesn't it, mem?
Keep it up. I won't bother you any longer.
店长不要这么客气，这是我哈基迷身为厨师应该做的迷！
No need to be so polite, manager. This is what I, Hachimem, am meant to do as a chef, mem!
迷！你好好擦桌子，等把手脚练得麻利些，我就安排你去端菜迷！
Mem, keep wiping those tables. Once your hands move fast enough, I'll have you serving dishes next, mem!
迷迷！你好好端菜，多揣摩揣摩顾客的喜好，等时机成熟，我就会安排你去当主厨迷！
Mem! Carry those dishes with care. Learn what the customers like. Once the time comes, I'll make you head chef, mem!
迷迷迷！你好好炒菜，等整家餐馆都离不开你的手艺，店长的位置就非你莫属了迷！
Mememe! Cook with heart. Once the whole restaurant depends on your cooking, the manager's seat will be yours, mem!
迷？！店长，你、你怎么也在迷！
Mem!? Manager, wh—why are you here, mem!
你、你的话…到时候当然早就已经荣升董事长了迷！
Y—You... by then, you'll have been promoted to chairman already, mem!
在餐馆庆祝真开心，真想每天都能过生日迷！
It feels so great to celebrate at the restaurant. I wish every day could be my birthday, mem!
有生日折扣，有惊喜点心，甚至员工还会围到桌子前，为我唱生日歌…听得我眼睛湿湿的。这才是过生日该有的样子迷！
There were birthday discounts, surprise desserts, and even the staff gathering around to sing to me... It made my eyes go all misty. That's what a real birthday should be like, mem!
服务员，给每桌都添壶水。就说是我请的迷！
Server, bring a pot of water to every table. Tell them it's my treat, mem!
为什么会这样呢…第一次抢到了优惠券，有了学生才能享受的六点九折折扣。两件快乐的事情交织在一起，本该给我带来更大的优惠。

Why did it turn out like this... It was my first time getting a coupon, and I also had a <unbreak>31%</unbreak> student discount. Two happy things overlapping should have given me an even better deal.
我本应获得梦幻般的用餐时间才对。但是，为什么，会变成这样呢……
I should've had a magical dining experience. But why... why did it end up like this...
为什么两种优惠不能叠加起来用迷……
Why can't I stack both discounts, mem...
大家好迷姆迷姆~这里是哆徕徕迷~
Hi everyone, mem-mem~ This is Doreremem~
妖精们，听说这家餐馆的菜肴味道正宗、价格实惠，分量特别大，能让妖精肚子瘪瘪地进来，肚皮鼓鼓地出去迷！
Fairies, word is the dishes here are full of flavor, budget-friendly, and served in huge portions. You'll come in with a flat belly and leave with a full one, mem!
迷境里的传闻究竟是真是假？神秘餐馆崛起背后的真相究竟如何？
Are the whispers from the Maze true or false? What's the real story behind this rising culinary mystery?
——请关注下期树叶小报的哆徕徕迷美食探访专栏评测迷！
—Tune in next episode on Leaflet News for Doreremem's food exploration review column, mem!
呵呵…你们在吃沙拉，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
Hehe... you're eating salad, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.
沙拉直接用叉子吃实在太过粗鲁。应该用菜叶卷起红酸果，一起送入口中迷。
Eating salad just with a fork is way too crude. Wrap the redsour fruit in leafy greens and savor them together, mem.
红酸果在齿间绽开时溢出的酸涩，融合绿球菜的清甜。仿佛清晨的第一滴露水在你的舌尖跃动，生机勃勃的绿意，由此开始在你的心里蔓延……

As the redsour fruit bursts between your teeth and melds with the greenie cabbage's sweet freshness, it feels like the first drop of morning dew dancing on your tongue. That vibrant green vitality begins to spread through your heart...
呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.
呵呵…你们在吃烤饼，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
Hehe... you're eating pancakes, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.
将菜肴的香气封存进谷物之中，这天才般的想法，是迷路迷境何等的恩赐迷！
Locking a dish's aroma inside grains, what a genius idea! Truly a gift from the Membrance Maze, mem!
一口一口品尝会破坏精心营造的神秘感。迷地一口把烤饼全吞下去，在咀嚼中揭晓真相，才是正确的品尝方式迷！
Nibbling bit by bit ruins the carefully woven mystique. The right way is to eat the entire pancake in one go, and let each chew reveal the truth, mem!
呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.
呵呵…你们在吃肉食，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
Hehe... you're eating meat, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.
让尖酸果汁流过肉的表面只是徒劳，将它滴入肉的纹理之间，才是品尝美味的奥义。
Letting the tangy fruit juice run over the meat's surface does nothing. Only when it seeps into the fibers of the meat can the true flavor be unlocked.
如此一来，仿佛溪流淌过干涸的河床，清泉填补每一个缝隙，每一口咀嚼，都能尝到肉经过提鲜后的滑嫩鲜香迷……
Just like a stream trickling through a dry riverbed, fresh spring water fills every crevice. With each bite, the tenderness and rich aroma of the meat unfold in full, mem...
呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.
呵呵…你们在吃南瓜，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
Hehe... you're eating pumpkins, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.
起初，南瓜有着坚硬的外壳；但当你打开它，就能发现它的心灵竟是如此柔软。
At first, the pumpkin wears a hard shell. However, once opened, you discover a heart that's soft and tender.
经过一番缠绵的炖煮，南瓜与汤汁的边界模糊了，肉的鲜香和南瓜的醇香交织了…世间的一切善与恶、真与假，都仿佛在锅中混融为一……

After a slow and gentle simmer, the lines between pumpkin and broth begin to fade. The savory depth of meat and the mellow sweetness of pumpkin intertwine... In that pot, all the world's good and evil, truth and lies, seem to fuse as one...
呵呵，被认出来了吗？果然像我这样的美食家，在哪里都不能保持低调迷。
Hehe, have I been found out? As expected, someone like me, a true gourmet, can never go unnoticed, mem.
希望那些美食奥秘，能为餐桌前的你带来些许启迪的灵光迷。
May these culinary insights spark a little inspiration at your table, mem.
哈！叽里咕噜地说一大堆，不都是想劝我放弃。我偏不！
Ha! All that blah blah blah, you're just trying to make me give up. Well, guess what? Not happening!
什么「性价比」，什么「商业价值」，都是开公司要考虑的事，和我有什么关系？
Who cares about cost-effectiveness and commercial value? That's all IPC business stuff! What's it got to do with me?
路过的！你来说说——游戏想要好玩，最重要的东西是什么？
Hey, passerby! Tell me. What's the most important thing that makes a game fun?
哼，不懂了吧？优秀设计只是表象，你还没看到最核心的东西。
Hah, you don't get it, do you? Great design is just the surface. You haven't even seen the real core of it yet.
哼，不懂了吧？游戏是用来玩的，光是好看还远远不够。
Hah, you don't get it, do you? Games are meant to be played. Looking pretty alone just doesn't cut it.
哼，不懂了吧？钱就像是愿力，人人都有，但头脑之间亦有差距，以为有钱就什么都能办到，可大错特错了！
Hah, you don't get it, do you? Money is just like Wishpower: Everyone's got it, but there's a gap between minds. If you think having money means you can do anything, you're dead wrong!
Hold on, who said you get to test me?
哼，用问题来回答问题，现在的年轻人以为靠这个办法能让自己显得更聪明，殊不知，恰恰暴露了自己的无知！
Hmph, answering questions with questions... Young people these days think it makes them look smarter, when in fact, it only exposes their ignorance!
算了，就让我——本游戏制作仙人——来告诉你其中的诀窍。
Well then, let me, the divine sage of game developers, reveal the secret to you.
比巧妙的设计更根本，比华丽的美术更有吸引力，比鼓胀的钱包更能鼓舞人心，那就是「爱」啊！没有爱，是做不出来的！
More fundamental than clever design, more captivating than gorgeous art, more inspiring than a fat wallet... That's LOVE! Without love, it simply can't be done!
明白了？明白了就快来看看我做的游戏。嘿，保准叫你惊叹不已！
Got it? Now come check out the game I made. Hey, I guarantee it'll blow your mind!
老人颤巍巍地从口袋里掏出两架像素飞机，如至宝般捧到你的跟前。
With trembling hands, the old man pulls out two pixel planes from his pocket, holding them out to you as if they were precious treasures.
「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」，最均衡的机体！各项数据都很优秀，擦弹判定宽松，绝招是超广范围结界，安定性高，适合任何玩家使用！我给它的评级是…「凶级」！

{RUBY_B#red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#}, the most balanced mech out there! Excellent stats across the board, forgiving graze hitbox, and its special move is a super-wide barrier. High stability makes it perfect for any player! My rating for this bad boy is... "Evil tier"!
「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」，飞机中的战斗机！火力超强，威力超大，还有能让伤害倍增的绝技！缺点是移动慢，但在绝对的破坏力面前，这又算得了什么？

{RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}, the fighter among planes! With devastating firepower, massive damage output, and a special skill that multiplies damage! Sure, it moves slow, but who cares about that when you've got absolute destructive power?
它的评级也是「凶」！顺便，还从未有「狂」及以上的机体出现过！
Its rating is also "Evil"! By the way, there's never been a mech rated "Crazy" or above!
看你的反应，肯定很想玩吧？别骗自己，毕竟是旷世神作，正常人看到绝对都会被吸引的。
Judging by your reaction, you're dying to play it, aren't you? Don't lie to yourself, this is a masterpiece for the ages, after all. Anyone in their right mind would be drawn to it.
直接给我玩玩不就行了么？
Why not just let me play it?
哈，按捺不住内心的冲动了吧？能理解，毕竟是旷世神作，正常人看到绝对都会被吸引的。
Hah, can't contain your excitement anymore, can you? I get it, this is a masterpiece for the ages, after all. Anyone in their right mind would be drawn to it.
但是，我最喜欢做的事，就是对那些感兴趣的人说——「我拒绝」！
But you know what I love doing most? Telling interested people: "I refuse!"
我费尽心血、呕心沥血的作品，凭什么给别人指指点点？出再大的价钱都不行！
My blood, sweat, and tears went into this work. Who are they to criticize it? No amount of money in the world could make me budge!
Fine, if you won't let me play, I'm outta here.
你不只是仙人，更是神人。
You're not just a sage. You're a real piece of work.
等等，我没说不给你玩啊。看你打扮特立独行，和我中意的漫画角色有几分神似，必是游戏奇才。想玩对吧，帮我个忙就成。

Hold up, I didn't say you couldn't play. Looking at your unique appearance, I was reminded of a character from my favorite comic. You must be a gaming prodigy. You want to play, right? Just do me a favor first.
实不相瞒，我打算收徒，喊了几个人来面试。待会帮我看看，他们是不是有资质。
To be honest, I'm planning to take on some disciples. I've called a few people in for interviews. Help me check if they've got what it takes.
我这稀世罕有的手艺，要是传错了人可就糟糕了。
It would be a disaster if my one-of-a-kind skills fell into the wrong hands.
Fine, I'll do it if I have time.
Talking to you is such a chore...
我们约在游戏中心的门前见面。你要是闲得慌，就来看看。
Let's meet up in front of the arcade. If you've got time to kill, come check it out.
对了，还有个问题，我逢人必问的，你也给我老实回答——「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」和「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」，更喜欢哪个？

Oh right, one more question. I ask this to everyone I meet, so give me an honest answer: Between {RUBY_B#red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}, which one do you like better?
If you won't let me play, I won't tell you.
哼，我就知道，果然不该指望外行人能懂。你走吧，但别忘了我交代的事！
Hmph, just as I thought. Can't expect an outsider to understand. You can go now, but don't forget what I told you!
跟我念——不要因为喜欢8-bit游戏而感到羞愧！我就是我，我就是游戏制作仙人！
Say it with me: Never be ashamed of loving 8-bit games! I am who I am, the divine sage of game dev!
来到约定地点时，你意外撞见了一幕极为喜感的画面——
When you arrive at the meeting spot, you stumble upon an absolutely comical scene.
<size=28>我不会因为喜欢8-bit游戏而感到羞愧！我要做游戏制作仙人！</size>
<size=28>I won't be ashamed of loving 8-bit games! I'm gonna be a divine sage of game dev!</size>
啧，再用点力！没气势怎么做游戏？你们有为游戏开发事业赌上一切的觉悟吗？！
Tsk, put some more effort into it! How can you make games without passion? Are you truly ready to put everything on the line for game development!?
算了算了，时间有限，直接来面试吧。就从你开始，你为什么想做游戏？
Alright, alright, time's short, let's get straight to the interview. Starting with you: Why do you want to make games?
我、我不知道呀。朋友说独立游戏制作人在网上很受欢迎，我就过来了。
I—I don't know. My friend said indie game developers are popular online, so I came here.
话说…旁边那两个在飞的，是你的幻造种？为什么打了马赛克？
By the way... those two flying things next to you, are they your imagenae? Why are they mosaicked?
啊，我知道了！一定是你在创造它们的时候，脑子里尽想些见不得人的东西，所以被自动屏蔽了！这就对了，嗯，都说相由心生嘛！
Ah, I get it! You must've had some naughty thoughts while creating them, so they were automatically censored! That makes sense. After all, your creations reflect what's in your mind!
你…你…不仅侮辱我的品格，还敢侮辱我的作品！快滚，别让我再见到你！
Y—You... you... not only insulted my character, but you dare insult my work! Get out, and don't let me see you again!
什么嘛，粉丝没几个，架子还真不小。这游戏制作人，我还不想当呢。
Geez, barely any fans but such a big ego. I don't even want to be the game producer anyway.
哼，连像素风都认不出，真是一代不如一代了。不和她多纠缠，你又是为什么？
Hmph, can't even recognize pixel art, kids these days are getting worse and worse. Forget about her, what about you?
我、我憧憬成为魔法少女！想要超强的火力，这样才能保护世界，交到朋友！
I—I dream of becoming a magical girl! I want overwhelming firepower so I can protect the world and make friends!
噢！我喜欢这个理由，我们肯定看过同一部动画！魔法少女，身边没几个仆从跟着怎么能行？很好，我认可你的梦想了！
Oh! I love that reason. We must have watched the same cartoon! What's a magical girl without a few servants by her side? Nice, I totally approve of your dream!
你们就是异父异母的兄弟。
You two are brothers from different parents.
噢！师父，我们赶快开始特训吧。我已经做好守护世界的准备了！
Oh! Master, let's start the special training right away. I'm ready to protect the world!
不错。以你的资质和热情，我保你十年出师，二十年获得最强称号。
Not bad. With your talent and passion, I guarantee you'll master it in ten years, and in twenty years you'll earn the certified title of the strongest.
那我什么时候才能成为魔法少女？
So when can I become a magical girl?
按经验推算，至少在获得头衔后十年吧。等等…你不是个男高中生吗？
Based on my experience, it would take at least ten years after getting the title. Wait... aren't you just a high school boy?
你做的游戏里，我没法随便按自己的意愿变身吗？
In your game, I can't just transform whenever I want?
不能。这个游戏里只有飞机，很多颜色的飞机。
Nope. This game only has planes. Lots of colorful planes.
没意思，看来这个办法也行不通呢。那再见啦，祝你们好运！
Boring, looks like this method won't work either. Well, catch you later. Good luck to you all!
哼，要么完全不懂，要么成天做梦，这种人怎么做得好游戏？我失望至极！
Hmph, either they're completely clueless or they've got their head in the clouds all day. How could someone like that make a decent game? I'm utterly disappointed!
不管那么多，现场不是还有个候选者么。你站到了最后，想必是真对游戏感兴趣吧？
Never mind all that, we still have a candidate right here. You stayed till the end, so you must be genuinely interested in the game, right?
我、我只是在发传单而已…店里有很多可爱的孩子，有兴趣来看看吗？
I—I'm just handing out flyers... There are lots of cute kids at the shop, would you like to come take a look?
大家玩游戏都很厉害，也看过许多老动画，知识丰富，肯定能陪您聊得开心！
Everyone here is great at gaming and has watched lots of classic cartoon. With such a wealth of knowledge, they'll definitely have a blast chatting with you!
我、我…办完正事就来光顾……
I—I'll... come by after I finish my business...
唉。我这稀世罕有的手艺，难道真要后继无人了吗？
*sigh* Will my rare and precious craftsmanship really die with me?
What's the big deal? It's just two little planes.
哼，你不懂，这可是我毕生愿力的结晶，怎么能随便糟蹋？我得替它找个好去处。
Hmph, you don't get it. This is the crystallization of my life's Wishpower. How could I let it go to waste? I need to find it a proper home.
不错，不错。从这位先生的言行中，确实能感受到满腹的才华。
Not bad, not bad at all. From this gentleman's words and actions, I can truly sense his abundant talent.
哦哦？你看起来呆呆的，眼神倒是不错！说话挺上道，正好我在收徒，要试试么？
Oh? You look a bit spacey, but there's something in those eyes! I like how you talk. Actually, I'm taking disciples right now. Wanna give it a shot?
哈，我是星际和平公司创意小组的负责人，日常职责便是在街头挖掘有潜力的艺人，看你言行如此奇特，想必是位难得一见的才子。
Ha! I'm the head of IPC's Creative Talent Division. My daily job is scouting potential artists on the streets, and seeing how... peculiar your behavior is, you must be quite the rare talent!
有兴趣加入公司吗？当然，是带着你的作品一起。
Interested in joining the IPC? With your work, of course.
啊？招安是吧？我呸！谁不知道被公司收购后是什么下场，想让我的游戏变成你们的摇钱树，休想！滚滚滚，跟那些噗噜说去吧。

Huh? Trying to buy me over? In your dreams! Everyone knows what happens after being bought by the IPC. You want to turn my game into your cash cow? Nice try! Get lost! Go tell that to those ploos instead!
还有闲心在这里嘴硬？那我问你，为什么急着收徒，不就是因为你自身的愿力，已经没法支持创作了么？
Still being stubborn here? Let me ask you this. Why are you in such a rush to take on disciples? Isn't it because your own Wishpower can't sustain your creative work anymore?
你、你胡说！我精神好着呢，通宵画图都不带心梗的！
N—Nonsense! I'm perfectly fine. I can pull all-nighters drawing without even risking a heart attack!
骗骗自己可以，别把旁边的这位{F#小姐}{M#小哥}也骗到了就行。要是你的愿力真那么充足，这俩小飞机早成了大妖怪，至于像这样摇摇欲坠的么？

You can fool yourself all you want, but don't drag this {F#miss}{M#mister} here into your delusions. If you really had that much Wishpower, these two little planes would've turned into mighty strangelings by now. Not barely staying afloat like this!
厉害的游戏我见多了，可简陋成这样，根本跑不起来的，哈，还是第一次见！
I've seen plenty of impressive games, but one this meager that can't even run? Ha, that's a first!
我会开出一个你无法拒绝的条件。很多事嘴上说说就得了，当真了，对谁都没好处。
I'll make you an offer you can't refuse. Some things are better left as empty talk. Taking them too seriously won't do anyone any good.
Is that right, old sage of gaming?
别做仙人了，成为人类吧。
Stop trying to be a sage, just be human.
不要答应，这是资本做的局！
Don't fall for it, it's a capitalist trap!
那…你们会收购我的游戏吗，包括全部设定集、没完成的原画，还有废稿……
So... would you buy my game, including all the setting materials, unfinished key animations, and even the rejected drafts...
没问题。只要它们有足够商业价值的话。
No problem. As long as they have enough commercial value.
差点忘了。还有个事要你做，我不需要红色的飞机，改成白色吧。白色是大人气主播火花的应援色，肯定比其余颜色要卖得好。

Oh, almost forgot. There's one more thing I need you to do. I don't need the red plane anymore, change it to white. White is the fandom color for the popular streamer Sparxie, so it'll definitely sell better than other colors.
啊？但你不是才说，会收购我的全部游戏么？
Huh? But didn't you just say you'd buy every part of my game?
按需求进行修改，不就是开发者的工作吗？换个皮而已，对你来说应该很轻松吧？
Making changes based on requirements, isn't that what developers do? It's just a change of appearance, should be a piece of cake for you, right?
别叽里咕噜地说废话了，卖还是不卖，给个准信。
Cut the chatter and give me a straight answer. Are you selling or not?
决定前，我想…最后试飞一次。
Before I decide, I want to... take one last test flight.
搞创作的就是事多。行吧。别拖太久，我还赶着去看火花直播。
That's the problem with you creative types. Fine, whatever. Just don't take too long, I've got Sparxie's stream to catch.
你…对，你不是早就说想玩我的游戏么。最后这次机会，就让给你了。
You... yeah, you've been saying you wanted to play my game for a while now. Here's your last chance, I'm giving it to you.
<color=#dbc291ff>亲手摧毁自己的作品总是很残忍，替我做出选择吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It's always too cruel to destroy your own creation. Please make the choice for me.</color>
好了。红色飞机都被打坏了，倒也省了换色的麻烦。你该想好了吧？
Alright. The red plane has been wrecked, saves us the trouble of repainting it anyway. Have you made up your mind?
拿去吧。你说得对，我的梦想不过是随便借个名字，用愿力信手画出来的涂鸦。
Take it. You're right, my dream was just a borrowed name, a doodle sketched with Wishpower on a whim.
但公司的财力，足以使这个美梦成真，成为玩家能玩到的、真正的游戏。
But the IPC has the financial power to turn this dream into reality, making it a real game that players can actually experience.
知道就好。走吧，我带你去办产权转移手续。往后，这可就是我们的创意了。
Good that you understand. Let's go, I'll help you with the property transfer paperwork. From now on, this will be our creation.
那边的{F#小姐}{M#小哥}，也谢谢你了。
That {F#miss}{M#mister} over there, thanks to you too.
喂喂，你在做什么？！不是说了要白色飞机么，白色！打坏了还怎么卖啊？
Hey hey, what are you doing!? Didn't I say we need white planes? WHITE! How are we supposed to sell them if they're damaged!?
哈。干得漂亮！高高在上是吧，叫我做换皮游戏是吧，那就别怪我们掀桌子了！
Ha! Well played! Acting all high and mighty, huh? Telling us to rebrand the game, huh? Don't blame us when we flip the table then!
但你的行为不会给公司带来任何损失，顶多是浪费我的时间。出于报复心而毁掉自己的作品，真的值得吗？
But your actions won't cause any harm to the IPC. At most, you're just wasting my time. Is it really worth destroying your own work, just for the sake of revenge?
什么值不值？那是你们商人的想法。做游戏，最重要的就是开心。
Worth? That's just how you merchants think. When it comes to making games, the most important thing is to make myself happy.
现在我开心了，看到你不开心，我变得更开心了，还有什么比这更值得的？
Now I'm happy, and seeing you unhappy makes me even happier. What could be more worthwhile than that?
我就是我！我是——游戏制作仙人！
I am who I am! The divine sage of game dev!
嗯。这游戏看起来还有点意思，就这么埋没掉可惜了，顺手帮个忙吧。
Hmm. This game looks kinda interesting. Would be a shame to let it go to waste. Might as well lend a hand.
加点炫酷特效，再补个激烈的对战画面，视频上传…搞定。
Add some cool effects, throw in an intense battle scene, upload the video... Done.
你可得认真点做，发售后，也给我玩玩吧。
You better take this seriously. After it's released, let me play it too.
哈？你就这么直接回来了，我交代你做的事呢？
Huh? You just came back like that? What about the task I gave you?
别推卸责任，你自己决定吧。
Don't shirk the responsibility. Make your own decision.
哼。倒还挺会说的。是啊，这是我该做的选择，和任何人都没有关系。
Hmph. You've got a way with words. Yeah, this is my choice to make, and it's nobody else's business.
红白两色的小飞机沿着喧闹的街道渐行渐远，越飞越高，直至消失在视野的尽头。
The red and white planes glided along the bustling street, climbing higher and higher until they vanished into the distant horizon.
说到底，游戏就是游戏。既不是某人的作品，更不是商品。<color=#dbc291ff>飞机，必须能自由地飞才行啊。</color>
At the end of the day, a game is just a game. It's not someone's masterpiece, let alone a commodity. <color=#dbc291ff>A plane needs to fly free, that's what it's meant to do.</color>
无聊。飞得再好，得有人看见才行。没有愿力支持，再完美的设计也是白搭。
Boring. No point in being a great pilot if no one's there to see it. Without Wishpower to back it up, even the most perfect design is useless.
这就是二相乐园的生存法则。谁都逃不掉。浪费我的时间，走了。
That's just how things work in Planarcadia. No one can escape it. You're wasting my time, I'm out of here.
…会有人看见的。会有人喜欢的。
...Someone will see it. Someone will like it.
<size=28>「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」和「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」——你们一定要幸福啊！</size>
<size=28>{RUBY_B#Red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}! May you both find happiness!</size>
It's just two planes, what's the big deal?
哼，你不懂。小飞机？游戏？那可是我回不去的青春！
Hmph, you don't get it. Toy planes? Games? Those were the good old days I can never return to!
不过，谢谢你啊。最终，没有打碎它们。
Thank you anyway, for not breaking them in the end.
嗯。这游戏看起来还有点意思，就这么埋没掉可惜了，顺手帮个忙吧。
Hmm. This game looks kinda interesting. Would be a shame to let it go to waste. Might as well lend a hand.
加点炫酷特效，再补个激烈的对战画面，视频上传…搞定。
Add some cool effects, throw in an intense battle scene, upload the video... Done.
你可得认真点做，发售后，也给我玩玩吧。
You better take this seriously. After it's released, let me play it too.
「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」和「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」，你会选哪个？
Which would you choose? {RUBY_B#red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#} or the {RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}?
最后的这次试玩机会，就让给你了啊。你…对，就是你，替我做出选择吧。
I'll let you have the last chance to test it out. You... Yes, you. Make the decision for me.
「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」和「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」，你会选哪个？
Which would you choose? {RUBY_B#red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#} or the {RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}?
嗯，那就好好想吧。我已经没有指手画脚的权力了。
Yeah, think over it carefully. I don't have the right to criticize you anymore.
... I don't want to break either one.
红色飞机是不需要的，只保留白色就好。对，那可是火花的应援色啊。
No need for the red plane, just keep the white one. Yeah, that's Sparxie's fandom color.
有什么好犹豫的。公司只需要白色，这个好卖钱，就这么简单。啧，想不通吗？
What's there to hesitate over? The IPC only needs the white one. It's lucrative, as simple as that. Tch, don't you get it?
... I don't want to break either one.
准点打卡，免费食堂，从不加班，年假拉满。嗨，做游戏哪有为公司卖命强啊！
Clock in on time, free food, no overtime, and plenty of annual leaves. Ah, I'm better off working for the IPC than making games!
诶诶，你来了。我打听个事啊——你有在市面上看到我做的游戏吗？
Oh, you're here. Let me ask you, have you ever seen the game I made in the market?
There are too many games out there, I can't remember.
行吧。多的我也不问。有人负责发行那些杂事，我只管拿提成的那份就好。
Alright then, I won't ask for details. Someone else is distributing those things. I'll just take the commission.
——不要因为喜欢8-bit游戏而感到羞愧！我就是我，我就是游戏制作仙人！
Never be ashamed of loving 8-bit games! I am who I am, the divine sage of game dev!
哎，喊了老半天，也没来几个人。这个徒，还收不收得到了？疾锋龙列车终会到站，那我呢，我的游戏呢？

*sigh* Barely anyone came, despite all that shouting. Will I really be able to recruit a disciple? The Bullet Wyrm Express will eventually reach its destination. But, what about me? What about my game?
啊啊…不管！活到老，做到老！要是没人来，我就自个儿做！
Ah, whatever! I'm going to devote the rest of my life to this! If no one comes, I'll do it myself!
你看，捡到的这两架飞机模样好奇怪，旧旧的，丑丑的，早就没人喜欢这种款式了。
Look, these two airplane models I picked up look so strange. They're old and ugly, nobody likes this sort of design anymore.
那你为什么一直带着它，像是宝物那样呢？
Then why do you carry them with you, as if they're some sort of treasure?
Wanna learn? I can teach you.
别磨磨蹭蹭的，走，我带你去办产权转移手续。往后，这可就是我们的创意了。
Stop dawdling, come on, I'll help you with the property transfer paperwork. From now on, this will be our creation.
啧，这么着急干什么，我又不反悔。最后，让我再和这些残骸多呆会吧。
Tsk, what's the rush? I'm not going back on my word. Just... let me stay with these wreckage a little longer.
你是做游戏把脑子做坏了？这两架飞机可是幻造种，地上干干净净的，哪来的残骸？
Did all that game development fry your brain? Those two planes are imagenae, and the ground is spotless. What wreckage are you talking about?
哼，你是真不懂。那个…是我梦想的残骸啊！
Hmph, you really don't get it. That... that's the wreckage of my dreams!
做游戏啊，最重要的就是开心。
When it comes to making games, having fun is what matters most.
哪怕飞机被打坏了，但只要我还在，我的独立精神还在！就总能重新做出来。
Even if the aircraft gets wrecked, as long as I'm still here, my independent spirit lives on! I can always build it again.
但现在我很开心，看到那个公司组长不开心，我更开心了，还有什么比这值得的？
But now I'm happy, and seeing that IPC supervisor unhappy makes me even happier. What could be more worthwhile than that?
我就是我！我是——游戏制作仙人！
I am who I am! The divine sage of game dev!
<size=28>「{RUBY_B#红色飞机}梦灵号{RUBY_E#}」和「{RUBY_B#白色飞机}理魔号{RUBY_E#}」——你们一定要幸福啊！</size>
<size=28>{RUBY_B#Red plane}The Dreamsoul{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#white plane}The Demonic Wit{RUBY_E#}! May you both find happiness!</size>
我会为你们，还有这个不讲道理的世界，献上我全部的爱和祝福！自由地飞吧！
I'll give all my love and blessings to you and this unreasonable world! Fly free!
Do you understand the rules or not?
Since when were there so many rules?
所以结论显而易见——摆盘时需要尽量堆高。越高，代表这道菜越有可能触碰到艾格勒的眼眸。
So, the conclusion is obvious... When filling your plate, you need to stack it as high as possible. The higher it is stacked, the more likely it is that your dish will catch the gaze of Aquila.
不，瑟希斯首要推崇的一定是颜色搭配，或许参照{RUBY_B#花花草草}裂分神迹{RUBY_E#}会更合理。
No! I am certain that Cerces would place the most importance on color coordination. Maybe it would be best to reference the {RUBY_B#Plants and Flowers}Rift of Miracles{RUBY_E#}?
我觉得，做菜，味道也很重要。
I think that flavor is also very important when cooking.
什么！瑟希斯听完都要枯了！菜品不考虑外观却注重味道？这不是本末倒置吗！
What!? Cerces would wither just hearing you say that! Placing the priority in a dish on flavor over appearance? Do you not think that's backwards?
…不，大块头的意见或许有一定道理。味道也是一种艺术判断标准，这是被我们一直忽视的思路。
...No, the big guy might actually be onto something. Flavor is also a criterion that can be used to judge art. This is a thought that we have all overlooked.
从头理一下吧，这次从餐具形状开始说起，正好{RUBY_B#讨论组}辩论场{RUBY_E#}也可以同步更新一下……
Let's go through this again from the top. This time, let's start with the shape of the cutlery. Fortunately, we can update the {RUBY_B#Discussion group}Forum{RUBY_E#} at the same time.
都说了——先热水、再温水、最后才是冷水！你怎么就死活不开窍呢！
I told you: Hot first, then warm, and then finally cold! How can you not get that?
能洗干净得了呗，哪儿来那么多讲究？
Being clean is good enough. Why do you have to be so fussy about it?
当然要讲究：热水清洁身体、净化魂灵；温水消除疲劳、放松心情；冷水冷却降温、振奋精神——
Of course I'm fussy about it: Hot water detoxes the body and cleanses the soul. Warm water eliminates fatigue and relaxes the mind. Cold water lowers the temperature and perks up the spirit...
只有这样，才能充分享受泉水，也才能展现你对法吉娜的敬畏，懂吗？
This is the only way to fully appreciate the spring water, and demonstrate your reverence for Phagousa. Get it?
懂了。但是不好意思，我信艾格勒。
I get it. But I'm afraid my faith lies with Aquila.
你这漂亮的小脑袋瓜究竟怎么长的？里头不会比陶罐还空吧？
What's wrong with that pretty little head of yours? Don't tell me it's as hollow as a dolium inside?
每次不是忘带浴巾浴盐就是落下酒水餐饭，就你这记性还好意思在「花园」工作？
You either forget the bath salts and towels, or you forget the snacks and drinks. You've got some nerve, working at the Garden with a memory like that.
我真的错了…下次一定记得带…
Really, I'm sorry... I won't forget things next time...
算了，之前那些我也懒得跟你计较。但我问你，昨天新买的香氛呢？
Forget it. I don't want to bring all those old mistakes up now. But let me ask you this: Where's the new perfume from yesterday?
...Uh... I'll buy you another right now...
唉，没见你多能赚钱，败家倒是一把好手！
*sigh* You're no good at earning money, but you sure know how to spend it!
…也就是从那时起，我开始察觉——这「世界」或许并非我们所感知到的那般真实，或许希帕索斯是对的…
...That was when I began to realize... This "world" might not be as real as we perceive it to be. Perhaps it's like Hippasus said...
…不是，我又怎么得罪你了？干嘛突然拿冷水泼我…
...Have I offended you again? Why are you suddenly pouring cold water on me...
水？哦，当然是水！正如神谕者泰勒斯所言：「水容纳一切又连接一切」。处在水中时，人们的思想便得以向外延展，感知更多……

Water? Oh, sure — water! It's just as the sage Thales first said: "Water constitutes the principle of all things and connects all." In the water, the mind stretches out further away and perception is greatly strengthened...
道理我都懂，但这和你把水泼我头上有什么关系？
I get the theory, but what does any of that have to do with you pouring water on my head?
人要想认识世界，就得先认识自己在世界中的位置——我这是在帮你疏通「内」与「外」的联系。不然就以你那远不及胸肌发达的脑子，怎么继续跟我交流？

If you want to understand this world, you have to first understand your place in the world — I'm helping you clear the way to connect the "internal" with the "external." Otherwise, how could someone like you with more brawn than brains be able to keep up with me?
听说，为了犒赏黄金裔的英勇，上层浴场的水质如琼，秘酿管够！还有专业的辩论师供他们消磨时间……

I hear that, to reward the Chrysos Heirs' heroics, the water quality of the upper floor's baths is akin to liquid jade, with a free flow of ambrosia! They'll also be entertained by a professional debater...
真好啊，大哥，我也想当黄金裔。
That sounds awesome, man. I wanna be a Chrysos Heir too.
我怀疑，不可能单单凭运气。那些黄金裔一开始也是普通人，他们一定掌握了某种不为人知的方法……
I suspect it's not just sheer luck that'll get you there. Those Chrysos Heirs were all ordinary people when they were born. They must have grasped some secret method to gain that status...
我拿到情报了，想成为黄金裔不难。
I've got the intel. It's not hard to become a Chrysos Heir.
这样我们就也能被当成英雄了吧！还能和阿格莱雅大人说上话……
That means we can be heroes too, right!? And we'll get to rub shoulders with Lady Aglaea...
瞧你那出息。总之，得赶紧做准备了，明后天就行动。
Is that the extent of your ambition in your noggin? Anyway, we have to prep quickly. We're moving out in a couple of days.
人们说情爱会使人盲目，而这份黯淡却恰与灿烂的永夜相称。若您愿接受一份典雅的热情，还请…回应我的心意。
People say love renders us blind, but this dimness is the perfect ambience that complements the shimmering night sky. If you would accept a passion of elegance, please... respond to my affection.
看来，我也不行啊…无论如何，愿您…再次寻得良缘。但还请记得，您有一位坚定的支持者，名为仄菲克。
Looks like I'm unworthy as well... No matter. May you... find happiness elsewhere. But please remember that you have an ardent supporter in me, he who is named Chefik.
离去吧，不要占用女士太多时间。温柔的女士，请允许本人自我介绍…
Don't waste a lady's time and take your leave. O gentle maiden, please allow me to introduce myself...
所以结论显而易见——摆盘时需要尽量堆高，越高，代表这道菜越能触碰到艾格勒的眼眸。
So, the conclusion becomes obvious: While being served, the food must be piled up as high as possible — the higher it is, the better it could feast Aquila's eyes.
不，瑟希斯菜式的重点一定是颜色搭配，或许参照{RUBY_B#花花草草}裂分圣迹{RUBY_E#}会更合理。
No, the focus of Cercesian cuisine must be the arrangement of colors. Perhaps something like {RUBY_B#plants}the Relics of Rift{RUBY_E#} is more reasonable.
开玩笑，要想让菜肴的艺术价值更上一层楼，材料的搭配才是重中之重。
As if. If you want to take your culinary craft up a notch, it's the combination of ingredients that is most critical.
想象一下，以{RUBY_B#刻法勒的食材}奥赫玛麦{RUBY_E#}作为基底做粥，加入十一位泰坦的对应食材，那道菜该有多么出色啊！

Just imagine, using {RUBY_B#Kephalean ingredients}Okheman oats{RUBY_E#} as a base for porridge, then adding in corresponding ingredients for each of the eleven other Titans — how amazing that would taste!
「吉奥里亚的食材」不是大地兽吃的吗？你想让黄金裔吃土？
Georios' Ingredients — aren't they food for dromases? You want the Chrysos Heirs to eat dirt?
那又如何？艺术性高于一切。
So what? Artistry is above all else.
我们扣握双手，向塞纳托斯颂祷，缘引他们迎来的，「第二次的逝亡」。
We clasp our fingers intertwined, singing hymns to Thanatos, to guard the fate they welcomed, "the second demise."
这是哀悼，也是祝福，所为他们领受的，「所有人的遗忘」。
This is both lament and blessing, for what they have received, is "being forgotten by all."
啊啊，曾几何时的有名之人。已然忘却的无名之魂。
Ahh, once individuals of renown, now nameless souls lost to memory.
In the end, at the dawn of genesis, flowing once more.
盲信会带来许多危害，试想，你因为一句不知真假的消息，便轻易下了某种草率的决定。结果呢？损失，后悔，还会让亲近的人看笑话。

Blind faith can bring many dangers. Just imagine, if you made a rash decision based on unverified information, how will things end? You will suffer loss and regret, and become a joke to your loved ones.
是啊，前两天我就信了他们说的，说什么艾格勒大人会因悲伤而哭泣，让我买了不少防雨防灾的东西，一个都用不上。
Yes. Two days ago, I believed what they said about Lord Aquila crying tears of sadness, and they got me to buy up all kinds of wet weather gear. But it turned out I don't need any of it.
你看看，你看看…多不应该啊。没关系，我正要教你们怎么杜绝这种情况。
See? See? That is what I'm talking about. Don't worry. I can just teach you how to protect yourselves from fraud for good.
拿着这个护身符，它会保护你们，让你们免受迷信的侵扰。
Take this Lucky Charm: It will protect you all from the pervasive reach of superstition.
哦哟，这可是个好东西，它真的有这么灵？
Oh wow, that's really awesome. Is it really all that effective?
跟你讲，这是我第五次重考，总算是过了。
I tell you what, this is my fifth time taking the test and I finally passed.
辛苦你了，大哥，五次比平均水平要少了，恭喜你啊！
Good work, big bro. That's still below the average retest records, so congrats!
可不是，那些教章的石板都快把我家桌子压垮了！花了几个月去学去记，第五次的成绩还是压线过的……
Right? Those rules carved into the stone tablets nearly crushed my desk! All these months of hard work, and I finally made it on my fifth try, though by a tiny margin...
不提了，过了就是过了，现在想想，努力取得收获，值得。哎，兄弟你当时考了几次？
Whatever. It's a solid pass after all. Looking back now, it was worth it to work hard for that. *sigh* How many times did you have to take the test, bro?
我没考，有天我路过这里，闲的没事丢了块土给它们，有一只居然说我穿的太蠢，气得我差点跟它们打起来。

Never done it. I was walking by here one day, bored out of my skull, and chucked a lump of dirt at them. One of them said I dressed like a clown and I blew my stack. We almost came to blows there and then.
正好被我现在的上司看到，他就把我招进来了。
And my current boss just so happened to see that, and hired me on the spot.
还不够，客人要求「能击碎盔甲」，需要很高韧性，淬火前混一些靛钢进去。
It's not enough. The customer wants it to be able to "break armor." It needs to be highly durable. Mix some indigo steel in before quenching it.
下一个订单，定制，瑟希斯权能，锤子。
Next order. Custom-made Cerces' authority, hammer.
木制的是吧，记得顺着纹理裁切，让他们祷告时能省些功夫，交给西斯了。再下一把是…尼卡多利权能的…我吃不住，杜，你行吗？
Made from wood eh? Remember to cut along the grain, so they save some trouble during prayers. It's up to Sisk now. The next piece is... Nikador's authority... I can't do this. Tuu, do me a favor?
Okay... Remember, do remind the customer.
当然，「不能靠祈祷，而是需要用脏话辱骂泰坦，然后躲掉凭空出现的攻击」…真是莫名其妙。
Of course, "One can't rely on prayers alone, but needs to spit foul words to curse the Titans, then avoid attacks that appear out of thin air" ...This is absurd.
刻法勒啊！这些可爱的小东西们真是它最美妙的造物！
Holy Kephale! These adorable little things are really its prettiest creations!
小奇美拉是吧，严格来说它们不算是刻法勒造物…不过可爱这点我倒是同意。
The little chimeras eh? Strictly speaking, they're not Kephale's creations... but I do agree that they're adorable.
可它们长得确实像刻法勒！你瞧那些多变的外观，多么「全世」啊！我传信石版的记忆区已经被各种奇美拉的绘像装满了，等下就打包发到我们的辩论场去。

But they look just like Kephale! Look at their variety of designs, such a spitting image of Kephale! My teleslate's memory zone is full of all kinds of chimera-related drawings. I'll compress them and send them to our Forum later.
唉，羡慕你们。我…没法靠近它们。
*sigh* I envy you all. I... can't go near them.
不会吧，你难道怕生？哦，哦！我知道了，是不是过敏？听说因为它们所包含的生物信息繁杂，这种事还挺常发生的…
Huh, are you afraid of unknown creatures? Ooh, ooh, I know, you're allergic to them? I hear it's because they have a complicated genome, making the allergy of yours fairly common...
不…不是，是它们…对我过敏。唉……
N... No, they're... allergic to me. *sigh*
泰坦眷属的战争没有止息，集齐火种的时刻也还很遥远，而我们呢？每天就在铺子里打铁！说真的，我已经不知道这种一成不变的生活有什么意义了。

The Titankin's war never ceases to an end. The instant when all Coreflames are collected is still far away. And us? We're hammering iron all day at the smithy! Honestly, I have no idea what the whole point is of living this monotonous life.
那是因为你最近忙过头了。听说过劳逸结合吗？适度的休息会让你对工作再次产生激情。
That's because your schedule has been too hectic recently. Heard of work-life balance? Taking timely breaks will invigorate your passion for work.
你说得轻巧，误了订单，战士们少了装备，那可是要命！
Easier said than done. If orders are delayed, the soldiers will have to fight unarmed. Lives would be truly on the line!
那反过头来想，咱们的工作能够切实帮到战士们，这不是个很好的意义吗？至少我就为此而活，两位客人，你们说是吧？
Let's think about it on the flip side then: Our work can actually arm the troops and save them. Isn't that a great meaning to life? Well, to my life, at least. What say you, customers?
生活的意义…大祭司大人也是明了此般，才会令我们迁来刻法勒的圣城吧。
The meaning of life... The High Priest probably understood this as well, which was why he bade us move to Kephale's holy city.
诺杜斯先生…您说得对。能听到这些争论，或许是我们来到奥赫玛后最大的收获。
Mr. Noldus... You're right. Hearing such discourse is perhaps the greatest boon I've received since we came to Okhema.
听说，元老院出资的探险队回来了，就昨天的事。
I hear the expeditionary squad that the Council of Elders' funded returned yesterday.
是，刚我在广场那边看到他们了，好像说是发现了些新的矿石，正在和工匠们讨论呢。
Yes, I saw them at the plaza. They seem to have found some new ores, and are discussing the matter with the craftsmen.
哼，出发前信誓旦旦地说能找到应对黑潮的方法，结果就带了些破石头回来？
Hmph, they solemnly swore to find a way to counter the black tide before they left, and now they return with a bunch of useless stones?
行啦，又不是你探险，就别说风凉话了。城外那种危险的状态，他们七个都能平平安安的回来，还能带回点收获，已经很了不起了好吧。
All right, all right, not like you're the one exploring, so can it. Danger lurks everywhere outside the city. It's already a feat that the seven of them came back unscathed, with a minor haul in tow.
七个？他们…不是只去了五个人吗？
金血乃泰坦之神体，而黄金裔乃泰坦神授，自然也是金血先于英雄存在。
Golden blood is the divine body of the Titans, and the Chrysos Heirs are divinely ordained by the Titans. Naturally, the existence of golden blood precedes that of the heroes.
非也！议题并非探讨概念前后，而是名词的生辰。而黄金裔的故事被传颂前，根本无人知晓究竟「何为金血」。

On the contrary! We're not talking about the before or after of the concept, but the day the words were created. Before the Chrysos Heirs' story was sung in paeans, no one knew what "golden blood" was.
但黄金裔流淌的并非金血，自然金血一词也并非源于黄金裔之事。
But what courses through the Chrysos Heirs' veins isn't actual blood in the color of gold, therefore they naturally are not the origin of the words "golden blood."
这…浴场图书室中可寻得物证！曾有教章中，黄金裔一词赫然在列，但金血却以其他名词替代…
You... You can find solid evidence in the bath's library! The Chrysos Heirs were prominently mentioned in scripture, but other terms replaced "golden blood"...
嘘，好好听着，这议题相当重要。
Shush. Just listen. That is a very important topic.
…说这喂养奇美拉是门学问，然后啊，我就把我前些日子钓的那条胳膊粗的大鱼喂给它，它反而不怎么喜欢。
...Caring for a chimera is a science. Then, I fed it the big fish I caught that was as thick as my arm, but it didn't take much of a liking to it.
