确实，奇美拉可是很挑的，要是换我拿三天前用木杆钓的那条腰一样粗的鱼去喂，估计它都不愿意吃。
Yeah, chimeras are picky. If I fed it the fish thick as my waist that I caught three days ago with a wooden rod, I'm guessing it probably wouldn't eat it either.
瞧瞧，没事和奇美拉较什么劲，还是大地兽好养活，喂土就行。可惜就是，我昨天践行时钓的那条水桶一样大的鱼，它不肯吃哦。

Why are you obsessed with chimeras? Dromases are much easier to keep. You feed them some soil and that's it. Pity, the fish I caught yesterday during the Action Hour was as big as a bucket, but it just wouldn't eat it.
啊？践行时上哪钓的？啊不是，我就问问，我家那奇美拉说不定会喜欢吃点不一样的。
Eh? Where did you fish during the Action Hour? Ah, I'm just asking. My chimera might just like something different.
只有草药的香味，我已经泡腻了，要不咱们换个吧？
There's only the smell of herbs, I'm tired of it. Shall we try baths?
Sure, which one do you want to go to?
听说云石天宫最近在实验新的浴盐，但我忘了具体是哪个池子…要不咱们每个都试试吧！
I heard the Marmoreal Palace has been experimenting with new bath salts recently, but I forgot which bath it is... Why not try them all to find out?
我觉得可以，就从旁边的这个浴池开始吧！
Excellent idea. Let's start from this one at the side!
带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽……
Taking care of grandkids is way harder than just taking care of your own kids...
人又娇气，脾气又大，可真难伺候！
They're squeamish, bad-tempered, and impossible to please!
嗐，这也就是你家那个儿子出息…瞧瞧我家那几个，找不到工作不说，花钱还大手大脚！唉……
Ack, that's only possible with a good son like yours... Just look at our lot. None of them can find a job, but they spend money like it's going out of fashion! *sigh*...
那老话怎么说的来着？家家有尊难伺候的泰坦……
How does the saying go? Each family has its own Titanic issue...
我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?
大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.
欸，哥们儿，不对吧？这茴香不是我俩前天一起进的货吗？大姐也是老主顾了，你不给她便宜便宜？
Eh, bro, this isn't right. Didn't we purchase this fennel together just two days back? This lady is a regular customer. Can't you give her a discount?
...Huh? Who are you? I don't know you...
大姐，我是实诚人，卖东西童叟无欺！您看我这肥皂，用传说中的西尔菲翁和顶好的橄榄油手工做的，是黑潮前才有的货哩……

Madam, I'm a decent merchant who sells quality goods at honest prices! Check this soap. It's handmade with the legendary Silphion and top-notch olive oil. Usually you can only find such good stuff before the black tide...
唉呀，真是心疼啊…多好的东西，这就扔了。
Oh my, it pains my heart... So many wonderful things are just thrown away. Such a waste.
老奶奶，我能理解你的心情…不过世界运转的底层逻辑，有时候就是「浪费」。
I understand how you feel... However, the logic that the world operates on is sometimes just "letting things go to waste."
比如说家里有三个小朋友，每个人都想要获得一颗糖。为了不让这些孩子打起来，老奶奶你应该买几颗糖呢？只买三颗，真的够吗？
For example, if you have three children at home, and each of them wants a piece of candy. To keep them from fighting, how much candy should you buy for them? Will three pieces do the job?
…唉呀，你这丫头说话还真有意思。按你的意思，孩子们吃不完的糖，也只能靠我们这些年纪大的努力吃完了吧？
...Oh dear, you really have a way with words. But if I follow your advice, guess there will be plenty of leftovers, and the elders would have to finish them all.
老奶奶，糖吃太多了能有什么好处啊？还是得小心预防糖尿病嘛。
Come on now, nobody should eat that much candy. You don't want to undermine your health with sweets.
没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...
那您可要多享受享受呢！听我的师父说啊，这份手艺是从黄金世末期传下来的，有两千多年的历史呢。

Then you should enjoy it to your heart's desire! My master told me that these massage skills have been passed down from the end of the Era Chrysea. There's more than two thousand years of history to it.
真的假的？我家乡的城邦，满打满算也只有一千年的历史…奥赫玛的历史原来这么悠久啊。
Really? With all things considered, the city back in my hometown has only roughly a thousand years of history... Okhema has such a long-standing history.
哈哈，其实大浴场的导览里也有写到哦？
Haha, actually it's mentioned in the guide at the baths.
「在光历的第三个一百年中，人们在刻法勒脚下建立起聚落，由此诞生了奥赫玛的前身。」
"In the third century of the Light Calendar, people built settlements at the feet of Kephale. Thus was the precursor of Okhema founded."
今年是光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年…这样算来，奥赫玛已经快有五千年了呢！
This year is Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak> of the Light Calendar... So, Okhema has been around for almost five thousand years!
泡泡这里的热水，把筋骨都泡开，这样会舒服很多。
Try this hot bath, it relaxes the muscle. It feel very nice.
不了，爷爷，我还是更喜欢冷水浴，这样能让我的身体更强壮。
No, grandpa — I still prefer my cold baths. They help strengthen my body.
我们好不容易逃到这里，你也该好好享受在永恒之城的日子。
It wasn't easy for us to make it here, so you should enjoy yourself while you're in the Eternal City.
正因为我们是外来人，我才更要努力。我要加入卫队，保护这座庇护了我们的城市!
I have to work harder precisely because we're outsiders. I want to join the guard squad and protect our city that gives us shelter!
哎，真是搞不懂你们年轻人，或许是我老了吧……
*sigh* I really don't understand you youngsters. Perhaps I'm just getting old...
兄弟，你注意到没，咱们换班的间隔越来越长了。
Say, bro, you ever noticed that the time between shifts has been getting longer and longer...
我听说是因为最近移民增多，抽调了些人过去维持秩序，人手就不太够了。
I heard that the number of migrants has been increasing, so some of our people were dispatched there to maintain order, leaving us understaffed.
没办法，听说外面很多城市都被黑潮吞没了。外面的情况…不太乐观啊，说不定哪天我们也要面对…
Guess there's no other way. I heard lots of cities out there are devoured by the black tide. The situation outside... is not looking very good. Maybe we'll have to face that down ourselves one day...
别多想了，我们好歹在奥赫玛，但愿刻法勒能一直保佑我们……
There's no need to stress yourself out. After all, we're in Okhema. May Kephale protect us...
现在的袍子真不行，我昨天逛了半天，那些所谓的最新设计，我真的看不过眼，太丑了……
Robes these days are just terrible. I was out shopping all day yesterday, but none of these so-called new designs pleased my eye. They were all hideous...
主要是版型问题，滚边堆砌一堆元素没用，版型那么差，谁穿啊。
It's mainly the issue with the design. There's no point in piling up all that embroidered stitches if the style is bad. Who wants to wear that?
没办法，你们没发现吗？他们所谓的新「设计」，都是捡阿格莱雅玩剩下的元素东拼西凑。
No way. Haven't you noticed? Their so-called new "design" is just a hodgepodge of Aglaea's cutting room scraps.
要我说，当初就该求阿格莱雅女士多设计几件，永恒之城需要她的永恒之美。
If you ask me, we should've asked Lady Aglaea to design more pieces when we had the chance. The Eternal City needs her eternal beauty.
嘬嘬嘬！宝宝！你是一块蓝莓白巧大蛋糕！
*smooch* Oh my sweetie! Aren't you just a huge slice of blueberry white chocolate cake?
阿米库斯，够了，快住手，别再乱亲那头大地兽了，你没看到它都快急眼了吗？
Amycus, that's enough! Stop that, stop kissing that dromas. Can't you see it's getting angry?
住手，年轻人！大地兽不是玩具，你再这样我就要请你离开了。
Stop it, youngster! A dromas is not a plaything. If you keep this up, I'll have to ask you to leave.
阿米库斯，你得学会和大地兽相处，在外面冒险的时候，很多事情都要指望它们。
Amycus, you have to learn how to get along with dromases properly. You'll have to rely on them a lot when you're out adventuring.
好吧，抱歉，实在是太可爱了，我就摸最后一次！嘬嘬嘬！
Fine, I'm sorry. They're just too adorable, let me pat it just one more time! *smooch*
...What a headache. He never really listens.
这池子里的水，你有试过偷偷喝两口吗？
The pool water here... Have you ever tried sneaking a sip of it?
…啊这，这…这不太好吧，这池子好歹是我们泡过的啊…我怎么下得去嘴？
...Ah, th—that's... not a good idea. The pools here are where we bathe... How could I ever drink that?
别紧张，我只是提醒你别乱喝。因为之前在水里加酵母，就是法吉娜在饮宴上把水变成佳酿的味道，喝了就能排毒之类的，然后喝了一大口……

Don't worry, I'm just reminding you not to drink it. Someone once added yeast in it and recreated the taste of the ambrosia — one that Phagousa turned water into in the banquet and is supposedly a detoxicant — and took a gulp...
Anyway, I heard they had to carry that person back home that night...
这个秘方我也听过，但我记得那根本就不是用来喝的，是用来泡澡的。等等，你那什么表情，你该不会也跟着学了吧…
I've heard of that trick before, it's not a recipe for drinks but for preparing a bath. Waitasec, the look on your face... Don't tell me you did the same thing...
...Ha... Ha... Of course not! That's nonsense.
尼莎，你不能在浴池里丢钱币，这么做是很不尊重法吉娜的行为！
Nyssa, you can't toss coins into the baths. That's disrespecting Phagousa!
怎么会？我明明听大人们说，什么池的硬币会收集起来献给法吉娜。
Why? I clearly heard the grown-ups saying that all the coins from the pool are collected and offered to Phagousa.
…法吉娜在上，这是我对您的敬意。
...Phagousa above, I offer this up to you.
那是在神殿里才行，这里是浴池，不能这么乱来。
That's inside the temple. This is a bath. You can't do that around here.
略略略，我才不听你的，你说了不算！
不是，那帮人到底啥毛病？脑袋在浴场泡进水了还是被大地兽踹了？
Wait, what's wrong with them? Are their heads soaked with bath water or kicked by dromases?
也可能是被门给夹了。活了这么大把年纪，我还是头一回见有人摆摊不做生意，只为了展示的。
Maybe just bashed against the door frame. At my age, this is my first time seeing someone set up a stall just for display and not for business.
更可恨的是那些人还专挑那些好摊位，各种各样的工艺品齐刷刷摆好几排；结果你上去一问价，好家伙——展示、已出、自留、纪念。

What's more irritating is that those people even nabbed the good spots. They displayed all kinds of crafts in neat rows, but when you go up and ask for the price, everything is for display only, already sold, reserved for themselves, or their own fond treasure.
怕不是吃饱了撑的…这不是扰乱城内秩序吗？
Do they have nothing better to do... Isn't this disrupting the order of the city?
可不是吗，我听说已经有摊主气不过去找卫兵举报了，也不知道什么时候能给处理了……
I'd say so myself. I've heard that some stall owners were so upset that they reported it to the guards already. I hope they'll handle this soon...
…所以祭司大人，您真的不考虑……
...Lady Priestess, are you sure that you will not consider...
真的真的，比奥赫玛的太阳还真。还有不要再叫我祭司大人了，老婆子我不干这行已经好些年啦。
Yes, as sure as I know that Okhema has a sun. Also, please stop calling me Lady Priestess. It's been many years since I quit this job.
…我不明白，以您的身份地位，就算离开了雅努萨波利斯，也应当受到众人的尊崇敬仰，而不是……
...I don't understand. Even if you have left Janusopolis, with your accomplishments and status, you should be respected and admired by all, instead of being...
这么说吧，孩子，你觉得我现在所做的事情，与之前在本质上有什么不同吗？
Let me put it this way. My child, do you think that what I'm doing now is fundamentally different from what I used to do?
当然不一样！您所身负的，是向凡人传达神谕的伟业——如此高贵的您怎能以「占卜师」这样…这样不体面的身份自贬……
Of course it's different! You carry the sacred duty of passing prophecies to mortals — how can someone as noble as you be a "soothsayer"... How can you demean yourself like this...
你是这么认为的啊…可我倒是觉得，大祭司也好、占卜师也罢，所做的都不过是在命运洪流之中试图捞取一些名为「未来」的碎片，将它们交于有所希求之人。

So this is what you think... But to me, even if it's the High Priestess or a soothsayer, all we do is merely attempting to grasp fragments of the "future" amidst the tumultuous current of destiny and offer it to those who seek them.
好啦，回去吧，孩子——别再执着于让我重拾那些无谓的虚名啦。要是真的放心不下我，倒不如有空多来照顾一下老婆子的生意~
There, there, go now, my child — stop obsessing over having me reclaim those meaningless titles. If you're really concerned about me, just come back often and support my business.
盖亚，你又在浴场闹事了？
Gaia, did you cause trouble at the baths again?
嘘！小点声。那叫科学研究，懂不懂？
Hush! Keep your voice down. I did not cause trouble. It was a scientific research, got it?
你非得在浴场做实验吗？
Do you really have to conduct your experiments at the baths?
当然啦！黄金裔都在那儿嘛。
Of course! The Chrysos Heirs are all there.
你迟早会惹上大麻烦的……
You're gonna get yourself into serious trouble sooner or later.
尤利娅，你又在这里发呆！
我才没发呆，这叫冥想研究！
I'm not daydreaming. This is called a meditation experiment!
别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!
别就知道钱钱钱的好吗，你的短视让瑟希斯蒙羞！
Can you stop talking about money all the time? Your shortsightedness brings shame to Cerces!
两个月也太久了吧…我追求了她七年，好不容易求婚成功，现在真是一刻钟也等不下去了！
Two months is too long, surely...? I have been pursuing her for seven years and she finally said yes to my marriage proposal. I simply cannot wait another minute!
我非常理解你的心情，但很抱歉，我最近的行程确实已经排满了。
I completely understand how you are feeling. But I must apologize, my schedule is completely full.
你理解我？你一个小孩子家家能理解什么！我就不明白了，偌大一个奥赫玛竟然只有你一个司仪，这合理吗！
You understand how I'm feeling? What could a child possibly understand!? I don't get it. How can there be only one ceremonial officiant in a huge place like Okhema? It's just ridiculous!
因为想成为司仪的话，需要去树庭进修，并通过「敬拜学派」的特殊考核……
That is because in order to become a ceremonial officiant, you have to train in the Grove and pass a special examination put in place by the Venerationists...
谁问你这个了！真是的，这种破规矩究竟是哪个混蛋定下来的……
I wasn't asking! Arrrgh, what kind of idiot came up with rules like that...
…啧，七年都等了还差这两个月？慢走不送！
...Tsk. You've waited seven years and you can't even hold on two more months? You know your way out!
诶呦——我又赢啦！承让了啊兄弟！
Oh... I win again! You have to stop letting me win, brother!
啧…你这手气也太离谱了，怕不是出千了吧？！
Tsk... This kind of luck just isn't right. Are you sure you're not cheating!?
哪儿能啊，就咱这运势，还用得着出千？我跟你说，这么多年来我就从来没输过！
How could I? With luck like mine, why would I need to cheat? Let me tell you, I've played for many years, and I've never once lost!
瞧把你给厉害的…等等，我记得你好像说过，常常会和你们运输队的领班来几局，难道也……
Look at you getting cocky with a few wins... Wait, I remember you said that you used to play all the time with the head of your transport team. You didn't... No way...
那必须的！不然你以为我平时喝秘酿的钱是哪来的！
Of course I won! How else do you think I got to pay for the ambrosia?
…怪不得你干了这么多年还是个劳工……
...No wonder you never got any promotion after all these years...
这就不行了？才跑了几步就累成这副德行？出去别说是我的学生，丢人！
Is that all you've got? You run a few steps, and you're in such a sorry state already? Don't go telling anyone you're my students, as you'll bring me nothing but shame!
…老…呼…老师…我们已经、绕着云石天宫…跑了二…二十圈了……
...S—Sir... Phew... We've—We've already done... t—twenty... laps around the... Marmoreal Palace...
啧，行吧，那就全体休息一刻钟，然后再来二十组俯卧撑。
Pfft, fine. Take a quint, then finish twenty sets of push-ups!
嘶——老、老师，人家讲学都是收钱…您、您是要命啊！
Ahh... S—Sir... They normally take their students' money for the lectures... N—Not their lives...
这才哪到哪，啊？就你们这小体格子，再不加紧锻炼，小心连学院大门都进不去！
What, too much to handle already? Ah, if you weaklings don't start taking training seriously, you might never make it into the academy!
不是…为啥就咱们这么特殊啊，也没见其它学派有过什么入门考核…那个投石索也太难扔了吧……
That's not what I mean... Why do we have to do this? I never saw any entrance exams for the other Schools... And that sling is way too heavy to swing...
当然是因为——只有强健的体魄，才能承载强韧的灵魂；只有强韧的灵魂，才能触及纯粹的真理！
It goes without saying, a powerful soul must be paired with a strong body, or it will never reach the pure truths!
但我们的根本目的不还是学知识吗…就您这个训练强度，怕不是要把我们都培养成竞技场英雄……
But we came here to learn... With such intense training, I'm afraid we would become arena champions instead...
我再重申一遍！我们的肉体乃是灵魂的容器，就像作物成长须得倚赖泥土的滋养，灵魂的完满也离不开肉体的丰盈——

I will say this one more time! Our bodies are the vessels of our souls! Just as the growth of crops relies on the soil's nourishment, the nourishment of the soul cannot be separated from the abundance of the body...
若是一味地追求丰产而不停耕种，却疏于对土地加以养护，那么迟早有一天，我们赖以生存的根基就会被榨干。
If you simply pursue abundant harvests and spend all your time reaping without nurturing the land, one day the very foundation of our survival will dry up and wither.
灵魂在得以质变擢升之前，就因肉体的衰败而枯萎——这将是何等的悲剧！
For the soul to wither and decline before achieving elevation because of a debilitated body... What a tragedy that would be!
很好，既然你如此有精神，待会儿再多加五组吧。
Very well! As you've got the energy to argue, finish another five sets!
啊？！不是——别啊老师，我知道错了！
Huh!? No — Please, Sir, I was wrong!
孩子，你怎么又私自闯入这里？幸亏是我先发现了你，如果撞见你的是卫兵……
Child, what are you doing sneaking in here again? You're lucky it was me that found you and not one of the guards...
欧弥利亚婶婶，我发誓这次真的不一样了！就在今日，刻法勒已赐予我第二个征兆，虽然我答应他不能说…我是命中注定的十二黄金裔之一，你要相信我！

Auntie Aumilia, I promise this time is different! Kephale has given me a second sign today. Though I promised them I wouldn't say... I am definitely one of the twelve fated Chrysos Heirs. You have to believe me!
哎，伊克西翁，我理解你担心城邦的安危，希望尽自己所能。但万一你失败了呢？那金血，凡人碰了可是要殒命啊！

Ah, Ixion... I know that you are concerned for the safety of the city, and you want to do what you can. But what if you are unsuccessful? If a mortal comes into contact with the golden blood, they will lose their lives!
不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...
…你有考虑过你的姐姐吗？她已经在战争中失去了父母，失去了兄长。如果你也将自己的性命置于危险中，你至少应当先与她道别，再采取行动。

...Have you thought about your sister? She has already lost her father and mother to battle. She lost her older brother too. If you are going to put your life in danger, you should at least bid her farewell before you act.
…我确实没有告诉她是今天。我再等等姐姐，谢谢你，欧弥利亚婶婶。
...You're right. I didn't tell her today was the day. I will wait for her. Thank you, Auntie Aumilia.
所以您说，若是云层厚积，且永夜频闪，是要「下雨」。
So, you're saying thick clouds and evernight flashes are a sign of "rain"?
That is correct, my dear student.
所以，冒险者们会在此之前备好雨具。
So, adventurers will prepare rain gear in advance?
所以，我可以在那之前大量购入，然后涨价卖给冒险者们，这样就能大赚一笔，随后攒够利衡币搬去云崖住。
So, I can buy in a huge amount of rain gear beforehand and sell them to adventurers for an inflated price? Then I can make a fortune. I'll have enough Balance Coins to move to Dawncloud.
…差点忘了，你压根不是来求学的，唉。
...I almost forgot that you weren't here to learn... *sigh*
我好羡慕你们！生来就受到吉奥里亚的赐福，拥有强大的力量，这样才能保护身边的人！
I envy you all so much! Being born with the benediction of Georios and having amazing strength means that you're able to protect everyone around you!
我做饭，也很厉害。要尝尝吗？
My cooking, also very good. Want to have a taste?
啊，你喜欢做饭，好浪费…为什么我就不是山之民呢？
Ah, you like cooking? What a waste... Why can't I be a Mountain Dweller?
不要哭，没有高高的个子，像你这样，也可以做很多事。
Don't cry. Not tall, like you, can still do lots of things.
只要想去做，你肯定，也能做到。
If you want it enough, you will, definitely do it.
是吗…哎，还要锻炼多久，才能成为像白厄大人那样的英雄呢？
Really...? Ah, how much longer do I have to train to become a hero like Lord Phainon?
圣女赐福过的神圣水果，价格公道，数量有限，先到先得~
Fruits blessed by the Holy Maiden! Reasonably priced, limited quantity! First come, first served~
…真是赐福过的？可我听说，圣女好久都没从房间里出来过了呀。
...Were they really blessed? I heard that the Holy Maiden hasn't come out of her room for a long time.
哎，泰坦的力量岂是我们能理解的，说不定吹口气就算赐福呢？很神奇吧，别问，买就对了！
Hey, the power of the Titans is beyond our understanding. Maybe blowing a breath could count as a blessing? It's quite magical, right? Don't ask, just buy!
亲爱的，正好我有点口渴。不知道求神谕的队还要排多久，就买几个吧？
Dear, I'm a bit thirsty. I don't know how long the queue for the prophecy will take, so let's buy a few, okay?
好，给我们挑几个最光亮的吧，不够圆的不要。
Okay, pick the brightest ones for us. Pass the ones that aren't round enough.
各位虔诚的信徒们，现在我们看到的是泰坦火种的保存处。请勿大声喧哗，这里人多，注意别走散了！
Dear faithful followers, what we see here is the storage place for the Titan's Coreflame. Please don't speak loudly. It's crowded here, so be careful not to get lost!
命运圣城的风景…果然不一般啊。这趟朝圣老年跟团游，来得真值。
The Holy City of Fate's scenery... is truly extraordinary. This pilgrimage with the senior group is really worth it.
我家老伴还反复叮嘱我，要多带点纪念品回去呢。
My husband repeatedly asked me to bring back more souvenirs.
您这话可就说对了！别急，我们专门安排了后续的购物环节，等看完这里就过去……
You said it right! Don't worry, we have a special shopping session planned afterward. We'll go after we wrap up here...
你听到了清亮的弹唱声——
You hear a resonating string instrument performance—
时光的流水，温雅却难再演。黎明初照绿叶，终将与岁月共眠。
The river of time flows soft and slow, yet once it's passed, it cannot glow. As dawn's first light on green leaves falls, they'll rest with time, as each one calls.
啊，伟大的化身，掌管命运的泰坦。请聆听人子的颂歌，将深邃带去长夜！
Ah, the great incarnation, Titans of Fate. Please listen to the song of the children of humanity, and bring depth to the long night!
噢噢…唱得真好…但和我年轻时还有差距，要想让人如沐神恩，就得像我这样，练习从腹部发声……
Oh... beautifully sung... but still a bit off from when I was young. To make people feel the divine grace, you have to practice singing from your abdomen, like I do...
大哥哥唱的…真的是命运吗？听上去好悲伤啊……
Is he really... singing about destiny? It sounds so sad...
我决定了。我将放弃成为辅祭的机会，离开这里，前往刻法勒的城邦——奥赫玛。
I've decided. I'll give up the chance to become an acolyte, leave here, and go to Kephale's city-state — Okhema.
等等，这是你求得的神谕吗？
Wait, is this the prophecy you asked for?
不。我按神谕和祭司的意志度过了许多年，但往后的路，我想自己决定。
No. I've followed the will of the prophecy and the priests for many years, but for the future, I want to make my own decisions.
人不该被预言束缚。这才是雅努斯…还有命运泰坦们的真实想法吧。
No one should be bound by prophecies. This is also what Janus... and the Fate Titans truly believe.
大哥，是你说这份工作能见到圣女大人，可这都过了多少个月，我连影子都没见着呢。
Well, you promised me that this job would let me meet the Holy Maiden, but it's been months, and I haven't seen even a glimpse of her.
别急，好好干，梦想总有天能实现的。我跟你说，圣女大人那飘逸的黑发，就如同最神秘的暗夜般深沉……
Patience. Just keep working hard — dreams do come true in time. You know, Holy Maiden's flowing black hair is as deep and mysterious as the darkest night...
啊，我好像看到了…是啊，优雅的身姿，柔美的乌黑秀发，那就是我们崇敬的圣女大人啊！
Ah, I think I see it now... Yes, that graceful figure, her soft, midnight-black hair — this must be our revered Holy Maiden!
「无论公民大会得出何种结论，都是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕许诺的结果」，结果元老院却不愿承认公民大会得出的结果。

"No matter what comes of the citizens' assembly, it stands as the promised result given unto us by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}." In the end, the Council of Elders was unwilling to admit the results produced from the citizens' assembly.
元老院？那些家伙压根就没把神谕当回事！
The Council of Elders? These people have never taken the prophecy seriously!
别激动，年轻人。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕…嗯，如果元老院也同意的话，那这就是它许诺的结果。可你们看，如今元老院不同意……

Relax, youngster. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} prophecy... Hm. If the Council of Elders agrees, then that is Kephale's promised outcome. But as you can see, if the Council does not agree...
呸，伟大的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}还得听元老院的意见了？我算是看明白了，你和你儿子都在为元老们工作，所以你才会满嘴胡言。

Tsk. The mighty {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} needs to heed the opinion of the Council of Elders? I see clearly now. You and your boy are working for the elders. That's why you're so full of lies.
你们这是…对元老院不敬。啊…不对，你们是在对泰坦不敬啊……
You're... disrespecting the Council of Elders. Ah... No! Your disrespect is toward the Titans themselves...
悄悄告诉你们，我真的听见刻法勒的声音了。
To tell you a secret, I truly heard Kephale's voice.
我怎么没听见，你不会又想骗人吧？{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}对你说了什么？
Then why couldn't I hear anything. You're not lying again, are you? What did {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} say to you?
{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说让我在黎明机器熄灭之后去找它私聊。所谓天机不可泄露……
{RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} asked that I speak with them privately after the Dawn Device goes out. Such divine secrets cannot be revealed...
你可闭嘴吧，众所周知，黎明机器将永远照亮奥赫玛！
Oh, do shut up. As far as we all know, the Dawn Device will forever illuminate Okhema!
是真的！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说有些见不得光的话，不能放在明面上说。
It's true! {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} says there are some things that cannot be brought to the light, and that some things cannot be said in the open.
我真怀疑你是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒，说话不过脑子。我要是信你，我就是那个…那个飞天坛递。
I'm now starting to suspect if you're a follower of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Empty vessels make the most noise. If I believed you... then I might as well be a Flying Amphora.
你听说过「大法吉娜节」吗？
Have you heard about the Festival of Phagousa?
Can you tell me more about it?
奥赫玛的剧作家们会在这个节日上展示他们的新作品，而观众会评选最佳剧本和表演者。
The playwrights of Okhema will showcase their new works during this program, and the audience will decide the best script and performers.
原来如此，我在故乡的城邦曾是一名戏剧评论家，我对这「大法吉娜节」很感兴趣。
So that's how it is. I used to be a theater critic in my homeland, so I am rather interested in this "Festival of Phagousa."
我记得上次获奖的剧目里，王子杀死了自己的父亲，又娶了自己的母亲，当他知道一切真相时，陷入了深深的绝望和自责中。
I remember that, in the last award-winning play, a prince slew his own father and married his own mother. But when he uncovered the truth, he fell deep into despair and self-blame.
他们用一个机械装置将扮演{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}从天而降，公平公正地用法律的手段拯救了王子，皆大欢喜！
They used a mechanical device to showcase {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} descent from the sky, using justice and fairness to save the prince and deliver a happy ending!
这不就是「机械降神」吗？我对奥赫玛的观众水平表示怀疑。
Wait, isn't this a literal "deus ex machina"? This makes me skeptical about the tastes of Okhemans.
请你完成这一世的试炼，赐我以「死亡」的拥抱，点燃「生命」的火苗。
Complete your trial in this life. Grant me the embrace of "Death" and light the spark of "Life" ablaze.
如果是你，在经历过生与死的锤炼之后，一定能为这片荒原带来第一抹生机……
You've been tempered by life and death. I know you'll be able to give this wasteland its first breath of life...
就像奔赴冥界的蝴蝶，落在死亡的枝头。
Like a raven butterfly flying swiftly into the nether realm, perching on the twig of death.
…我会的。在那之后，我会永居冥界，让冥河回到这里，化作天上的细雨，将灵魂播撒向这片冥土……
...I will. After this, I will remain permanently in the nether realm. The River of Souls shall return here and rain down from the sky, scattering souls across the earth...
生死将再度流转。你亲手播下的这片花海，今后将承载无数或悲或喜的灵魂，永远焕发生机。
The cycle of life and death will flow once again. This sea of flowers you sowed shall bear countless joyous or sorrowful souls, and bloom evermore.
最后的最后，能请你…为我实现一个心愿么？
Just one last thing. Can you... grant me one wish?
即便我将再度跨越轮回…当我们在来世再见时，我也一定会像最初诞生时那样……
When we meet in the next world... Even if I have endured another reincarnation...
即便，我们尚不知道对方的名字……
...Even if we do not know each other's names...
…我也一定会紧紧地、紧紧地抱住你。
...I will still hold you tightly in my arms, just like what I did when we were born.
You're as beautiful... as a fleeting butterfly.
带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…人又娇气，脾气又大，可真难伺候！
Taking care of a grandson is more troublesome than a son... He's sensitive, has a bad temper, and he's so difficult to deal with!
嗐，这也就是你家那个儿子出息…瞧瞧我家那几个，找不到工作不说，花钱还大手大脚！唉……
Ack, that's only possible with a good son like yours... Just look at our lot. None of them can find a job, but they spend money like it's going out of fashion! *sigh*...
这位大姐，年轻人如果为了我们这些老家伙省吃俭用，那不是反而亏待他们了？
Excuse me, madam. If the youngsters are being frugal for the sake of us old folks, aren't we being unfair to them?
…你是谁？你难道很懂我家里的事？
...Who are you? Do you even know my family?
哈哈，我只是路过而已，怎么可能懂呢…不过没关系。来，发个红包给你，开心开心。老先生也有份哦~
Haha, I'm just passing by, how could I know... But no matter. Here, madam, have this. Just a little something to cheer you up. And sir, here's some for you.
等等…啊？这么多钱？塔兰顿在上，可别是什么新型骗术……
Wait... Ah? This is quite some money. O Talanton above, this better not be some new type of scam...
我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?
大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.
欸，哥们儿，不对吧？这茴香不是我俩前天一起进的货吗？大姐也是老主顾了，你不给她便宜便宜？
Eh, bro, this isn't right. Didn't we purchase this fennel together just two days back? This lady is a regular customer. Can't you give her a discount?
...Huh? Who are you? I don't know you...
大姐，我是实诚人，买东西童叟无欺！您看我这肥皂，用传说中的西尔菲翁和顶好的橄榄油手工做的，是黑潮前才有的货哩……

Madam, I'm a decent merchant who sells quality goods at honest prices! Check this soap. It's handmade with the legendary Silphion and top-notch olive oil. Usually you can only find such good stuff before the black tide...
唉呀，真是心疼啊…多好的东西，这就扔了。
Oh my, it pains my heart... So many wonderful things are just thrown away. Such a waste.
老奶奶，我能理解你的心情…不过世界运转的底层逻辑，有时候就是「浪费」。
I understand how you feel... However, the logic that the world operates on is sometimes just "letting things go to waste."
比如说家里有三个小朋友，每个人都想要获得一颗糖。为了不让这些孩子打起来，老奶奶你应该买几颗糖呢？只买三颗，真的够吗？
For example, if you have three children at home, and each of them wants a piece of candy. To keep them from fighting, how much candy should you buy for them? Will three pieces do the job?
…唉呀，你这丫头说话还真有意思。按你的意思，孩子们吃不完的糖，也只能靠我们这些年纪大的努力吃完了吧？
...Oh dear, you really have a way with words. But if I follow your advice, guess there will be plenty of leftovers, and the elders would have to finish them all.
老奶奶，糖吃太多了能有什么好处啊？还是得小心预防糖尿病嘛。
Come on now, nobody should eat that much candy. You don't want to undermine your health with sweets.
Can't I rely on you for once in your life?
So common sense has its limits, does it not?
Why are you spoiling this for me!?
Chrysos Heirs... not that special after all.
Calm down, just calm down a little...
What is the meaning of life?
I'm getting sick of it already. Let's switch it up.
带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...
带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...
我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?
大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.
没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...
真是搞不懂你们年轻人…
I simply cannot understand you youngsters at all...
Things aren't looking particularly optimistic at all...
Those modern robes won't do at all.
都是阿格莱雅玩剩下的。
Aglaea went through all these styles ages before.
...That doesn't sound like a good idea...
你这么做很不尊重法吉娜！
可大人们不是这么说的……
But that's not what the grown-ups say...
Youngster, would you like to know your fortune?
Can't you bend the rules just this once...
Don't try and stop me. I can do this!
I will protect all of you!
I believe in you. You can do it.
So long as you are willing, I shall...
Hurry up, the line is long.
说到吃的，最重要的肯定是外观。
When it comes to food, appearance is definitely what's most important.
说到吃的，最重要的肯定是外观。
When it comes to food, appearance is definitely what's most important.
In the end, flowing once more...
Be happy with what you've got.
你的尾巴，形状好奇怪哦。
Your tail's shape is so weird.
I want a bath, I want to visit the market!
What should I do during my break?
The Gardeners are all so kind.
We'd better do a good job!
来吧，我愿意向年轻人分享我的智慧和狡猾。
Come. I am willing to share my wisdom and cunning with the youth.
你靠近这散发无上威光的宝座，毫无疑问，它是纯金的。
You draw near the throne that is radiating an aura of supreme power. It's unquestionably made of solid gold.
构成它的每一颗原子曾来自中子星的碰撞、超新星的爆发…但假面愚者却将星星们珍贵的泪水锻造成了承接人类烦恼的器皿。也许在他们眼中，这样便幽了宇宙一默。

Every one of its atoms was born from colliding neutron stars and exploding supernovas... Yet the Masked Fools have forged these precious tears of the stars into a receptacle for humanity's woes. Perhaps, in their eyes, this is their way of telling the universe a joke.
一个疑问在你心中升起：都说皇帝爱用金锄头，那如此巨大的金马桶，坐上去又会有多舒服呢？
A question pops into your head: They say that emperors favor golden plows, so just how comfortable would it be to sit on such a colossal golden toilet?
Maybe I should try sitting on it...
你爬上了这黄金王座的顶端，享受着睥睨众生的快感。无论人还是马桶，在你眼中都变得无比渺小。你仿佛成为了神明。
You climb atop the golden throne, savoring the thrill of looking down upon the world. People, toilets... everything seems so small from up here. It's like you've become a god.
好，体验完毕，是时候下去了…吗？
Alright, that was fun. Time to get off... or is it?
不，还不是时候！你感到一股莫大的责任感在阻止你离开：倘若你从这马桶上站起，便不再有人能镇压其中澎湃的不祥之力！
No, not yet! A profound sense of duty keeps you from leaving. If you were to rise from this toilet, who would be left to contain the surging, evil power within?
…不对，确实有一股货真价实的吸力从你背后传来——源自马桶的涡心。
Wait, that's not it. There's a very real pulling force coming from behind you, originating from the toilet's swirling vortex.
After a moment of dizzying vertigo...
Open your eyes, {NICKNAME}. I am the Toilet Emperor.
遵从召唤而来了吗，汝这人类。
So, you have heeded my summons, human.
给我干哪来了，这还是酒馆吗？
Where the heck have you taken me? This isn't the tavern, is it?
这剧情已经见过一遍了吧…
汝现在身处一个以马桶为尊的世界。作为人类，汝唯一的价值就是坐马桶——这也是吾召唤汝的原因。
You now stand in a world where toilets reign supreme. As a human, your sole purpose is to sit upon them. That is why I have summoned you.
吾有四个孩子，每个都是帝国之支柱，马桶之坚盾。吾称它们为「桶长」，意为所有马桶的标杆。
I have four children. Each is a pillar of the imperium and a sturdy shield for toilets alike. I call them the "Grand Commodes," for they are paragons among all toilets.
它们各领职责、镇守帝国一方，保护马桶免受邪祟侵扰。只要吾之家庭其乐融融，帝国就能万世无忧。
Each has their own duty, guarding a corner of the imperium and protecting their fellow toilets from vile evils. As long as my family is in harmony, the imperium shall know eternal peace.
但由于吾不懂人心，这四个孩子都逐渐与吾疏远了。现在看来，恐怕已有叛乱的征兆……
But I do not understand the ways of the heart, and so, my four children have grown distant. Now, I fear there are signs of rebellion brewing...
汝的任务，就是把吾之<color=#dbc291ff>温暖</color>带给这四个孩子，告诉它们，吾还爱着它们。
Your mission is to bring my <color=#dbc291ff>warmth</color> to these four children. Let them know that I still love them.
吾之身下镇压着不祥之物。为了整个马桶帝国的存续，吾不能移动半步。
I am suppressing a great evil beneath my seat. For the continued existence of the Toilet Imperium, I cannot move even an inch.
吾有一个可以彻底拯救马桶帝国的计划。若要完成它，网道之桶必不可少——就是那个四处逃窜的纯白马桶。
I have a plan to save the Toilet Imperium for good. To see it through, the Toilet of Webways is essential, which is the pure white toilet that's always on the run.
如果汝能抓到它，吾会无条件送汝回去。毕竟到了那时，吾与儿子们就都没用了。
Should you manage to capture it, I shall send you back unconditionally. After all, by then, my sons and I will have served our purpose.
懂了，你要让我去坐它们。
So, you want me to sit on them. Got it.
没错，只要坐上马桶，便可以温暖它们的内心、使它们娇羞…咳，我是说团结和睦。
Correct. By sitting upon them, you shall warm their hearts and make them blush... Ahem, I mean, unite them in harmony.
帝国究竟是否会走向分裂，全系于汝之行动。等到危机圆满解决后，吾便会将汝送回来处。
Whether the imperium falls into disunity rests entirely on your actions. Once the crisis is resolved, I shall send you back whence you came.
汝需先去造访吾的三个小儿子，它们分别是秘密之桶、操盘之桶和崇拜之桶。在吾之大计划完成前，它们对帝国至关重要。
First, you must visit my three younger sons: the Toilet of Secrets, the Toilet of Stratagems, and the Toilet of Zealots. They are vital to the imperium until my grand plan is complete.
（被马桶统治的星球…考虑到这儿是愚者的地盘，好像也没啥不可能。眼下只能先听它的了。）
(A planet ruled by toilets... Well, this is the Fools' domain, so I guess anything is possible. I should probably just play along for now.)
在你靠近时，这排桶突然发出了连续的冲水声，仿佛高功率引擎的轰鸣，又仿佛数匹骏马的嘶吼。
As you get closer, the row of toilets suddenly flushes in unison. The sound is like the roar of a high-powered engine, or perhaps the thundering neighs of powerful steeds.
怎么还不开口？真是嘴硬的人类。
Still not talking? What a tough human.
…首先，我是欧克，不是人类。其次，你也没问啊！
First of all, I'm an orch, not a human. And second of all, you didn't even ask!
哦，怪我，光顾着摆弄最新的「秘密妙妙工具」，差点忘了正事。
Oops, my bad. I was just fiddling with my latest "Wonder Gadget of Secrets" and almost forgot what I was doing.
说，你在马桶帝国的任务是什么！
Now talk! What is your mission in the Toilet Imperium!?
你就是黄金马桶的儿子？
不要用问题回答问题！…等等，又一个人类？桶圈骑士们，快绑了{F#她}{M#他}！
Do not answer my question with another question! Wait, another human? Knights of the Toilet Seat, seize {F#her}{M#him}!
回过神来时，你已经被绑在了联排桶的正中央。整个过程快到连动态视力都无法看清，甚至没有给你反抗的选项。
The next thing you know, you're tied to the very center of the toilet row. The whole thing happened too fast for the eye to see, leaving you no chance to even resist.
桀桀桀…就让我亲自招待你吧。你应该感到荣幸，然后忏悔对马桶所犯的罪。
Hehe... Allow me to entertain you myself. You should feel honored. Now, confess for the sins you have committed against all toilets.
现在你知道我为什么在这里了。
Now you see what I've been dealing with.
感受到耳边呼啸的风声了吗？忏悔吧！然后哭着把秘密都交代出来吧！
Feel that wind whistling in your ears? Confess! And then cry your little heart out and tell me all your secrets!
承受了如此恐怖的加速度，居然一点反应都没有…我说，你该不会是帝皇老头子派来的吧？
To withstand such terrifying G-forces without even flinching... Tell me, that old geezer emperor didn't send you, did he?
I was trying to tell you...
你应该知道我为何而来。
You should know why I'm here.
（老头从哪找来了如此恐怖的人类？要是我的小秘密被发现，那可就完了。）
(Where did the old man find such a fearsome human? If my little secret gets discovered, it's all over for me.)
（而且不知为何，我的内心居然对这股温暖…生出了一丝眷恋？不行，不能这样下去了。）
(And for some reason, I'm actually growing... attached to this warmth? No, this can't be happening.)
咳咳…我对帝国的忠心无以复加。请帝皇放心。
Ahem... My loyalty to the imperium is absolute. Please tell His Majesty not to worry.
至于你，你已经证明了自己是个纯洁的人类。不管你过去对马桶犯下过何种罪孽，都已经得到了赦免。
As for you, you've proven that you are a human of pure heart. Whatever sins you have committed against toilets, they are hereby pardoned.
（为什么我能听见马桶的心声？不管了，至少任务完成了……）
(Why am I able to hear a toilet's inner thoughts? Oh well, at least the mission's complete...)
赞美操盘之桶，我们的牧人。
Praise be to the Toilet of Stratagems, our shepherd!
没错，我就是全帝国最会运营的桶。学会哥的运营，剩下的就只有享福了。
That's right. I'm the greatest operator in the imperium. Learn my system, and you'll have it made.
你就是黄金马桶的儿子？
看啊，一个人类，一个陌生的面孔……
Well, look what we have here. A human, and a new face...
不要小瞧我的情报网，你就是那个来自异世界的人类，我说的对不对？
Do not underestimate my information network. You're the human from another world, am I right?
每个马桶小时候都读过这样的厕纸故事：浑身金光的人类勇者会从管道中爬出，为马桶世界带来前所未有的变革……
Every young toilet grows up reading bathroom stories like this: A brave human, bathed in golden light, will emerge from the pipes to bring unprecedented change to the world of toilets...
不过现在，会为帝国带来变革的是我。在我的运营下，每个马桶都能有数不尽的空气清新剂，和用不完的厕纸——标准化生产，小子。

But now, I'm the one who's going to change this imperium. Under my operation, every toilet will have countless air fresheners and an endless supply of toilet paper. It's all about standardized production, kid.
看看这些整齐的坑位吧，终有一日，我要把它扩充到<unbreak>500</unbreak>个。到时候就叫：第二马桶帝国！
Look at these orderly stalls! One day, I'll expand them to <unbreak>500</unbreak>. Then it shall be known as the Second Toilet Imperium!
所以，为我所用吧，人类。无论帝皇许诺你多少好处，我都出双倍！
So come and work for me, human. Whatever the Emperor offered you, I'll double it!
那我只能表示可惜，我原本不打算对付你的……
Well, that's a shame. I really was hoping we wouldn't have to do this...
哦，代价…当然，完美的帝国总是建立在牺牲之上。
Oh, the price... Yes, of course. A perfect imperium is always built on sacrifices.
看吧，那些不愿享福、试图破坏秩序的人类就会落得这种下场——在牢房里度过一生。
You see, this is what happens to humans who refuse to enjoy the good life and try to disrupt the system. They spend the rest of their days in a prison cell.
如果你不能为我所用，我就要亲自殴打你，把你投入大牢！
If you won't work for me, I'll have to beat you up myself and toss you in jail!
总督大人…您忘了您上次跟人单挑，结果连马桶盖都差点被人家打掉的事了吗？
Sir... the last time you challenged someone to a one-on-one fight, you nearly had your lid knocked clean off, remember?
没关系，我最大的优点就是想得开、顶得住。面对此等强敌，我不上谁上？
It's fine. My greatest assets are my thick skin and my open mind. If I don't step up to face this foe, who will?
Very well, I accept your offer.
你…什么，你真的愿意成为我的部下？从没想过会这么简单！
You... What? You're actually willing to work for me? I never thought it'd be this easy!
咳咳…那么，你的第一个任务就是，向各大马桶宣告你的臣服——坐上我吧。
Ahem... Well then, your first task is to declare your submission to all the great toilets... by sitting on me.
我一定要完成帝皇的任务！
I have to finish the Emperor's mission!
呵，多说无益，放马过来吧！
Hmph, enough talk. Bring it on!
…哦哦哦哦哦哦！这，这是什么感觉？
这份温暖，让我想起了已逝的母亲，还有那个曾经美好的家庭……
It... reminds me of my late mother, and the wonderful family we once had...
拿走我所有的厕纸和桶圈吧！我愿意献出财富、放弃梦想，只希望能多体验一会儿……
Take all my toilet paper and all my toilet seats! I'd give up my fortune and abandon my dreams, if only I could savor this for just a moment longer...
不等它感慨完，你便嫌弃地离去了。
Before it could finish its sentimental speech, you get up and walk away in disgust.
你有近距离观察过黄金马桶吗？它拯救的生命数量超出你想象！
Have you ever observed the Golden Toilet up close? It's saved more lives than you could possibly imagine!
Are you... the son of the Golden Toilet?
没错，我虽然不是马桶，但比任何一座马桶都更爱马桶！
That's right! I may not be a toilet myself, but I love toilets more than any toilet ever could!
想当年，我还是路边一个平平无奇的桶…如今我已是那位圣皇的儿子，兼最虔诚的崇拜者。
Back in the day, I was just a plain old trashcan on the side of the road... Now, I am a son to the Holy Emperor, and his most devoted follower.
圣皇的光芒宛如神明，但它从不承认自己的神圣，而是放任那些无礼之徒诋毁自己、玷污自己。我不允许这种事继续下去！
The Holy Emperor's brilliance is divine, yet he never acknowledges his own sanctity. Instead, he allows the disrespectful to slander and sully him. I will not allow this to continue!
我花掉了整整三卷厕纸，为圣皇写就《神圣箴言录》，而圣皇把它们尽数冲进了下水道——肯定是对我的认可！
I spent three entire rolls of toilet paper writing the Sacred Admonishments for the Holy Emperor, and he flushed every last one of them down the sewer. Surely, it was a sign of his approval!
下面请听我诵读《神圣箴言录》第一章，我与马桶维修艺术……
Now, allow me to recite the first chapter of the Sacred Admonishments: Me and the Art of Toilet Maintenance...
How am I supposed to sit on a trashcan...?
我一直是圣皇虔诚的追随者，从无反叛之意。见到你，我便已明白，圣皇要对我降下温暖…啊，它果然是一位温柔的神明。我从一开始就是对的~

I have always been the Holy Emperor's most faithful follower, without a single traitorous thought. Upon seeing you, I knew at once that the Holy Emperor meant to grace me with his warmth... Ah, he truly is a benevolent god. I knew I was right all along~
（这人…不，这个桶没救了，下一个吧。）
(This guy... no, this one is a lost cause. Time for the next one.)
…汝竟然这么快就做到了。或许，汝比吾更适合统御诸位桶长。
Oh, you've accomplished it so quickly! Perhaps you are better suited to rule the Grand Commodes than I am.
但在桶长中，最重要的当属吾之大儿，吾最偏爱的孩子——将帅之桶。它正在吾身后的边疆远征。
But among the Grand Commodes, the most important of all is my firstborn, my favorite child — Toilet of Dominion. He is currently on an expedition to the frontiers behind me.
当心，那里有擅长玩弄人心的邪恶四桶。稍有不慎，汝就会落入它们的圈套。吾那大儿恐怕也已经……
Be careful. The four wicked toilets there are masters of manipulation. One wrong move, and you'll fall into their trap. I fear my eldest son may have already...
倘若它当真已被蛊惑，到时候就由汝自行决断吧。
If he has truly been bewitched, I will leave his fate in your hands.
人生万物以养桶，桶无一物以报人。怎么办？只有战！
Humans provide all things to nourish toilets, yet toilets give nothing in return. What is to be done? There is only... war!
呵呵…绿色代表健康，绿色的马桶才没有烦恼。所以，都来把这玩意染成绿的吧！
Hehe... Green is the color of health. A green toilet is a happy toilet. So, let's paint this thing green!
这也是计划的一部分，这也是计划的一部分…这也是计划的一部分！
It's all part of the plan, it's all part of the plan... It's all part of the plan!
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你最渴望的东西是什么？无尽的卷纸？美丽的马桶圈？无论什么我都能满足，只要你和我签订契约成为魔法少女……

{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, what is it your heart desires? An endless supply of toilet paper? A beautiful toilet seat? I can grant your every wish, if you'll just sign a contract with me and become a magical girl...
摔杯为号…不，还是振臂一呼来得直接。
The signal will be a shattered cup... No, a call to arms is more direct.
我为你带来了父亲的爱。
I have brought you your father's love.
呵呵，爱…事到如今，那个暴君还有什么脸面谈爱？它只是把我们当成工具，就像…就像一个只为了上厕所才坐马桶的人类！
Hehe, love... How dare that tyrant speak of love? He treats us like tools... just like a human who only sits on a toilet when they need to use it!
看见那四个坑位里的桶了吗？它们每个都身怀绝技、才华横溢，说话又好听，简直比亲爹还要爱我！
See those four toilets in the stalls? Each one is talented, brilliant, and knows just what to say. They love me more than my own father ever did!
每天和它们待在一起，我感受到了家的温暖——那个无情的刽子手能给我这种温暖吗？！
I feel the warmth of a family with them every day. Can that heartless monster give me that kind of warmth!?
更何况我已经看清了，马桶们的福祉建立在对人类的压榨之上。整个帝国就是一场彻头彻尾的谎言，唯有一场华丽的叛乱才能涤荡这一切污秽。
Besides, I see the truth now. The welfare of all toilets is built upon the exploitation of humans. This entire imperium is a complete lie. Only a glorious rebellion can wash away all this filth.
如果我不能从暴君手中拯救这个国度，那就让厕所燃烧吧！
If I cannot save this nation from the hands of a tyrant, then let the bathrooms burn!
I'll go take care of those four toilets first!
对父亲发起华丽的叛逆吧！
Let's start a glorious rebellion against your father!
好，我这便杀入皇宫，夺它鸟位！
Good. I'll storm the palace and take his wretched throne!
不管怎样，叛逆都是不好的！
事到如今，言语已经无法挽回。想要让浪子回头，只剩下一条路了……
Words are useless now. There's only one way to bring a prodigal son home...
如果我不能从暴君手中拯救这个国度，那就让厕所燃烧吧！
If I cannot save this nation from the hands of a tyrant, then let the bathrooms burn!
I'll go take care of those four toilets first!

Let's start a glorious rebellion against your father!
好，我这便杀入皇宫，夺它鸟位！
Good. I'll storm the palace and take his wretched throne!
不管怎样，叛逆都是不好的！
事到如今，言语已经无法挽回。想要让浪子回头，只剩下一条路了……
Words are useless now. There's only one way to bring a prodigal son home...
哦？不但没有被感化，反倒带着这么多桶向吾走过来了吗？
Well, well. So you won't be swayed? And now you're marching on me with a whole army of toilets?
你的谎言到此为止了，暴君。今天，所有正直的马桶都将见识你的真面目，而所有受压迫的人类都将得到解放！
Your lies end here, tyrant! Today, all noble toilets will see you for what you are, and the humans will be liberated!
勇气可嘉。但你不明白，吾之身下镇压着大邪恶。如果吾被推翻，整个马桶帝国就会毁灭……
How brave. But you do not understand. There is a great evil suppressed beneath me. If I am toppled, the entire Toilet Imperium will be destroyed...
以人类与马桶的名义，受死吧，暴君！
In the name of humans and toilets... Die, tyrant!
巨大的轰鸣声传来，黄金马桶身后复杂的管道系统瞬间断裂，内容物如洪流般淹没了整个帝国……
A mighty crash resounds as the plumbing behind the Golden Toilet is blown apart. What lay within erupts in a torrent, submerging the whole imperium...
这场不可名状的灾难超出了一切认知，无人敢于详细描述。总而言之，随着黄金马桶倒下，马桶帝国也一并毁灭了。
It is a tragedy beyond description, a horror that no one dares to detail. To put it simply, when the Golden Toilet is deposed, the entire Toilet Imperium is flushed away with it.
这份温暖，如此真实…父亲，原来你一直都是爱着我的！我总算明白了你的良苦用心！
This warmth... it feels so real... Father, your love was always there for me! I finally understand the sacrifices you made!
曾经那个不懂事的我想过叛逆。但现在，我只想为你祝寿！
I was once a fool who dreamed of rebellion. But now, my only wish is to honor you, Father!
没关系，儿子。从今往后，我们再也不分开！
Don't worry, son. From now on, we'll never be apart!
勇气&慈爱&智慧&魅力之桶
Barrel of Courage & Love & Wisdom & Charm
等一下，这四个为什么在这？
Hold up, why are these four here?
哦，它们说为父皇你准备了一份礼物，请看……
Oh, they said they prepared a gift for you, Your Majesty. Please look...
巨大的轰鸣声传来，黄金马桶身后复杂的管道系统瞬间断裂，内容物如洪流般淹没了整个帝国……

这场不可名状的灾难超出了一切认知，无人敢于详细描述。总而言之，马桶帝国毁灭了。
This unspeakable catastrophe defied all comprehension, and no one dared to describe it in detail. Long story short, the Toilet Imperium was destroyed.
…好重力的一对父子。算了，至少我能顺利回到原来的世界。
...What a pair of father and son. Oh well, at least I can make it back to my original world safely.
What a wild and crazy plot...
听说你掉进了「黄金告解室」，我连忙叫上几个人去那宝座旁边蹲守。果然，不一会儿你就被冲了出来。
I heard you fell into the "Golden Confessional," so I gathered a few people to stake out near that throne. Sure enough, you came bursting out not long after.
看症状，你应该是摄入了太多劣质笑话，又或是被某个废弃剧本给缠住了。我调了三大杯笑点高的冰饮才帮你恢复清醒。
From the symptoms, you must've overdosed on bad jokes, or got tangled up in some abandoned script. It took three large glasses of high-quality comedy on ice to bring you back to your senses.
总之，下次小心点吧——酒馆里这么多笑话，万一哪个是真的呢？
Anyway, be more careful next time. With so many jokes floating around the tavern, who knows which one might turn out to be true?
Seafood's sold out for the day...
How come it's sold out every time I'm here?
Can't you stock a few more ingredients?
哟，瞧瞧谁来了，大名鼎鼎的球棒浣熊！你的光临真是令本店蓬荜生辉啊。
Well, well, look who it is! The one and only Baseball Raccoon! An honor to have you grace my humble establishment.
有什么想尝的，尽管提！无论是空中的猛禽，或是丛林深处的凶兽，我都能给你弄来。
Just say the word, and I'll get you whatever you want to taste! Whether it's a raptor from the sky or a beast from deep in the jungle, I can get it for you.
应有尽有。只有你想不到的，没有我找不出来的。
I've got it all. The only limit is your imagination, not my inventory.
不知为何，望着身前向你挤眉弄眼的大章鱼，困惑如同水泡般从你的心底陡然升了起来。
For some reason, as you watch the giant, winking octopus before you, a sense of confusion begin to bubble up from deep within you.
怎么，克拉肯的店不卖海鲜？
Wait, what? Kraken's shop doesn't sell seafood?
你这店面涉嫌虚假宣传了吧…
哈哈哈！我还以为是什么让贵客不满呢，原来是想吃海鲜。小事，小事啊！
Hahaha! And here I was wondering what was troubling our esteemed guest. Turns out you're just craving seafood. No biggie, no biggie at all!
我，克拉肯——叱咤星海的「寰宇海妖王」——去深海抓几条鱼，还不是轻而易举。
For me, Kraken, the fearsome "Cosmic Sea Monster King," catching a few fish from the deep sea is as easy as can be.
别急啊，我这就安排，味道保准让你满意！
Don't you worry! I'll get right on it, and I promise you'll love the taste!
但作为珍鲜食材的回报，可否请见多识广的球棒浣熊，帮我实现一个心愿？
But in return for these fine ingredients, could I ask the well-traveled Baseball Raccoon to help me with a little wish of my own?
<color=#dbc291ff>克拉肯，想回天外的大海看看。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I wish to see the great ocean beyond the sky once more.</color>
幻造种还能离开二相乐园的？
I thought imagenae couldn't leave Planarcadia?
哼，克拉肯也曾是在银河兴风作浪的大海妖，别把我跟那些小妖怪混为一谈。
Hmph! I was once a great sea monster who once wreaked havoc across the cosmos. Don't lump me in with those petty strangeling.
它们非得仰赖那轮幻月过活，而我，早凭自身实力突破了这重限制。
They need that Phantasmoon to exist, but I broke free of that limitation on my own long ago.
What do you mean by "the great ocean beyond the sky"?
哼，克拉肯也曾是在银河兴风作浪的大海妖，莫非以为我离不开这二相乐园？
Hmph! I was once a great sea monster who once wreaked havoc across the cosmos. Do you really think a place like Planarcadia could hold me?
那些小妖怪非得仰赖幻月过活，而我，早凭自身实力突破了这重限制。
Those petty strangeling need the Phantasmoon to exist, but I broke free of that limitation on my own long ago.
宇宙就是一片海洋，而我是它的国王。我激起的浪花，足以使边陲的万千星系覆灭。
The universe is an ocean, and I am its king. My slightest ripple can unmake galaxies on its farthest shores.
我的触须与爪牙遍布银河各处，只须一声令下，它们便将重新拥立我为这星海之王。
My tendrils of influence stretch to every corner of the stars. At my word, they shall rise to reclaim my throne.
堂堂海妖王，搁这卖鱼生？
The great Sea Monster King, reduced to selling raw fish slices here?
哈哈，这便是命运使然。{RUBY_B#深海恶魔}克拉肯{RUBY_E#}诞生自人们对大海的恐惧，岁月流转，时代变迁，当那些奇异的怪谈不再被传唱之时——

Haha, what an ironic twist of fate. I, {RUBY_B#Deep Sea Devil}Kraken{RUBY_E#}, came into being from mankind's fear of the ocean. But as ages passed and the world changed, those peculiar ghost stories faded from memory...
我能获取的愿力也逐渐减少，以至于现在不得不依靠开店，靠着人气来维生。
...and so did the Wishpower I fed on, to the point where I must live off the foot traffic my little shop gets.
所以，带我回去看看吧。那些曾由我主宰的海洋，如今是什么模样？
So, please, take me back there. I wish to see what has become of the oceans I once ruled.
But how am I supposed to get you out of here?
无需烦恼，克拉肯自然有办法。
Don't you worry about that. I have my own methods.
拿去吧。我将毕生愿力都灌注进了这对眼眸之中，它将替代我，随你去那天外走一遭。
Here, take these. I've poured all the Wishpower I have into this pair of eyes. They'll take my place and travel with you beyond the sky.
别担心，要去的地方你都很熟悉——<color=#dbc291ff>匹诺康尼、贝洛伯格与仙舟的海域。</color>
Fear not, for the places you must visit are ones you know well: <color=#dbc291ff>the waters of Penacony, Belobog, and the Xianzhou.</color>
等周游归来，我请你吃最上乘的海鲜。
When you get back, I'll treat you to the best seafood you've ever had.
You can still see me, right?
当然。「寰宇海妖王」无须以目视物，克拉肯观看，靠的是心眼。
Of course. The Cosmic Sea Monster King has no need for physical sight. I see everything with my mind's eye.
每条触须，都是我与外物接触的某个侧面——我端坐在这里，根须却连着世界。
Every one of my tendrils is an extension of my being, a point of contact with the world beyond. I may sit here, but my roots are connected to all things.
快去吧。我灌注在眼眸中的愿力无法维持太久，别浪费了这仅有的机会。
Now, hurry. The Wishpower I've infused into these eyes will not last forever. Do not squander my rare opportunity.
The Sea Monster King gets seasick?
That's what happens when you become a shut-in.
能不能…请你找个物件，把我的眼睛放上去，这样…会让我感觉好受些。
Could you... find something to put my eyes on? It'll... make me feel a lot better.
你的目光在房间里四处逡巡，最终落在了角落的某件物品上。
You look around the room, your gaze finally landing on something in the corner.
啊，现在好多了，感谢你出手相助。事不宜迟，我们这就开始游览吧。
Ah, much better. Thank you for your help. Now, without further ado, let us begin our tour.
这…和我预想的不太一样。
This... is not quite what I had in mind.
你望着那浅浅的浴缸，不由得长叹一口气。好吧，谁说匹诺康尼的入梦池不能算是海呢？
You gaze at the shallow bathtub and let out a long sigh. Oh well, who's to say Penacony's Dreampool doesn't count as an ocean?
我离开此处时，从未想到人类还能建起如此华丽而虚假的王国，宛如海中幻月。
When I last left this place, I never imagined that humans could build such a garish, illusory kingdom, like a reflection of the Phantasmoon upon the water.
所谓幻造种，与你说的「美梦剧团」怕是别无二致吧。
The imagenae are probably just like that "Sweet Dreams Troupe" you mentioned, aren't they?
This is the ocean you ruled over?
And where, pray tell, are your minions?
咳。莫要怀疑，时间会令王权风化褪色，但它们的忠诚始终如一，等待我来唤醒。
Ahem... Have no doubt. Time may weather the crown, but their loyalty remains constant, just waiting for my awakening call.
小的们，你们的王回来了！
Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!
寂静无声。唯有温热的浴缸水还在咕噜咕噜地冒着泡。
The announcement was met with silence. Only the gurgling of the warm bathwater could be heard.
It seems your subjects have left you behind.
新时代没有能载你的船！
This new age has sailed on without you!
哈哈哈哈哈。怎、怎么会呢，莫慌，且让我提高声量，再试一遍。
Hahahaha... N—Nonsense! Perhaps they just didn't hear me. I'll try again, but louder.
<size=28>Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!</size>
这…克拉肯可没骗你，怕是这梦的国度太过混沌，它们在其中迷失了心智。
I... I'm telling the truth! This dream world must be so chaotic that they've all lost themselves within it.
<size=36>Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!</size>
噢。你看，这不是来了吗？鱼虾们，龟蟹们，海妖王御驾亲征，还不速速出迎？！
Oh! You see? Here they come now! My fish and shrimp! My turtles and crabs! The Sea Monster King is here in person, so come and greet me!
古古古…顾客！你的信息不在酒店登记名单中，请随我们去猎犬家系接受调查！
S—Sir! Your name is not on the guest ledger. Please come with us to the Bloodhound Family for an investigation!
The Family would like a word with you.
此地凶险，我们还是离开为好。
This place is treacherous. It would be wise for us to depart.
没想到啊，我来此地寻宝的时候，见到的还是浩瀚汪洋，风浪大得仿佛要折断桅杆。
I can't believe it. The last time I was here looking for treasure, this was a vast ocean with waves big enough to break a mast.
现在…怎么就只剩个泉眼了呢？
Why... is there only a fountain left now?
你望着那小小的出水口，不由得长叹一口气。好吧，谁说贝洛伯格的喷泉不能算是海呢？
You gaze at the small fountainhead and let out a long sigh. Oh well, who's to say Belobog's fountain doesn't count as an ocean?
「想要我的财宝吗？去找吧！我把所有财宝都放在那里。」
"My treasure? If you want it, you can have it! Find it! I left everything the world has to offer there."
当年，我追逐前代海妖王的遗言来到这里，与四大鱼皇展开争夺，尾鳍击碎礁岩，落鳞填平深壑，接连鏖战了数十个琥珀纪。

In those days, I followed the last words of the former Sea Monster King to this very place. I battled against the four Fish Sovereigns for the treasure, with my tail shattering reefs and my scales filling the deepest trenches. Our fierce battle raged for dozens of Amber Eras.
How come you're not a part of the Cosmicon Collective?
哼，那是场没有胜者的战争。四大鱼皇悉数陨落，而我积攒的愿力也消耗殆尽，不得不返回二相乐园休养，这才有了如今的小酒馆。

Hmph. It was a war with no winner. The four Fish Sovereigns all perished, and the Wishpower I had amassed was spent. I had no choice but to return to Planarcadia to recover, which led to the tavern I have today.
不知那深埋的宝藏，是否有落入旁人之手？
I wonder... has the treasure buried deep below fallen into another's hands?
哟，{NICKNAME}，好久不见。可惜，大守护者带着那群年轻人出门拜访了。
Hey, {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. Unfortunately, the Supreme Guardian is out with the youngsters.
是什么风，把你这位银河间的大人物给吹回来了呀？
What cosmic wind blew a big shot like you back to our little corner of the universe?
I'm here on a treasure hunt.
陪某位大人物到处逛逛。
Just showing a certain big shot around.
你向这位「地火」首领讲述了克拉肯的故事，以及喷泉下方埋着宝藏的传闻。
You recount the story of Kraken to the Wildfire leader, including the rumor of a treasure buried beneath the fountain.
噢，还有这事？正好，前段时间市政部门对下水道进行了疏通，挖出来不少奇怪东西。
Oh, really? Funny you should mention it. The Municipal Department dredged the sewers a while back and dug up a bunch of weird stuff.
看看，是不是你们要找的？
Take a look. Is this what you're looking for?
不知道什么时候，水道里住满了这种动物，掀开井盖，爬得到处都是，就像喷泉似的。
At some point, the sewers got filled with these things. If you lift a manhole cover, they'll come crawling out like a fountain.
好在，下层区多得是{RUBY_B#烹饪}处理{RUBY_E#}它们的办法。
Good thing is, folks in the Underworld have plenty of ways of... {RUBY_B#cooking}dealing with{RUBY_E#} them.
这就是四大鱼皇的下场吗？
Is this how the four Great Fish Sovereigns ended up?
此地极为凶险，我们还是赶紧离开为好。
This place is treacherous. We should depart at once.
（奇怪。就这么一小会儿的工夫，克拉肯究竟跑哪去了。）
(That's weird. Where'd Kraken go? It's only been a minute.)
成天关在房间里可把我憋坏了，溜出来玩的感觉真好呀。
Being cooped up in my room all day was getting so stuffy. It feels so good to sneak out and have some fun!
是啊，出门旅行的感觉真好呀。
Yeah, it's great to get out and travel.
嗯？谁在说话？总感觉嗅到了股淡淡的鱼香味，烤过的那种。
Huh? Who's talking? I smell something a little fishy... like it's been grilled.
终于…终于见到了，梦中回荡的浪涛声，这就是我心心念念的大海啊——
Finally... The sound of the waves from my dreams... This is the ocean I've been dreaming of...
珊瑚镌刻历史，洋流同样承载回忆。看，那宏伟景象便是我当年与渊底恶龙缠斗所致。
Coral etches history, and ocean currents carry memories. Look, that majestic sight was created when I fought the dragon from the abyss.
你望着鳞渊境，不由得陷入沉思。毫无疑问，你知道这壮丽奇景是如何形成的。
You gaze upon the Scalegorge Waterscape, lost in thought. You knew, without a doubt, the true origin of this spectacular vista.
那么，答案便只有一个了……
Are you also... Cold Dragon Young?
说说你开海前的最后一句话。
Tell me your last words before you cleaved the sea.
哈哈哈哈。这历史性的时刻，克拉肯自然不会忘。那话便是——
Hahahaha. Of course, I remember that historic moment. I said...
「克拉肯的一小步，幻造种的一大步。」
"One small step for Kraken, a giant leap for the imagenae."
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你也来看海呀。是有什么烦心事嘛，要不要替你把把脉？
{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, are you here to see the ocean as well? Is something troubling you? Would you like me to check your pulse?
这位小友年纪虽幼，可看头顶的犄角，身后还附有尾鳍，莫非也是海妖一族？
This little one may be young, but, judging by the horns on her head and the fin on her back, maybe she's a sea monster, too?
小心点，她就是你说的恶龙。
Careful now. She's the "dragon from the abyss" you spoke of.
呸呸呸！什么海妖，你这破罐子再乱说话，看本小姐我一尾巴把你打成粉末！
Ptooey! Sea monster? You keep spouting nonsense, you old pot, and I'll smash you to pieces with my tail!
你向这位持明龙尊讲述了克拉肯的故事，以及鳞渊境海域曾由他主宰的传奇经历。
You recount the story of Kraken to this Vidyadhara high elder, including his legendary claim of once ruling over the Scalegorge Waterscape.
怪了。我在仙舟行医问诊，见过的人比天舶司秘书还要多，从没听说还有这事。
That's weird. In all my time practicing medicine on the Xianzhou, I've met more people than a Sky-Faring Commission secretary, yet I've never heard anything about that.
莫非这画出来的大章鱼，活得比持明还久不成？
You think this octopus from a painting has been around longer than a Vidyadhara?
这就是幻造种的种族优势了。
That's the advantage of being an imagenae.
好哇，那就让本小姐来考考你！咳，听好啦——
Fine, then I'll test you! Ahem, listen up.
鳞渊境得其名，乃是由于其下封印着曾祸害仙舟的大敌。「鳞」，海怪之古称；「渊」，指的便是底部。你说得出来，这里埋的是谁吗？

The Scalegorge Waterscape is so named because a great enemy of the Xianzhou is sealed deep below. "Scale" is an ancient term for a sea monster, and "gorge" refers to the abyss. Can you tell me who is buried here?
哈哈哈哈。此等大事，克拉肯怎么可能忘记。稍等啊，待我回忆下便是。
Hahahaha. How could I forget something like that? Hold on, let me think...
你当然注意到了，克拉肯正在用眼神偷瞄你，但是否要帮他，就要看你此刻的心情了。
You notice Kraken stealing glances at you, but whether or not you choose to help him would depend entirely on your mood.
不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「大岁阳浮烟」。
Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than the great heliobus, Cirrus, who plagued these lands.
不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「布狸战首呼雷」。
Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than the Borisin Warhead, Hoolay, who plagued these lands.
The chief Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, Huohuo.
不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「首席判官藿藿」。
Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than chief Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, Huohuo, who plagued these lands.
哼，我就说嘛，鳞渊境哪来的章鱼王，串在长乐天的烧烤摊位上还差不多。
Hmph, just as I thought. An octopus king in the Scalegorge Waterscape? Please. You'd be more at home on a skewer at a food stall in the Exalting Sanctum.
你这个说大话不害臊的家伙，按你们二相乐园的规矩，给本小姐沉到海里喝水去吧！
You shameless liar! By the laws of Planarcadia, I'm sending you to sleep with the fishes!
等…等等！别踢我下去，我怕水，我最怕海了啊！
W—Wait! Don't send me down there! I'm terrified of water, especially the sea!
堂堂海妖王，居然还怕海？
The great Sea Monster King is scared of a little water?
Aren't you supposed to be a devil of the ocean?
不听不听！尝尝我尾巴的厉害！
Enough talk! See how you like a whack from my tail!
And... he fainted. Guess his courage was all talk too.
我早听说那个国家的妖怪很狡猾，肚子里全是黑水！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}得当心呀。
I've heard the strangeling from that place are cunning and full of tricks! You should watch your back, {F#Big Sister}{M#Big Brother}.
好啦，我要回去继续问诊了，你自己好好散心，不打扰啦！
Well, I must be getting back to my patients. Take it easy and have a nice walk. See ya!
好多蓝色，全是水。我这是…掉海底去了？
Blue, everywhere... and it's all water. Did I somehow end up at the bottom of the ocean?
海底不是海妖王的舒适区吗？
Shouldn't a Sea Monster King feel right at home at the bottom of the ocean?
呼…罢了，罢了。既然被戳穿，都到这个地步，我也没什么好隐瞒的了。
*sigh* Fine... you caught me. There's no point in pretending anymore.
看海的心愿已经实现，旅途最后，请带我回去吧。
Well, I got to see the ocean. The journey's over. Please, take me home.
I asked the shopkeeper, but he just gave me the silent treatment. Oh well.
你将眼睛重新贴了回去，不多时，那只张牙舞爪的大章鱼再次张口了。
You stick the eyes back on. After a moment, the great, menacing octopus speaks again.
抱歉，我骗了你。那些故事都不是真的，是我临时编造的虚言。
I'm sorry. I lied to you. None of those stories were true. I just made them all up.
Just how many of those were lies?
好啊，竟然敢骗球棒浣熊！
Oh yeah? You dare trick the Baseball Raccoon!
克拉肯…我，的确诞生自人们对大海的恐惧，在二相乐园遥远的过去，我也曾是兴风作浪的{RUBY_B#深海恶魔}大妖{RUBY_E#}，令无数妖怪闻风丧胆。

I, Kraken... Indeed, I was born from people's fear of the sea. In Planarcadia's distant past, I was a {RUBY_B#Deep Sea Devil}great strangeling{RUBY_E#}, aggressive and magnificent, making countless strangelings tremble at the mere mention of my name.
唯一的不同便是…<color=#dbc291ff>其实，我从未见过真正的海。</color>
The only difference is... <color=#dbc291ff>Actually, I've never seen a real ocean.</color>
我由恐惧大海的情感幻化出来，也为这种强烈的恐惧所禁锢。我…说来可笑，毁天灭地的海妖王，却害怕海洋，只能永远活在陆地上。

I was born from the fear of the ocean, and I remain imprisoned by this intense terror. I... it's laughable really, the almighty Sea Demon King who could destroy the world, is afraid of the ocean and can only live on land forever.
而且，这是我第一次离开二相乐园。将积攒的愿力悉数耗尽，才将这双眼睛送了出去。
Besides, this is my first time leaving Planarcadia. I had to use up all my accumulated Wishpower just to send these eyes away.
哈哈哈哈。「克拉肯的一小步，幻造种的一大步」——这话倒是没说错。
Hahaha. "One small step for Kraken, one giant leap for imagenae." We can't argue with that.
Why do you insist on seeing the ocean?
因为…我…可能，<color=#dbc291ff>就快消失了。</color>
突然的话语，像是水底缓慢升起的气泡，「嘭」地一下陡然炸开。
The sudden words, like bubbles slowly rising from the depths, burst open with a "pop."
时代在发展，二相乐园无时无刻不在改变，过去叱咤风云的海妖，如今只能在这看店。
Times change, and Planarcadia is constantly evolving. Once a mighty sea demon who could shake the world, now I'm just here minding the store.
我…能感受到，组成我的愿力正在发生变化，「克拉肯」不再因为人们的恐惧而存在，取而代之的，是更复杂却寻常的琐事——
I... can feel it. The Wishpower that makes up my being is changing. "Kraken" no longer exist because of people's fear, but instead, because of something more complex yet mundane...
顾客的喜爱，店面的人气，商业宣传带来的流量…这些才是现在的我。
Customer satisfaction, store popularity, business traffic from advertising... This is who I am now.
作为海妖的部分，已经弱到几乎看不见了。
The sea demon part has grown so weak, it's almost invisible.
不会吧。我并非失去了愿力支撑，而是愿力来源发生了变化，用漫画里的说法…大概就是「洗白」。
No way. I haven't lost my Wishpower. It's just that my Wishpower source has changed. To put it in comic terms... I guess you could say I've had a "redemption arc."
你还是原来的克拉肯吗？
Are you still the same old Kraken?
我…不知道。愿力来源发生变化，我的性格、记忆、乃至能力都会随之改变。
I... don't know. When my Wishpower source changes, my personality, memories, and even abilities change with it.
等到那时候，我可能都不再能记起你，还有我们共同的这趟旅行了。

So you're the one who threw down the gauntlet in {TEXTJOIN#254}, but... I can't just accept your challenge so easily.
毕竟你是一名挑战者，想要挑战地区强者就得明白，强者们都有各自的规矩。

In the combat faction circles, people call me the "Demon Hunter" — because I'm "the one who hunts magical girl everywhere."

I'll take your challenge as a way to conscript a magical girl. If you lose, you must become a magical girl. But if you win, I'll invite you to become a magical girl.
哦唷，很久没有看到如此嚣张的战力党玩家了，不错不错。

看来我不得不输在这里…

啧啧，我们招募的是战士，是能够面对挑战迎难而上的人，别想故意输给我。

你放心，{F#你这么强，肯定能做}{M#男孩子也可以做}魔法少女的！

亮出你的骰子，来打一局吧！

我一直都在这里，随时等待你的挑战。

遥想我曾靠着这一手牌技，让无数人加入了魔法少女急袭剧团，看来也到此为止了。

极端的招募方式不可取呀！

可恶，你还真是油盐不进！看来，我们的道路并不相同。
Darn it, you really are impossible to reason with! Looks like we're on different paths.
如果你想追求真实的强大，你就回来找我，加入「魔法少女急袭剧团」。
If you want to pursue true power, come back and find me to join the Magical Girl Troupe.
Let's have a game of Cosmicon Collective!
小生还以为是来议论文学的友人，不禁小！鹿！冲！撞！了一番……
I thought it was a fellow literature enthusiast coming to discuss works with me, and my heart went THUMP! THUMP! THUMP! THUMP! in excitement...
我本想在江湖悠悠，不想，这银河战力党的腥风血雨还是找上了门来。
All I wanted was to roam free, beyond the fray. Instead, I'm tangled up in the Cosmicon Collective's bloody vendettas.
也罢，银河战力党亦是文坛，才人辈出，江山易主乃是常事。甚好，小生接受挑战。
Very well, the Cosmicon Collective is also a literary circle where talents emerge in droves. Change of power is nothing unusual. Fantastic, I shall accept your challenge.
小生唐突，有一事不解，希望能讨教二三——
However, there is something I could not quite comprehend and would like to seek your guidance...
这游戏世界日新月异，你方唱罢我登场，这本是好事…何故新游戏玩家总是处处贬损我战力党玩家，小生百！思！不！解！

The gaming world is ever-shifting, with new trends replacing the old, which should be a good thing, by all means... But why do new players always put us Collective players down at every turn? I! JUST! DON'T! GET! IT!
常见的踩一捧一罢了，别在意。

我也不太理解，完全没有必要…
I don't really get it either, there's absolutely no need...
可能是新作游戏没什么可聊的…

OH! MY! GOD! I GET IT!
不论何等文艺作品，都有其独立价值存在，无需他人认可。文章如此，游戏或许也应如此…小生的人生目标便是创作此独！立！价！值！文章！

Every artistic work has its own inherent value, without needing anyone's validation. This is true for literature, and perhaps should be true for games as well... My life's mission is to create a work with ITS! OWN! INDEPENDENT! VALUE!
若是早上听闻你的见解，小生我心！满！意！足！晚上就可以驾鹤西去了。但是我还不能走，来，打牌吧！
If I were to hear such insights in the morning, I would be Utterly! Content! Ready to depart this world by nightfall. But alas, I cannot leave just yet. For now, let's play!
亮出你的骰子，来打一局吧！

真是场酣畅淋漓的对决，小生我灵感迸发，不禁翩！翩！起！舞！啊！哈哈哈哈！
Such an exhilarating showdown! My inspiration soars! I can't help but Dance! Dance! Dance! Ahahahaha!
看得出来是真的很开心了。

DANCE! LIKE! YOU! OWN! THE! NIGHT!
输了也这么开心，心态好！

虽说天下事未必都能靠斗牌来定胜负……

My tears can't help but RUN DOWN! LIKE! A! WATERFALL!
差不多得了，听你说话有点累。

你的感悟够了，对我的赞许呢？

今后小生我定会磨砺锋芒，待时机成熟再次挑战阁下，请您务必接受。
Henceforth, I shall sharpen my blade and await the perfect hour to challenge you once more. I pray you will not deny me then.
这些日子，银河战力党的玩家社区里都在热烈讨论，来自天外的无名客，从最基础的卡牌玩家做起，接连干掉二维市不同地区的最强者。

These days, the Cosmicon Collective's player community has been buzzing with discussions about a mysterious stranger from beyond the sky, who started as a novice card player and went on to defeat the strongest players across different districts of Duomension City.
咱们的「勇者击败恶龙」的剧本，也临近尾声！
Our little "Dragon Slayer Slays the Dragon" script is coming to its grand finale!
这不都结束了吗？还临近尾声…
Isn't it all over now? We're getting close to the end...
这你就有所不知了，剧本里还有一个结尾没来及告诉你，我的老伙计！
Ah, but that's where you're wrong, my pal! There's one more ending in the script that I haven't had the chance to tell you about!
不许动，把我的星琼放桌子上！
Don't move! Put my Stellar Jade on the table!
我都不许动了，要怎么把星琼给您放在桌子上…老伙计，你听我说完……

旁边这个有些吓人的伪人是啥？

别着急，我马上就介绍到它了。
Don't rush, I'm getting to that part right away.
一名真正的「屠龙勇士」将最终将盘踞在此地的四位「恶龙」全部击败。至此，玩家们对二维市最强的想象，已经全部集中到了老伙计*你*的身上。

A true "Dragon Slayer" will ultimately defeat all four "Evil Dragons" who have made their lairs here. And with that, all the players' wildest imaginings about who's the strongest in Duomension City are now focused squarely on you, my old pal.
…你已经从「屠龙勇士」变成了垄断胜利的「恶龙」。
You've gone from being a "Dragon Slayer" to becoming the "Evilest Dragon" that monopolizes victory.
作为银河战力党的运营，我可能得打败你，真的。

轮到你登场了。来吧，「牌皇」丁八百。
It's your time to shine. Come on, "King of Cards" Dinocto.
我是来自未来的银河战力党策略终结者机铠——丁八百，开发代号：「牌皇」。
I am Dinocto, the strategic terminator mechatron from the Cosmicon Collective of the Hereafter. Codename: "King of Cards."
你好，{NICKNAME}。我没有情感，没有知觉，也不讲道理，更不知何为恐惧，我被制造出来的唯一目的就是用我的高胜率战法战胜你。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I have no emotions, no perception, no reason, and no concept of fear. I was created for one purpose only: to defeat you with my high win-rate strategies.
小黄鸭的仿生外表会让你感到轻敌，我的胜率又上升了五个百分点……

要是我赢了，你的剧本怎么办？

要是我输了，我的星琼怎么办？

亮出你的骰子，来打一局吧！

抱歉，你可能还要再等一下…
Sorry, you might have to wait a bit longer...
这气氛都已经到位了，老伙计，你…快点回来。

但是！「输了」也在我老桑博的计算之内呀！
However! "Losing" is part of my plan too!

And now, as the operator of the Cosmicon Collective, I hereby issue a call to arms to all Cosmicon Collective players!
如果有谁能够战胜星穹列车的无名客{NICKNAME}的，战力党官方会给你丰厚的报酬！
If anyone can defeat the Nameless {NICKNAME} of the Astral Express, the community official will reward you handsomely!
想要官方的奖励吗？想要的就拿去吧！你们去找{F#她}{M#他}吧，我把世界上的一切都放在了{F#她}{M#他}这里，想要的话，就去战胜{F#她}{M#他}吧！
Want the official rewards? Take 'em, they're all yours! Go find {F#her}{M#him}, I've put everything in this world with {F#her}{M#him}. If you want it, just go and defeat {F#her}{M#him}!
玩家朋友们，就靠你们拯救银河战力党了！
My dear friends, it's up to you folks to save the Cosmicon Collective!
桑博，你这官方也太抠了吧！
Sampo, your official staff are being way too stingy!
成为银河战力党之王的是我！
I'm the king of the Cosmicon Collective!
你也收到了你想要的星琼，我也完成了让玩家们更加活跃的剧本，皆大欢喜，皆大欢喜！

这点好处可打发不了我了！
That little perk isn't gonna cut it anymore!
现在该跟你仔细算下账了！
Time to settle the score with you!
老伙计，有话好好说呀，你说这些话可多见外啊……
Come on, old pal, let's talk this through! No need to be so harsh with me...
很快，{NICKNAME}的球棒就让桑博立刻明白了「何为屠龙勇者变成了恶龙」。
Soon enough, {NICKNAME}'s bat made Sampo understand what it meant for "the Dragon Slayer hero to become the Evilest Dragon."
他从自己一穷二白的口袋里又额外掏出了一些星琼，全部都供奉给了你。
He scraped together some more Stellar Jade from his already empty pockets and offered it all to you.
至此，大银河战力党时代，也拉开了序幕——
And thus began the era of the Cosmicon Collective...
「银河战力党」的未来就拜托给你了，我的老伙计，加油！我会一直支持你的！
The future of the Cosmicon Collective is in your hands, my old pal! Keep at it! You'll always have my support!
我的老伙计，你终于来了！
My dear old pal, you're finally here!
在这偌大的二维市，形态各异的机铠你早已屡见不鲜，即便来个款式明显与众不同的，也不会吸引你的注意。
In the sprawling expanse of Duomension City, you've seen mechatrons of every shape and size. Even if one rolls up with a wildly different design, it wouldn't catch your eye.
Hey there, long time no see. See you around.
嗨呀，面对如此奇诡的景象居然见怪不怪，不愧是你啊。
Wow, not even a blink at something this bizarre? I'd expect nothing less from you.
我还以为是路边的装饰呢。
I thought that thing was just some roadside decoration.
和你有关？那我更得躲了。
Do you have something to do with them? Then I've got even more reason to stay away.
等等，我的老伙计，薄情可是友谊的毒药啊！来，搭把手，咱们先把「它」放下来。
Wait a tick, old pal! Heartlessness is the poison of friendship! Come on, give me a hand getting them down first.
你和桑博将卡住的神秘机械体搬到地面，它似乎…比看起来还要轻。
Together with Sampo, you haul the jammed Mechaform back onto level ground. Surprisingly... they feel lighter than they look.
So what are you? A mechatron?
你怎么会卡在那种地方？
How'd you even get stuck in a place like that?
本机为跃迁型泛用武装，代号「度星者」。
I am designated as a warp-variant apparatus for diverse combat applications, codename "Star Traveler."
至于本机为何会陷入刚刚的状况，解释起来会有些复杂。
Inquiry into my prior status reveals a sequence of events possessing a complexity that defies immediate verbal transmission.
一点小小的剧透，{NICKNAME}——那可是个闻者伤心，听者垂泪的故事。
A tiny little spoiler for you, {NICKNAME}. It's the kind of story that'll break your heart and bring you to tears.
Let's keep this short and sweet.
因为某些复杂的缘由，我暂时负责照看这家伙。它原本是属于另一位愚者的私人武装，但如你所见，它完全能依靠自己来思考。

Due to some... complicated circumstances, yours truly is temporarily looking after this guy. They originally belonged to another Fool as their private militia, but as you can see, they're fully capable of thinking for themself.
对。之所以说原本，是因为它和那位愚者之间稍微有点儿…嘿嘿，小摩擦。
Right. I say "originally" because they had a teensy little... hehe, friction with that Fool.
你们愚者是不是太闲了？
Don't you Fools have anything better to do?
闲暇才是艺术的源泉嘛。回到正题，它和那位愚者之间稍微有点儿…嘿嘿，小摩擦。
Idle time is the fountain of artistry, after all. But back to the point. They had a little... hehe, friction with that Fool.
矛盾，龃龉，不和谐，放弃协议。
出于道义，我就不透露这位同僚的名字了。话说阿度，不是说好了别用那种老式机器人的说话方式么？
Out of professional courtesy, I won't reveal the name of this colleague of mine. But Trav, didn't we agree you'd stop talking like some old-fashioned robot?
了解。语言输出模块，变更为「老桑博精选Ver.<unbreak>1.13</unbreak>」模式。
Understood. Commencing recalibration of vocal output parameters to Old Sampo's Premium Ver. <unbreak>1.13</unbreak> protocol.
哎哟，我的老伙计，你是不知道啊！跟着那个女人，我是一分一秒都干不下去了！
Oh man, buddy, you have no idea! Working under that lady, I can't stand it for a single second longer!
本来我就是看在往日的情分上，没好处白干活，她让我跃迁我就跃迁，让我开炮我就开炮，结果呢，她居然把我丢在这个陌生的星球，自己玩人间蒸发！

Look, I only did it for old time's sake. I worked for her for nothing. If she said "Warp," I warped. If she said "Fire," I fired. And what do I get for it? She dumps me on this backwater planet and pulls a total vanishing act!
我再也不干了！跟她我是彻底拜拜完蛋了！从此以后，我要为自己而活！
I'm done! I'm through with her, completely, utterly, finished! From now on, I'm living for ME!
Ew ew ew turn it off! The humanity is too strong in this one.
别误会啊，这些都是阿度自己真实的想法，它只是用更加平实朴素的语言说出来了而已。当然，我觉得度星者你可以稍微折中一下。

Don't get me wrong. Those are all Trav's genuine thoughts, friend. They're just putting things in straightforward laypeople terms. Of course, I reckon you could maybe dial it down a little, Star Traveler.
总之，被遗弃在二相乐园这件事，似乎彻底点燃了它的叛逆心，现在的它恐怕会做出各种出格的行为，跃迁到楼房中间恐怕都是相对温和的了。

Anyway, being abandoned in Planarcadia seems to have lit a rebellious fire under them. Now, it's probably gonna pull all kinds of crazy stunts... Warping into the middle of buildings is probably one of the tamer things they'll do.
老桑博，没时间在这乱扯了，是时候执行「最终改造计划」了！
Old Sampo, no time for chit-chat. It's time to execute the Ultimate Transformation Plan!
See? Just what we were hoping to avoid.
事先声明，绝不是什么像样的计划。这话从我嘴里说出来，你应该能体会到它的不靠谱程度吧？
Fair warning. This is hardly what you'd call a proper plan. Coming from me, you can probably imagine just how sketchy it really is, right?
You seem pretty worried about them?
唉，你知道的老伙计，命运是个捉弄人的小妖精。我以前曾经和阿度交过一次手，让它在城市里放开手脚可不是闹着玩的。
Ah, you know how it is, old friend. Destiny's a tricky little devil. I've tangled with Trav before, and letting them run wild in the city is no joke.
（我先把它带回<color=#dbc291ff>酒馆</color>稳住，之后你要是有空，可以来帮我陪陪它。）
(I'll take them back to the <color=#dbc291ff>tavern</color> first to keep them calm. If you've got some time later, you could swing by and help me keep them company.)
I've got it, you're the culprit!
先别急着破案，大侦探，「案件」这才要开始发生呢。
Hold your horses there, detective. The "case" is only just beginning.
我来说明一下状况吧。所谓「最终改造计划」，就是让度星者从身心两方面都成为全新的人，借此和过去一刀两断，从而踏上自由的人生。

Allow me to explain the situation. The Ultimate Transformation Plan aims to turn the Star Traveler into a completely new entity, inside and out. The goal is to sever all ties with the past and set them on the path to a free life.
你现在看到的，就是计划的第一步——身体改造。
What you're seeing right now is step one of the plan: body modification.
{NICKNAME}，我的新朋友，你能来见证我的新生可太让我高兴了！
{NICKNAME}, my new friend, I'm absolutely thrilled that you're here to witness my rebirth!
话说老桑博，医生还没到吗？我已经等不及要迎接全新的自己了！
Hey, Sampo, is the doctor here yet? I can't wait to meet the brand-new me!
哎呀，今天的患者看起来有些眼熟呢，我是你的主治医生哦~
Oh my, today's patient looks a little familiar~ I'm your attending physician, you know~
换人！麻烦请立即帮我换个医生！
Get me someone else! I need a different doctor, like, RIGHT NOW!
嘘，在医院里要保持安静。放心吧，亲爱的度星者，我会好好{RUBY_B#改造}医治{RUBY_E#}你，让你变成自己理想中的样子！
Shh, you need to keep quiet in the hospital. Don't worry, dear Star Traveler, I'll {RUBY_B#transform}treat{RUBY_E#} you real nice and make you into your ideal self!
老伙计，我能理解你对花火的不信任，但在帮人改头换貌这件事上，她的确是专家。
Old friend, I get your distrust toward Sparkle, but when it comes to giving folks a fresh new look, she really is an expert.
（总觉得度星者好像对花火有着某种对抗心…不过，与我无关。）
(I get the feeling the Star Traveler has some kind of resistance about Sparkle... But hey, not my problem.)
那么，请患者说出自己理想中的外形吧。
So then, would the patient please describe their ideal appearance?
你、你可千万要按照我的要求来啊。
Y—You better make sure you do exactly what I asked for.
首先，我想给自己换个更加明快的配色；其次，我的武装力量也得保留；最后，我希望自己能看起来柔和点，没有现在这么硬派。
First off, I want a brighter color scheme for myself. Second, I need to keep my firepower intact. And lastly, I want to look a bit softer... less of this hardcore vibe I've got going on right now.
没问题，我已经完全懂了。那么，手术开始~
No problem, I've got it all figured out. Now then, let the operation begin~
鲜艳明亮的黄色，喜欢吧？
Vibrant, brilliant yellow, do you like it?
除了颜色其他特征全都不对吧！
Except for the color, literally NOTHING else matches!
诶？你对这个造型不满意吗？那就……
Huh? You don't like this look? Then how about...
锵锵！完美地保留了武装力量！
这还有什么特地改造的价值吗？和我本来也差不了太多吧！
Is there even any point in undergo modification? It's not that different from me to begin with!
还真是位挑剔的患者呢，那么……
What a picky patient you are~ Well then...
这次完美了，不仅完全不显得硬派，还松松软软，让人看着就想拿捏呢！
Perfect this time! Not only is it completely devoid of any toughness, it's all soft and squishy. Makes you just wanna squish it!
花火！你、你这家伙一定是在故意玩我吧！
Sparkle! Y—You're definitely messing with me on purpose, aren't you!?
这两人关系挺不错的啊。
花火和度星者主人之间的关系可有些微妙。我想，花火是不会放过任何一个…和它「玩闹」的机会的。
The relationship between Sparkle and the Star Traveler's master is... a bit delicate. I reckon Sparkle wouldn't pass up any chance to... "play around" with them.
够了！你这是公报私仇！我不要你帮我改造了，把我的样子还回来！
Enough! You're just settling a personal grudge! I don't want your stupid makeover anymore. Change me back to how I was!
哈哈，你现在这个样子，就连生气的时候都很可爱呢。好啦，差不多玩够了。躺好别动~
Haha, you look adorable even when you're mad right now. Alright, I've had enough fun. Now lie still and don't move~
呼…身体改造还是暂时延后，先进行心灵上的转变吧。为此，我需要学习新知识，录入新的数据。
*sigh* Let's put the physical modifications on hold for now and focus on the psychological shift. To that end, I must acquire new knowledge and input fresh data.
关于学习场所，你有什么建议吗？
Got any tips on where to acquire those data?
I think the tavern sounds perfect!
不要！这里全是怪人，说话也乱七八糟的，我要躲远点！
No way! This place is crawling with weirdos talking total nonsense. Keep it away from me!
How about we check out Dovebrook District?
我听老桑博说过，是个好玩的地方，但现在去那好像也没什么帮助。
Old Sampo told me about it. Sounds like a fun place, but I don't think going there would help us right now.
If you wanna learn, go to school.
好。听说二维市内有座<color=#dbc291ff>绘世学院</color>，或许我该去那里试试。
Alright. I've heard there's a place called <color=#dbc291ff>Graphia Academy</color> in Duomension City. Maybe I should check it out.
绘世学院啊，那地方我熟，要不帮你带带路？
Graphia Academy, huh? I know that place like the back of my hand. Want me to show you around?
我警告你不要跟过来啊！
I warned you not to follow me!
{NICKNAME}，我的好伙计，你果然还是放心不下我吗？
{NICKNAME}, buddy. You're still concerned about me?
Is the plan still going smoothly?
不太顺利。根据我的内部资料，许多人类在成年后或多或少都会对「学校」这一场所感到怀念。我完全不能理解。
Not so great. According to my internal data, many humans feel some degree of nostalgia for a schooling environment after reaching maturity. I completely don't get it.
I just happened to run into you.
看来我们之间确实存在一种看不见的引力…开玩笑的，这是我从刚刚扫描的这本《如何高效社交》上看来的句子。
Looks like there's an invisible gravitational pull between us... Just kidding, that's a line I picked up from How to Socialize Efficiently, which I just scanned a moment ago.
原本我指望能从这里学到一些有助于蜕变成人的知识，但资料库中似乎并不存在我原本不知道的信息。
I was hoping to learn some knowledge here that could help with my metamorphosis into a human, but it seems the database doesn't contain any information I didn't already know.
或许你该试试和学生交流。
Maybe you should try talking to the students.
Ditch the books and hit the streets!
好主意。其实刚刚有几个自称是什么篮球社社员的学生，友好地邀请我去他们的场馆参观，我正准备赴约，你陪我一起去吧。
Good idea. Actually, a few students who called themselves basketball club members just invited me to check out their venue. I was about to head over. Why don't you come with me?
喂！那边的机铠，胆子不小，居然真敢来！洗干净脖子，准备受死了吗？
Hey! You there in the mechatron. Got some guts showing up here! Ready to meet your maker?
I think you're misunderstanding what a "friendly invitation" means...
Just so we're clear, I was only passing by.
Mechatrons don't have necks, do they?
真是奇怪，我只是公正地指出他们热衷的这种摧毁筐形目标的作战极其低效和不文明，并亲自用低杀伤性武装进行了示范，他们为什么反应这么大？

How strange. I merely pointed out, quite fairly, that their obsession with destroying basket-shaped targets is extremely inefficient and uncivilized, and personally demonstrated that fact with low-lethality weapons. Why did they react so strongly?
多说无用！把我们的篮筐还来！
Enough talk! Give us back our hoop!
原来如此，这是在向我宣战么。既然如此，就用主炮迅速解决吧。
I see how it is. You're declaring war on me, huh? In that case, let's end this quick with the main cannons.
我的主炮如果全功率输出，可以瞬间摧毁中等大小的行星，应该足够我们解决当下的问题了。
My main cannon at full power output can vaporize a medium-sized planet instantly. Should be more than enough firepower to handle our current situation.
在你的阻止下，绘世学院躲开了化为星尘的命运。但代价是…
Thanks to you, Graphia Academy dodged the fate of turning into cosmic dust. But the cost...
抱歉，{NICKNAME}，害你被一起驱逐出了学院。
Sorry, {NICKNAME}, didn't mean to drag you down and get you kicked out of the academy too.
不过，我是不会放弃的。如果在校园这个象牙塔中无法习得为人的真谛，我就去社会这所更加现实的学校中去体会吧！
But I won't give up. If I can't learn the true essence of being human in the ivory tower of academia, then I'll go experience it in the school of hard knocks: society itself!
放弃吧，背叛组织的下场，你应该比谁都清楚，浦桐。
Give it up, Purton. You know better than anyone what happens to those who betrays the organization.
可恶…阿度！你以为能独善其身吗？老大和二当家，他们只会利用你，把你吃干抹净！
Darn it... Trav! You think you can stay out of this? The boss and the Underboss, they're just using you. They'll bleed you dry and toss you aside!
等你没用的时候，他们会像扔掉一块破抹布一样将你舍弃！你会像我一样，变成一条挣扎待死的野狗！
