这个小奇美拉很得意了！
Look at this little chimera, so full of itself!
好像嗅到了一丝不妙的味道。
I've got a bad feeling about this.
你赢了。许多年以后，人们还记得翁法罗斯的第<unbreak>33550338</unbreak>次永劫回归，和一群酝酿出了「毁灭」欲的小海豹。
You win. Years later, people will still remember the <unbreak>33,550,338</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence of Amphoreus, and those baby seals who birthed the desire for "Destruction."
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
o((•'ω´• )っ「有的嗷有的嗷！沉甸甸的金海豹杯，离开翁法罗斯的时候，不要忘了把它带上。」)∋
o((•'ω´• )っ "Yes, yes, of course! Don't forget to take this coveted Gold Seal Cup with you when you leave Amphoreus!" )∋
o((•'ω´• )っ「希望你看到它的时候，就想起豹豹可爱的模样，记得常回来找我们玩嗷。」)∋
o((•'ω´• )っ "Hope this reminds you of our adorable faces whenever you see it! Make sure to come back and play with us!" )∋
I love you all, my little Seal-buns!

o((•ω‡= )o "Tch, that's so sudden! You... you're the straightforward type?" )∋

跟我说说，你信不过哪个泰坦？还是说你瞧不起拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄？
Now, which Titan's power do you doubt? Or perhaps you question the integrity of the great hero who saved Amphoreus?
像蜜花乘着风，飘向更广阔的世界…来自小小村落的妖精，终于登上了更大的舞台迷！
Like a honey flower carried by the wind, drifting toward a vaster world... The fairy from a tiny village has finally stepped onto a grander stage, mem!
但外面的世界，充满了全新的挑战……
But the world out there is full of brand-new challenges...
所以，我们必须刻苦练习，绝不能掉以轻心，把舞会的桂冠拱手相让迷！
So, we must practice hard and never let our guard down. We can't just hand over the dance crown to them, mem!
你可能有所不知迷，外面的世界有名为「奇美拉」和「小海豹」的模样奇特的妖精，还有叫做「大地兽」的大怪兽…都深受欢迎！
You might not know this, but out there in the world, there are peculiar-looking creatures like chimeras and baby seals, and huge creatures called dromases... They're all super popular!
这位客人，我们和它们谁更可爱？想听听你公正的判断迷。
Hey there, customer! Who's cuter, us or them? I'd love to hear your honest opinion, mem.
Of course it's you, little fairies!
谢谢你，我有信心多了。不然，上台前手心里还捏着一把汗迷！
Thanks, I feel more confident now. Otherwise, my palms would've been super sweaty before going on stage, mem!
它们也未尝没有可取之处…
They might have some redeeming qualities...
那么，我们更要刻苦练习，用舞蹈赢得所有人的心迷！
Then we must practice even harder and win everyone's hearts with our dance, mem!
Is the world out there fun?
外面的世界太热闹啦！这里有闪着荧光的粉色花朵，猜不透怎么造出来的大屋子，还有来自世界各个角落的客人……
The world out there is just so lively! There are glowing pink flowers, enormous buildings made in ways I can't begin to guess, and guests from every corner of the world...
千万不要告诉村长，我都不想回迷境去了迷。
Please don't tell the village chief, but I almost don't want to go back to the Maze anymore, mem.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
身为舞者，我的答案当然是——希望你能记住我们的舞姿迷！
As a dancer, my answer is obvious. I hope you'll remember our mesmerizing moves, mem!
这个选项都是会送礼物的…
All these options come with gifts...
咦，有这样的设定吗？我们怎么不知道迷？
Huh? Is that actually part of the setting? How come we never heard about it, mem?
不过，蜜花盛开后会凋落，田地会逐渐荒芜，就连鹅卵石也会在漫长的等待中磨成粉末。但宝贵的回忆，永远不会褪色迷！
But honey-producing flowers wither after they bloom, fields gradually turn barren, and even pebbles crumble to dust as time drags on. Yet precious memories never lose their shine, mem!
这就是——世界送给我们的最好的礼物！
This is the greatest gift the world has given us!
到演出那天，一定要来支持我们迷！
Make sure to come and support us at the show, mem!
金丝捎来讯息， 一股暗流正在城中酝酿。在它发展到难以收拾前，我们有必要将其扼杀在源头。
The golden thread brings word that a dark undercurrent is brewing in the city. We must nip it in the bud before it grows beyond our control.
裁缝女，今天可是休息日，要我干活，得加钱噢。
It's a rest day, seamstress. If you want me to work, you'll have to pay extra.
呵，赛法利娅，对你来说，哪天不是休息日？若非事态紧急，我不会把两位召集至此。
Heh. When is it not a rest day for you, Cifera? I wouldn't have called you both here if it weren't urgent.
事关重大，你们要做好心理准备。
This is no trivial matter, so steel your hearts.
不知受何人撺掇，白厄竟然…又动了「挑些色彩靓丽的衣饰」的念头。
Maybe someone had been whispering into his ears, but Phainon had been thinking of... "picking out colorful clothing" again.
把大家喊出来，就为了这事啊。
You called everyone here just for that?
呵…当真是一番有趣的开场白。
Heh... now that's quite an intriguing opening line.
听见裁缝女说玩笑，就像看见家里的猫翻跟头，虽说在情理之中，但总觉得有些奇怪。
Hearing you make a joke is like watching a house cat do a somersault. While not entirely impossible... it still feels rather strange.
呵呵，不多下些饵料，恐怕游鱼会不屑一顾，也勾不起猫儿的好奇心呢。
Heh. The fish won't bother to bite without enough bait, and the cat definitely won't have her curiosity stirred otherwise.
言归正传，我打算重建织坊。把大家召集到这里，是希望你们能助我一臂之力。
Back to business. I plan to rebuild the weaving workshop. And the reason I gathered you here is that I hope you can lend me a hand.
听你话里话外这意思，裁缝女，原来你是打算拉我们合伙呀？
From the way you're talking, seamstress, sounds like you're trying to rope us into a partnership, huh?
可骑士放下剑柄，又能做些什么呢？
What else can a knight do once they lay down their sword hilt?
我可没说让你放下剑柄。织坊需要缝纫，亦需要裁剪。如何分辨纹理、理顺针脚…不熟稔锋刃的人可没法胜任。
I never said to put down your sword hilt. A weaving workshop needs both sewing and cutting. Discerning patterns, aligning stitches... someone unfamiliar with blades couldn't handle the job.
无论如何，有大家作伴，总比成天闷头喝蜜酿来得好些吧？
Anyway, having your company is better than spending all day drinking honey brew alone, wouldn't you agree?
呵，真是一尾耳目众多的金鳟啊……
Heh, quite a well-connected golden trout we have here...
海瑟音姐姐出马，恐怕布料还没反应过来，就已经被裁断了吧？
With big sis Hysilens on the job, I bet those fabrics won't even know what hit them before they're cut!
那我呢，总不会又让我跑腿吧？
What about me? Don't tell me I'm running errands again?
好主意！我攒下的那些奇珍异宝，足够尝尝当老板的滋味了。
Great idea! With all those rare treasures I've saved up, I can finally get a taste of being the boss!
唔…从别人家里掏东西，我很擅长，但要把东西往别人家里塞，这还是头一遭。
Hmm... I'm good at taking stuff from other people's homes, but putting things into them? That's a first.
好啊，我就先按灰子你这一身，设计一套「救世主同款」的天外来客套装！咦，没准我还挺有生意头脑的？
Great! I'll model it after your Gray Mystery style and design a "Deliverer-inspired" sky-beyonder outfit! Hey, maybe I've got some business sense after all?
既然大家都同意，那么等我勘定场地，便择日开工。对了，赛法利娅，今后你可不能再用「裁缝女」这个称呼叫我了。
Since you all agree, I'll survey the site and then pick a date to start the work. By the way, Cifera, you mustn't address me as "seamstress" from now on.
既然入了伙，现在你也是「裁缝女」。
Now that you're part of the crew, you're also a "seamstress."
呃？！糟糕，你给我做局是吧！
Huh!? Darn it, you're setting me up!
我很高兴，能在你的见证下重建织坊。
I'm glad that I can rebuild the weaving workshop with you as my witness.
说实话，赛法利娅是否会接受邀请，我真有点拿不准。
To be honest, I'm not quite sure whether Cifera will accept the invitation.
或许正因为你在场周旋，她才会选择加入。我必须向你道谢。
Perhaps it was your presence and mediation that made her choose to join. I must thank you for that.
呵呵，没问题。你的身材匀称，无论穿什么都很精神。这是来自织者的判断，并非客套的场面话。
Hehe, no problem. You have a well-proportioned figure, which looks great in anything you wear. That's a weaver's professional judgment, not just empty flattery.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.
虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.
谢谢。在织坊的日子，是我回忆里极为温暖的时光。若是能重回那样的生活，我很期待。
Thank you. My days at the weaving workshop were some of the warmest memories I have. I look forward to returning to that kind of life.
呵，没想到我的剑艺，竟能在裁衣方面有所作为。
Heh, who would've thought my swordsmanship could come in handy for tailoring?
无论什么，都避不过金织爵的丝线。我想，她或许是看我百无聊赖，所以想用这个法子，让我寻些实际的事做吧。
Nothing can escape Dux Goldweaver's threads. I guess she probably saw how bored to death I was, so she used this method to get me to do something more productive.
呵…真是有劳她费心了呀。
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...
这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.
请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?
嗯，我去买些布匹练练力道。不然，若是失手毁掉人台，可不好交代了。
Hmm, I'll go buy some fabric to practice my technique. After all, it would be quite awkward if I accidentally destroyed the mannequin.
我就知道裁缝女叫我们来准没安好心，这不，又想让我们帮她打工了。
I knew that seamstress had something up her sleeve when she called us here. Look, she's trying to get us to work for her again.
You're also the boss this time.
哼哼，那她可算是找对人了。要论经营的智慧，这城里可没人比得过我——就连那个树庭男孩都不行！
Heh heh, then she's definitely found the right person. When it comes to business smarts, no one in this city can match me, not even that Grove boy!
是啊，不过，一想到又要朝九晚五准点到岗，我就连尾巴都打蔫了。
Yeah, but just thinking about having to clock in nine-to-five makes even my tail droop.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!
需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?
如果你实在想留个纪念，就拿着这枚猫咪硬币吧，反正我也用不上它了。
If you really want a souvenir, take this cat coin. It's not like I have any use for it anyway.
Don't forget about us, Gray Mystery!
好啊，灰子，等裁缝铺开张，记得要来光顾。别和她们说，我偷偷给你打折！
Great, Gray Mystery! When the tailor shop opens, make sure to drop by. Don't tell them, but I'll secretly give you a discount!
...Isn't this the Blazing Sun that is destined to rise?
...Isn't this the agony this world needs?
我的脚趾在抠三室两厅了。
This is so awkward I wanna sink through the floor.
Is this a duo comedy act, Amphoreus chapter?
好搭档，那你也表演一下那个吧，就是……
Hey partner, why don't you do that thing too, you know...
"But rather the Nameless who dwells among mortals—"
嗯，就是这样，你的气势比我们两个还要火热十足啊！
Hmm, that's right, your spirit is even more fiery and intense than two of us combined!
这种台词该在战斗时说！
That's the kind of line you should say during combat!
哈哈，拯救世界的任务完成之后，再说出这种话，果然还是有点像热血过头的笨蛋。
Haha, saying stuff like that after saving the world, you do sound like an over-enthusiastic goofball.
但是看到这家伙一脸揶揄地走过来，就猜到他会忍不住呛我几句…哎呀，还是和从前一样。
But seeing him walk over with that smirk on his face, I knew he couldn't resist taking a few jabs at me... Ah well, some things never change.
还没和你正式地说一声「好久不见」，万敌。
Haven't had the chance to properly say "long time no see," Mydei.
我已经听说了，在天外的「圣杯战争」中，有人的夙愿是回到过去的哀丽秘榭。
I've heard that in the "Holy Grail War" beyond the sky, someone's deepest wish was to return to the past Aedes Elysiae.
看到你和家人们亲热团聚的场景，还以为「救世主」只顾得上故乡的亲人，等到空闲时间才能和旧友打声招呼。

Seeing you having such an intimate reunion with your kinship, I thought the Deliverer would only have time for family from the homeland, and would only get around to greeting old friends when you had some spare time.
怎么会！我也是看到你跟歌耳戈王后和欧利庞王站在一起，场面难得温馨，才不忍心过去打扰的。
Of course not! I saw you with Queen Gorgo and King Eurypon, and the scene was so heartwarming that I didn't want to disturb you.
瞧，我还带了老妈做的蜂蜜烙饼和葡萄馅饼，滋味不输给悬锋城的羊奶石榴汁。
Look, I even brought honey suncakes and grape pies made by my mom. They're just as tasty as the pomegranate goat milk from Castrum Kremnos.
下回也带我去拜访拜访悬锋的先王和王后，让他们品尝一下哀丽秘榭的特产吧。
Next time, why not take me to visit the former King and Queen of Kremnos and let them have a taste of Aedes Elysiae's specialties?
记得有人童年还想去悬锋学武？
Didn't someone want to practice martial arts in Kremnos when he was a kid?
有人还写过普逃馅饼的错别字？
诶诶，咱们还是不是好搭档了？虽然我把背负的「记忆」和「心愿」都托付给了你，也不要在这种时候全部揭露啊……
Hey, hey, aren't we still partners? Even though I entrusted you with my memories and wishes, there's no need to reveal everything at a time like this...
其实那时候，我满脑子都是大家的「心愿」，对自己的「心愿」还是一片空白，只想回到命运的指针转动之前…挽救还未发生的事情。
Back then, my mind was filled with everyone else's wishes, while my own wish remained a complete blank. I just wanted to turn back the hands of destiny... to prevent what had yet to happen.
但现在，我从空白中找到了新生的含义，慢慢有了新的愿望。
But now, I've found meaning in the blankness, and gradually, new desires are taking shape.
这么拐弯抹角，不像你的风格。是什么愿望，就直接说吧，{NICKNAME}也在听着。
Being so roundabout isn't like you at all. Just tell us what you wish for directly. {NICKNAME} is also listening.
嗯，万敌，抱歉，我想正式和你说一声……
Um, Mydei, sorry, I want to formally tell you something...
{RUBY_B#歌尔巴尼帕尔大图书馆}你的图书馆{RUBY_E#}，还能再带我去看看吗？
Can you take me to {RUBY_B#Gibranipar Grand Library}your library{RUBY_E#} again?
我的图书馆并未设锁，「钥匙」在立下约定的那一刻就已经递交到你手中了。
My library has no locks. The key was placed in your hands the moment our promise was made.
我解读一下：约定一直作数。
Let me break it down: The promise still stands.
原来你的图书馆是邀请制。
自然也对天外的「救世主」开放，你不是已经读过其中几篇了吗？
Naturally, it's also open to the Deliverer from beyond the sky. Haven't you already read some of those articles?
好搭档，如果去万敌的图书馆，你最想看什么类型的藏书？
Hey partner, if you could visit Mydei's library, what kind of books would you most want to check out?
应该比较酸牙吧？大概会有他喜欢的诗歌，悬锋城的史传……
Must be quite a sour taste, I'd say? There's probably some poetry he likes, and chronicles of Castrum Kremnos...
说不定还有一些失传的悬锋古语？悄悄多学几句，下次就知道怎么应对他了。
Maybe there are some lost Kremnos sayings? If I secretly learn a few more, I'd know how to deal with him next time.
其实，我的脑海中有一副画面：与残破的城墙相比，悬锋的图书馆却保存得异常完好，我想捡起一本卷轴仔细看一看，眼睛却被烧得模糊，怎么也看不清上面的文字……

Actually, there's a scene in my mind: Compared to the crumbling city walls, the library of Kremnos was strangely well-preserved. I wanted to pick up a scroll to examine it closely, but my eyes were so scorched that I couldn't make out any of the text, no matter how hard I tried...
随后那些脆弱的纸本也在大火中燃烧起来……
Then those fragile volumes also went up in flames...
哈！都是些蒙了灰的记忆，我曾告诫自己永志不忘，却已经不确定究竟是梦中还是真实。但至少，这回再去，绝不会再是那样的场景了。
Ha! Just dusty old memories now. I swore to myself I'd never forget, but now I can't even tell if they were dreams or reality. At least this time, when I go back, things won't play out the same way.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.
正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.
我去问问他都有什么书。
I'll go ask him what books he has.
是你的风格！那就把惊喜感保留到最后一刻吧。
That's so you! Let's keep the surprise until the very last moment.
天外的救世主，与你也差了一句：「好久不见」。
The Deliverer from beyond the sky, this is for you too, "long time no see."
你的图书馆都有什么书？
What kind of books do you have in your library?
首先…悬锋城确有字典。虽然不比树庭广博，但也绝非人们以为的那样。
First of all... Castrum Kremnos does have dictionaries. Though not as extensive as the Grove's, they're far from what people assume them to be.
听说丹恒一直在补充星穹列车的智库，要带往天外的话，我会推荐托勒密早年写作的百邦历史给你们。
I heard Dan Heng has been updating the Astral Express's data bank. If you're bringing some beyond the sky, I'd recommend Ptolemy's early writings on the History of a Hundred Nations.
如果是白厄，想必会在鉴宝手册那里流连忘返。顺便，我还需要送他一本《如何读懂悬锋城的空气》。
If it's Phainon, he'd probably get lost in the appraisal manual. By the way, I should also get him a copy of How to Read the Air in Castrum Kremnos.
若是这么说，「救世主」不是皇冠或者印戒，并非独一无二的权力象征，抑或什么珍贵的雅称，而是将履行…或已履行的命运。
If that's the case, "Deliverer" is not a crown or a signet, not a unique symbol of power, nor some precious honorific. It is a destiny to be fulfilled... or one that has already been fulfilled.
事到如今，在我称你或白厄为「救世主」时，已不再心存调侃或过分沉重的敬意……
Now, when I call you or Phainon the "Deliverer," there's no trace of mockery in my words, nor any of that burdensome reverence...
而是只有平静。正如远远望见，并呼唤一位归来的旧友。
...Just a sense of peace. As if seeing an old friend from afar, and calling out to them.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.
当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—
歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.
呵…衷心感谢你的祝愿。我早已是，今后亦是。
Heh... Thank you for your blessings. I always have been, and I always will be.
凯撒大人，你的皇冠后面…是不是粘上了什么东西？
Um, Great Imperator... I think there's something stuck on the back of your crown?
嗯？那便有劳「摇光爵」替我取下来吧。
Oh? Then be a dear, Dux Lucens, and take it off for me.
凯撒大人？怎么不是菈宝？
Great Imperator? Why not something cute, like "Cera"?
对逐火的大前辈还是要客气一点啦！
You have to be respectful to a senior of the Flame-Chase!
像小凯撒、小刻之类的，只能在心里偷偷喊一喊，灰宝说是不是？
You can only use nicknames like "Impy" or "Cery" in your head, don't say it out loud. Right, Grayie?
是我为粉发的爱卿新取的爵名，听说她与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡出自同族，皆是天空城邦的后裔。
It is a new peerage I have bestowed upon my dear, pink-haired subject. I am told she and Seneca, the Dux Brumalis, are from the same clan, descendants of the Sky city.
呵，但「冬霖爵」说起话来，往往让身边人如沐冬风，难受了许多，粉发的爱卿却像春日林间摇曳的微光，所以取了这个称号。

Heh, but Dux Brumalis's words often carry the bite of frigid winter, causing much discomfort to those around her. My dear pink-haired subject is like the dappled sunlight in a spring forest. Hence her title.
是一张小贴纸呢，谁这么大胆，居然敢在凯撒大人头上动土。灰宝一起来看吧，上面写的内容……
Oh, a little sticker! I wonder who was bold enough to stick this on her crown. Come on, Grayie, let's read it...
「和我组一辈子的黄金裔吧」…嗯？
"Share your lifetime as Chrysos Heirs with me"?
看字迹，既不像阿格莱雅女士，也不像缇宝老师。唔，如果是蝶宝和万敌阁下的话，也不应该呀！他们和凯撒大人几乎从没正式见过面。
Judging by the handwriting, it's not Lady Aglaea or Lady Tribbie. Hmm, and it shouldn't be Cassie or Mydei! They've never formally met the Great Imperator.
「剑旗爵」？我与她的约定…不必以如此刻意的方式说出来。
Dux Gladiorum? Our promise... doesn't need to be stated in such a deliberate way.
我印象里的卡厄斯兰那，若要向凯撒进言，可要更坦率直白些。
The Khaslana I know would be far more straightforward in his counsel to me, his Imperator.
狡猾的多洛斯小猫？逐火的军队里，她不是最想远离我们的人吗？
That crafty Dolos kitty? Of all the Flame-Chasers, isn't she the one most eager to keep her distance?
好恐怖！光是想想那刻夏老师提笔写这行字的画面，我就要把自己送进昏光庭院了。
How horrifying! Just picturing Professor Anaxa writing this note is enough to make me check myself into the Twilight Courtyard!
话说回来，我看到的凯撒大人总是独来独往，海瑟音小姐和四位勋爵举杯共饮的时候，凯撒大人也没有和他们一起。
You know, every time I see the Great Imperator, she's by herself. Whenever Miss Hysilens and the four duxes share a toast, she's never with them either.
我很想知道…凯撒大人独自一人的时候都在想些什么？对于黄金裔们，还有一度能以另一种方式触及的天外世界，现在又是怎么看的呢？
I'm so curious... What does the Great Imperator think about when she's all alone? What are her thoughts now on the Chrysos Heirs, and on the world beyond the sky that was once within her reach?
娇小柔和的外表下，问出的问题却这么直击人心吗？
For someone with such a gentle and petite appearance, your questions are remarkably sharp and insightful.
与你说说也无妨，不与众爵共饮，单纯是因为君王要保持清晰的头脑，对于法吉娜的蜜酿，啜饮一口足矣，再多的话，我暂且无福消受。

I don't mind sharing. The reason I don't drink with the duxes is simply that a monarch must keep a clear head. One sip of Phagousa's honey brew is plenty for me. For now, any more than that is a pleasure I cannot afford.
嗯嗯，记下了，凯撒大人能喝下的蜜酿，大概…约等于小伊卡能喝下的十分之一吧。
Mm-hmm, noted. The amount of honey brew that the Great Imperator can drink is about... one-tenth of what Little Ica can handle.
咳！至于逐火的后辈们，该由臣子觐见君王，岂有君王无故召见的道理？
Ahem! As for the younger generation of Flame-Chasers, it is only proper for a subject to seek an audience with their monarch, not the other way around.
哦！我猜得没错，比起主动接近其他人，凯撒大人在等待被我们主动接近！
Oh! So I was right! The Great Imperator doesn't initiate contact. She prefers us to take the lead!
好生无礼！「摇光爵」，你在言辞犀利这方面…竟然毫不输给「冬霖爵」……
How insolent! When it comes to sharp words, Dux Lucens... you're every bit the equal of the Dux Brumalis.
凯撒观察报告，堂堂出炉！
And now, presenting... my official Imperator Observation Report!
这是风宝的职业习惯了。
只剩最后一个问题了，再说说吧！
Only one question left. Tell me more!
天外世界的看法么？我反倒要感谢{NICKNAME}，比起「毁灭」那无数颗闪烁的星星，我很高兴，它们最终还是踏上了有无限可能的道路。

My thoughts on the world beyond the sky? For that, I have {NICKNAME} to thank. I am glad that instead of facing "Destruction," those countless stars were ultimately set upon a path of infinite possibilities.
现在的我偶尔也在想，对弈之外，说不定我也可以培养些新的爱好，比如……
Now I occasionally find myself thinking that, outside of chess, perhaps I could pick up a new hobby, like...
用奏乐的方式征服人心？
Conquering the hearts of the people through music?
和小伊卡进行蜜酿大比拼？
A honey brew showdown with Little Ica?
且慢，我似乎遗漏了什么，刚才盘点有可能贴这张贴纸的人，是不是跳过了一位？
Wait a minute. I seem to have missed something. While taking stock of the possible culprits behind this sticker, did we skip over someone?
诶嘿嘿，是吗？没有吧，没有啦！
Hehe, did we now? I don't think so, not at all!
「摇光爵」，竟然会采用这样的方式突破对方的心理距离，但又不令人反感，如此说来，倒是她独特的天赋……
The way Dux Lucens closes the emotional distance without causing offense... It is, in its own way, a unique talent of hers...
是逐火的大前辈和小后辈！
A great senior of the Flame-Chase and her lil' junior!
要说年龄，我们相隔了上千年，却有种一见如故的亲切。咳，让任何人初见的时候感到亲切，也是她的天赋之一吧。

In terms of age, we are more than a thousand years apart, yet I feel a strange kinship, as if meeting an old friend. Ahem... I suppose making anyone feel comfortable upon first meeting is another of her talents.
毕竟不是谁都能上来就叫宝。
After all, not everyone can start using nicknames straightaway.
这一声声宝…既有技巧，又有感情，的确很容易让人迷失。
All these sweet nicknames... They're delivered with such skill and affection that one can easily get lost in them.
我很欣赏她的个性，总有人因凯撒的威严对我心生敬畏，事实上，君王诞生于臣民当中，也应永远与臣民同在。
I quite admire her personality. Many revere and fear my authority as the Imperator, but in truth, a monarch is born from her subjects and should always stand with them.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
当然有——我的「后」棋，亦是我棋盘上的干将。
Of course there is. My "Queen" piece, who is also a mighty general upon my chessboard.
「后」是实力最强的棋子，来去如风，不可多得。希望你的旅程也能如它一般自由。
The "Queen" is the most powerful piece on the board. It moves like the wind and is truly one of a kind. I hope your journey can be just as free.
期待你的其他职业道路。
I look forward to your future career choices.
无论棋手还是其他身份，凯撒的准则便是——要做就做到最好，我将成为这个领域的神明！
Whatever I undertake, be it chess or any other pursuits, my code is simple: be the best. I will become the standard by which all others are judged!
除了缇宝老师，每次我和大家说话都要仰着脖子，但凯撒大人却特别地平易*近人*呢，嘿嘿，真是一位让人感到亲切的陛下。
I'm always craning my neck when I talk to others, aside from Lady Tribbie. But you're so "down-to-earth," Great Imperator, literally!
Alright, I'll crouch down right now!
哎呀，要说善解人意，灰宝才是第一名！
Aww, and you're the most considerate of them all, Grayie!
往凯撒头上贴纸，你是头一个。
A sticker on the Imperator's head... You're the first one to ever pull that off.
还以为能蒙混过关呢，凯撒大人真是心细如发，是下棋带来的思维训练吗？能缜密地发现每处不对劲的细节。
Ah, I thought I'd gotten away with it~ Nothing gets past the Great Imperator. Is meticulously seeing through every illogical detail a takeaway from chess practice?
但是，被我猜中了，她果然不讨厌我这样做吧！
But I was right! She doesn't actually mind, does she?
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
希望你铭记的东西…呀，看你期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
Something to remember...? Oh, judging by your eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?
正好，你瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被人抢完了，幸亏我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!
它最精妙的设计是，只要捏一捏，就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—
我也想要风宝的小贴纸。
I want a little sticker from Cinny, too.
好啦！我会为灰宝准备的，想要健康小提醒、心情晴雨单，还是手绘的小表情？都可以满足哦！
Okay! I'll make some just for you, Grayie. Would you like health reminders, daily mood trackers, or maybe some little hand-drawn emojis? I can make anything you want!
今后不再需要四处奔走传播神谕了，所以商量一下，*我们*要做些什么好呢。
Since we don't need to run around delivering prophecies anymore, what should we do now? Let's see...
不需要开百界门…突然，感觉很无聊！
No more opening the Century Gate... Ugh, everything feels so boring all of a sudden!
送快递？就是把大家想要的东西送到他们手里吗？
Deliveries? Like, bringing things that people want to them?
*我们*可以用阿雅的万帷网，来收集大家想要的东西。
We can use Agy's World Wound Web to find out what everyone wants.
然后，好多个*我们*，把东西送到！
And then, a whole bunch of us can deliver everything!
这样的话，那*我们*可得好好想一个响亮的口号啦。
If we're doing that, then we need to think of a catchy slogan!
You can deliver things with the Century Gate.
有百界门，不管多远，都能马上送到！
With the Century Gate, we can deliver things instantly, no matter the distance!
口号我都想好啦，就叫：「开门！缇宝快递！」
I've got one! How about... "Knock knock! Tribbie Delivery!"
You can launch it over with a rocket.
啊！这个，我想到一个口号：「缇宝快递！使命必达！」
Ooh! I've got one for that: "Tribbie lives to deliver!"
But that would blow up the packages!
嗯，我也很喜欢课堂上认真听讲的大家呢。
Mmm, I do like all the attentive students in our classes.
不如，尝试教些其他课程吧！
Maybe we could try teaching different classes!
话是这么说，可是该教些什么呢？
That's true, but what should we teach?
缇宝老师，我想学变魔术。
Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to do magic tricks.
魔术？哎呀，这可伤脑筋了，*我们*也从来没有学过变魔术呀。
Magic tricks? Oh dear, that's a tough one. We have never learned how to do magic tricks ourselves.
要不…你去问问小夏，如果是他的话，一定知道很多奇奇怪怪的东西。
Why don't you go ask Naxy? I'm sure he knows all sorts of weird and wonderful things.
缇宝老师，我想学做火箭。
Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to build rockets.
火箭？不行不行…那实在是太危险了。
Rockets? Absolutely not... that's way too dangerous.
还是说，小灰只是想看烟花？这样的话，*我们*可以教你如何制作烟花呀。
Or are you saying that you just want to see some fireworks? If that's the case, we can teach you how to make those, Little Gray.
Hmm... Doesn't feel like there's much of a difference!
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
锵锵！这是*我们*缝制的娃娃，怎么样，很可爱吧？
Ta-da! This is a doll that we made. Adorable, isn't it?
如果小小灰以后想我们了，就捏一捏这个娃娃吧。
If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!
如果担心晚上会做噩梦的话，就抱着它睡觉吧。
If you're worried about having nightmares, just cuddle it in your arms.
嘿嘿，*我们*希望能够像天上的星星一样，散布在每一个你失眠的夜晚。而现在，小灰也有一颗属于自己的星星啦！
Hehe, we hope to be like the stars in the sky, scattered across every sleepless night of yours. And now, you have a star of your very own, Little Gray!
从今以后，不会再有离别。
From now on, no more goodbyes.
嗯！大家都会永远、永远相聚在美好的明天！
Yes! We'll all be together, not just tomorrow, but forever and ever and ever!
听说心有灵犀的人，哪怕各自旅行，也会走到同一个终点。也许这就是我们在哀丽秘榭重逢的原因吧。
They say kindred spirits, even when traveling different separately, will eventually arrive at the same destination. Perhaps that's why we reunited here in Aedes Elysiae.
I thought I'd never see you again...
至少此刻，我们又见面了，不是吗？
At least for this moment, we meet again, don't we?
很可惜，这次恐怕我无法回应你啦。
I'm afraid I won't be able to say yes to you this time.
在战胜铁墓后，我在来时路上独自走了很远很远。
After defeating Irontomb, I walked alone for a long way back on the path I came from.
为了让这篇浪漫的故事有始有终，我把所有的墨水都用完了，也许，这就是我们最后一次相见啦。
To give this romantic tale a proper beginning and end, I've used up all my ink. Perhaps this is our final meeting.
翁法罗斯的故事虽然暂时封笔了，但你的故事还很漫长。如果在某一页你踟蹰不前，一定要记得向前看哦。
Though the story of Amphoreus has reached its final page for now, your own story still has many chapters ahead. If you ever find yourself stuck on a page, remember to keep looking forward.
毕竟，有人会在过去等你，那么一定也有人…会在未来等你吧。哎呀，听上去就好浪漫呀！
After all, if someone's waiting for you in the past, then surely someone... must be waiting for you in the future too. Ah, just hearing that sounds so romantic!
But I still want to see you.
I will keep you in my memories.
你说多巧，人家也是这么想的。
What a coincidence, I was thinking the same thing!
我们曾在哀丽秘榭共度过一段恬静美好的时光。那时候我问过你，以后回想起来，会怎么想象当时的我？
We shared some peaceful, beautiful moments together at Aedes Elysiae. Back then, I asked you, when you look back on these times, how will you picture me?
嗯，对也不对，人家明明是更成长了一些哦。
Hmm, yes and no. I've actually grown up quite a bit, you know~
I wanna go back to the past...
和你度过的点点滴滴，我都记得。你呢？有没有把人家好好放在心里呀？要记得常看如我所书，多让我们陪陪你哦。
I remember every little moment we spent together. What about you? Have you kept me close to your heart? Remember to review As I've Written often, and let us keep you company!
接下来，我会基于你的记忆，将那段岁月唤回哀丽秘榭，作为最后的相片陪伴你。
Next, based on your memories, I will recall those days to Aedes Elysiae, as the final photograph to accompany you.
那时…往昔的涟漪会带着故事——与你再度{RUBY_B#初见}重逢{RUBY_E#}。
At that time... the ripples of past reverie will carry stories and {RUBY_B#first encounter}meet{RUBY_E#} you once again.
呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
*yawn* I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...
Tomorrow... gotta plant flowers... gotta sing...
把手伸进水里…感受到了吗？风轻轻吹过水面，就会变成涟漪。
Put your hand in the water... Can you feel it? When the wind gently blows across the surface, it creates ripples.
记得我为什么喜欢秋千吗？因为一摇一摆，就能触碰到天空。
Remember why I love swings? Because with each sway back and forth, I can touch the sky.
好宁静的麦田…哀丽秘榭的时光，再也不会被打扰啦。
Such a peaceful wheat field... The tranquil moments of Aedes Elysiae will never be disturbed again.
有时，我会梦见自己变成了一颗小小的种子。
Sometimes, I dream of becoming a tiny seed.
这一定意味着，新的故事正在某个地方发芽吧？
This must mean that a new story is sprouting somewhere, right?
海的那边是什么？已经有答案啦！还是海，广袤无垠的星海。
What lies beyond the sea? We've got the answer! More sea! The vast, endless sea of stars.
你说，在星海里濯足是什么感觉？开玩笑的，听说宇宙可冷啦。
I wonder what it feels like to dip your feet in the starry sea? Just kidding, I heard the universe is freezing cold!
看这尊神像，欧洛尼斯也是我们的好伙伴。
Look at this statue. Oronyx is our good buddy too.
多奇妙的缘分呀。你、我，还有三月七，都担任过岁月的半神呢。
What a fascinating twist of fate. You, me, and March 7th... We've all served as demigods of Time.
昔涟坐在棚顶上看风景。你想起一句诗：「明月装饰了你窗子，你装饰了别人的梦……」
Cyrene sits on the roof, taking in the scenery. A poem comes to your mind: "The bright moon adorns your window, while you adorn someone else's dreams..."
不过，昔涟发现你了。她没有出声，只是眨了眨眼，对你露出一个微笑。
However, Cyrene noticed you. She didn't say anything, just blinked and gave you a smile.
你说，会不会有人在这里敲击风铃，举办一场小小的音乐会呢？
Say, do you think someone might ring these wind chimes and put on a little concert here?
光是看着绿茵茵的作物，人家就能想象出一桌佳肴的样子！
Just looking at those lush green crops makes me imagine a whole feast laid out on the table!
把蔬果培育得这么漂亮，小妖精们一定费了不少心思吧？
The fairies must have put a lot of thought into nurturing such beautiful fruits and vegetables, huh?
每次那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅站在一起，就意味着奥赫玛要被闹得天翻地覆，哪怕是现在，我也不敢精神放松啊……
Every time Professor Anaxa and Aglaea stand together, it means Okhema is about to be turned upside down. Even now, I can't let my guard down...
Heh, I heard all of that.
并无大事，我只是想找人讨论一下，最近街头新流传的泰坦神话。
Nothing major, I just wanted to find someone to discuss the new Titan myths circulating on the streets lately.
我说什么来着？就算没了金线，大名鼎鼎的「金织」女士还是那么爱监听人们的动向。还有你，白厄——
What did I tell you? Even without the golden thread, the illustrious Lady Goldweaver still loves keeping tabs on everyone. And you, Phainon...
不巧，我也知道你要说什么——
As luck would have it, I also know what you're about to say...
「白厄跟那女人有样学样，不肯放过一点风吹草动，他到底像谁的学生？」
"Phainon's just like that lady, not letting even the smallest detail slip by. Whose student is he really?"
被看穿了啊那刻夏老师…
我的脑子是什么公共文件吗？一个两个都喜欢来擅自解读。
Is my brain some kind of publicly shared folder? Everyone just loves to come and interpret it as they please.
别争了，我们都是他的老师。
Stop arguing, we're all his teachers.
Huh? Partner, what are you talking about?
街头流传的泰坦神话，我有种不妙的预感，难道是那本<color=#dbc291ff>《隐秘之恨：蝶与树》</color>？
The Titan myths circulating on the streets... I have a bad feeling about it. Could it be that one called Hidden Hatred: The Butterfly and the Tree?
「名为墨涅塔的少女在树庭求学时得到了瑟希斯的青睐，但瑟希斯发现，她的亲近实则是为了获得学术指导，两人的关系由此变得复杂了起来……」

"A girl named Mnestia caught Cerces' attention while studying at the Grove, but Cerces discovered that her closeness was merely to gain academic guidance, which made their relationship grow complicated..."
…那刻夏老师，我可以接着说吗？
问我干什么？写的是瑟希斯，关我阿那克萨戈拉斯什么事？
Why are you asking me? It's about Cerces, what does it have to do with me?
这个…毕竟有人觉得这本书里描绘的「裂分之枝」和「黄金之茧」，是在影射某次新轮回嘛！
Well... After all, some people think that the Bough of Rift and Chrysalis of Gold depicted in this book are alluding to a certain new cycle!
「多年以后，两人的继任者进一步变成了水火不容的关系。一次碰面，他们互相指责对方不用正眼看自己，险些大打出手。」

"Years later, their successors' relationship deteriorated to the point of becoming sworn enemies. During one encounter, they accused each other of not even deigning to look at one another properly, and nearly came to blows."
哦！还有后记：「所谓神话都掺杂了后人附会，两位泰坦并没有传说中的那么相亲相爱，不过只是一点零星的合作关系……」
Oh! And there's a postscript: "All myths get embellished by later generations. These two Titans weren't as lovey-dovey as the legends suggest, they just had some occasional collaboration..."
所以，阿那克萨戈拉斯，你怎么看？
So, Anaxagoras, what do you think?
要我说，唯一可取的只有一点。
If you ask me, there's only one redeeming quality about it.
所谓神话都掺杂了后人附会。
All myths are mixed with later embellishments.
不错，的确是学士的灼见。是我的针脚犹豫了。
Indeed, that's quite an astute observation from a scholar. I was the one being hesitant with my stitches.
我没听错吧，阿格莱雅当面夸赞那刻夏老师了？
Did I hear that right? Aglaea actually praised Professor Anaxa to his face?
自从双眼复明后，我重新拾起了「织者」的工作。书店的克帖西芬委托我织一副泰坦神话主题的挂毯，放在她的店铺里。
Since regaining my sight, I've resumed my work as a "weaver." Ctesiphona from the bookstore commissioned me to weave a Titan-mythology-themed tapestry for her shop.
——但听到了街头流传的这些新版本，我也思忖起了要如何编排剪裁。
...Though, after hearing these new versions circulating in the streets, I started contemplating how to arrange and edit them.
这倒稀奇，「金织」女士什么时候这么在乎人们的看法了？
Well, that's rare. Since when did Lady Goldweaver start caring about what others think?
毕竟这双新生的眼眸，与刚开始观察世界的孩童无异，要看和学的东西还有很多。
After all, these new pair of eyes were no different from those of a child first observing the world. There was still so much to see and learn.
新世界的人们也得从一段更好的故事里了解过往「历史」，不是吗？
The people of the new world deserve to learn about the "history" through a better story, don't they?
呵！既然如此，别忘了我们身边就有一位——{NICKNAME}，听说你正打算把翁法罗斯的故事带到天外……
Hah! Speaking of which, we have someone right here. {NICKNAME}, I heard you're planning to take the story of Amphoreus beyond the sky...
要编织挂毯，{F#她}{M#他}的故事岂非最好的蓝本？
To weave a tapestry, wouldn't {F#her}{M#his} story make the perfect blueprint?
交给我！我下笔绝对公正客观。
Leave it to me! I'll write with absolute fairness and objectivity.
放心，诸位的关系我自有判断。
Don't worry, I can figure out everyone's relationships on my own.
那我便期待你将故事再次带回的一天了。
Then I'll look forward to the day when you bring the story back again.
接下委托时还不觉得，真正编织起来才意识到，这副挂毯可是个大工程。
I didn't realize it when I took the assignment, but now that I'm actually weaving it, this tapestry is turning out to be quite the undertaking.
Let's hire more people for the weaving workshop.
正和我想的一样。至于如何招揽…还要略施一些小手段，等我的好消息吧。
Just as I thought. As for recruitment... I'll need to employ some tricks. Wait for my good news.
How does it feel to have your sight back?
呵…有浪漫之处，亦有不便之处。
Heh... It has its romantic aspects, as well as its inconveniences.
不便在于，人们心之所想、目光之所往，诸多本可凭借金丝知晓的细末之事，如今我要重新学着去阅读了。
The inconvenience lies in having to relearn how to read all those subtle details, like people's thoughts and where their gazes wander. Things I used to easily discern through the golden thread.
而浪漫之处在于…无论是对比显著的色彩、光泽，抑或布料上最细微的纤绒，都可以靠着人类的双眼看清。
And what makes it romantic is... whether it's the stark contrast of colors and luster, or the finest fibers on the fabric, they can all be seen clearly with the human eye.
无疑，奥赫玛的领袖需要能够纵览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
Without doubt, the leader of Okhema must command golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.
虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.
Thank you for your hard work all this while.
啊，感谢你直抒胸臆的慰藉。托你的福，我卸下了重担，终于可以感慨一句，那确实是一番苦旅……
Ah, thank you for your heartfelt comfort. Thanks to you, I've been able to unburden myself, and I can finally say... it truly was a grueling journey...
关于那本书，我可以说实话了吗——什么乱七八糟的，写的都什么玩意？
About that book, can I be honest now? What a complete mess. What on earth was that nonsense even about?
Finally! I knew you wouldn't be able to endure that.
哼，我的泰坦神话课上，零分重修的学生，写出来的也能比它多卖几个利衡币。
Hmph, even students who failed and had to retake my Titan Mythology class could earn more Balance Coins with their writing than this.
我觉得大家读得很津津有味啊。
I think everyone's really getting into it.
是吗？会欣赏这部作品的人，应当是被墨涅塔和瑟希斯合力诅咒了的人吧。
Really? Anyone who appreciates this work must have been cursed by both Mnestia and Cerces.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。

Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.
没有任何东西能让你获得智慧，除了「我们对智慧还一无所知」的认知。
Nothing can grant you wisdom except the realization that "we know nothing of wisdom at all."
希望它能让你铭记这一点。
I hope this will help you remember that.
Truth and gossip are equally important!
呵，这又是哪里的箴言？罢了……
Huh, where's that proverb from? Never mind...
多亏有我在场，不然真不敢想现场会是什么样，火药味总算没那么浓了，是吧？
Good thing I was there, I don't even want to imagine what would've happened otherwise. At least the tension's not as thick now, right?
他们从认识起就剑拔弩张吗？
Have they been at each other's throats since they first met?
至少在我加入逐火之后，见到的两位就是这样了。
At least that's how the two of them were when I joined the Flame-Chase.
那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅都是懂得审时度势的人，危机面前能放下成见，携手合作……
Professor Anaxa and Aglaea were both people who knew how to read the situation. In times of crisis, they could set aside their differences and work together...
现在一切归于平静，他们却针尖对麦芒地拌起了嘴，哎，只能说…人和人之间的气场还真是玄妙啊！
Now that everything's calm, they're at each other's throats bickering... *sigh* I guess you could say... the chemistry between people really is a mysterious thing!
还有街头读物吗？再来几本。
Got any more street reads? Hook me up.
有的有的，这样的书我还看过好几本。像什么《我的逐火之旅果然有问题》、《凯撒陛下的专属剑姬》、《神明学校的逃课猫咪》……
Of course, I've read quite a few books like that. Stuff like Something's Wrong with My Flame-Chase Journey, The Imperator's Personal Blade Maiden, The Class-Skipping Cat at Divine Academy...
嘘，我们小声点，要是你感兴趣，我带你去书铺里悄悄看。
Shh, let's keep our voices down. If you're interested, I'll take you to the bookstore to peek quietly.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
突然这么正经吗？那我也不得不郑重地掏出这样东西了。
Why are you getting all serious all of a sudden? Ah well, you left me no choice but to solemnly pull out this thing.
原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.
正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.
虽然很乐意被你夸，但——还是别打趣啦！
While I appreciate the compliment, stop teasing me already!
万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?
...Castorice? Are you here for the event too?
是的，但我还不知道，万敌阁下居然也要参加。难道说，你也准备好了手工制品？
Yes, but I had no idea that Lord Mydei would be participating too. Don't tell me you've also prepared some handicrafts?
制品？是说食材吗？我也很意外，你会报名新一轮的黄金厨神争霸赛……
Crafts? You mean ingredients? I'm also surprised that you signed up for the new Master Chrysos Chef Championship...
厨、厨神争霸赛？这里不是翁法罗斯第一届手工制品交流会现场吗？
A—A Culinary Showdown? Isn't this supposed to be the 1st Amphoreus Handicraft Convention?
Who the heck wandered onto the wrong set?
这两个消息我怎么都没听说？
How have I not heard about either of these?
我收到了一封「遐蝶小姐亲启」的邀请函，上面写了手工制品交流会的时间和地点，还盖上了元老院的火漆印。
I received an invitation addressed "Dear Miss Castorice," with the time and location of a handicraft exchange meeting, sealed with the Council of Elders' wax seal.
呀。这火漆印，怎么是带栅格反光效果的，迎着星光看的话……
Huh. This wax seal... why does it have a grid-like reflective effect? When you look at it under the starlight...
是赛飞儿的猫咪硬币形状？
Is it in the shape of Cipher's cat coin?
果然，我也收到了一封同样形式的邀请函，信中还说，这次会有来自天外的异世界美食厨神参赛，带来全新的银河口味菜品，我一时疏忽…大意了。

Sure enough, I also received an invitation in the same format. The letter mentioned that this time, there would be a legendary chef from another world beyond the sky participating, bringing new cosmic-flavored dishes. I let my guard down... I was careless.
Good thing it wasn't an arm wrestling contest.
{NICKNAME}阁下居然还记得，赛飞儿阁下替我报名的那场扳手腕大赛。
{NICKNAME}, you still remember that arm-wrestling tournament Lady Cipher signed me up for.
但现在，我已不再身负「死亡」，这双手恐怕也无法赢过万敌阁下了。
But now, I no longer bear the authority of Death. These hands of mine probably can't defeat Lord Mydei anymore.
我该早点想到的，赛飞儿阁下肯定玩心大发，按捺不住想要在新世界施展诡计，捉弄捉弄大家……
I should have known earlier that Lady Cipher would be up to her tricks, unable to resist playing her mischievous games in this new world to mess with everyone...
不知道赛飞儿阁下还用同样的伎俩骗了多少人，还是…不会只有我们两个被骗了吧？
I wonder how many others Cipher has tricked with the same ploy... or could we be the only two who fell for it?
一道懒洋洋的声音从半空传来——
A lazy voice drifted down from above.
「没那么夸张，只准备了四封！另外两封正打算寄给救世小子和裁缝女，邀请他们穿上自己搭配的新衣服，去参加新一季时装展览……」

"It's not that dramatic, I only prepared four letters! The other two are meant for our little deliverer boy and the tailor girl, inviting them to wear their self-coordinated new outfits to the new season's fashion exhibition..."
「嘻，我可迫不及待要看裁缝女为救世小子的审美头疼了——猫猫快递，走喽！」
"Hehe, I can't wait to see the tailor girl getting headaches over our little deliverer boy's fashion sense! Meow Express, off we go!"
声音消失了，赛飞儿阁下…还真是精力充沛呀。
The voice faded away... Cipher sure is full of energy.
无妨，我能理解，新世界的岁月平稳流淌，但平凡的生活不等于一成不变，她大概是想为大家带来点新鲜事。

It's alright, I understand. Time flows peacefully in this new world, but an ordinary life doesn't mean it has to stay the same forever. She probably just wants to bring something fresh and exciting to everyone.
...while satisfying her urge to pull a few mischievous pranks.
我也还没亲眼见过白厄阁下穿黄戴紫的模样，的确很好奇呢。
I haven't seen Lord Phainon dressed in yellow and purple either. I'm quite curious indeed.
What about the ingredients Mydei brought?
若不介意，我可以现场烹饪，邀请大家一同来享用美食。
If you don't mind, I can cook them right here and invite everyone to enjoy the meal together.
Guess who's not getting an invite?
*只有声音*「我还没走远呐！我都听得到，灰子。」
*voice only* "I haven't gone far yet! I can hear everything, Gray Mystery."
Perfect, let's have Master Mydei do the cooking.
可以，火候根据你的口味来定。
Sure, I'll adjust the heat to your taste.
那遐蝶带来的手工制品？
What about the handmade stuff from Castorice?
都是阁下眼熟的东西，有书签，抱枕，还有毛毡娃娃。因为赶工制作得有些粗糙，我本来想和参加交流会的大家互相交换。

These are all things you're familiar with: bookmarks, cushions, and felt dolls. They're a bit rough around the edges because I made them in a rush, but I was hoping to exchange them with everyone at the meetup.
嗯…但眼下，还是容许我带回去再好好修饰一下吧。
Hmm... But now, please allow me to take them back and refine them a little.
Time to look forward to the fashion exhibition.
那么，我有一个建议，为了胃部健康，等看完白厄的时装搭配再吃饭吧。
Well, I have a suggestion: for the good of your stomach, let's eat after we've seen Phainon's outfit.
万敌阁下…真的有那么夸张吗？
Lord Mydei... is it really going to be that dramatic?
头顶的星空，真美呀，一颗颗星星，像无数个会眨眼的灵魂。
The starry sky above is so beautiful, each star twinkling like countless blinking souls.
{NICKNAME}阁下，如果有空，也和我一起去花园看看吧。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, if you have time, would you like to join me for a stroll in the garden?
我在那里播撒了许多花种，但愿时间能冲淡那些令人怅惘的回忆，让故事的种子，再度长成一片无垠的花海。
I scattered many flower seeds there, hoping time would wash those melancholic memories away, allowing the seeds of stories to grow once again into an endless sea of flowers.
What kind of flowers did you plant?
安提灵是生长于冥界的花朵，它素净的花瓣能带给往生者最后的安宁，但种在这里就有些不合时宜了。
Antila is a flower that grows in the nether realm. Its pure petals bring final peace to the departed, but planting it here seems rather inappropriate.
所以…我这次种下的都是更绚烂的花朵。
So... this time I planted even more dazzling flowers.
阁下，天外一定也有繁花似锦的世界吧？若有机会，请你为我捎带些旅途中偶遇的花种吧。
I believe there must be worlds blooming with lush flowers beyond the sky as well, right? If you have the chance, please bring me some flower seeds you encounter along your journey.
如今还有怅惘的回忆吗？
Do you still have any melancholic memories?
虽然人们见我时举止还是略有拘谨，但好奇的孩子们已经愿意牵起我的手，去看停驻在花丛中的蝴蝶了。
Though people are still somewhat wary around me, curious children are now willing to hold my hand as they go and watch butterflies resting among the flowers.
他们胖乎乎的指尖，像拥抱一样温暖。
Their chubby fingertips are as warm as a hug.
要说唯一的一点怅惘，便是与你的相遇。人和人的相遇和离别是常态，阁下总要踏往更远的星空……
If I must name something regretful, it would be our encounter. Meetings and partings are part and parcel of life, and you must always venture forth toward more distant stars...
不过，翁法罗斯因你的到来而诞生的奇迹，以及曾经相伴的那些记忆，于我而言，已经足够珍贵了。
But the miracles that your arrival brought to Amphoreus, and all those memories we shared, are already precious enough to me.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。

Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.
但愿它也能让你平安归来。
I hope it brings you back safely, too.
你所在之处，便是温柔的花海。
Wherever you reside is a gentle sea of flowers.
若这是阁下对我的祝愿，我就轻轻收起，珍藏在心中啦。
If that is your blessing for me, then I'll gently accept and cherish it.
此世已是没有纷争和牺牲的世界，做得好，救世主。
This world is now free from strife and sacrifice. Well done, Deliverer.
没有纷争的世界，会无聊吗？
Would a world without strife be boring?
在我看来，纷争正是为终结纷争而存在。纵使此世必要之痛，亦有迎来愈合的一天。
In my view, strife exists to end strife itself. Though it may be a pain this world needs, there will come a day of healing.
何况，悬锋人的字典里可没有无聊。做好一顿饭，与夺下战功同样光荣。
Besides, there is no word for "boring" in the Kremnoan language. Preparing a good meal is just as glorious as winning battles.
如今这个世界不缺本应灭绝的动物，食材库丰富了许多。对任何一位喜欢烹饪的人来说，都称得上足够有趣的世界。
These days, the world is full of animals that previously went extinct, which has greatly enriched our ingredient inventory. It's quite a fascinating world for anyone who enjoys cooking.
The Grand Restaurant is about to open!
可以挥着菜刀上战场了。
Time to charge into battle with a kitchen knife.
But there are still some tricky pranks...
哈哈，悬锋城流传过一句古语：猫要么在睡觉，要么在捣乱。我猜，阿格莱雅会更先按捺不住，要给她找点营生干一干了。
Haha, there's an old saying in Castrum Kremnos: cats are either sleeping or causing trouble. I bet Aglaea will be the first to get restless and find the cat something to do.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.
当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—
歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.
迈德漠斯，黄金厨神之王！
Mydeimos, the Chrysos God-King of Chefs!
听起来，气势倒是不输「歌耳戈之子，浴血代冠」，好，这份赞誉我收下了。
Well, that sounds just as grand as "The son of Gorgo will be crowned in blood." Very well, I'll accept this praise.
若是回归最朴素的生命本能，填满「大地」的胃袋，只需要一块块滋味丰盛的红土。
If we return to the most basic instinct of life, all it takes to fill the "Earth's" belly is rich and flavorful redsoil.
翁法罗斯的万物生灵现如今都有了自己的归宿，我也终于能够放下重担，安心地享受美食时刻了。
All living beings in Amphoreus have found their place now, and I can finally put down my burdens and enjoy my meal in peace.
大地兽之王也爱吃红土？
Even the Dromas King likes redsoil too?
这副身躯踏上一片全新的净地时，食欲竟也在一瞬间旺盛地涌来。
As this body stepped onto this pristine new land, a sudden surge of hunger washed over me.
或许就像法吉娜贪恋它的秘酿一样吧，我也天然地喜爱这从「大地」熔炉中诞生的物事。炙热，酥脆，美味，你也该与我一同用牙齿仔细感受…嚼嚼……

Perhaps, just as Phagousa can't resist their ambrosia, I've always had a natural fondness for what's born from the furnace of Earth. Hot, crispy, and delicious. You should use your teeth and thoroughly enjoy this feeling with me... Nom nom...
Wanna chat about the lands beyond the sky?
「永夜之帷」的记忆中勾勒过——你的双足丈量过不少天外的世界，为我亲口讲讲那些「大地」的模样吧。
As depicted in the memories of the Veil of Evernight, you have traversed many worlds beyond the sky. Tell me, what is the "Earth" there like?
A land covered in ice and snow...
你为荒笛讲述了冰天雪地的雅利洛-Ⅵ号，以及贝洛伯格的人们与寒潮和风雪持续千年的抗争……
You told Terravox about the frozen lands of Jarilo-VI, and how the people of Belobog have been fighting against the Eternal Freeze and blizzards for a thousand years...
看来，无论任何世界，生灵们都有自己和「大地」相处的方式，虽说不上反叛，却也在摩擦中不断前行呐！
It seems that in any world, living beings have their own way of dealing with the "Earth." While it may not be outright rebellion, they keep moving forward through friction!
The land that floats in the sky...
你为荒笛讲述了漂浮在星海中的仙舟「罗浮」，那里有一株建木古树，其中的居民饱经了「丰饶」的恩赐和苦楚……

You tell Terravox about the Xianzhou Luofu drifting in the sea of stars, where an ancient Ambrosial Arbor stands, and whose inhabitants have experienced both the blessings and suffering brought by the Abundance...
古树…如此说来，这岂非是一种瑟希斯掌管的「大地」？
Ancient trees... In that case, could this be a form of "Earth" governed by Cerces?
假如有机会，我也想亲眼看一看，呜嗡…但愿我的身躯不会把那里的「大地」压沉。
If I ever get the chance, I'd love to see it with my own eyes, hmm... I just hope my body won't sink the "Earth" there.
A land... made of Memory Bubbles?
你为荒笛讲述了梦想之地匹诺康尼，包括梦中和梦外的时刻，和一场回到「大地」的飞行……
You tell Terravox about Penacony, Land of the Dreams, including moments both inside and outside the dream, and a flight back to "Earth"...
背离了同胞所行之路的人，却终有机会走上了第三条路吗？有趣，我对「开拓」的理解又加深了几分。
Someone who deviated from their comrades' path yet ultimately found the chance to walk down a third path? Fascinating. I have gained a deeper understanding of the Trailblaze yet again.
有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
Is there anything you want me to remember?
当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—
Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?
呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.
从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...
倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?
Thanks for keeping watch over yesterday.
呜嗡…也感谢你们守护了我的心愿。昨日的守望，都是为了一起走向明天。
Grumph... Thank you all for protecting my wishes, too. We watch over yesterday to walk toward tomorrow together.
得闲时来我的肩膀上坐一坐，一起离那片星空更近一些吧。
When you have time, come and sit on my shoulder. Let's get a bit closer to those stars together.
没有「时光硕果」的帮助，记忆的航船无法远渡…只能之后再来了。
Without the help of the Fruit of Time, the ship of Remembrance cannot sail far... I can only return later.
啊，贵客…我能感觉到，上升的一切都将汇合。或许我很快就能回到家乡了。
Ah, honored guest... I can feel it, everything that rises must converge. Perhaps I'll be able to return home soon.
不过在那之前，我还有必须完成的使命…你愿意协助我，对吗？
But before that, there is a duty I must fulfill... You'll lend a hand, right?
It's all coming to an end, at last...
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
只需一些记忆，我便能提供协助。
With just a memory shard, I can help you out.
衣匠接过记忆残晶，平和地炼化。
The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and calmly refines them.
嗯…有位织者摔伤受困。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>坍塌的天花板碎石边</color>哀嚎伤痛呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who got injured and trapped. The golden thread brings tidings: They're wailing in pain beside a <color=#dbc291ff>collapsed ceiling rubble</color>.
嗯…有位织者难逃困境。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>停止运转的扇叶边</color>，为不再运转的死路愤怒呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who's stuck and in trouble. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of stopped fan blades</color>, raging about the dead end that no longer turns.
嗯…有位织者正在隐秘侦察。金丝带来消息，它正隐匿于<color=#dbc291ff>巨大空旷的房间中</color>，为一座炮台惊异呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who's doing some secret scouting. The golden thread brings tidings: They're hiding in a <color=#dbc291ff>huge, spacious platform</color>, marveling at a cannon turret.
嗯…有位织者正在拷问自己的内心。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮封闭的门扉前</color>思索自己的答案呢。

Hmm... There's a weaver who is questioning their inner self. The golden thread brings tidings: They're contemplating their answer <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the door sealed by the black tide</color>.
嗯…有位织者独行于朝圣之旅。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>至高的尖刺上</color>探索光的来向呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who is on a solitary pilgrimage. The golden thread brings tidings: They're exploring the source of light on <color=#dbc291ff>the highest spire</color>.
嗯…有位织者正向更高处远眺。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的平台上</color>惊叹你飞行的速度呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who is gazing up high. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>on the elevated platform</color>, marveling at your flying speed.
嗯…有位织者正为逐火的前路欢欣鼓舞。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>火种的符文前</color>，等待英雄的现身呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is thrilled about the future of the Flame-Chase. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the Coreflame's runes</color>, waiting for the hero to show up.
嗯…有位织者行动缓慢。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>向闪烁电光的高处</color>，举步维艰一步步攀登呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who moves at a burdened pace. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>climbing towards the heights where lightning flickers</color>, struggling with every step.
嗯…有位织者迷失了自己的来路。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>残破断裂的柱子上</color>，疑惑归家的方向呢。
Hmm... There is a weaver who has lost their way home. The golden thread brings tidings: They're on a <color=#dbc291ff>fractured, crumbling pillar</color>, puzzled about which way leads home.
嗯…有位织者正在因恐高瑟瑟发抖。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的数据流附近</color>，发誓永远陪伴它爱的电路板呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is trembling with fear of heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They're near the <color=#dbc291ff>data streams high above</color>, vowing to forever stay with the circuit board they love.
我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
I've found all the nymphs here.
想来对你没什么难度。现在，我也该完成自己的工作了……
Seems like it wasn't too hard for you. Now, it's time I fulfill my part of the deal.
「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
"Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.
仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?
嗯…恭喜，贵客。这样一来，此地便不再有未完之事了。
Hmm... congratulations, honored guest. With this, there's nothing left unfinished here.
Can you give me more hints?
「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
"Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.
仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?
希望我们还能再见，贵客。
Hope to see you again, honored guest.
你好啊，贵客，我们再次见面了，于这方新创的天地中。
Hello there, honored guest. We meet again in this world newly wrought.
有人称之为废墟，有人称之为囚牢。但我知道，这里不过是那位英雄内心的写照，我亦如此。
Some call it ruins, others call it a prison. But I know it's nothing more than a reflection of that hero's inner world. Mine as well.
在一切彻底结束前，让我们先拾尽若虫——他常用来自比的对象吧。
Before all comes to an end, let's gather all the nymphs, the creatures he so often used as a metaphor for himself.
最后的这段路，只需要像往常那样走过就好。
Just walk this final stretch like you always do.
哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
在这方心绪构成的世界里，唯有<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>能为我们指引前路。
In this world woven from emotions and thoughts, only the <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> can guide our way forward.
带着释怀的表情，衣匠将记忆的残晶炼化。
The Garmentmaker refines the Memory Crystal Shards with a relieved expression.
嗯…有位织者遍历大地，找寻最美的乐章。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>无人奏响的琴边</color>，为那流溢的琴音啧啧称奇呢。

Tiny oversights, redundant data... There are many terms for such beings in professional fields unknown to me.
造物主天衣无缝的演算中，本不该出现此等变量——但在每段旅程的终点，那位英雄都会向命运发起反抗，一遍又一遍……

During this process, certain minute variables came into being, which became the embryonic form of the nymphs. Since then, nymphs have become footnotes to every epic story.

没有没有，这是咱自己做的啦。

就是嘛，咱也陪了你们一路，结果一大堆照片里，却没几张能照到咱。明明还换了新造型，好可惜啊——
Right? I've been with you guys this whole time, but in all those photos, there's barely any of me in them. And I even got a new look. Such a waste!
Sorry you had to go through that, March 7th.
我们的旅途还在继续，这就够啦！后面你们俩记得多请我喝几杯奶茶就行！
Our journey continues, and that's all that matters! Just remember to treat me to lots of bubble tea later, you two!
现在想想，还是有点遗憾，要是能从翁法罗斯多带点纪念品出来就好了。
Come to think of it, it's kind of a bummer. I wish I could've grabbed more souvenirs from Amphoreus.
哎呀，一旦开始多愁善感，就没完没了啦。总之，它就送给你啦，要记得摆在显眼的位置！
Aw geez, once I start getting all sentimental, there's no stopping me! Anyway, it's yours now. Make sure you put it somewhere everyone can see!
我猜你也有东西要送给我？
I'm guessing you've got something for me too?
没错，不过我在犹豫该怎么开口。

我也有东西要交给你，但我在犹豫怎么开口。
I have something to give you as well, but I'm hesitating on how to bring it up.

March came to see me a few days ago and used the Synthesizer to print out the tablet and cover. I was already thinking about it back then.
到底什么纪念物既能表达「开拓」，又契合你的风格——最后得出的结论就是它。
After considering what souvenir could represent both Trailblaze and match your style, this was the conclusion I reached.
收下吧，庆祝我们平安无事地走完了这一遭，{NICKNAME}。
Take this. To celebrate that we made it through unscathed, {NICKNAME}.
三个人在一起才算完整，对吧？
不客气，下次去偷夜宵时，记得你来打头阵。
Don't mention it. Next time we raid for midnight snacks, you'll take the frontline.
嗯，我想说的就是这些，开饭的时候见。
Mm, that's all I wanted to say. See you at mealtime.
至于这件礼物，如果觉得有些奇怪…不，没什么，希望你能中意。
As for this gift, if you find it a bit strange... No, never mind. I hope it's to your liking.
小心，不要触碰那块羽珀，否则「毁灭」的力量会将你一并浸染！
Watch out! Don't touch that feather-shaped amber, or the power of Destruction will consume you!
那位英雄用脱落的羽翼铸成了这道封印。若要靠近，得先解决{RUBY_B#「铁墓」}一切的源头{RUBY_E#}才行。
That hero forged this seal with their fallen wings. To get close, we must first deal with {RUBY_B#Irontomb}the source of everything{RUBY_E#}.
那位英雄终于拥抱了真我，迸发出耀眼的光芒……
That hero finally embraced their ego, erupting in brilliant radiance...
真是美丽的光芒啊，简直像世界的裂缝一样，我也想投身其中……
Such beautiful radiance... It's like a crack in the world itself. Even I want to dive right into it...
那道光芒…照射出了什么东西？
That light beam... what did it reveal?
「神话之外」？时光归墟里，竟然会有通往这地方的入口？
Exomyth? There's actually an entrance to that place in the Ruins of Time?
{F#她}{M#他}的内心生出一丝疑惑，却还是朝前方的屏幕走去。
{F#She}{M#He} felt a hint of doubt, but still walked towards the screen ahead.
若虫们如灯泡般散发着忽明忽暗的光泽，怪热闹的。
The nymphs were glowing like lightbulbs, flickering on and off, quite a lively spectacle.
这里为什么会有若虫？或许是「权杖」不怕Bug吧。
Why are there nymphs here? Perhaps the Scepter is not afraid of bugs...
仔细一想，金属质地的若虫跟这里还蛮相配的。
Come to think of it, these metallic nymphs really fit in well around here.
这是一面古怪的屏幕。上次触碰它时，你不得不与那来古士战至天昏地暗。
This is one weird screen. Last time you touched it, you had to fight Lygus until all hell broke loose.
这次…什么也没发生。难道是缺了什么东西？
Nothing happened this time... Could something be missing?
这是一面古怪的屏幕。上次触碰它时，你不得不与那来古士战至天昏地暗……
This is one weird screen. Last time you touched it, you had to fight Lygus until all hell broke loose...
果然，行走于无名之途上的人，一定能发现这处巧思。不枉我将观众席的入口与那片空间相连。
As expected, those who walk the nameless path will surely discover this clever design. It wasn't in vain that I connected the audience entrance with that space.
呵呵，别紧张，阁下——此刻于您眼前显现的，不过是系统底层的一串维护代码。
Heh heh, there's no need to be nervous. What you see before you is merely a string of maintenance code from the system's backend.
注销管理员权限之前，吕枯耳戈斯用了一点时间将我捏塑成型，并留下了一道谜题——
Before revoking Administrator privileges, Lycurgus took some time to mold me into shape, and left behind a riddle...
在这场实验中，真正导致失败的<color=#dbc291ff>变量</color>是什么？
In this experiment, what was the real <color=#dbc291ff>variable</color> that led to failure?
看来，你还没有找到自己的答案——时日无多，请尽快思索吧。
It seems you haven't found your answer yet. Time is running out, so please think it through quickly.
是啊，英雄——故事家会这样称呼他们，而我更愿称其为自由之人、充满无限可能性的人。
Yes, heroes. That's what storytellers call them, but I prefer to call them free spirits, people of infinite possibilities.
翁法罗斯的七月名为自由月。它既是属于刻法勒的月份，亦是每名囚徒心底最渴望、却无法触及的东西。
July in Amphoreus is called the Month of Freedom. It belongs to Kephale and represents what every prisoner yearns for deep in their hearts, yet can never grasp.
人的精神是不可测算的，唯有神明能掌控一切。正如赞达尔无法剔除自身的人性，吕枯耳戈斯亦无法抹杀生命的出路。
The human spirit is immeasurable. Only the gods can control everything. Just as Zandar cannot remove his humanity, Lycurgus cannot eliminate the path of life.
于命途一题上，我们不过是命运的囚徒……
When it comes to the topic of Paths, we're nothing but prisoners of destiny...
但谁又能断言，我们不是一座更大洞穴中的囚徒呢？
But who can say for sure that we aren't just prisoners in an even bigger cave?
所以，我搜集了这些若虫，作为对自己和后来者的小小警示：「控制」不过是一种幻象。
So, I collected these nymphs as a small reminder to myself and those who come after: "Control" is nothing but an illusion.
行走在无名之途上的人啊，离别之前，请允许我为你献上一句箴言……
O wanderer on the nameless path, before we part ways, allow me to offer you these words of wisdom...
你是一块绝好的石料，勿要放弃这份可塑性——它是你身上最大的卓越。
You're a diamond in the rough. Don't lose that malleability, for it is your greatest excellence.
直到你决定踏出这片<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#世界}洞穴{RUBY_E#}</color>之前……
Until you decide to step out of this <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#world}cave{RUBY_E#}</color>...
流动的光路，很像金线呢~
The flowing light path really looks like a golden thread~
Thank you for letting us get home.
到了那时，就去找衣匠吧。
When the time comes, go find the Garmentmaker.
花苞随着某种脉搏的节律鼓动，猩红色孢子随之喷涌而出。
The flower bud pulsates with a certain rhythmic beat. Following that, crimson spores gush forth.
你曾听说繁育沾染的星球，孢种甚至能在旅者的鼻壁上生根发芽。为了你的鼻腔健康，或许不应该离它太近。
You've heard about planets tainted by the Propagation, where spores can even take root in travelers' nasal cavities. For the sake of your olfactory health, you probably shouldn't get too close.
先是一股浓腻的香气，随后是花蕊兴奋的颤舞…似乎嗅到了你身上熟悉的危险气息，花蕊突然停顿，瑟缩回花苞之中。

First came a thick, cloying fragrance, followed by an exhilarated dance of the stamen... Seemingly detecting the familiar-yet-dangerous aura about you, the flower's stamen suddenly paused, shrinking back into its bud.
被蛀空的星空，沦为虫群孵育子嗣的卵床…梦境向你展示了一段残酷的回忆。
The hollowed-out starscape, reduced to a breeding ground for the Swarm's offsprings... The dreamscape revealed a cruel memory to you.
真蛰虫肆虐的年代，虫群分泌粘液连接被侵蚀殆尽的星体，织就一张又一张连亘数光年的巨网。
In the era ravaged by True Sting, the Swarm secreted mucus connecting corroded celestial bodies, weaving massive nets spanning light-years across space.
对于曾眺望过这番景象的那些世界而言，能做的只有祈祷和等待。
For worlds that had witnessed this sight, all they could do was pray and wait.
被蛀空的星空，沦为虫群孵育子嗣的卵床…梦境向你展示了一段残酷的回忆。
The hollowed-out starscape, reduced to a breeding ground for the Swarm's offsprings... The dreamscape revealed a cruel memory to you.
太一之手撕裂了夜空， 虫卵破溃，繁育的力量喷涌而出。
The hands of Ena lacerated the night sky, as insect eggs burst open, unleashing the power of Propagation.
匮乏。仅仅远望一眼，你便感到无比匮乏。你的脊椎开始思考，口器吱咯作响，渴望用一场血肉的盛宴填满空若无物的胸腔…你最好把视线移开。

Scarcity. Just one distant glance, and you feel the overwhelming scarcity. Your spine begins to think, your mouthparts clicking and grinding, yearning to fill the empty void in your chest with a feast of flesh and blood... You'd better look away.
受繁育沾染的巨大蕈菌，想必一次可以吃很久。
This massive mushroom, tainted by the Propagation, could probably provide sustenance for ages.
再以这样的势头生长下去，这些蕈菌或许也能发展出璀璨的文明，在某个幽暗的地域演绎一出争夺王位的戏码。
At this rate of growth, these fungi might just develop their own dazzling civilization and put on a show of power struggles for the throne in some dark corner of the universe.
本着实事求是的探究精神，你摸了摸蕈菌上附着的织体。柔软，黏糊，富有弹性，还有点火辣辣的。你得出结论：下次不要摸了。
In the spirit of scientific curiosity, you touched the tissue attached to the fungus. Soft, slimy, elastic, and a bit spicy-hot. Your conclusion: don't touch it next time.
这颗「死灭之茧」曾捏造出一张悬垂的丝网，如愿诱捕到了寻觅而至的飞萤。
This "Cocoon of Extinction" had woven a suspended web of silk, successfully luring and trapping the fyreflies that came searching.
同为盛放星核的容器，你简直与它们油然而生了惺惺相惜之情。
Being a fellow vessel for Stellarons, you can't help but feel a kindred spirit with them.
阴谋与论辩、创造与死亡，以及抵押生命也要完成的宏伟志愿…你仿佛才刚亲眼目睹，但已是前尘旧事。
Conspiracies and disputations, creation and death, and grand aspirations worth betting one's life on... Though it feels like you just witnessed it all, it's already become a tale of the past.
帷幕之后隐隐浮现白漆绘制的图案。三个同心圆，构成了橡木横截面上的年轮，你隐约记起这是橡木家系的家徽。
Behind the curtains, white-painted images gradually emerge. Three concentric circles form the growth rings on an oak cross-section. You vaguely recall this as the Oak Family's insignia.
橡木家系的家徽。橡木年轮上的三个缺口，究竟是对希佩三重面相的礼赞，还是在暗喻寄居木中的蛀虫？
The Oak Family's insignia. Are the three notches in the oak's growth rings a tribute to the Triple-Faced Soul, or do they hint at the woodworms dwelling within?
在家徽上画一株被拦腰折断的橡木，会不会有点不大吉利？你真替橡木家系感到担心。
Drawing a snapped oak tree on the family insignia... that's pretty inauspicious, isn't it? You're genuinely worried about the Oak Family.
古旧的轮椅，在道路的尽头像一座墓碑矗立。
An old wheelchair stands like a tombstone at the end of the road.
书籍、钢笔和纸张依旧停留在书桌上，但再也等不到它们的主人。
The books, pens, and papers remain on the desk, but they'll never see their owner again.
匹诺康尼命运的众多分岔路中，这一条在彼时走到尽头…再往前是一片望不到底的虚空。
Among the many branching paths of Penacony's destiny, this one has reached its end... with nothing but an endless void lying ahead.
自动钢琴被猩红色的荒草吞没，琴键残缺，零星、生涩地发出走调的单音。
The automatic piano was engulfed by crimson-colored wild grass. Its keys were damaged and missing, sporadically and stiffly emitting discordant single notes.
你从未见过如此…丰腴的蝴蝶，你不禁联想起饱饮鲜血的蚊子，有着鼓鼓囊囊的腹部。
You've never seen such a... plump butterfly before. You can't help but think of a blood-gorged mosquito with a swollen belly.
「繁育」的力量流溢。每一根枝条、每一片叶片都因紧绷而微微翕动，迫不及待挣脱束缚自己的牢笼。
The power of Propagation overflows. Every branch and leaf quivers with tension, desperately yearning to break free from their cage's confinement.
时钟的点缀，书籍排列构成的线条，乃至书脊上每一个烫金的字体，仿佛都冥冥中服膺于一个伟大且和谐的比例。
The ornate clocks, the lines formed by organized books, and even every gilded letter on their spines. It all seemed to mystically conform to some grand and harmonious proportion.
一切都在自己恰如其分的位置上，简单、洁净、井井有条。
Everything is in its proper place: simple, pristine, and perfectly organized.
「同谐」的力量流溢。最单纯的满足温热地上升，填满你的胸膛。再在这里呆下去，你恐怕会幸福得昏厥过去。
The power of Harmony overflows. The purest satisfaction rises warmly, filling your chest. If you stay here any longer, you might just pass out from sheer bliss.
似有若无的香气悬浮，盘旋之处绵密得堪称结实，空隙之处又无比稀疏。你置身的这片空间似乎拥有不均的质地。
A faint fragrance lingers in the air, dense enough to feel almost solid where it swirls, yet incredibly sparse in the gaps. The space in which you find yourself seems to have an uneven texture.
滴…嗒，滴答，滴——答，时钟也以不一致的步伐掠过刻度。你的目光划过这处神秘的所在。
Tick... tock, tick-tock, tick—tock, the clock marches past its marks with uneven steps. You glanced across the entirety of this mysterious place.
幽绿色的药剂在昏暗中散发荧光，不知道口感如何。
The pale green potion glows in the darkness. You wonder how it tastes like.
书桌的一角的各式年鉴、典籍、杂志下，压着各不相同，甚至自相矛盾的身份证明。
Pinned beneath various almanacs, classic volumes, and magazines in a corner of the desk were multiple identification documents. All different, and some even self-contradictory.
一面碎镜，停留在了破裂的一刻。对碎镜的钟爱，好像是忆者的出厂设置。
A shattered mirror, frozen at the moment of breaking. The love for broken mirrors seems to be the default factory setting for Memokeepers.
高背椅微妙的弧度能够完美地承托背部，暗示着它的主人有着良好品味，且不是一个能够忍受正襟危坐的人。
The subtle curve of the high-back chair perfectly supports the back, suggesting that its owner has impeccable taste, and is not one to tolerate improper behavior.
你们几个烂西瓜！既然已经决定改邪归正！会一门生存技能是非常重要的。拿出以前做坏事的脑子！给我好好学习啊！

You rotten watermelons! Since you've already decided to turn over a new leaf, it's incredibly important to learn a craft or two to survive. If you've got the brains to pick up crimes, use it to learn instead!
我们这帮粗人，哪里懂得怎么搞家政服务啊？又要打扫卫生，又要微笑服务…这我们真搞不定啊！大姐头！
What do bumpkins like us know about housekeeping service? You gotta clean and serve with a smile... We really can't do it, boss!
你个烂西瓜！谁让你叫大姐头了，说了多少次都记不住？我们正经人的世界存在「大姐头」吗？要叫海梅斯老师！
You rotten watermelon! Who told you to call me lady boss? How many times must I say it!? There are no lady bosses among decent folk. Call me Ms. Hymes!
对不起！海梅斯老师！我立刻自刎归天以谢天下！
I'm sorry! Ms. Hymes! Allow me to pay with my life!
停！你们现在都是正经人了！不要动不动就自刎归天！先来复习一下上节课学的内容…照看人类婴儿的时候，婴儿突然哭了起来，你们应该怎么办？

Stop! You're all civilized individuals now. Stop thinking about paying with lives! Let's review our previous lesson... When taking care of a human infant and the infant suddenly starts crying, what should you do?
给孩子讲述我们当年和永火官邸火并的故事。当时我身中数枪，一滴眼泪都没有流！因为老大说过，「泯灭帮永不哭泣」！
Tell the child about our shootout with the Ever-Flame Mansion back in the day. I took multiple bullets, but I didn't shed a single tear! Because our boss said, "Annihilation Gang never cries!"
住口，你这个暴力烂西瓜！给我写<unbreak>400</unbreak>字检讨反省一下…但是不许自刎归天！
Shut up, you violent rotten watermelon! Write a <unbreak>400</unbreak>-word reflective essay... but none of you are allowed to pay with your lives!
来，旁边那个看起来很认真的烂西瓜，你来回答一下！
Now, that serious-looking rotten watermelon over there! You answer this question!
我会轻轻抱起婴儿，塞入安抚奶嘴，缓慢地摇晃。
I will gently carry the infant, give them a pacifier, and rock them softly.
嗯，你这西瓜还不错，说的还算句人话。
Hmm, you're not too bad. A decent answer, at least.
然后我会在婴儿的耳边轻声说：「如果您再这么哭，下次来找您的就是反物质军团了。」
Then I'll whisper to the infant: "If you keep crying like this, next time it'll be the Antimatter Legion coming for you."
你这臭放贷眼镜烂西瓜！威胁婴儿的态度还挺恭敬是吧？你再敢把以前收高利贷的那副嘴脸拿出来，下次来找你的就是你的假释监督员了！

You four-eyed, loan-sharking piece of rotten watermelon! Quite the respectful tone you've got there for threatening a baby. You try that debt collector act one more time, and the next person knocking on your door will be your parole officer!
对不起！海梅斯老师！我立刻自刎归天以谢天下！
I'm sorry! Ms. Hymes! Allow me to pay with my life!
你们这群烂西瓜，不要以为「改邪归正」是一件简单的事。做过错事的人，想要过上普通人的生活，必须付出巨大的代价才行！听懂了吗！
You bunch of rotten watermelons, don't think that it's easy to "turn over a new leaf." People who've done wrong and want to live a normal life must pay a huge cost! You hear me!?
咦？这不是星穹列车的客人吗？你怎么一个人跑到鸽川区来了？这里的治安不太好，一定要注意安全。有什么需要我们帮助的吗？

Huh? Aren't you a guest from the Astral Express? What are you doing out here in Dovebrook District all by yourself? The security here isn't great, so you need to be careful. Is there anything we can do for you?
没错。我们两个是专门负责鸽川区治安工作的治安官。我是古斯，这位则是部长卡拉。
That's right. The two of us are officers in charge of security for Dovebrook District. I'm Gus, and this is Chief Carla.
什么「狗」啊…卡拉部长是「犬灵」！是异常防御部认定的幻造种公民，也是一位在这条街上德高望重的老治安官！
What do you mean, "dog"? Chief Carla is a "woofae"! A registered imagenae citizen recognized by the Department of Aberration Defense, and a highly respected veteran security officer on this street!
什么「治安犬」啊…卡拉部长是「犬灵」！是异常防御部认定的幻造种公民，也是一位在这条街上德高望重的老治安官！

What do you mean, "security dog"? Chief Carla is a woofae! A registered imagenae citizen recognized by the Department of Aberration Defense, and a highly respected veteran security officer on this street!
唉…您说的对。域外人士确实容易因为外表而产生混淆，不能因此责怪别人…抱歉，无名客，刚才是我的态度不好。
*sigh* You have a point. It's easy for outworlders to get confused by appearances. I shouldn't hold it against them... My apologies, Nameless. I was out of line.
部长说，鸽川区本来就是个治安混乱的地方，幻月游戏期间更是雪上加霜，你们一定不要惹上纠纷！
The Chief says that Dovebrook District is a lawless place to begin with, and things get even worse during the Phantasmoon Games. You need to make sure you don't get into any disputes!
部长说，如果你卷入了什么纠纷，请第一时间联系我们，不要自己着手解决…哎呀，部长，人家是无名客，战斗力很强的，用不着我们操心吧？

The Chief says that if you get caught up in any trouble, please contact us first and foremost. Don't try to resolve it on your own... But chief, this person is one of the Nameless. They're very strong. I don't think we need to be concerned, do we?
啊，您说的对…部长的意思是，正因为你战斗力太强了，所以才请你尽可能不要自己解决纠纷。
Oh, you have a point... The Chief means that it's precisely because you're so strong that he's asking you not to resolve these matters personally.
你要是在鸽川区把哪个不长眼的小混混给打伤打残了…那可真是不好收场。
If you were to seriously injure or maim some thug who picked a fight with you in Dovebrook District... that would be a very difficult situation to handle.
总而言之，请一定要注意安全！有什么问题随时来找我们！
Anyway, just stay safe! And don't hesitate to find us if you need anything!
I was just passing by. I'll be on my way now.
了解了。你自己注意安全，有什么问题随时来找我们！
I understand. Please be safe, and don't hesitate to find us if you need anything!
经理…你这混蛋上司…为了陪你喝麦芽汁，老子又没赶上末班车！可恶啊…又要在外面露宿了啊！
Oh Manager... you jerk... Had to drink that malt juice with you and missed the last train again! Darn it... Guess I'm sleeping on the streets tonight!
呕——{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，谢谢你啊，你真善良。但是叔叔…呕…叔叔没事，叔叔早就习惯了。
*burp*... Thanks, {F#kid}{M#kid}, that's nice of you. But this old man... *burp*... this old man's fine. I'm used to it.
叔叔小时候，也想过偷喝老妈藏起来的麦芽汁，结果还没喝到被老妈发现，给我好一顿训。那时候我就向幻月发誓，「长大以后我要天天喝麦芽汁！」呕——

When I was a kid, I tried to sneak a sip of the malt juice my mom hid, but she caught me and chewed me out. Back then, I swore to the Phantasmoon, "I'm gonna drink malt juice every single day when I grow up!" *burp*...
*二相乐园粗口*！*二相乐园粗口*！*二相乐园粗口*！我那是许了什么*二相乐园粗口*愿望啊！
*Planarcadia profanity*! *Planarcadia profanity*! *Planarcadia profanity*! What kind of a *Planarcadia profanity* stupid wish was that!
你可千万不要变成叔叔这样的大人啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}。不要遇到我的那种混蛋上司…臭轻脚！只是个经理而已，官威倒是大得很，尾巴天天都要翘到天花板上去！

Don't you ever grow up to be like me, {F#kiddo}{M#kiddo}. And don't ever get a jerk for a boss like I did... That darn lightpaw! He's only a manager, but he's got an ego so big his tail is always sticking straight up in the air!
嘿嘿，但你知道吗？这个臭轻脚见到我们那个总监的时候，也和我一样，点头哈腰地敬麦芽汁…他给那个臭噗噜敬麦芽汁时，都快钻到桌子底下去了！

Hehe, but guess what? When that blasted lightpaw is with our director, he's just like me, bowing and scraping, serving malt juice... He was practically under the table kissing that bloody ploo's feet!
至于臭噗噜总监，见到臭幽灵董事的时候也一个样，恨不得趴在地上敬麦芽汁！那个臭幽灵董事，在会见那些臭公司领导时，也卑微得我都以为这家伙终于要消散了！

And that blithering ploo director is the same way with the stinking ghost executive. He practically prostrates himself to offer him malt juice! And that despicable ghost executive... When he meets with those obnoxious IPC leaders, he's so pathetic I thought this guy was finally going to dissipate into thin air!
哈哈哈哈，都是些色厉内苒的货色，都是*二相乐园粗口*酒桌上的小丑！包括我！哈哈哈…呕——
Hahahaha, they're all a bunch of phonies, nothing but *Planarcadia profanity* clowns at the dinner table! Myself included! Hahaha... *burp*...
{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，记住叔叔一句话…你一定要成为不需要给人敬酒的那种人，不然无论你薪水有多高，都只是…小丑…呕——

{F#Kid}{M#Kid}, remember what I say... You must become someone who doesn't need to toast others at dinner parties. No matter how high your salary is, if you have to do that, you're just... a clown... *urp*
这些混蛋上司，劝麦芽汁的时候，让我喝麦芽汁，自己却在那喝水！{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，你长大后可不要给这样的上司打工啊！也不要成为这样的上司啊！呕——
Those jerk bosses, making me drink malt juice while they're having water themselves! {F#Kid}{M#Kid}, when you grow up, don't ever work for bosses like that! And don't become one, either! *urgh*
你记得你之前曾经来过这个…档案室。
You remember you've been to this... archive room before.
当时这块档案室的大黑板，或许应该叫白板，当时就很吸引你的注意了…现在也一样。
Back then, this big blackboard, or perhaps whiteboard, really caught your eye... just like it does now.
抱歉，我这只是善意的警告罢了。
Apologies. That was just a friendly warning.
你怎么还唱起来了，我是在警告你呱～
Why are you singing now? I'm warning you, ribbit!
我是被诅咒的名侦探「青蛙白板」。朋友，请不要再靠近我了，靠近我，你只会变得不幸。
I am the cursed Detective "Froggy Whiteboard". Stay back, friend. Come any closer, and misfortune will befall you.
你可能在二维市内见过「鳄鱼侦探」，我曾经与它一起共事过，它不过是个沽名钓誉的家伙…而我，是见过凶案与眼泪的，一名真正的侦探，呱。

You may have met Detective Croc elsewhere in Duomension City. We once worked together, but they were nothing but a puffed-up charlatan. But I... I have seen murder and tears. I'm a real detective, ribbit.
二维市的二维侦探太多了！
There are way too many Duomension detectives in Duomension City!
朋友，难道你不喜欢我们二次元吗？再说了，我有建模！而它是真的平面。
What, you don't like us cartoon characters? But I've got a 3D model! That guy's the true flat one!
那你怎么蜗居在档案室里？
So why are you holing up in the archive room?
呵，你的观察力很敏锐。不错，我是为了自己封印自己，选择留在了这里。
Heh, sharp eye. Indeed, I chose to be confined here, a seal crafted by my own will.
我的外表看似小孩，智慧却过于常人。破获案件无数，但这也引出了另一个问题……
I might look like a child, but my mind is far beyond ordinary. I've cracked countless cases... and that's the problem.
无论我走到哪里，那里都会遇到杀人事件，几乎无一例外！
Wherever I go, a murder always follows... without fail!
哎，这就是名侦探的代价吧。
Ah, such is the price of being a great detective.
Can you really leave this place, though?
It's none of your business! None of your business! None of your business!
所以，这是我的忠告——远离我吧，我不想再推理了，让我安静地待在这里吧。
So take my advice: stay away from me. I'm done solving any more cases. Just let me sit here in peace, please.
很好奇，你的「总会遇到杀人事件」体质是不是也能在这间档案室生效？
I'm curious, does that "wherever-you-go-a-murder-happens" curse of yours still apply in this archive room?
有道理还行！我先撤退了！
A fair point!? I'm getting out of here!
这也能生效？因果律武器啊？
It even works here? What are you, a walking death machine?
我也没有那么玄乎…对不起，我还真有这么玄乎。
I wouldn't say I'm that supernatural... Sorry, actually I am exactly that supernatural.
倒也不用那么担心，你看，现在房间里只有你和我两人，而我是侦探，从不杀人！

除非有第三个人进入房间，否则，这就绝不可能发生杀人事件。
So unless a third person walks through that door, there's absolutely no way a murder will happen.

<size=28>I can't move. Go close the door!</size>

无论我走到哪里，那里都会遇到杀人事件，几乎无一例外！

So take my advice: stay away from me. I'm done solving any more cases. Just let me sit here in peace, please.
啊…抱歉，是{NICKNAME}啊，那就不用远离了，想聊聊吗？

想了解你和这间档案室…
I'd like to know more about you and this archive room...
这是绘世学院的档案室，也是藏着众多秘密的地方。抱歉，秘密之所以为秘密，就是不能有太多知情人。
This is Graphia Academy's archive room, a place of many secrets. Sorry, but a secret's only a secret when only a few people know about it.
规矩我明白，你不能说出秘密。

什么意思？我不知道，别吓我。

你误会了，不能有太多知情人的意思是……
You've got it wrong. What I mean by 'only a few people know' is...
你别问我，为什么档案室里会有伪装成校工的人进进出出，嘴巴里说着特定的收容编号，执行着繁复的交接程序，并且有些人再也没出现过……

Don't ask me why there are people disguised as janitors going in and out of the archive room, muttering specific containment numbers, executing complicated handover procedures, and usually never even showing up again...
你别问我，为什么档案室里偶尔会有血渍出现，又会在没人注意的时候被刻意消除，为什么所有的校工都假装不认识我……
Don't ask me why bloodstains occasionally show up in the archive room only to be deliberately wiped away when nobody's watching, or why all the janitors pretend they don't know me...
你别问我…你不问了是吧，好吧，你走出这扇门就忘记我们的对话吧。
Don't ask me... Oh, you're done with the interrogation? Fine. Just forget this whole conversation ever happened.
Is this still the archive room?
你别问我这还是档案室吗？

Let's keep that secret between us.
Want to learn more about the Froggy Whiteboard...
我吗？如你所见，曾经是个大侦探，而现在只是个*被诅咒的侦探*而已。
Me? Well, as you can see, I used to be a great detective, but now I'm just a *cursed detective*.
有人曾经说「是离奇的案情成就了侦探」，我曾经也为自己遇到的各种案情而暗自庆幸——要是解决了它，我肯定会声名鹊起吧。
Someone once said, "It's the strange cases that make a detective." I used to take pride in every bizarre case I encountered. If I solved them, fame would naturally follow, right?
但随着层不出穷的案件发生，我不得不怀疑，这一切的一切，与我存在着某种联系——无论它们是有意的无意的。
But as the cases kept piling up, I couldn't help but wonder: were they all somehow connected to me? Whether by coincidence or by design.
侦探应该是让人感到信任和幸福的职业。
A detective is supposed to bring people peace of mind.
所以，我宁可自己被封印起来，也不愿意有更多的人因靠近我而受伤了。
So I sealed myself away. I'd rather stay trapped than see anyone else get hurt because of me.
我只是封印了自己，但是你看，我整理线索和推理的能力还在，如果需要帮助的话，欢迎你来找我。
Don't worry. Though I have sealed myself away, my skills in deduction and reasoning are still sharp. If you ever need help, you can always come find me.
所以你这白板是做什么的？
