你知道线索板吗？一种辅助思维的可视化工具。
You know what a clue board is? It's a visual tool that helps with thinking.
大侦探在思考时，需要借助一些方式找出看似无关的事物之间的隐秘关联，从而推动案情突破。
When concentrating on a case, a great detective uses various methods to uncover hidden connections between seemingly unrelated things. This can crack a case wide open.
你看！我这里恰好就有一些毫无关系的事物图片，当它们不按固定顺序放在这里时，你联想到了什么？
Check it out! I just happen to have some completely unrelated pictures right here. When they're arranged in no particular order like this, what associations come to mind?
我也没有联想到，它们还真是毫无联系啊！

I've got the culprit figured out...
啊…我的意思是你的推理能力有点太强了，我忍不住想要抄答案了。
Ah... what I mean is your deduction skills are so sharp, I can't help but want to take a look at your answers.
但是，直接询问其他侦探事件的真相，还是太过羞耻了，我不会再问了。
But asking other detectives directly about their case results is just too embarrassing. I won't be doing that again.
总之你明白了吧，在退役之前，我承担的就是如此重要的职责。
Anyway, you get the picture — before I retired, I had some seriously important responsibilities on my shoulders.
Sorry, but we should keep our distance for now!
没问题，下次有空再聊吧。

Oh, stop the act. That's a nice outfit you've got on. It tells me you're a person of refinement, just like myself. So why would refined people like us be in a place like the Dovebrook District? We must be here on business.
现在既然你出现在我面前，那我就可以断定——你是来见我的。

至于你是从哪里得知了我的行踪…大概是从社交网站上找到的吧？真拿你们这些狂热粉丝没办法啊。呵，看你那惊异的表情，没想到我能看穿真相吧？
And how did you learn of my whereabouts? Let me guess... social media? Honestly, you rabid fans are something else. Hehe, that shocked expression... You never thought I'd see through you, did you?
你可别小看我，我可是推理剧专业户！《乐园疑云》《神探下了课》《尘灵猎人》《超动感警探》…既然你是我的粉丝，那应该都看过吧？

Don't you underestimate me. I'm a specialist in mystery shows! Arcadia Mystery, After Class Detective, Wispae Hunter, The Hyper-Mentalist... Since you're such a big fan, you must have seen them all, yes?
So what brings you to the Dovebrook District?
啧…都被你找到这里来了，那我大概也算是瞒不过去了…我现在的热度越来越低了，为了维持愿力，只能来鸽川区寻求些「专业手段」了。

Tch... Well, you've found me, so I guess the secret's out... My popularity is fading. To keep my Wishpower from drying up, I had to come to the Dovebrook District to seek out some... "specialized services."
说穿了，就是来这里找些专业人士在网上给我造造势。我也不知道他们都怎么干…但方法无所谓，有愿力汇入就好。
Basically, I'm looking for some experts to manufacture some buzz for me online. I don't know the details of what they do... The methods don't matter, as long as the Wishpower keeps coming.
别这么看着我嘛！你也知道的，现在大环境不好，并不是我的问题。

呵，跟我玩这种欲擒故纵的小把戏是吧？你都追到这里来了，那又怎么会不记得我演过什么呢？

《乐园疑云》第三季第五集的死者、《神探下了课》第十九季第五集的死者、《尘灵猎人》第五季第五集的死者…我演过的死者可太多了！
The corpse in Season 3, Episode 5 of Arcadia Mystery, the corpse in Season 19, Episode 5 of After Class Detective, the corpse in Season 5, Episode 5 of Wispae Hunter... I've played so many corpses!
最厉害的还是《超动感警探》，在第七集里面，我一个人扮演了五个死者！你肯定还对我当时的演技记忆犹新吧？
But my best work was in The Hyper-Mentalist. In Episode 7, I single-handedly played five different dead bodies! Surely you remember my breathtaking performance?
行了，能和偶像聊这么久，你也应该满意了吧？快别在这儿缠着我了，要是让狗仔队拍到我在鸽川区和粉丝密会，谁知道他们会乱写些什么报道！

Alright, you've had a nice long chat with your idol, you should be satisfied. Now stop hanging around me. If the paparazzi catch me having a clandestine meeting with a fan in Dovebrook District, there's no telling what kind of nonsense they'll write!
(I'll just act like I never saw him.)
等等，你别急着走啊！只要你保证不拿出去倒卖，我也是可以答应和你合影的呀！签名也不是不能商量的呀！
Hey, wait, don't just walk off! As long as you promise not to resell it, I could even agree to a photo op! An autograph might be negotiable, too!
嗯？哦，你好…有什么事需要帮助吗？虽然人生最多还有三万多天，但如你所见，我现在并没有什么急事，所以你如果有什么困难就告诉我吧…我会在力所能及的范围内伸出援手哦。

Hm? Oh, hello... Need any help? Even though I've got about <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> days left in life, as you can see, I'm not particularly busy right now, so if you're having any troubles, just let me know... I'll lend a hand where I can.
Nothing much, just wanted to chat.
唔，糟糕，我在力所能及的范围内想不出来什么话题耶…怎么办，要写一封血书向您谢罪吗？哎呀——别紧张，只是一个玩笑而已。如果你真的需要，我会用红墨水认真写的。

Hmm, this is bad, I can't think of any topics... What should I do, write you an apology letter in blood? Oh, don't worry, just kidding. Though if you really need one, I'll write it properly with red ink.
诶，迷路？…哦，难道您没有在手机上安装《星际和平地图》这款应用？
Eh, lost? ...Oh, don't tell me you haven't installed the Interstellar Peace Map app on your phone?
很简单的，从应用市场里找到这款地图，安装一下，手机就可以提供移动导航的服务啦。
It's super simple... Just find this map app in the app store, install it, and your phone will provide mobile navigation services!

Oh man, that's a real bummer. With mobile payments being so popular these days, running into those old-school coin-operated vending machines can really leave you high and dry.
这<unbreak>100</unbreak>信用点里凝结着我的生命和汗水…我就把它托付给您了。请一定要好好使用它啊。

哦，抱歉…是我误会了…不好意思。有空再聊天吧…嗯，希望我们还有见面的机会。

相逢就是缘。有什么我能够帮到你的吗？

唔…你身上有一种特别的魅力，总是能吸引大家的注意？你的笑容像阳光一样温暖，一定能照亮整个世界？不管遇到什么困难，你总能迎难而上解决问题，是一个值得信赖的朋友？

Hmm... You have this special charm that always draws everyone's attention? Your smile is as warm as sunshine, surely brightening up the whole world? No matter what challenges come your way, you always rise to the occasion and solve problems. A truly reliable friend, right?
啊…我好像不是非常擅长这个。在人生的前一万天里很少做这种事情。如果效果不好，请接受我的道歉。
Ah... I don't think I'm particularly good at this. Haven't done much of this sort of thing in the first ten thousand days of my life. If it doesn't turn out well, please accept my apologies.

…咦？好奇这个吗？唔，应该说是节省生命能量的必要举措吧。
...Huh? Curious about that? Well, let's just say it's a necessary measure to conserve life energy.
不化妆会不好意思出门，但是全脸化妆又非常麻烦…戴口罩的话，只要画好眼睛就可以啦。嗯，其实就是懒得化妆。

I'd feel self-conscious going out without makeup, but doing a full face is such a hassle... With a face mask on, I just need to do my eyes and I'm good to go. Well, I guess I'm just too lazy to make up.
唔，这么说来还是上班的时候轻松。我的工作属于难得的上班不用化妆的那种。不过缺点就是…上班的时候也不好穿表达个性的衣服。

Hmm, come to think of it, work is pretty chill. My job's one of those rare ones where I don't have to put on makeup. Though the downside is... I can't really wear clothes that express my personality at work.
啊…我家是开旧书店的。在店里要和各种各样的书打交道，也有一些上了年纪的客户，所以穿着打扮都要尽量朴素一些。
Ah... My family runs a used bookstore. Since I deal with all kinds of books at the shop and we have quite a few elderly customers, I try to keep my appearance fairly modest.
店面本身不大，就开在我们家老房子的一楼…来的客人也都很安静，所以有种像古墓一样令人安心的感觉。哎呀…这样想来，这份从爷爷手里继承下来的工作确实挺不错的。

The shop itself isn't big, just on the ground floor of our old house... The customers are always quiet, giving it this weirdly comforting tomb-like vibe. Heh... Come to think of it, this job I inherited from grandpa isn't half bad.
比老爸老妈那样的标准上班族还是舒服多啦。
Way better than being a regular office worker like Mom and Dad.
旁边的那本书是幻造种吗？
Is that book next to you an imagenae?
哎呀…阁下真是慧眼如炬。
Oh my... Your Excellency is truly perceptive.
没错，那本立体书也是幻造种…不过由于愿力微薄，它的身体已经开始分崩离析，上面的立体插图早已消失不见…甚至糟糕到了不是所有人都能看见它本身的地步。

That's right, that pop-up book is also an imagenae... but due to its weak Wishpower, its body has already started to fall apart. The pop-up illustrations have long since vanished... it's even gotten so bad that not everyone can see the book itself anymore.
如果阁下也有拯救它的意愿，还请多多留心身边的环境：<color=#dbc291ff>这本书上已经分崩离析的立体插图，可能就隐藏在世界的角落之中</color>。

If you're also willing to help save it, please pay close attention to your surroundings: <color=#dbc291ff>the shattered pop-up illustrations from this book might be hidden in corners of the world</color>.
请多保重。希望下次还有机会。
Take care. Hope we'll meet again.
怎么一天又过去了！唔，我看看…腿断过、肠胃炎犯过、感冒发烧咳嗽早得过了…
How did another day just fly by! Hmm, let me see... broken legs, gastroenteritis, cold, fever, and cough... Cliche excuses...
哎，到底还有什么理由可以跟老师请假啊！
Ugh, what excuse can I possibly give to the teacher this time!
你是学生？为什么不上学？
You're a student? Why aren't you in school?
我在上学啊，谁说「装上学」不是一种上学？这可不比坐在高中教室轻松！
I AM going to school! Who says "pretending to go to school" isn't a form of schooling? It's not any easier than sitting in a high school classroom!
我每天都得起个大早，跟爸妈说「我上学去啦！」，接着再给老师发小作文：「非常抱歉妮卡又得请假了」，然后坐三站列车溜到这里来找有为姐姐。

Every morning I have to get up super early, tell my parents "I'm off to school!", then send my teacher a little note saying "I deeply apologize but Nikka needs to take another day off," and hop on the carriage for three stops to come see Miss Willyn.
Why don't you want to go to school?
好奇怪的问题，难道你想上班？
What a weird question! Do you actually want to go to work?
好啦，我知道你的意思。逃学是我自己的决定，我知道这不对，但除了你和有为姐姐，没人会问我为什么，大人们只会说——
Alright, I get what you mean. Skipping school was my own decision, I know it's wrong, but besides you and Willyn, no one asks me why. Adults just say...
「话别讲这么难听，那不是孤立，是你自己不合群！」，「起外号？要有欢愉精神啊妮卡，你就是太敏感！」，「都是孩子，什么打不打，闹着玩而已」……

"Don't make it sound so harsh, this isn't isolation. It's just that you don't fit in!", "Nicknames? Come on Nikka, where's your spirit of Elation? You're way too sensitive," "Kids fight all the time! It's not bullying, just harmless fun..."
就是这样。所以…我暂时不想上学。
And that's that. So... I don't want to go to school for now.
有为姐姐是我的好朋友！喏，就是那个强壮的欧克姐姐！
Miss Willyn is my good friend! Look, she's that strong orch lady over there!
以前的我，生活给我一拳，我一躺就是一天！现在的我，每天都想成为她那样的世间强者！
When life threw a punch, I used to just lie there. Now, I wake up every day striving to be like her, who's strong enough to take on the world!
我计划找她锤炼自己，等我也变得强大了，我就回学校去，然后把那些欺负过我的人都揪出来，说：「——我要一次打八个！」
I'm gonna ask her to train me. Once I'm strong enough, I'll go back to school and line up those bullies, one by one, and say: "Come at me! I can take all eight of you at once!"
Can't figure it out either. I'm out.
没事，想不出理由我就直接开摆。俗话说得好——只要胆子大，一周七天假～
No worries. When words fail me, I just... stop trying. As they say: with guts comes freedom, every day's a holiday!
啊啊！欧克为什么就非要做打打杀杀的营生！哪有这样的道理！
Argh! Why do orch always have to make a living through violence and bloodshed!? Who made up that rule!?
哎呀，抱歉吓到你了！世界如此美妙，我却如此暴躁，这样不好…不好……
Ah, sorry! Didn't mean to scare you. The world is so wonderful, yet I'm so grumpy here... not good... not good at all.
多谢您的关心，我没事，我只是再次求职失败罢了…没事的，我已经习惯了。
Oh, thank you for asking. I'm fine, really. Just... failed another job interview. Again. But I'm used to it by now.
为什么所有用人单位都在问我「擅不擅长战斗」「要不要转岗安保部门」「会不会忍不住殴打客户」这种蠢问题啊？我看起来难道是个很暴力的人吗！

Why do all these recruiters keep asking me stupid questions like "Are you good at combat," "Would you like to transfer to security," "Ever worry you'll punch a client?" Do I really look that violent to you!?
哎…我们欧克自世人对暴力的恐惧和羡慕中诞生，也把这样的印象留给了后人。所以直到今天，欧克的就业之路也很狭窄。

...We orch were born from humanity's fear and admiration of violence, and that impression has been passed down through generations. That's why even today, career options for orch remain quite limited.
大家似乎很难信任欧克会真正放下他们所擅长的暴力，所以我爸妈常说：「只有去做『治安官』，才能被人打心底里尊重」。
It seems people find it hard to trust that we orch can truly abandon the violence we excel in. That's why my parents always say, "Only by becoming a security officer, can you earn true respect."
我当然尊敬治安官的牺牲，但厌烦暴力的我更想突破大家对欧克的认知，尝试一些不必使用武力的和平岗位。

I do respect security officers and all their sacrifices. However, as one who is tired of violence, I want to break through everyone's stereotypes about orch and try peaceful jobs that don't rely on force.
可现实却…很不顺利，外加爸妈催得紧，我只能假装上班，躲在这投简历。
Reality, though... hasn't been kind. With my parents breathing down my neck, all I can do is pretend to work while hiding here sending out resumes.
不过往好处想，至少旁边那位妮卡妹妹还很需要我…需要我教她怎么打架。哎呀烦死了！怎么所有人都觉得我是武力派呢？我明明是头脑派！大学时学的可是生化电子学喔！

Looking on the bright side though, at least little Nikka still needs me... needs me to teach her how to fight. Ugh, honestly! Why does everyone assume I'm the muscle type? I'm totally the brainy type! I majored in biochemical electronics in university, you know?
不过嘛，如果最终能帮到妮卡妹妹的话，那至少说明「武力」也不算全无用处吧。哈哈。
But I guess... if my fists can help Nikka even a little, maybe might isn't entirely useless after all. Haha.
吓到你真的很抱歉！我之后会努力保持情绪稳定，做最和平的欧克！
I'm so sorry for scaring you! I'll do my best to stay calm from now on... to be the most peace-loving orch there ever was!
章鱼，还是鱿鱼？静下心想想，我的胃现在渴望什么……
Octopus or squid? Deep breath, what does my stomach crave right now...
嗯，刚出锅、热乎乎的章鱼丸子，就像深海的金色宝箱一样。一口下去绵软咸鲜，而「宝藏」的弹牙口感更增添了一份惊喜……

Hmm... fresh out of the pan, this piping hot squid doughballs is like a golden treasure chest from the deep sea. It's soft and savory at first bite, while the chewy "treasure" inside offers an extra delightful surprise...
说到鱿鱼，就是烤鱿鱼，重点在于食材新不新鲜，酱料如何调配。就像这里的老烧烤摊，他们的秘制酱料咸中带辣，香而不腻，让人食指大动……

If it's squid, then it's gotta be grilled. The secret's in the fresh ingredients and mixed sauce. Take this old BBQ stand right here. Their secret sauce has this perfect balance of salty and spicy that is rich but never greasy. It makes your mouth water just smelling it...
我决定了，各买五份。谢谢你的建议，年轻人。
I've made up my mind. Five orders of each. Thanks for the advice, young one.
哈哈，这是我的荣幸。如果想就近吃一顿，我推荐「多星籍餐厅」，能吃到其他世界的特色菜，尤其是「香炸云排」，酥脆得恰到好处。

Haha, I'll take that as a compliment. If you're looking for a good place nearby, try "Galactic Cuisine." They've got specialties from all across the galaxy. You won't go wrong with the "Cloud Cutlet." It's crispy, crunchy, and absolutely perfect.
哈哈，去它的健康饮食。我能大口吃着美食，不就证明我很健康吗！
Haha, to hell with healthy eating! If I can stuff my face with delicious food, that's proof enough I'm healthy!
听听五十岁大叔的人生建议吧——「人与美食的相遇总是很短暂。所以只要今天吃得下，就绝不要剩到明天。」
Take it from a guy in his fifties: "The encounter between you and delicacies is always fleeting. So if you can eat it today, never save it for tomorrow."
这么说来，大叔我作为「美食博主」的直播副业，已经赚得比本职还多了。
Come to think of it, my side gig as a "food influencer" is now making more than my actual job.
也许真的可以考虑旅游局的提案，担任形象大使，专职四处探店？
Maybe I should really consider the tourism agency's proposal to be the brand ambassador and make a career out of exploring different food?
他们说我的吃相很好。每次我开播，都会给当地带来一个月的营收增长……
They said my eating face looks great on camera. Every time I stream, local restaurants see a whole month's worth of growth...
Wouldn't that tie you down, though?
有道理…我还想趁下次出差，去罗浮仙舟尝尝那道出名的「苏打豆汁儿」呢。
Fair point... I still wanna try that legendary mung bean soda next time I'm on business at the Xianzhou Luofu.
算了，当务之急还是享受今日的美食！要是发现好吃的店，记得也跟大叔我说一声啊！
Forget it, now let's just focus on enjoying today's food! If you find any good restaurants, please do let me know!
这是很严肃的问题，是我们气氛组赖以生存下去的红线！
This is a serious matter. it's the bottom line that our Hype Squad's survival depends on!
我作为老大，一直在强调：「辨别！辨别！」——我们一定要为不同的人精准送去他们最需要的祝福，才能平安得到他们的关注和愿力！
As the boss, I've always emphasized: "Discern! Discern!" We must precisely deliver the most needed blessings to different people if we want to safely gain their attention and Wishpower!
既然有新人加入，我就把咱们的「气氛组生存技巧」再讲解一次。
Since we have a newbie joining us, let me go over one more time our Hype Squad Survival Guide.
就算是做气氛组也要有职业道德。咱们最核心的职业素养就是具备鹰一样的敏锐和手术刀般的精确，在纷乱的地铁口，也绝对不能认错人！

Even as a Hype Squad member, you gotta have professional ethics. Our core quality is having an eagle's sharp eye and a surgeon's precision. That is, we absolutely can't mistake someone's identity in the chaos of a subway entrance!
注意听，一个丧眉耷眼、眼冒金星，走一步晃三步的人下午回家，他会是谁？
Listen up, a guy with droopy eyes, dizzy and dazed, and stumbling like he's about to fall over on his way home one afternoon, who do you think that'll be?
错！咱们从来不给下班的上班族喊口号——我们又不加班！遇不见他们的！
Wrong! We never chant slogans at salarymen going home. We don't work overtime! We never run into them anyway!
记住，他是个学生，而且刚刚考了零鸭蛋，走一步晃三步是不想回家！
Remember, he's a student who just flunked an exam. If he's staggering with every step, it's because he doesn't want to go home!
明、明白了…加班的上班族和考试失败的学生，不也差不多嘛？
I—I get it... Salarymen doing overtime and students failing exams, they're pretty much in the same boat, right?
你这家伙不要碎碎念！虽然我们幻造种聚集起来做气氛组，求的就是那点关注和愿力，但一行就要有一行的规矩！
Stop your yapping! Sure, we imagenae gather to hype up the crowd for attention and Wishpower, but there are rules to follow in this line of work!
你们是不是觉得我芋头二当家特别麻烦，总喜欢强调这些无关紧要的细节？不，你们错了！让我给你们讲个故事吧！
You think I, Underboss Taro, am a pain in the neck, always harping on about these trivial details? No, you've got it all wrong! Let me tell you a story!
遥想我刚入行那年，大当家就草拟出了那些振聋发聩的口号，从上班族到无所事事者，甚至帮派分子都受到过他的鼓励！
Back in my early days, the boss came up with those mind-blowing slogans that inspired everyone from office workers to slackers, and even gang members!
但大家知道为什么现在我成老大了吗？
But do you all know why I'm the boss now?
因为那个最后的下午，他对着一个凶神恶煞的欧克高呼：「今天也要加油做个帮派分子啊！朝着二相乐园的治安挥舞拳头吧！」
Because on that final afternoon, he shouted at a fierce-looking orch: "Let's keep being a gang member today too! Let's raise our fists against the peace of Planarcadia!"
然后他就被一位蹲守已久的欧克便衣治安官拖走了。拘了七天，出来后就金盆洗手了。
Then he got dragged away by a terrifying orch undercover security officer. After seven days in detention, he came out with his spirit broken and swore off the life for good.
啊，每每想到这个沉重的故事，我的心还是会抽痛！各位，一定要记住这个教训——绝对不能认错别人的身份！
Ah, every time I think about this heavy story, my heart still aches! Everyone, remember this lesson and never ever mistake someone's identity!
你们应该来应援一下我！
You should come cheer me on!
我们气氛组会绝不认错别人的身份，想要应援的话您得告诉我们——您是谁？
The Hype Squad never misidentifies anyone. If you want our support, you'll have to tell us: Who are you?
I'm a student still in school!
您每次来到这里，我们气氛组都会鼓励您好好读书的！
Whenever you come, the Hype Squad is here to cheer you on to hit the books!
我是进入社会的打工人！
I'm just another corporate slave in the rat race!
您每次来到这里，我们气氛组都会鼓励您加油工作的！
Whenever you come, the Hype Squad is here to cheer you on with your work!
我是…我是二维市的废物…
I'm... I'm just a loser in Duomension City...
废物？不对，您是在享受生活！
A loser? No way, you're living your best life!
您放心，就算您的生活方式不被人理解，我们气氛组都会支持您的！
Don't worry! Even if others don't understand your lifestyle, the Hype Squad will always have your back!
问别人之前，先说自己是谁。
Introduce yourself before asking others who they are.
行不更名，坐不改姓，我是气氛组的芋头二当家。请多指教！
True to my name and reputation, I'm Taro, the Underboss of the Hype Squad. Glad to know you!
市民您好，您已违反「二相乐园交通法」第五章十二条，在机动车道上超速行驶。
Greetings, citizen. You have violated Article <unbreak>12</unbreak>, Chapter 5 of the Planarcadia Traffic Law for speeding on the motorway.
鉴于初犯且情形轻微，您有一次机会，可以通过完成答题而从轻处罚。
Given that this is your first offense and a minor case, you have one chance to receive a lighter punishment by completing a questionnaire.
真倒霉，刚提车想潇洒一把，就碰上「铁面的道穷司」…你可说好了，答个题就放我走。
Just my luck! I just got my car and wanted to get some fun, and I run into the "Down-Bad Jones"... You promised to let me go if I'd answer the questionnaire.
如果您在十个问题中正确回答八问，将不会进行行政拘留，仅会处以罚金。请听题：
If you answer eight out of ten questions correctly, you will not face administrative detention, only a fine. Please listen to the questions:
为何多数治安官不会选择追逐混混，直到将其逮捕？
Why don't most security officers choose to chase down the thugs until they're caught?
因为他们追不上！开玩笑的…是治安官也怕违法吧？
Because they can't catch up! Just kidding... The security officers are also afraid of breaking the law, I guess?
错误，你开再快我也追得上。而且我们拥有一定的执法豁免权，放弃追捕是避免危害公共安全。
Wrong, no matter how fast you go, I can still catch up. Besides, we have certain law enforcement immunity, and abandoning pursuit is about avoiding risks to public safety.
下一问，治安官应该如何灵活应对市民提出的「手下留情」请求？
Next one: How should a security officer flexibly handle citizens' requests to go easy on them?
Maybe reduce the penalty a bit?
错误，那是渎职行为——但我们会在开罚单的时候写字写慢点。
Wrong, that would be dereliction of duty, but we'll write the ticket nice and slow.
下一问，机铠以<unbreak>50</unbreak>公里/系统时的速度在正向车道行驶，该段道路有限速<unbreak>60</unbreak>公里的指示牌，请问这一场景中是否存在违规行为？

Moving along: A mechatron is traveling at <unbreak>50</unbreak> kilometers per system hour in the forward lane. There's a speed limit sign showing <unbreak>60</unbreak> kilometers. Is there any violation in this scenario?
错误，机铠整体属于幻造种，应该走非机动车道。您已用光错误次数，请在此等待转运。
Wrong, mechatrons are classified as imagenae and should use the non-motorized lane. You've exhausted your chances. Please wait here for transfer.
不要啊——我不想蹲局子啊——
No way! I don't wanna end up in the slammer!
路过的各位市民，为了您和他人的安全，请遵守交通规则。祝您生活愉快。
Dear citizens passing by, for your and other people's safety, please follow traffic regulations. Have a pleasant day.
这位路过的宝子，用你可爱的小手点个关注呗~要不要再动动手指刷个愿宝？可以解锁全新舞蹈哦~
Hey there cutie~ Mind using those adorable fingers to give us a follow? And while you're at it, why not tap that Wishbae button? You'll unlock a brand new dance routine~
不刷的话麻烦让一让，别挡着其他路过的宝宝打赏愿力好吗？
If you're not donating, could you please step aside? Don't block other sweeties trying to give their Wishpower, okay?
Focus your mind. Unleash the Wishpower!
咦，你还真的打赏愿宝呀！
不对，愿力还在增加…是心愿火箭…不，是豪华愿景摩天轮…不，是愿满天成梦幻嘉年华！
No wait, the Wishpower is still rising... It's a Wish Rocket... Hold on, it's a Deluxe Wish Ferris Wheel... No way, it's THE Dream Carnival of Fulfilled Wishes!
呼，至少这阵子不必担心消失，可以稍微歇歇了。老板大气！
Phew, at least I don't have to worry about disappearing for a while. I can finally catch a break. Thank you for being so generous!
老板出手这么阔绰，真是让蒲儿心里砰砰直跳呢。老板想看什么舞吗，还是想和蒲儿聊聊天呢？
I gotta say, you're so generous it makes my heart flutter! Would you like to see me dance, or would you prefer to chat with me?
You changed your attitude in the blink of an eye.
别生气嘛老板，我承认刚才说话有点大声了。像我们轻脚这种满大街都是的幻造种，也只有靠这样吸引路人的目光，才能得到一点点愿力了。
Please don't be mad at me. I admit I was a bit loud earlier. As a lightpaw, one of those dime-a-dozen imagenae, we can only get a tiny bit of Wishpower by catching people's attention like this.
去掉直播成本，再去掉平台抽成，即便一天跳到晚，也只是勉强足够维持存在而已。一旦停下来，没人喜欢我，甚至没人讨厌我…我就消失了。

After deducting streaming costs and platform fees, even if I dance from dawn till dusk, I'm barely making enough to live. Once I stop, no one will like me, not even hate me... and I'll just disappear.
老板老板，你舍得让蒲儿消失吗？
You wouldn't let me disappear, would you?
那我再多给你传输些愿力！
Then I'll transmit more Wishpower to you!
老板你最好了！咦，不过，你身上似乎没有新鲜的愿力了哦？说什么要给蒲儿愿力，只是说说而已吗？
You're the best! Huh, but... looks like you don't have any fresh Wishpower on you? All that talk about giving me Wishpower... Was that just empty promises?
救急不救穷，这也没办法。
Emergency care won't fix being broke. That's just how it is.
我就知道…你们为了有人陪伴创造了轻脚，一旦腻了就把我们遗弃在街头…有兴趣时来哄一哄，厌倦了就看也不看我们一眼……
I knew it... You created lightpaw just to have company, then abandoned us on the streets once you got bored... You pamper us when you feel like it, and ignore us completely when you're tired of us...
也没关系…反正但凡一有充裕的愿力，蒲儿都会把它花掉的。漂亮衣裳啦，名牌香水啦，真皮包包啦…想要我的愿力？通通拿去好了。
It's fine though... whenever there's plenty of Wishpower, I will spend it all anyway. Designer clothes, fancy perfumes, genuine leather bags... Want my Wishpower? Take it all, be my guest.
反正，也不知道明天自己还会不会在这里……
Well, who knows if I'll even still be here tomorrow...
这就对了，我们可不像你们有用不完的时间。路过的宝子们，用你可爱的小手点个关注吧，求求啦~
That's more like it! Unlike you folks, we don't have all the time in the world. Hey there passersby, give us a follow with those adorable little fingers of yours, pretty please~
哇！年轻美丽的小姐，您超群的气质我隔着一条街就嗅…就发现了。
Wow! Beautiful young lady, your exceptional aura... I could sniff... I mean, I could notice it from all the way across the street!
别误会，我是来自寰宇知名大事务所「超星娱乐」的星探尾巴长。这是我的名片。怎么样，有兴趣加入我们事务所，逐梦演艺圈吗？

Don't get me wrong, I'm Longtail, a talent scout from "Superstar Entertainment," a renowned entertainment company across the universe. Here's my business card. So, what do you say? Interested in joining our agency and pursuing your dreams in show business?
正常星探会在这闻来闻去吗？管好你的鼻子！
Would a normal talent scout be sniffing around like that? Keep your nose to yourself!
美丽的小姐，或许您有听说过这样一句话——「一流的星探都具备对时尚最敏锐的嗅觉」，而我的鼻子便是如此。
My lovely lady, perhaps you've heard this saying, "The best talent scouts have the keenest nose for fashion," and that's just how my nose is.
只要一个具备时尚感，有成为演员、歌手潜力的素人从我身边经过，我都会嗅闻到她身上那股神秘的气息……
Whenever a fashionable amateur with potential to be an actress or singer passes by me, I can catch that mysterious aura on her...
要红的气息、万众瞩目的气息、大把信用点愿宝的气息！
The aura of going viral, the aura of being in the spotlight, the aura of Wishbaes throwing credits around!
实话告诉你吧，看到你的那个瞬间，我连你以后的巡演主题名都想好了。
To be honest, the moment I saw you, I'd already thought up the name for your future tour.
相信我，跟着我们事务所，只要你四肢健全，我就能给你包装成寰宇影后，只要你能开口说话，成为银河歌姬也不是梦，区区知更……

Trust me, you should join our agency. As long as you've got all your limbs, I can transform you into a Universal Movie Queen. If you can open your mouth and speak, becoming a Cosmic Serenader isn't just a dream. Miss Robin is just...
你是说…超越知更鸟小姐？
嘘——这话可不敢乱讲！总之，你潜力无限，我们事务所又本事通天，强强联手，你明白意思就好！
Shh! Don't say that out loud! Look, you've got unlimited potential, and our agency is well-versed in knowledge and information. Together we'd be unstoppable, if you catch my drift!
Do I really have that much potential?
说起来你可能不信，我闻到过很多种类的时尚气息，只有你的最不一样，简直是勾魂夺魄，令人心底泛痒，还有点海洋的潮腥，和面点的香甜……

You might not believe this, but I've caught whiffs of all sorts of trendy scents, and yours is utterly unique and absolutely bewitching. It makes my heart tingle, with hints of salty ocean breeze and sweet pastry all at once...
你闻到的其实是我刚买的大黄鱼焙面吧！
What you're smelling must be the Yellow Fish Noodles I just bought!
哈哈哈…俺好幸福，好满足嘎！
Hahaha... I'm so happy, so totally stoked, quack!
你看起来很开心，遇到好事了？
You look happy! Did something good happen?
今天来集会的路上，俺竟然在垃圾桶里捡到了半碗炒面，还浇着俺最爱的酱汁嘎。
On my way to the gathering today, I actually found half a bowl of noodles in the trashcan, and it even had my favorite sauce on it, quack.
好久没有吃到热乎乎的饭菜，肚子里一下子暖洋洋的。
It's been so long since I've had a hot meal, the warmth spreads through my belly like a cozy blanket.
Man, I'm so freaking happy, quack!
和大家在一起，俺怎么可能不幸福？哈哈哈…哈哈…哈……
How could I not be happy when I'm with everyone? Hahaha... haha... ha...
呜…呜呜呜…呜哇哇哇哇！你说得对，俺根本就没有吃饱嘎！
Waaah... Waah... WAAAAAAH! You're right. I'm still hungry, quack!
Do ploos really talk like that?
从我们那个年代起，噗噜就会「嘎、嘎」说话嘎。
Since our age, ploos have been speaking with a "quack," quack.
偷偷告诉你，你可别向异、异常防御部的人告密嘎。俺本来住在乡下的小溪里，饿了就去农田抓虫子吃，日子过得可自由自在了。

Let me tell you a secret, but don't snitch to the folks at the Department of Aberration Defense. I used to live in a stream out in the countryside, catching frogs from the fields whenever I got hungry. Oh, those were the days of pure freedom, quack.
有天我玩累了回窝里打盹，没成想一睡就睡了几百年。等被公司的挖机挖出来，才发现一切都大变样了。

One day, I got tired from playing and went back to my nest to take a nap. I didn't expect to fall asleep for hundreds of years. When the IPC's excavation machine dug it up, it was only then that we realized everything had changed.
农田变成了高楼，小溪变成了街道，家也找不着了嘎。
Farmlands turned into skyscrapers, streams became streets, and I can't even find my way home anymore, quack.
俺没有被登记在册，其他噗噜不搭理俺，也没有虫子吃，俺完全摸不清头脑，只好捡垃圾为生了。
I wasn't registered, the other ploos ignore me, and there are no bugs for me to eat. I couldn't figure it out at all, so I had to pick up trash to make a living.
我听到他们说，只要加入幸福微笑研究会，阿哈就会亲自让大家得到幸福，俺就来了这里。可是，虽然俺已经很努力微笑了，还是肚子好饿，不能像大家那样幸福……

I heard them say that if I joined the Research Society of Happy Smiles, Aha would personally make everyone happy, so I came here. But even though I've been trying my hardest to smile, my stomach is still so hungry, and I can't be happy like everyone else...
难道是没有做幸福手术的缘故嘎？
Could it be 'cause I haven't had the Happiness Surgery yet, quack?
这是可以做手术解决的吗？
Can this be fixed with surgery?
他们和俺说，不幸福是一种疾病，是需要医治的。只要把脑袋里的不快乐切断，阿哈就会在脑子里亲自给你讲笑话，永远生活在幸福里了！

They told me that unhappiness is a disease that needs to be cured. Just cut off the unhappiness in your brain, and Aha will personally tell you jokes in your head, and you'll live in happiness forever!
可是俺每次想做幸福手术，大家都推三阻四，也不知道为什么。
But every time I wanna get that Happiness Surgery, everyone keeps giving me the runaround. No clue why.
唉，不知道什么时候才能做上幸福手术。这是我唯一的盼头了嘎！
*sigh* I wonder when I'll finally get that Happiness Surgery. That's literally the only thing I'm looking forward to, quack!
I'm out. Have fun being happy without me.
喂！你这家伙是同行吧？你哪个经纪公司的？这条街应该是我们「超星娱乐」的地盘吧？希望其他友商能稍微懂点规矩。

Hey! You're in the same business, aren't you? Which agency are you working for? This street should be Superstar Entertainment's turf, right? You should know a thing or two about respecting territories.
吃枪药了？这么凶干什么？
What's got into you? Why so hostile?
啊…你是「球棒浣熊」啊！对不起，这几天一直在被人抢地盘，有些应激了。看你穿得那么帅气，我还以为又是同行呢……
Ah... you're "Baseball Raccoon"! Sorry, I've been getting my territory snatched up these past few days, so I'm a bit on edge. You look so stylish, I thought you were another rival...
唉，看你一头雾水的样子，我还是给你解释一下吧。你应该也知道，幻造种主要靠获取愿力生活。而获取愿力最简单的方式，恐怕就是做主播了。
*sigh* You look confused. Let me explain it to you. As you probably know, the imagenae mainly survive on Wishpower. And the easiest way to get Wishpower? Well, that's probably becoming a streamer.
而我，就在众多赛道中，选择了「美食探店主播」。这主要是因为我有卓尔不凡的美食品味——我从十岁开始就只吃精品美食，绝不碰那些随处可见的凡庸食物！

And among all the types, I chose to be a "Food Review Streamer". This is mainly because I have an extraordinary taste in food. I've been eating only gourmet cuisine since I was ten, and I absolutely refuse to touch those mundane dishes you find everywhere!
可是，探店主播这条赛道也很拥挤，而且主播们各个身怀绝技。
But there were too many food review streamers, and they got their own special tricks up their sleeve.
有些人特别有钱，顿顿吃高级料理；有些人喜欢旅游，今天吃埃伊加汗国的汗王烤肉，明天吃克里姆特立宪国的街头卷饼；还有些料理大师，对每家店的厨艺都分析得头头是道。

Some are loaded with cash, dining on fancy cuisine every meal; some are travel foodies, feasting on Khan's BBQ in the Aigaian Khanate today and street wraps in the Klimt Republic tomorrow. Then there are the culinary connoisseurs who can break down every restaurant's cooking techniques.
而我…只是个很擅长吃饭的穷鬼，身为幻造种也没办法到处旅游，而且自己也不会做饭——但谁规定不会做饭就不能当美食主播？评价歼星舰还要自己会肉身跃迁？

And me... I'm just a broke foodie who happens to be good at eating. I'm an imagenae, so I cannot travel everywhere. I can't even cook, but who says you need to know how to cook to be a food streamer? Do you need to know how to warp jump yourself to share your views on a starnought?
所以最后，我就选择了这条道路——「小众美食探店主播」！
So in the end, I chose this path — becoming a "Niche Food Review Streamer"!
我到处在犄角旮旯寻找那些不为人知的「宝藏小店」，将它们「发掘」出来，使它们成为广为人知的名店，享受它们应有的客流量。
I search every nook and cranny for those hidden gem restaurants, bringing them into the spotlight so they can become well-known establishments and get the customer traffic they deserve.
但这就带来了另一个问题：所谓「小众美食店」，对「小众美食探店主播」而言是一种「消耗品」。任何店家一旦被我们这些顶流探店主播介绍，就会很快成为超级网红店。

But that creates another issue. For a streamer like me who specializes in hidden foodie gems, these little-known spots are essentially a "consumable resource." The moment a top streamer like me reviews a place, it blows up and becomes the next big internet sensation.
而一旦成为超级网红店，我的优势就不存在了。刚才说的那些专业人士，就会像闻到厨余垃圾的大鸦一样聚集过来，不给我留任何立锥之地。
And once a place goes viral, my edge is gone. The so-called "professionals" I mentioned will flock to it like vultures to a carcass, elbowing me out completely.
为了维持生存，我每周都要探访几家不为人知的小众美食店。但二相乐园可不会每周都凭空多开好几家小众美食店啊！
I have to hunt down a few undiscovered eateries every week so I can make a living, but it's not like Planarcadia is going to magically spawn a fresh batch of obscure shops for me every seven days!
之前读到过，在如今的「能源后匮乏时代」到来之前，古人们管那些几亿年才能重新出现的化石能源，叫做「不可再生资源」。「小众美食店」对我来说，就是「不可再生资源」。

I read that before we entered this "post-energy scarcity era," the ancients called fossil fuels "non-renewable resources." Because they take hundreds of millions of years to come back. That's exactly what these little-known restaurants are to me: a non-renewable resource.
况且，这条主播赛道虽然并不拥挤，但也有为数不少的同行…所以刚才当我以为你是同行时，才会有那么强的敌意，真不好意思啊……

On top of that, while my particular corner of the streaming world isn't exactly crowded, there's still a fair number of competition out there. That's why I was so aggressive when I mistook you for one of them. Sorry about that...
唉，仔细想想也挺没意思的，为了混口饭吃，我们这些主播之间像是领地意识过强的野狗一样，见面5秒就开始战斗。上个月还出现流血事件了，搞得像混混一样…何必呢？

*sigh* But it all feels so pointless, you know? We streamers are at each other's throats like territorial strays just to scrape by, ready to brawl five seconds after meeting. It even got violent last month and someone actually got hurt. It's like we're a bunch of thugs... So what's the point of it all?
下次有机会再聊吧，「球棒浣熊」，我要去探店了。小众美食探店是个争分夺秒的营生，万一被人抢先，今天就全白忙了。
Let's chat later, "Baseball Raccoon." I gotta get back to my scouting. This niche eatery business is a race against time. If someone else gets the scoop before me, today's a total bust.
Get away from me. I'm scared of mad dogs.
哼，害怕就对了！不要跑到其他主播的地盘上来探店啊！
Hmph, you'd better be scared! Don't even think about scouting for spots on another streamer's turf!
啊…每次听到大家分享的幸福瞬间，我都止不住眼眶里的热泪。
Oh... I just can't hold back the tears whenever I hear people sharing their moments of happiness.
Maybe I'm just a little too sentimental?
哈哈哈，老婆对我说：「爱钓鱼就去钓一辈子吧！」
Hahaha! My wife told me, "If you love fishing so much, just go fishing for your entire life!"
有这么善解人意的家人，我真的太幸福了！哈哈哈！
Having such an understanding wife... I'm the happiest man alive! Hahaha!
你好，有兴趣了解一下「幸福微笑研究会」吗？
Hi there! Would you be interested in learning about our Research Society of Happy Smiles?
和我们一起向阿哈祈祷吧，祈祷永恒的欢愉降临这片被污染的净土！
Come pray to Aha with us! Pray that eternal elation descends upon this sullied sanctuary!
岂有此理！鼠目寸光！懂不懂什么叫真正的「灵魂摇滚」——区区一百信用点…可恶，瞧不起谁呢？！
One hundred credits!? That's it!? Uncultured swine! This is "Soul Rock," the music of the soul! You have no idea who you're insulting!
好啦好啦，要我说啊，就你那「生锈的破锣在刮锅底」似的嗓音…人家没向治安官举报你扰民，就已经非常善良啦。
Settle down, rockstar. Let's be real, your voice sounds like a blender full of rocks. It's a miracle you haven't been slapped with a noise complaint by the security officers.
更何况虽然嘴上嫌弃，你收钱的动作可是一点都不慢呢……
And besides, for all your grumbling, you sure were quick to take the money...
Huh... you two look so alike.
唉…确实，经常有人这么说。
*sigh* We do get that a lot, yes.
你搁这儿装什么呢？还「经常有人这么说」…这位朋友，请仔细看看，我俩长得可不是「好像」，而是「一模一样」才对。
What are you playing at? "We do get that a lot"? My friend, take a closer look. We don't just "look alike," we're "spitting images" of each other.
咳…总、总之，你有什么事吗？如你所见，本大爷是名「通灵者」，能够凭借音乐沟通鬼神——看，这家伙就是我召唤的专属幽灵……
*cough* An-Anyway, do you need something? As you can see, I am a spirit medium who can communicate with ghosts and gods through music. See, this fellow here is the exclusive ghost I've summoned...
才怪嘞，我就是他哦。确切来说，是他「想当歌手」的沉重执念…啊，就是那种沉甸甸、黑漆漆的情感，像沥青一样，黏腻又刺鼻……
No way. I AM him! Or more precisely, I'm his deep-seated obsession with "becoming a rockstar"... Ah, you know, that heavy, dark, twisted emotion. It's like asphalt, sticky and pungent...
There's a ghost of him before he died?
「幽灵」可不是人死后才会出现的哦，只不过死前的执念往往最强烈罢了。像他这样又不得志又小心眼的家伙，活着也会孳生出幽灵——准确地说，我这类叫做「我执灵」。

Ghosts don't only show up after someone dies, you know. It's just that obsessions are often strongest before death. For a guy as unsuccessful and petty as him, a ghost can sprout out of him while he's still alive. To be precise, my type is called a "spirit of obsession."
闭嘴吧，就你话多！咳…这位朋友，别听他瞎说——对了，既然有缘遇见，你要不要考虑当我的粉丝？
Oh, just shut up! *cough* My friend, don't listen to his nonsense... By the way, since fate brought you here, have you considered becoming a fan of mine?
别看我现在还没什么名气，但早晚会大红大紫的。你现在入了粉籍，以后可就是元老……
I might not be famous yet, but I'm gonna make it big sooner or later. If you join the fan club now, you'll be one of the OG fans when it happens...
真心不建议这么做哦~毕竟这人成名的概率，比抽中隐藏款豪华扭蛋还要低呢…啊，别瞪我嘛，只是实话实说而已。
Oh, I seriously advise against that. The odds of this guy getting famous are slimmer than pulling a super rare from a deluxe capsule... Ah, don't glare at me. I'm just telling it like it is.
刚刚好像听到什么一百块…
I thought I heard something about a hundred credits...
什——不、不是的，你听我说…我…本大爷只是在偶然路过时，发现这间「歌坛」被俗气所沾染，所以特意在此开坛净化一番……
Wh—Wha— No, it's not that! I uh... I was just casually passing by when I found this "karaoke bar" defiled by tackiness, so I'm performing a special purification ceremony...
对对对！净化对象就是老板饱受摧残的耳膜——区区一百信用点买他后半辈子听力平安，血赚！
Exactly! And he's purifying the owner's tormented eardrums! Just a hundred credits to keep his hearing for the rest of his life. It's a total steal!
啧，有完没完？！你今天废话怎么这么多……
Tsk, will you knock it off!? Why do you have so much to say today...
对啦，这位朋友，这家店会收购顾客自己唱的曲子哦~唱得越好、价格越高，如果你想赚点零用钱的话……
By the way, my friend, this shop buys songs sung by customers~ The better you sing, the higher the price. If you want to earn a little pocket money...
失陪一下——我现在有些话要和他好、好、聊、聊……
If you'll excuse me, I have a few things I need to have a... nice... long... talk... with him about.
哇啊？！怎么有人竟然会殴打自己的「我执灵」啊！太自恨了吧！
Whoa!? Who assaults their own "spirit of obsession"!? Now that's some serious self-hatred!
*tries to hold back laughter* Pff... pfft... hahahaha!
Why are you laughing and crying at the same time?
呱！忘了自我介绍，我是笑点很低的喜剧明星「鸽川小子」。
Ribbit! I forgot to introduce myself. I'm the comedy star who's easily amused, Dovebrook Kid.
我是泪点很低的悲剧明星「海原小子」。
And I'm the tragedy star who's easily moved to tears, Seafeld Kid.
我们都是满愿电视台旗下的艺人，共用同一个演播室。只不过他的节目在前，我的节目在后，很多年来，我们的收视率都不相上下。
We are both artists under Many Wishes TV and share the same studio. It's just that his show is on before mine. For many years, our ratings have been neck and neck.
刚才你也看到了吧？那个赶车的上班族，袜子竟然穿反了！
You saw it too, right? That commuter rushing to catch his ride had his socks on the wrong way!
地铁别坐反就好了。真是可笑啊，噗哈哈哈哈！
I just hope he doesn't take the subway in the wrong way. How funny, hahaha!
为了生计疲于奔命的上班族，居然连穿好袜子的时间都没有，未免也太可悲了，呜哇哇哇哇……
A commuter so busy just trying to make a living that he doesn't even have time to put his socks on properly. Isn't that supreme tragedy? Waaaah...
还有刚才不小心撞到其他人的学生，一下子脸都吓绿了呢。
And that student who accidentally bumped into someone just now? She was so frightened that her face turned green.
她本来就是欧克吧？未免也太可笑了，噗哈哈哈哈！
But she's an orch, isn't she? Isn't that just hilarious, hahaha!
就因为绿色的皮肤，一辈子都会被人误解吗？未免也太可悲了，呜哇哇哇哇……
Is she going to be misunderstood her whole life just because of her green skin? Isn't that just too tragic? Waaaah...
会有人喜欢看这节目吗？
Does anyone actually enjoy watching this show?
嗨，有的观众就是要看到别人流眼泪才高兴呢！
Hey, some viewers just aren't happy unless they see someone shedding tears!
我知道你泪点很低，但至少得先有泪点吧。
I know you're easily moved to tears, but there has to be a reason to cry in the first place.
噗噜总有发现小乐趣的眼睛，这就是我们总走上演艺事业的原因。
Ploos always have an eye for finding the little joys in life, which is why we often end up in show business.
对我们噗噜来说，光是站在台上就很好笑了。这可能就是乐子神赏饭吃吧？噗哈哈哈哈！
To us ploos, just standing on stage is hilarious enough. Maybe it's how The Laughter ensures we have a living? Hahaha!
因为生来是噗噜，就要接受被嘲笑的命运吗？未免也太可悲了，呜哇哇哇哇……
Do I have to accept a fate of being laughed at just because I was born a ploo? Isn't that just too tragic? Waaaah...
说真的，老哥，你要不去看看病吧？
Seriously, maybe you should go see a doctor.
这两个家伙，家里要请高人了。
Maybe they both should go see someone professional.
呦，年轻人，需要代购吗？我今天来得早，还有三个多小时就能排到了。
Hey there, young one. Need a proxy buyer? I got here early today, so I'll be at the front of the line in just over three hours.
What are you in line for...?
你这消息不太灵通哦？《银河战力党》最近出了新卡，火爆得很，每天队伍都从早排到晚呢！
Oh, you're not in the loop, are you? Cosmicon Collective released new cards recently. They're a huge hit, so the line is from morning till night every day!
而且我跟你说，那些个商家可不厚道了——你辛辛苦苦大半天，好不容易排到了，还得搞什么「粉丝资格审查」，认不出图鉴上的随机角色就不让买！

And let me tell you, those vendors are so crafty. After you've toiled for half the day and finally made it to the front, you still have to go through a "fan qualification check." They won't let you buy if you can't recognize a random character from the index!
不过好在婆婆我早就把全图鉴都背下来了，交给我你就放一百个心吧。
But fortunately, this old lady has already memorized the entire index, so you can be a hundred percent sure you're in good hands with me.
需不需要帮忙代购呀？婆婆我干这行很久了，专业素养可是一般人比不了的。咱们这儿不仅保证不拆原盒，还支持当场开封验编号。

So, need a proxy buyer? I've been in the business a long time, and my professional standards are second to none. Not only do I guarantee the original box will be unopened, but I also support on-the-spot unsealing to check the serial number.
而且悄悄告诉你哦，就算是那些不好抢的官方限定礼盒，凭着婆婆的人脉，也都能给你运作运作。
And I'll let you in on a secret: even for those official limited edition gift boxes that are hard to grab, I can work some magic for you, thanks to my connections.
当然喽，购买门槛也是稍稍有一些的啦——咱们这边打底三倍起价，越是高罕，就越贵一些。
Of course, there's a small price to pay for entry. We start at three times the original price, and the rarer the item, the more expensive it gets.

而且咱们向来都是买卖全凭个人意愿，完全不存在强买强卖的——要的就是双方都满意。

所谓的「幸福手术」，本质上可是{RUBY_B#阿哈}欢愉之主{RUBY_E#}的恩典。你可以不信任我，但你应该信任星神的伟力。

Both humans and imagenae have an innate aversion to failure, especially the fear of being the last. So everyone thinks, "I'll compete once I'm ready," but guess what? You're never truly ready!

如果你购买了我的服务，接下来不管你选择参加什么考试或比赛，我都一定会做得比你差！百分百为你垫底！

这样一来，你就可以放心参加任何比赛了。因为无论你有多烂，都可以无条件相信这一点——我更烂！
This way, you can enter any competition with total confidence. Because no matter how badly you do, you can believe one thing without a doubt: I'll be even worse!
听起来是个很愚蠢的服务，对吧？但你试试看就知道了，人心是很脆弱的，想让它好好干活，就要想办法哄它开心，这就是「情绪价值」的意义，嘿嘿。

Sounds like a pretty dumb service, right? But you'll understand once you try it. The human heart is fragile. To get it to perform well, you have to find ways to keep it happy. That's the meaning of "emotional value," hehe.
行了，就介绍到这里吧。如果需要我帮你垫底，就随时来找我吧～新客八折优惠哦。
Alright, that's basically the full introduction. If you ever need someone to take last place for you, just come find me~ New customers get a <unbreak>20%</unbreak> discount!

看来你也是「受害者」。不可饶恕！那些在关键地方断章的家伙们！

这还算幸运的。我追的那本漫画的作者，不知怎么的喜欢上了来自仙舟的「帝垣琼玉」，直接进入了「间歇性更新，长期性休刊」的状态。

But this is still one of the better ones. The author of the other comic I'm following somehow got hooked on Celestial Jade from the Xianzhou and has now entered a state of "intermittent updates and long-term hiatus."
本想着等这本漫画完结，就可以放心的离去了。现在看来，这作者是铁了心地不想让漫画完结，下次更新不知道要等到何年何月了！
I was hoping I could finally move on once this comic ends. Now it looks like the author is dead set on never finishing it. Who knows when the next update will be!?
我想起一位沉迷打牌的故人。
That reminds me of an old friend who was obsessed with playing cards.
那叫「帝垣琼玉」的玩意真有那么好玩吗？欸，像这种「不务正业」的漫画家还真不少。
Is that "Celestial Jade" thing really that fun to play? Ugh, there are quite a few comic artists who don't stick to their jobs like this.
我甚至听说，有个漫画家发现去参与星际和平公司的炒股要比画漫画更赚钱，干脆直接就撂笔不画了！你说这都是什么事儿啊。

I even heard that one of them discovered that playing the stock market with the Interastral Peace Corporation was more profitable than drawing comics, so they just dropped their pen and quit! I mean, what's up with that!?
作者也有自己的苦衷吧。

欸，这么说也不是不能理解。只是不光是我，其他粉丝们也等了很久了。大家都希望故事能有一个美好的结局。
Well, I suppose that's understandable. But it's not just me. Other fans have been waiting for a long time too. We all hope the story can have a happy ending.
不过你倒是提醒我了，作者拖更这么长时间，不会就是因为他还没想好该怎么让故事结束吧？
You've reminded me, though. The author has been dragging this out for so long. Could it be because they haven't figured out how to end the story yet?
实在没办法，干脆发起一个网络投票，让粉丝们选出「你最想看到的结局」好了。
If there's truly no other way, they should just launch an online poll and let the fans vote for "the ending you want to see the most."
I have other things to do. See you later.

Care for a meal box? It's Aha's Choice, delicious and affordable! Every bite is packed with nutrients!
顾客有所不知呀？阿哈就是吃过我们家的盒饭后才激动得流下了眼泪呀。
Oh, you haven't heard? Aha was moved to tears after eating one of our meal boxes.
阿哈吃完后，感慨地说道：「为什么要让我吃到这么好吃的盒饭，如果以后吃不到了怎么办？」
After finishing it, Aha emotionally said, "Why did I have to eat such a delicious meal box? What will I do if I can't have it again?"
我们家的盒饭精选颗粒饱满的大米，上好的肉类，先进的冷藏密封技术。打开包装就能享用，口感就像刚做出来的一样。

Our meal boxes use carefully selected plump rice, the finest meats, and advanced refrigeration and sealing technology. You can enjoy it the moment you open the package, and it tastes just like it was freshly made.
People actually like eating this stuff?
那是当然！你是不知道现在的年轻人时间有多宝贵，平时上学工作，连做饭的时间都拿不出。
Of course! You have no idea how precious time is to the young people nowadays. They're so busy with school and work that they can't even find time to cook.
这就是我们盒饭存在的意义，能够让这些没时间做饭，又不愿意去饭店的年轻人们多一个吃饭的选择。
And that's where our meal boxes come in. They give these young people, who have no time to cook and don't want to eat at restaurants, another option for their meals.
之前有个顾客连续一个月都在我这里买盒饭，还因此得了一个「盒饭领域大神」的称号。
Like there was a customer who bought meal boxes from me every day for a month and even earned the title "Meal Box Sage" for it.

欸~顾客，所谓故事呀传说呀这种东西，其实都是作为「调味剂」而存在的。你像这盒饭，你买之前我给你讲一个附带的小故事，就会变得更加美味不是？

Well, things like stories and legends exist as a sort of "seasoning." Take this meal box, for example. If I tell you a little story to go with it before you buy, it'll taste even more delicious, right?
坦白了说，这也算是一种营销策略。现在二相乐园的年轻人不都是喜欢追求什么「情绪价值」嘛。
To be honest, it's a marketing strategy. Aren't all the young people in Planarcadia obsessed with "emotional value" these days?
一个普通的盒饭，如果能够加上一个故事，或是包装附带一个图案，他们就愿意拿两倍的钱来买。当然，我们家的盒饭绝对是物超所值，故事就当是附赠的啦。

For an ordinary meal box, if you add a story or put a design on the packaging, they're willing to pay double for it. Of course, our meal box is an absolute bargain, so the story is just a little extra.
I don't have much of an appetite.
那好。顾客想吃的话可以随时再来呀。
Very well. Feel free to come back anytime if you get hungry.
I don't have much of an appetite.
那好。顾客想吃的话可以随时再来呀。
Very well. Feel free to come back anytime if you get hungry.
这位朋友，请稍微离栅栏远一点，很危险。生活是很美好的，你可千万不要想不开呀！
Hey there, could you step a little further from the railing? It's quite dangerous. Life is beautiful, don't do anything rash!
Don't worry, I wasn't planning to jump.
哦哦，那就好…但也不要离栏杆太近哦，出现事故也是不好的。
Oh good, that's a relief... But still, please don't stand too close to the railing. Accidents do happen, you know.
哈哈哈，看您耍宝的样子就知道，您是非常热爱生活的。看来是我多虑了，抱歉。
Hahaha, just seeing you goof around like that tells me you really know how to enjoy life. Looks like I was worried for nothing, sorry about that.
初次见面，我叫黛黛丝。日常的工作，就是在这座桥上劝导往来行人珍惜生命，算是位志愿者吧。
Nice to meet you, I'm Dades. My daily job is to stand on this bridge and persuade passersby to cherish their lives. You could call me a volunteer.
现代生活充满虚无，每个人都被困在「存在危机」中，我们的组织需要更多像您这样热爱生活的志愿者，来阻止大家放弃生命。
Modern life is full of emptiness, and everyone's trapped in an "existential crisis." Our organization needs more life-loving volunteers like you to stop people from giving up on their lives.
又见面了。请问今天有什么事吗？
We meet again. What can I help you with today?
I'd like to talk with you a bit more.
当然可以。和人聊天本身也算是我工作的一部分，哈哈。
Of course! Talking with people is part of my job anyway, haha.
Why would you volunteer to convince people to stay alive?
…我讲个故事吧，你当做别人的故事听就好——严格来说，确实就是别人的故事。
...Let me tell you a story. Just think of it as someone else's story. Because, strictly speaking... it is.
以前有个女孩，她出生在一个没有任何出众之处的小城市。而她自己也相貌普通、成绩普通、能力普通，没有任何出众之处。
Once there was a girl who was born in an utterly unremarkable small town. She herself was just as unremarkable: an ordinary face, ordinary grades, ordinary skills. Nothing about her stood out.
那座小城很小，小到每个人都认识彼此。那座小城又很大，大到这个女孩怎么也走不出去。好像她注定要在这里渡过自己波澜不惊的一生。
The city was small, so small that everyone knew each other. Yet it was so large that this girl could never find her way out. It seemed she was destined to spend her unremarkable life here.
吃饭、睡觉、上学。今天和明天一模一样，明天和后天一模一样…想必即使从学校毕业，这样无限循环的生活也不会有丝毫改变吧？

Eat, sleep, go to school. Today is exactly the same as tomorrow, and tomorrow is exactly the same as the day after... Guess even after graduating, this endless cycle of life won't change one bit, huh?
于是女孩觉得，她看到了「尽头」。如果人生的「此刻」和「最后一刻」不会有任何区别，那何不让「最后一刻」提前到来呢？
And so the girl thought she had seen the end. If there would be no difference between the present and final moment of life, why not let that final moment come sooner?
于是她纵身一跃，希望这无尽的苦闷可以彻底结束。然而就在半空中，一个前所未有的念头涌现在她的脑海中——
So she took a leap, hoping this endless torment would finally come to an end. But in midair, an unprecedented thought surged through her mind—
她「想要活下去」。她前所未有地「想要活下去」。比火焰渴望木柴还「想要活下去」，比宇宙渴望群星还「想要活下去」。
She wanted to live. She wanted to live like never before. More than fire craves wood, more than the universe yearns for its stars, she wanted to live.
「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」「想要活下去」！
"I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!" "I want to live!"
她应声坠地，再也不动。但她那「想要活下去」的强烈欲念，却在幻月的光辉下得以显化，此刻正站在你面前。
She hit the ground, never to move again. Yet, under the glow of Phantasmoon, her burning will to live manifested. There it stands before you now.
所以回到最初的问题，「为什么会劝大家活着？」因为我自己「想要活下去」。哈哈，就只是这样以己度人的理由罢了。
So, back to the original question: Why would I volunteer to convince people to stay alive? Because I myself want to stay alive. Haha, it's just me projecting my own feelings onto others, that's all.
How long have you been volunteering?
我想想…好像有个<unbreak>30</unbreak>、<unbreak>40</unbreak>年了？不太记得了，反正至少<unbreak>30</unbreak>年。哎呀，不知不觉都干了这么久了。

Let me think... It's been <unbreak>30</unbreak>, maybe <unbreak>40</unbreak> years? Can't quite remember, but at least <unbreak>30</unbreak> years for sure. Wow, time really flies. I've been at it for so long without even realizing.
你应该知道吧？我们「幽灵」并不是「人死后的灵魂」，而是强烈执念的显化。所以基本上，我们都是「偏执狂」，会持续执着于同一件事。
You probably know this, right? We "ghosts" aren't "souls of the dead," but the manifestation of intense obsessions. So basically, we're all "obsessives," forever fixated on one specific thing.
说起来，这些年二相乐园变化还挺大的。以前我做的这种公益事业，基本上只能靠好心人募捐来维系，毕竟没有任何收益嘛。

Come to think of it, Planarcadia has changed quite a bit over the years. Back then, these charitable works I did could only be sustained through donations from kind-hearted people, since there wasn't any profit in it, you know.
而现在…我最近签了经纪公司，每周要直播两次，在「抖妖」上做公益宣讲，还挺火的。每次直播，都有很多人打赏。
And now... I recently signed with a talent agency. I need to stream twice a week and do public welfare talks on OrchTok. It's pretty hot right now. Every time I stream, lots of people send me gifts.
说来真是荒谬，我竟然靠劝别人活下去赚到钱了…哎呀，真是哭笑不得。
It's absurd when you think about it... I actually made money by convincing others to stay alive. Honestly, I don't know whether to laugh or cry about this.
我本来有点膈应这种「公益商业化」，已经不想继续直播了。但后来，我在后台收到了很多年轻人的来信，他们大都和「我」以前差不多，觉得人生无趣，对未来无所适从。

I was initially put off by this "commercialization of charity" and ready to quit streaming. But later, I received many letters from young people in my inbox. Most of them were similar to how I used to be: lost, bored with life, and struggling with an uncertain future.
这些年轻人感谢我，说多亏了我的劝导，才重新找到了活下去的动力。
These young people thanked me, saying it was my guidance that restored their will to live again.
这样看来，「公益商业化」也不完全是件坏事嘛！至少，我能尽可能让发生在「我」身上的故事，不再在二相乐园重演。
Looking at it this way, "commercializing" charity isn't entirely a bad thing after all. At least I can do my best to prevent what happened to me from repeating in Planarcadia.
你觉得，人生的意义是什么？
What do you think is the meaning of life?
我只是个劝导员，并不是个哲学家。这样宏大的问题，我实在有点答不上来。
I'm just a counselor, not a philosopher. That's a bit too big a question for me to chew on.
但我清楚知道一件事：「活着」是一件很苦闷的事，年龄越大越是如此。等到一定岁数，就再也体验不到「身体和精神都很舒服」的感受了。

But I know one thing for sure: Being alive is a miserable thing, and it only gets worse with age. Once you reach a certain age, that state of "being at peace within your own body and mind" will elude you forever.
但是，明明生活充满无趣、充满痛苦、充满遗憾、充满永远憧憬却永远也不会发生的事，但我们还是会选择「活下去」，迎接下一个烦恼的日子。
Yet, even though life is full of boredom, pain, regret, and dreams that never come true, we still choose to keep on living, welcoming each new day with its troubles.
我猜想恐怕是因为，总体而言，生活是很美好的。
I guess it's probably because, all things considered, life is pretty wonderful.
倘若并非如此，就去让它变得美好吧。体认幸与不幸，并为之做出改变，这是智慧生命的特权，不该平白浪费。
If that's not the case, then make it wonderful. To understand fortune and misfortune and to adapt accordingly is the privilege of intelligent life, one that must not be wasted.
哎呀…好像跑题了。不过也没关系吧，反正我也答不出你原本的问题。
Oops... seems I've gone off track. But it's fine, right? I couldn't answer your original question anyway.
拜拜，要热爱生活哦。也要记得关心身边的人，及时察觉他们释放出的「求救信号」。
Bye-bye! Remember to embrace life, okay? And don't forget to care for those around you. Stay alert for any distress signals they might be sending out.
拜拜，要热爱生活哦。也要记得关心身边的人，及时察觉他们释放出的「求救信号」。
Bye-bye! Remember to embrace life, okay? And don't forget to care for those around you. Stay alert for any distress signals they might be sending out.

See, when evaluating a mech's quality, besides the usual stuff like appearance and functionality, the most crucial thing is identifying its "production batch."
早期批次，模具表面细腻、涂装均匀，版件间拼接很紧密。公司为了压缩成本，后期批次用的都是廉价材料，生产工艺也越来越敷衍了。
Early batches had refined molds, clean paint, and tight panel fitting. To cut costs, the IPC later used cheap materials and got increasingly sloppy with their production quality.

A young person who believes in love and dreams, who stumbles upon magical knowledge through sheer luck, and who bravely battles evil forces in combat, accomplishing heroic feats that even adults couldn't dream of—
她们会被当成和幻造类似的特别存在，被民众们亲切地称呼为「魔法少女」。
They're treated as special entities similar to imagenae, affectionately dubbed "magical girls" by the public.
而我们{RUBY_B#MGT}魔法少女急袭剧团{RUBY_E#}，便是一家为魔法少女们提供支援，进行整编，与治安官合作调度任务的服务性企业。

And that brings us to our second major function: providing professional contract consulting services for young people longing for magic. We help new magical girls blossom.

锵锵！恭喜同学！你已成为回家社第<unbreak>100</unbreak>名社员！欢迎欢迎，热烈欢迎！

我不是绘世学院的学生。

欸？同学难道不是来加入我们回家社的吗？我看你好像不是很了解的样子。

只是个路过的球棒侠而已。

Baseballer? Oh, are you from the Baseball Club?
看来同学的确没有了解过呢。简单介绍一下，回家社就是放学后回家的社团。不过我们可不是真的回家哦，而是社员一起来到活动室进行社团活动。

有的时候会一起看电影，有的时候也会一起打牌…啊对了！我们的新社员前几天拿来了自己的游戏机，现在还可以一起打游戏了。
Sometimes we watch movies together, sometimes we play cards... Oh right! The other day our new members brought their gaming consoles, so now we can play video games together too.
我们回家社可是整个绘世学院最最火爆的社团哦！所以我看到你走上前来，就以为你是要加入我们社团的新同学。
Our Go-Home Club is the absolute hottest club in all of Graphia Academy! That's why when I saw you coming over, I thought you were a new student wanting to join us.
同学刚才也听到了吧？你是回家社的第<unbreak>100</unbreak>名社员欸！<unbreak>100</unbreak>名！有些社团的历史成员加起来都没这么多。
You heard me just now, right? You're the <unbreak>100</unbreak>th member of the Go-Home Club! <unbreak>100</unbreak>th! Some clubs don't even have that many members in their entire history.
Wouldn't it be easier to just go home and play?
哼哼。这就是同学不懂了。回家玩和在学校玩能一样吗？我们可是光明正大地打着社团活动的名义在玩游戏，绝不是一回事好嘛。
Hehe. That's where you're wrong, my friend. What we do here is a world apart from mere gaming at home: it's a fully authorized club activity, which makes it entirely aboveboard!
可能我有点激动了，要是吓到你了不好意思。我也并不是要你现在就做出决定，毕竟加入社团这事还是要好好考虑一下的。
Sorry if I got a bit carried away and freaked you out. I'm not asking you to make up your mind right now. Joining a club is indeed something you should think through.
如果感兴趣，想要加入的话可以随时来找我哦。
If you're interested, you can always come find me later.
绘世学院最火爆的社团正在迎新中！路过的各位同学不来了解一下嘛？
Graphia Academy's hottest club is recruiting! Hey guys, why not check us out?

当然可以！社团成员、社团活动、新人福利…身为社长的我知无不言，言无不尽呀。
Of course! As the club president, I'll tell you everything there is to know about our members, activities, perks for newcomers... you name it!
回家社究竟是怎么来的？
How did the Go-Home Club come to be?
大部分同学也问过这个问题，前辈们说回家社最初根本就没有多少社员，是一届一届社长们的努力，才把回家社建设成了今天这个样子。
Ah, that's a question lots of students ask. According to our seniors, the club didn't have many members in the beginning. It took generations of club presidents to build it up to what it is today.
在最一开始，老师们一致认为「回家社」不允许审批，理由是社团活动和目的模糊不清。老师们说的也没错就是啦。
At first, the teachers unanimously rejected the "Go-Home Club" application, saying the club's activities and purpose were too vague. Well, can't really blame them for that one.
学校里的社团种类十分丰富，田径社、漫画社、游戏社、甚至还有电影研究会…每个社团都有明确的社团活动和目的。
The campus has a rich variety of clubs: Track and Field, comic club, gaming club, and even a film research fan club... all with clear purposes and activities.
而回家社并非上面的任何一种。上一届的学长说，它真正的主旨是「做自己想做的事情」。那些难以归类为某一单一形式的活动，就可以在回家社完成。

But the Go-Home Club didn't fit any of those. As last year's senior said, its true purpose is "doing whatever you want to do." Any activity that can't be neatly categorized into a single form can be done here in the Go-Home Club.
这就是「回家」的最初含义，就是因为找不到一个能够完美满足自己的社团才选择的回家。所以…去加入社团吧，去加入不被定义的社团！——学长当时如是说道。

That's the original meaning of "Go-Home." It started with students who couldn't find a club that truly fit them, so they decided to go home. Then... go join a club, one that defies all definitions! That's how our seniors put it.
在老前辈们的据理力争和其他同学的提议之下，最终还是成功设立了回家社并且获得了活动室。那一天是回家社最最重要，也是最值得纪念的一天。

After plenty of heated debates and a few clever proposals from other students, our seniors finally succeeded in establishing the Go-Home Club and securing a clubroom. That day became the most important and memorable day in the Go-Home Club's history.
这就是「回家社成立纪念日」，那一天大家会在活动室举办派对，纪念那一段回家社建立的历史。嘿嘿，这也算是独属于我们的文化啦。
This is Go-Home Club Foundation Day. On that day, everyone gathers in the clubroom for a party to commemorate our founding. Hehe, it's kinda our own little tradition.
入部有什么考核需求吗？
Are there any requirements to join?
的确是有的。既然我们叫做「回家社」，那么最基本的要求就是一定要能「宅得住」。
That's right. Since we're called the "Go-Home Club," the most basic requirement is that you must be capable of "staying home."
可不要小瞧了这个能力，很多同学都做不到呢。有些同学就是「宅不住」，一定要出门到处走走才行。
Oh, don't underestimate that ability! A lot of students can't even manage it. Some just can't stay home, they absolutely have to go out and about all the time.
的确有同学也是这样想的。看来你们同属于「宅不住」的类型。我也能够理解，有的时候就是想出门到处走走才行。
Yeah, quite a few students said the same thing. Looks like you're also part of the "can't-stay-home" type. I get it though, sometimes you just have to get out and stretch your legs.
回家社之前举办过一届「回家社宅在家里最长时间比赛」。获胜的是一位噗噜社员，他在家里整整宅了六个月的时间没有出门！
We actually held a "Longest Stay-at-Home Contest" once. The winner was a ploo member who stayed home for six whole months without stepping outside!
因为实在是太久了，以至于大家都快要忘记他的存在了。比赛结束的事情也忘记通知他了。你知道吧，如果幻造种长时间没人记得，就会逐渐消失。

He stayed in for so long that everyone kind of forgot he existed. We even forgot to tell him the contest was over. You know how it goes: if no one remembers an imagenae for too long, they start to fade away.
还好期末考试时大家拼尽全力终于想起了到底是谁缺席了，不然就出大事了。所以从那以后规定，如果社员一定想要长时间宅在家里的话，就来经常有人的活动室。

Thankfully, during final exams, everyone wracked their brains and finally remembered who was missing. Otherwise, things could've gone bad. So after that, we made it a rule: if members really want to spend a long time in one place, they should do it in the clubroom where people are around.
为什么回家社这么火爆？
Why is the Go-Home Club so popular?

偷偷告诉你，我这个当社长的其实一开始也问过这个问题。但是只有当你真正加入了社团，参与了社团活动后，才知道回家社是有多么的不一样！

Between you and me, I actually wondered that myself when I first joined club. But it's only after you actually join and take part in club activities that you'll discover just how unique the Go-Home Club really is!
其实加入回家社的同学们都是害怕孤独的孩子们。大家希望能够彼此交流自己感兴趣的东西，也希望能够分享自己的快乐。这不是一个人在家里就可以做到的。

You see, most of our club members are kids who don't like being alone. They want to share what they love, talk about their hobbies, and laugh together. That's not something you can do by yourself at home.
就像我看网络上说的：游戏的最高配置其实是可以一起玩的朋友。我表示十分赞同！如果没有人陪我，现在我都不自己一个人玩游戏了。
You know what they say online: the ultimate gaming setup is friends to play with. I couldn't agree more! These days, I don't even bother playing games alone if there's no one to join me.
大家都还是挺容易害羞的，不愿意公开的谈论自己的爱好。所以回家社某种意义上也算是一个交流爱好的俱乐部啦。我也是通过这里，才认识了不少志同道合的人呢。

People tend to be quite shy and reluctant to openly discuss their hobbies. So in a way, the Go-Home Club is also a little community for people with shared passions. Thanks to this place, I've actually met quite a few like-minded people.
That's all I wanted to know.
