这个时候，你最佳的选择，就是找我。在「你爸的幽灵」到底算不算你爸的问题上，我也许能帮你争取到一些发言权…和财产。

At a time like this, your best bet is to come to me. When it comes to the whole "is your dad's ghost really your dad" question, I might be able to help you secure some say in the matter... and some inheritance.
How's your win rate on cases?
作为一名经验丰富的律师，我通常会将自己的社会阅历与专业能力相结合，为不同客户专门定制最适合的服务方案。
As an experienced lawyer, I typically combine my social insights with professional expertise to create the most suitable service plan for each client.
比如面对身材矮小的噗噜，我会派遣人高马大的欧克助理们和对方热情谈判，从而达到感化对象，让对方知难撤诉的效果。

For example, when dealing with a vertically challenged ploo, I'd send my towering orch assistants to have a "friendly negotiation" with them, which usually convinces them to see the light and drop their lawsuit.
至于打扰到雇主生活和工作的假面愚者，那就好办多了。大家都在「酒馆」出没，抬头不见低头见…如果他不想自己也遭遇同等份量的恶作剧，多半愿意考虑赔偿的。

As for any Masked Fools who disturb an employer's life and work, that's even easier to handle. Everyone hangs out at the "tavern," everyone runs into each other all the time... If they don't want to get hit with the same level of pranks themselves, they'll probably be willing to consider compensation.
瞧，解决问题的方法有很多，法律只是其中一种手段。
Look, there are plenty of ways to solve a problem. The law's just one of 'em.
希望下次见面时，你能带着案子委托来找我…我是说，有需要的话。
I hope the next time we meet, you'll come to me with an assignment... I mean, if you ever need my help.
Nothing much, just dropping by to say hi.
哈哈，我也很高兴见到你。如果你之后遇到了什么需要法律援助的情况，随时联系我。
Haha, I'm glad to see you. If you ever need legal assistance in the future, feel free to contact me anytime.
祝你生日快乐！祝你生日快乐！祝你生日快哎哎哎乐！祝你生日快乐！
Happy birthday to you! Happy birthday to you! Happy birthday to youuuu! Happy birthday to you!
祝你前程似锦，运气爆棚，走哪儿哪儿亮堂堂。花开富贵人长乐，日进斗金福满堂。顺风顺水，万事称心。好运常相伴，霉运不打搅。

May your future be bright as silk, your luck be through the roof, and your path be lit with glory. May your fortune bloom and joy be endless, with gold pouring in day after day. May the winds be at your back and every wish come true. Let good luck walk beside you always, and pray bad luck never finds your door.
这不是显而易见吗？说吉祥话，给我被关在储物柜里的兄弟输送愿力。
Isn't it obvious? I'm sending some Wishpower to my buddy who's trapped in the locker by speaking words of good fortune.
这哪里显而易见了？你倒是好好给人家解释啊！
How is that obvious? You'd better explain it properly!
Thank you, thank you. Same to you!
我正靠说吉祥话，输送愿力给我被关在储物柜里的兄弟呢！你别抢我兄弟的吉祥话啊！
I'm sending Wishpower to my buddy in the locker by speaking words of blessing! Don't steal the words of luck!
谁会抢你的吉祥话啊？「抢」和「吉祥话」是可以组合到一起的词语搭配吗？
Who's gonna steal your words of luck? And since when did "steal" and "words of luck" belong in the same sentence?
罗瓦，我的好兄弟！我祝你福如太平洋长流水！寿比奥林匹斯山不老松！
Lova, my dear buddy! May your fortune flow endlessly like the waves of the Pacific Ocean! And may you live as long as the immortal pines of Mount Olympus!
你这吉祥话到底是哪个异世界的啊？哪有太平洋啊？咱们这儿哪来的太平洋啊？你刚哭出来的啊？
What kind of alternate universe did that blessing come from? "The Pacific Ocean"? What "Pacific Ocean"? Did you just cry yourself a new ocean or something?
算我求你了，你再努力回忆一下储物柜的密码吧！别给我说吉祥话了！
I'm begging you, try harder to remember the locker code! Stop giving me that "good luck" nonsense!
You guys have Mount Olympus here?
这是重点吗！重点是不要再说吉祥话输送愿力了，快放我出来啊！
That's not the point! The point is to stop talking about channeling Wishpower with words of fortune. Just get me out of here already!
吉祥话真能输送愿力吗？
Can you really transmit Wishpower using lucky words?
理论上可以，但幻造种能不能以此维生…我不想用自己做这个实验啊！
It's theoretically possible, but whether imagenae can survive on that... I've no wish to be the test subject for this experiment!
唉，我也不指望能打开这扇门了，只希望能多说两句吉祥话，让我兄弟在储物柜里过得好受一些。
*Sigh* I've given up on opening this door. I just hope saying a few words of blessing can make my buddy's time in the locker a bit more bearable.
你倒是指望一下啊！被关起来的是我诶！你不要擅自替我放弃啊！
Have some faith, will you! I'm the one locked up in here! Don't you give up on me!
你要是有空，也可以陪我们兄弟俩聊聊天。我兄弟一个人住在储物柜里太没意思了。
If you have some time, you can come hang out and chat with me and my buddy. It's no fun for him to live alone in that locker.
You can't really call this "living," can you?
这次密码肯定对！啊…还是不对…稍等兄弟，我先给你来段生日歌补充一下愿力！祝你生日快乐！祝你生…诶？{NICKNAME}，你来陪我们聊天了吗？

This password's gotta be the one! Ah... no, that's not it either... Hold on buddy, let me sing you a birthday song to boost my Wishpower! Happy birthday to you! Happy birth— Huh? {NICKNAME}, are you here to chat with us?
Alright, we can chat for a bit.
太好了。你看，兄弟，即使被困在储物柜中，也还是会认识新的朋友。这就证明了一件事——这个储物柜不隔音。
Great! See, buddy, you can still make new friends even when trapped in a locker. Which proves one thing: this locker isn't soundproof.
...Was that something that needed to be proven?
唉…事情是这样的，我们之前想要做一个恶作剧。就是让我兄弟躲在储物柜里，然后骗我们其他朋友打开柜子，他就可以蹦出来吓人一跳。
*Sigh*... Well, this was supposed to be a prank, and the plan was to have my buddy hide in the locker, then trick our other friends into opening it so he could jump out and give them a good scare.
这是我这辈子最后悔的决定。
This has got to be the worst mistake I've made in my life.
没想到最后我忘掉了密码，我兄弟就这样被关在里面了。
Who would've thought that I'd forget the password and leave my buddy locked in there?
我计算过了，储物柜的密码有8位数，如果我每天8小时不停尝试，每5秒穷举一个密码，那么只需要差不多<unbreak>50</unbreak>年就可以找到密码了！
I did the math, the locker has an 8-digit code. If I spend 8 hours a day trying combinations non-stop and testing one code every 5 seconds, I'll crack it in about <unbreak>50</unbreak> years!
你这数学算的对吗？我才不要在储物柜里关<unbreak>50</unbreak>年啊！你当是封印什么魔兽呢？
Are you sure your math is right? I'm not gonna be locked in a locker for <unbreak>50</unbreak> years! What do you think I am, some sealed mythical beast?
但也有好消息！我听说泊地站的站务人员工作非常懈怠，他们完全懒得定期清理储物柜。
But there's good news! I heard that the staff at Perdido Station are super lazy. They can't even be bothered to clean out the lockers regularly.
And what's so good about that, may I ask?
好就好在，我可以慢慢尝试密码，不必担心他们中途打扰。这样总有一天，我会找到正确的密码的！
The good thing is, I can try out the passwords at my own pace without worrying about them interrupting me. One of these days, I'll definitely crack the code!
…要不你还是走吧，留我在这儿自生自灭吧。
...Why don't you just leave me here to fend for myself.
真能靠吉祥话补充愿力吗？
Can you really replenish Wishpower with words of fortune?
「愿力」的本质就是「愿」嘛！那「美好的祝愿」肯定也是愿力的一种咯。所以吉祥话、生日歌、祝福语里面当然也是富含愿力的。
The essence of "Wishpower" is "wishes" after all! So "good wishes" must be a form of Wishpower too. That's why auspicious phrases, birthday songs, and blessings are naturally filled with Wishpower.
我只要每天努力对着储物柜唱生日歌、说吉祥话，我兄弟就能接收到充足的愿力，不至于崩解成尘灵。
As long as I sing happy birthday and speak auspicious words to the locker every day, my buddy here will receive enough Wishpower to keep from disintegrating into a wispae.
你看我给你演示一下啊！罗瓦！我祝愿你福如尼罗河长流水！寿比乞力马扎罗山不老松！
Let me show you what I mean! Lova! May your fortune flow like the Nile River! And may your life be as eternal as the ancient pines of Mount Kilimanjaro!
兄弟，算我求你了，能不能不要再若无其事地往吉祥话里掺杂异世界地名了？跟个伪人似的，真的很吓人……

Hey buddy, I'm begging you, could you please stop casually dropping the names of otherworldly places into your well-wishes? It's seriously creepy how you do it like it's nothing, as if you're some kind of impostor...
没有其他办法可以开门吗？
Is there any other way to open the door?
实在没办法啊！我也想让站务员帮忙开门，但是自己钻到储物柜里，这是违反车站运营条例的，会被站务员罚款的！我兄弟不富裕，不能让他赔钱。

There's no other way! I wanted to ask the station staff to help open the door, but crawling into the storage locker is against station regulations. They'd fine us! My buddy isn't exactly rolling in cash, so I can't let him take that hit.
这种时候就不要替我心疼钱了好吗？
Can you not worry about my money at a time like this?
兄弟，你不能这么说。别人不心疼你，我心疼你。别人不给你讲吉祥话，我给你讲吉祥话。
Hey, you can't talk like that. Even if no one else cares about you, I do. If there is no one out there who will give you words of blessing, I will.
…你还是别心疼我了。要不你找个工具把柜子撬开吧？
...Don't worry about me. Why don't you find a tool to pry this locker open instead?
兄弟，不可以。破坏公物是违反道德的。被关在储物柜中，黑暗的只是你的身体；但违反了你心中的道德律，黑暗的可是你的心灵啊！
You can't do that. Vandalism is morally wrong. Being locked in a locker only traps your body in darkness, but violating the moral code in your heart? That darkens your very soul!
都这种时候了你给我灌什么心灵鸡汤啊！
Cut the inspirational talk, this is not the time!
只摄取生日歌和吉祥话容易营养不良，我这不是给你换换口味吗？
Consuming only birthday songs and well-wishes can lead to malnutrition, I'm just giving you a change of flavor, aren't I?
好兄弟，真的，我不开玩笑——我一出来就弄死你。
Listen up, buddy. I'm being dead serious here, but the moment I get out, you're toast.
{NICKNAME}，你刚才有幸见证了我们兄弟二人结下生死之誓的时刻！是不是很感动？
{NICKNAME}, you just witnessed the epic moment where my buddy and I swore an oath of life and death! Pretty dramatic, huh?
先聊到这里吧，我还有事。
Let's wrap up here, I've got stuff to do.
好的，下次再见～有空再来找我们聊天哦！记得给我们写信，收件地址写这个储物柜就好！
Alright, see you next time~ Drop by for a chat when you're free! Don't forget to write to us! Just address your letters to this locker!
没有这种收件地址！不要给邮递员添麻烦！
That address doesn't exist! Don't make the mailman's job harder!
先聊到这里吧，我还有事。
Let's wrap up here, I've got stuff to do.
好的，下次再见～有空再来找我们聊天哦！记得给我们写信，收件地址写这个储物柜就好！
Alright, see you next time~ Drop by for a chat when you're free! Don't forget to write to us! Just address your letters to this locker!
没有这种收件地址！不要给邮递员添麻烦！
That address doesn't exist! Don't make the mailman's job harder!
乐子神在上，今年的律师资格证考试迫在眉睫，请保佑我进试顺利成为律师！
Oh, The Laughter above, the bar exam is just around the corner... Please bless me to pass and become a lawyer!
呼——啊啊，我还是不敢看签文！
*sigh* Aaah, I still can't bring myself to read the fortune slip!
Let me look at it for you.
你…你来看？好像确实可以！那就拜托你了！我有很强的预感，今年的律师资格证考试一定是上上签，毕竟我都考五年啦！
Y—You'd do that? That would be perfect! I'm counting on you! I've got a really strong feeling that I'll ace the bar exam this year... I mean, it's my fifth attempt, after all!
他颤抖着将一张签文交给你。你打开一看，上面冷冰冰写着：「下下签」。
With trembling hands, he passes you a fortune slip. You open it and read the cold, stark message: "Woe."
是、是吗！果然，我就说感觉自己今天神清气爽！
R—Really!? I knew it, I was feeling particularly refreshed today!
中签也好！你知道吗？中签才是最好的签，因为意味着自己还有上升空间！
Okay, fine. I'll take midling luck. You know what? It is actually the best fortune, because it means there's still room for improvement!
…你要不再看一次？有可能是打开方式不对！
...Maybe you should check it again? You might have opened it wrongly!
哈哈，你怎么不笑？没关系啦，欢愉一点我的朋友，大不了再考一年！乐子神一定是觉得我前几天有些懈怠，在提醒我分秒必争！
Haha, why aren't you laughing? Cheer up, my friend, worst case I'll just retake it next year! The Laughter must've noticed I've been slacking off lately and is reminding me that every second counts!
这种东西没什么好信的。
You can't trust stuff like that.
你将签文揉成一团，丢了。哇哦，真酷！
You crumpled up the fortune slip and tossed it away. Wow, that's so cool!
没错！如果把这些祈愿的时间全用来备考，我都能刷完两套题了！
You got that right! If I'd spent all this wishing time studying, I could've knocked out two practice sets by now!
反正无论如何，我进试一定要成功成为律师！
No matter what, I must succeed in becoming a lawyer!
毕竟——我，可是一岁抓周就抓住「历年律师资格证考试真题」，励志要成为律师的男人啊！
After all, I'm the man who grabbed Past Bar Exam Papers during my first birthday divination ceremony, destined to become a lawyer!
为了这个理想，我在那窄小的房间里，不吃不喝不睡连续复习了十四天，成功攻克了<unbreak>927</unbreak>条小论文难点！
For this dream, I locked myself in that tiny room, went without food, water, or sleep for fourteen straight days, and successfully conquered <unbreak>927</unbreak> thesis problems!
你看，这就是律师资格证考试的魅力，我都突破人类极限了！
See? That's the charm of bar exams: I've transcended human limits!
那是人的极限，但不是幽灵的。
That's the limits for humans, but not for ghosts.
朋友，难怪你好像有点死了！
No wonder you look kinda dead, my friend!
别开玩笑了，虽然第四天我确实心脏抽了一下，但你看我的身体，这不还……
Come on, don't joke around! Sure, my heart skipped a beat on day four, but look at me now, I'm still...
那十四天我满眼都是题，根本没有注意到这些啊！
For those fourteen days, all I could see were exam questions! I didn't notice any of this stuff!
不过，如果真是幽灵的话……
But if I've really turned into a ghost...
幻造种律师资格证考试年龄限制是很宽松的！这样一来我就不用担心超过年龄限制，可以一直考律师资格证了！我真是好死！
The age limit for the imagenae bar exam is super flexible! This means I don't have to worry about aging out! I can keep taking the bar exam forever! I'm so dead lucky!
感谢《灵物保护法》，幽灵也可以报考律师资格证考试…放心吧，就算成为幽灵，我进试也会成功当上律师！
Thanks to Faekind Protection Act, even ghosts can take the bar exam... Don't worry, even as a ghost, I will still become a lawyer!
I'd like to know more about your life...
当然可以，就当做是模拟面试了吧～但你不要用那种同情的眼神看着我！
Sure thing, let's treat it as a mock interview~ But don't give me that look of pity!
Why do you want to be a lawyer?
乐子神在上，律师可是二相乐园人人艳羡的神仙工作啊！
By The Laughter, being a lawyer is the most envied celestial job in all of Planarcadia!
其实五年前我刚刚毕业时，也曾勇闯公司大厂，试图做一个左手咖啡右手笔记本的优雅办公族。直到我参加了公司的群面。

Actually, when I first graduated five years ago, I boldly ventured into a big corporate life at IPC, trying to be one of those elegant office workers with coffee in one hand and a laptop in the other. That was until I had to do the group interview.
五个应届毕业生对着「1+1=2」的小学数学题绞尽脑汁。有的说要从原理开始证明，有的猜这是公司新的研究方向，还有个噗噜现场做了七十页幻灯片汇报！

Five fresh graduates were racking their brains over an elementary math problem "1+1=2." One wanted to prove it from first principles, another thought it was IPC's new research direction, and there was even a ploo who made a <unbreak>70</unbreak>-page PowerPoint presentation about it!
答案不就是「正确」吗？非要弄这么复杂，非要显出能耐，这就是浪费资源的恶性内卷，是社会的积弊和毒瘤！
Isn't the answer just "correct"? Making things needlessly complicated, trying to show off... That's just a toxic rat race, a deep-rooted cancer in our society!
但律师就不会了，工资高、受人尊敬、还能匡扶正义，这才是人类欢愉的尽头。
But a lawyer? Now that's different. High salary, respect from others, and you get to uphold justice. Now that's the peak of human elation.
所以我放弃了公司的录取机会，发誓要成为律师！
So I gave up my job offer from the IPC and swore to become a lawyer!
Ever thought about doing something else?
老实讲，放弃公司的机会后，我还真没想过参加律师资格证考试之外的路子。
To be honest, after giving up on IPC, I never really thought about any path other than taking the bar exam.
都说现在平台大机会多，我这样一路优秀，从施耐德大学附属中学一路考到施耐德大学经济学院的优秀毕业生不愁出路，可事实上我会干、能干的事还真不多。

Everyone says there are plenty of opportunities out there these days. But even as someone who's been excellent all along from Schnider University's affiliated middle school, all the way to graduating with honors from Schnider University's Political Economics Department, there really aren't many things I'm actually good at or capable of doing.
人情世故我烦得很，喝酒待客我又做不来…思来想去，我这样的应届毕业生果然还是最擅长且精通考试！

I can't stand all that social etiquette stuff, and I'm terrible at drinking and entertaining... After thinking it through, a fresh graduate like me is definitely best at and most skilled in taking exams!
我能刷题，我爱背书，我擅长把考试的时间规划到毫厘。我只要备考就高兴，就觉得自己可有价值，可有未来！

I can grind practice problems, I love memorizing textbooks, and I'm great at planning my exam time down to the millisecond. Just studying for exams makes me happy. It makes me feel valuable, like I have a future!
而且大家不都说考律师资格证好吗？放着阳光大道不走，那些小径谁知道会把我带到哪条阴沟里去。所以我还是只想律师资格证考试。

Besides, doesn't everyone say getting a law license is the way to go? Why take some sketchy side path when there's a bright, sunny road ahead? Who knows which gutter those other paths might lead to. So yeah, I'm sticking with the bar exam.
欸，朋友，你是做什么工作的？
Hey friend, what do you do for a living?
I travel all over the place.
I'm spreading good karma everywhere I go.
那听起来就是「自由职业」？太不稳定了。
Sounds like "freelancing" to me? That's way too unstable.
听我一句劝：「常在水里游，总会撞噗噜。」还是多刷真题，尽早找个稳定工作吧！
Take my advice: "If you swim in the water too much, you'll eventually run into a ploo." Better grind through more practice questions and find a stable job sooner!
哎，当你沉迷刷题，进入心流状态的时候，你也会忘记自己的身体吧……
Ah, when you're deep into grinding practice problems and get into that flow state, you tend to forget about your own body too...
不过现在再回想起那一天，确实也有些端倪。我只感觉心脏有些不适，但它不是不跳，反倒越跳越快，因为我刷出了人生最高分的卷子！

But thinking back to that day now, there were some signs. My heart felt a bit off, but it wasn't that it stopped beating... Quite the opposite, it was racing because I'd just scored the highest marks ever on my test!
然后我眼前黑了一下，就一下，我就立刻强撑着又把眼睛睁开了。
My vision went dark for a moment, just a split second, but I immediately forced my eyes back open.
因为刚好到平时给我妈打电话的点了嘛，我得跟她汇报好消息！
It's about time for my usual call with mom. I've got to tell her the good news!
...Oh right, my mom... she doesn't know yet...
还是先别告诉她了。等我当上了律师，也许我死掉的消息也会变得更好接受一些。
Better not tell her just yet. Maybe the news of my death will be easier to accept after I become a lawyer.
五年没考上律师，我真没脸再赖在家，所以租了个小房专门备考。
After five years of failing to the bar exam, I was too ashamed to keep living at home, so I rented a small place just to focus on studying for the exam.
我整天埋头在四平米的小屋，也不出门，也不跟朋友玩，就是埋头做题，虽然痛苦如坐牢，但好在效果已经很显著了！

I've been cooped up in my tiny <unbreak>40</unbreak>-square-foot room all day, not going out, not hanging with friends, just grinding through practice tests. It feels like prison, but hey, at least it's paying off big time!
现在，我已经能把「二相乐园律师资格证考试人类卷历年真题」倒背如流了！
Now, I can recite the "Planarcadia Bar Exam: Human Edition Past Papers" backwards and forwards!
如果我没记错…幽灵…考的是…「幻造种卷」……
If I remember correctly... ghosts... should be taking the... Imagenae Edition...
但没关系！既然我已经死了，那换句话说，时间就是站在我这边的！心若在梦就在！大不了从头再来！
But that's okay! Since I'm already dead, in other words, time is on my side! Where there's a will, there's a way! Worst case scenario, I'll start over from scratch!
好啊我的朋友，我一定不辜负你的鼓励，会努力成为律师的！要是遇到什么难题，记得找我帮你辩护！
You got it, my friend. I won't let your encouragement go to waste. I'll work hard to become a lawyer! If you ever run into any legal conundrums, remember to hit me up for defense!
好啊我的朋友，我一定不辜负你的鼓励，会努力成为律师的！要是遇到什么难题，记得找我帮你辩护！
You got it, my friend. I won't let your encouragement go to waste. I'll work hard to become a lawyer! If you ever run into any legal conundrums, remember to hit me up for defense!
初次见面~客人！欢迎来到砰砰萌萌咖啡店，我是这里的机铠服务员，MD<unbreak>-78</unbreak>-8，昵称「八子」❤
Nice to meet you~ dear guest! Welcome to Lovey Dovey Café, I'm MD<unbreak>-78</unbreak>-8, the mechatron server here, but you can call me Octyx ❤
请问客人需要些什么服务？
What services can I provide for you?
嗯嗯，客人这样问的话——当然是什么都行❤喔！我是说饮品啦～
Hmm~ Since you asked... Anything goes, of course ❤! I mean, drinks-wise~
我走错了？这里真是咖啡店吗？
Did I take a wrong turn? Is this really a coffee shop?
是咖啡店呢~咦…是八子❤让您误会了吗？
It most definitely is a café~ Oh... pardon, is it what I ❤ said that confused you?
为每一位到店的客人提供最周到的服务和最美味的咖啡——这就是砰砰萌萌咖啡店的愿景。
To provide everyone who visits our shop with the most attentive service and the most delicious coffee, that's the vision of Lovey Dovey Café.
竟然一共有五十多种口味任君品尝呢！包含咕嘟咕嘟燃油饮、网红混搭缤纷苏乐达…其中的爱心萌萌❤魔法杯是这条街的必喝榜第一名喔！
There are over <unbreak>50</unbreak> flavors for you to try! Including Glug-Glug O-Fuel, the viral Fusion Rainbow SoulGlad... and Sweetlove ❤ Magic Cup is the number one must-drink on this street!
这条街就一家咖啡店吧…
But there's only one coffee shop on this street, isn't it?
虽然是这样没错啦，但是我们店也有自己的特色哦！
Well, that's true and all, but our shop has its own special charm!
不是苏打豆汁儿我不喝。
I won't drink anything but mung bean soda.
只要客人需要，所有的饮品都可以满足~
Any drink you desire, we can make it for you~
作为服务员，我也会提供各类服务。比如，在为客人上餐后，八子会为客人施展扑通扑通心跳魔法，让您的每一口咖啡都幸福满满。
As the server, I offer all kinds of services. For example, after serving your meal, I will cast a thump-thump heart-throbbing spell, making every sip of your coffee filled with pure bliss.
又见面了，客人！欢迎光临砰砰萌萌咖啡店，机铠服务员八子一直在等你哦❤
We meet again! Welcome to Lovey Dovey Café, your mechatron waitress, Octyx, has been expecting you ❤
Do you have any other questions?
Yeah, I do have some questions...
不论什么疑问，我都会尽量为客人解答的！
Whatever questions you have, I'll do my best to answer them!
你们这儿有什么定制服务？
What custom services do you offer here?
八子的定制服务包括：情绪校准、幸福回路激活、重工业ASMR、心事缓存、运算噪声占卜、未来波动幸运测算……

Octyx's custom services include: emotional calibrations, happiness circuitry activation, heavy industrial ASMR, cognitive load buffering, divination predictions, future fluctuations and assorted fortunes...
嗯…还有顾客会用几系统时仔细观察我身上的零件，八子也不知道这有什么好观察的……
Hmm... Some customers would spend a few system hours carefully examining the parts on my body. I really don't get what's so interesting about that...
不过，只要客人喜欢，那就没问题哦！
But as long as you like it, then it's all good!
当然是分旺季和淡季的啦……
Well, it depends on whether it's peak season or off-season...
最近幻月游戏举办期间，八子就超~级忙！收集的愿力也比平时多多了，如果真的化为实体金币，我走路的时候一定会叮当响的！
During the recent Phantasmoon Games, I've been suuuper~ busy! I collected way more Wishpower than usual. If it were actual gold coins, I'd be jingling with every step!
不过，大部分时候八子的愿力是不够维持生存的…对于我们机铠来说，如果这样下去，会慢慢变成二维的设计图的……
But most of the time, my Wishpower isn't enough to sustain life... For us mechatrons, if this continues, we'll slowly turn into 2D blueprints...
但八子想出了一个非常好的办法，一旦愿力不够，八子就会主动变成一堆零件，躺在咖啡店前的地上。
But I came up with a brilliant solution: Whenever I run low on Wishpower, I'd voluntarily break down into a pile of parts, lying on the ground in front of the coffee shop.
没有过路的机铠爱好者会拒绝从零到一的拼装机会！在他们为八子组装身体的时候，就已经为我提供了足够的愿力啦！
No mechatron enthusiast passing by would turn down a chance to build from scratch! While they were assembling my body, they already provided me with enough Wishpower!
而且，这部分客人还会顺道为咖啡店提供收入，真是一举两得呢~
Plus, these customers will bring in extra income for the coffee shop. Talk about killing two birds with one stone!
嗯…能够服务更多的客人，也很让八子开心呢！
Hmm... being able to serve more customers also makes me really happy!
你一直这样元气满满吗？
Are you always this full of energy?
当然——为客人提供最周到的服务，是让八子最快乐的事情。
Of course! Providing the most attentive service to you is what makes me the happiest.
只是八子偶尔也有些失落呢…毕竟人类真的好难懂。
But sometimes I feel a bit down... after all, humans are really hard to understand.
八子每天勤勤恳恳地做到不出错，却没能让顾客们开心起来；反而偶尔搞砸了，把咖啡弄到身上，总会引来怜爱的目光……

Despite working diligently every day without making mistakes, I still couldn't make every customer happy. I even messed up and spilled coffee on myself, which would always attract sympathetic glances...
后来我才从客人们那里知道：偶尔犯错不是缺点，反而是一种萌点呢！
Later, I learned from the customers that making the occasional mistake isn't necessarily a flaw, but actually kind of endearing!
Humans are so hard to figure out!
I should come back here another time.
再见，客人，八子的爱意魔法始终伴随着你！
Goodbye, friend! My love magic will always be with you!
I should come back here another time.
再见，客人，八子的爱意魔法始终伴随着你！
Goodbye, friend! My love magic will always be with you!
唯一让八子有些沮丧的是…好像这样做招来的客人比八子正常工作还多……
The only thing that's got me feeling down is... somehow this scheme's bringing in more customers than when I was actually working...
欢迎光临无限<unbreak>11</unbreak>便利店，请随意挑选。
Welcome to Infinity <unbreak>11</unbreak> Convenience Store. Feel free to look around.
欢迎光临乐园唱片行「RECORDS」，这里放着我们最喜欢的音乐，请您随心一听。如果需要帮忙，请随时叫我。
Welcome to Arcadia "RECORDS," where we keep all our favorite music. Feel free to listen to your heart's content. If you need any help, just give me a shout!
欢迎光临「BOOK-ON！」漫画店，最近《苍天航路绒绒号》最新话到了，本店首推。当然，我们这里还出售各式其他书籍，如果找不到想要的，请随时叫我。

Welcome to "BOOK-ON!" comic store! The latest chapter of Fluffy Across the Blue just arrived, and it's our top recommendation. Of course, we also sell various other books. If you can't find what you're looking for, feel free to give me a shout!
哇！恭喜你成为今天第<unbreak>100000</unbreak>个呼唤「回归吧！火火火花！」的幸运观众~♥
Wow! Congratulations on being today's <unbreak>100,000</unbreak>th lucky viewer to call out "Come back, Spar-Spar-Sparxie!"~♥
你将获得「和火花的人生四十秒」互动时间！请说出你的心愿吧~握手，To签，合影，聊天——也许还会触发令人惊喜的隐藏奖励噢！
You'll get forty seconds of interactive time with Sparxie! Tell us your wish~ Do you want a handshake, an autograph, a photo, a chat. You might even trigger some surprising hidden rewards!
是呀，我是你的火花花呀~♥
拜托，能如此近距离和火花花互动的机会可不多呀~
C'mon, it's not every day you get the chance to interact with Sparxicle up close and personal like this~
拜托，能如此近距离和火花花互动的机会可不多呀~
C'mon, it's not every day you get the chance to interact with Sparxicle up close and personal like this~
简直不亚于能有幸亲眼一睹狗熊骑独轮车、狮子钻火圈、猴子顶碗了…你确定要将时间浪费在辨认一个旧型号、旧面具上么…小、灰、毛~

It's like being lucky enough to witness a bear riding a Unicycler, a lion jumping through fire hoops, or a monkey balancing bowls... Are you sure you want to waste your time identifying an old model, an old mask... Gray... Hair~
还是说…你找到了新的乐子，是来邀我参演的！我愿意！
Unless... you've found a fresh source of amusement and want me to co-star! Oh, I'm in. I am so in!
不如现在就来一场即兴的选角面试吧！快，向我提问~♥
How about we do an impromptu casting audition right now! Come on, hit me with your questions~ ♥
恭喜你获得「和火花的人生四十秒」互动时间！
Congratulations! You've won forty seconds of interactive time with Sparxie!
请说出你的心愿~握手，To签，合影，聊天…嘻嘻，火花花的美好品德之一，就是有求必应，有问必答噢~♥
Tell me your wish~ A handshake, an autograph, a photo together, a chat... Hehe, one of Sparxicle's best qualities is being always here to help and answer any question~ ♥
那我们聊个四十秒的吧。
Then let's chat for forty seconds.
你对我的好奇真的只值四十秒么？别骗人啦~
Is your curiosity about me really only worth forty seconds? C'mon, don't kid yourself~
动动手指，注册账号；动动脑筋，选定赛道；再动动嘴巴——哈喽哈喽，欢迎欢迎，感谢感谢——当然，这还只是一张没有灵魂的面具~

A flick of the finger, and you've registered. A bit of brainwork, and you've picked your niche. Then, a quick wag of the tongue, "Hi everyone, welcome to the channel, don't forget to like and subscribe." Of course, that's just a mask with no soul behind it.
成为风靡二相乐园的主播「火花」，还需要把握住时代的流量密码~很简单，你就直接问——观众老爷们想听什么，想看什么呀～

To become the hottest streamer "Sparxie" that takes Planarcadia by storm, you've gotta crack the code to viral success~ It's easy. Just ask directly: What do the honored audience want to hear or see~?
想看表演，那就又唱又跳~马上他们就会张大嘴巴，手指蠢蠢欲动，心想——原来身体可以这么灵活！我也想试试！

If it's a show they want, give 'em the full song and dance! Before you know it, they'll be staring wide-eyed, itching to join in, thinking: "How can someone move like that? I've gotta try it for myself!"
想听故事，那就和他们聊天~然后他们会瞪大眼睛——原来外面世界的人们活得那么精彩呀！我也想看看！
If it's a story they're after, then just strike up a conversation! Before long, their eyes will be wide with wonder: "So the world outside is really that vibrant? I want to go see it too!"
世界真真假假，公司高高在上，劳苦疲倦时，人们会发现乐子最是纯粹～在「火花」这里，他们可以是被服务的主人公，甚至成为主人公！

The world is a blur of truth and lies, and the IPC sits high above it all. When the grind becomes too much to bear, people realize that "Elation" is the only thing that's pure. With Sparxie, they don't just get to be the star of the show, they can actually become the protagonist!
于是…人见人爱的「火花」就这样诞生在人们对欢愉的渴求里~♥
And so... the universally beloved "Sparxie" was born from humanity's craving for the Elation~ ♥
只是可惜，水能载舟亦能覆舟呀。
Too bad, the very thing that lifts you up can also bring you down.
黑红？什么！火花花真的被大家讨厌了么，呜呜，这真是…太好了！当所有人都以为你在破防时，这场戏才真正进入高潮！
Black and red? What! Does everyone really hate Sparxicle now? Boo hoo, this is just... perfect! When everyone thinks you're losing it, that's when the show truly reaches its climax!
你就不好奇我的下一场戏什么时候开场么～放心，不会让你等太久的，毕竟…观众的耐心可是很有限的～
Aren't you curious when my next act begins~? Don't worry, I won't keep you waiting long. After all... an audience's patience is quite limited~
When are you planning to make your comeback?
小灰毛，你在关心我的下一场戏什么时候开场，对吧？放心～不会让你等太久的，毕竟…观众的耐心可是很有限的～
Gray Hair, you're wondering when my next act's gonna start, right? Don't worry~ I won't keep you waiting long. After all... an audience's patience only goes so far~
What does the streamer usually broadcast?
最开始嘛，就是跳跳舞，没有人会不喜欢看好看的人动起来吧？但主播最不喜欢的就是成为一张标签，将一件事反复翻炒啦——

At first, I just danced. I mean, who doesn't love watching attractive people move, right? But the last thing this streamer wants is to be pigeonholed and have people rehash the same old thing over and over—
深夜读评论的知心朋友，评价热点话题的毒舌，直播恐怖游戏的胆小鬼，潮到风湿的穿搭与美妆教学，ASMR资本论诵读哄睡服务……

Late-night comment-reading confidant, sharp-tongued critic of trending topics, scaredy-cat horror game streamer, drip-or-drown fashion and makeup tutorials, ASMR bedtime readings of socio-capital economics...
全能主播时代的领航员和守塔王，可不是开玩笑的哟~♥
The all-around streamer era's navigator and tower defense champion isn't just for show, you know~ ♥
I wanna be a streamer too. Teach me how!
首先，忘掉「真实的你」～再给自己捏一张恰到好处的假面，七分人设，两分悬念，剩下一分留给观众想象。然后，学会把一切当做素材——

First, forget about the "authentic you"~ Then craft yourself a perfectly-fitted mask. <unbreak>70%</unbreak> character design, <unbreak>20%</unbreak> mystery, and leave the last <unbreak>10%</unbreak> to your audience's imagination. After that, learn to treat everything as material!
你的眼泪是流量，你的愤怒是热点，你的哈哈大笑是噱头，而你此刻的求知欲…不就是最好的直播预告吗~
Your tears are clout, your anger is a hotspot, your laughter is a gimmick, and your curiosity right now... isn't that the perfect teaser for my next stream?
为什么不专精一个赛道？
Why not specialize in one niche?
「赛道」这种画地为牢的东西早过时啦！你瞧啊——在厨房跳舞，顺便煮碗拉面，舞蹈区和美食区的流量不就同时到手了？

This whole "staying in your niche" idea is so last month! Look! Dance in the kitchen while making noodles, and boom! You're raking in clout from both the dance community AND the foodies at the same time!
开一场「匿名忏悔室」直播，让观众用虚拟货币购买其他人的秘密，情感咨询和金融议题的关注度也轻易拿捏～
Start an "Anonymous Confessional" livestream where viewers can use virtual currency to buy other people's secrets. Easy way to rack up views on relationship advice and financial hot topics~
真正的狂欢，就是把所有赛道的栏杆全部拆掉！让万事万物都成为你的玩具~
A real party means tearing down all the guardrails on every niche! Let everything in the universe become your playground~
Wanna talk about the Phantasmoon Games?
规则上说：每一位谒者参与游戏后至少需要完成三个重要行动——
According to the rules, each Supplicant must complete at least three key actions after joining the game...
「唱名」——噢，就是面具为你背书的简历包装；「奇迹」——单位时间内的爆款指标；「宣扬」——就像是把一模一样的笑话复制粘贴到每个人的脑子里。
Roll-call: Oh, that's your resume getting jazzed up by your mask. Miracle: That's just the viral hits measured by the minute. Promotion: That's like copy-pasting the same joke into everyone's mind.
「获胜」是唯一的选项，为了觐见阿哈，所有人都攀炎附热，根本忘了最初的「欢愉」才不是满屏的弹幕与喝彩。规则，竞赛，输赢——可是欢愉最忌讳的玩意啦！

"Victory" is the only option, and in order to be blessed with an audience with Aha, everyone's bowing to the powerful and completely forgotten that the original Elation wasn't about screens full of bullet comments and cheering crowds. Rules, competition, winning and losing. Those are the things Elation hates most!
你要知道，最棒的表演永远不在剧本里~
Remember, the best performances are never in the script~
你信不信，其实每个人都见过阿哈？
Believe it or not, everyone's actually met Aha before?
与其见祂，或者浪费一分钟成为祂，不如好好酝酿一个让所有人捧腹大笑的笑话！整一个大活！你怎么知道阿哈没躲在你的热门视频后看热闹呢？

Instead of trying to meet THEM, or wasting time trying to become THEM, why not spend that time cooking up a joke that'll have everyone doubled over in laughter? Let's pull off something legendary! After all, how do you know Aha isn't hiding behind your viral video right now, just watching the chaos unfold?
当你把生活直播成一场连阿哈也忍不住偷看的演出时，谁还需要那张觐见的门票呢~
When you livestream your life into a show so entertaining that even Aha can't help but peek, who needs a ticket to an audience anyway~
How many more "masks" do you have left?
小灰毛，不要掉入外行视角的陷阱了呀~你这个问题就像在问一位魔术师有多少口袋一样。
Gray Hair, don't fall into the trap of an outsider's POV~ That question is like asking a magician how many pockets they have.
你怎么不数数我们见了几次面呢？也许我们的每一次相遇都是不同的面具在与你对话噢？而你的每一句话也都为我下一张面具设计提供了参考！你人真好！
Why don't you count how many times we've met? Maybe each of our encounters was a different mask talking to you! And every word you say gives me ideas for my next mask design! You're such a big help!
所以偷偷告诉你~我还有一张「主角」面具！它承载了花火最强烈的勇气，最纯粹的开拓信念，和最难以抵挡的吸引力，她也可以为了拯救一个世界战斗到最后！

So I'll let you in on a little secret~ I've got one more mask: the "Protagonist"! It holds Sparkle's most intense courage, her purest conviction for the Trailblaze, and the most irresistible charisma. With it, she can fight to the very end to save an entire world!
小心点哟，也许未来某一天，我会抢走本属于你的戏份~
Watch yourself~ One of these days, I might just steal the spotlight right out from under you~
我还有好多秘密，保持你的好奇，我都会告诉你的，只要你敢信~♥
I've got loads more secrets to share. Just keep that curiosity of yours alive, and I'll tell you everything... if you dare to believe me~ ♥
我还有好多秘密，保持你的好奇，我都会告诉你的，只要你敢信~♥
I've got loads more secrets to share. Just keep that curiosity of yours alive, and I'll tell you everything... if you dare to believe me~ ♥
主角大驾光临！你好呀，球棒浣熊。
The star of the show has arrived! Hey there, Baseball Raccoon.
刚恶补完一期绒绒号，都怪你们的故事太精彩了！
Just binge-watched an entire episode of The Fluffy. It's all your fault for having such amazing stories!
嗯——睡了那么久，谁懂一觉醒来就蹲到好作品的幸福感？
Mmm... After sleeping for so long, who can truly understand the bliss of waking up and immediately stumbling upon a masterpiece?
我们果然是同好嘛，击个掌！
I knew we were kindred spirits! High five!
And that's not even the best part.
Well, I'll be looking forward to it, then.
Ahem, let me introduce myself again.
我叫绯英，幻月游戏特邀观察员，电子宠物专业饲养员，永远青春靓丽的高中生…唔，但这样介绍下去得介绍到什么时候……

I'm Evanescia, special observer for Phantasmoon Games, professional digital pet caretaker, eternally young and radiant high schooler... Ugh, but at this rate, how long is this introduction gonna take...?
不如…你来提问，我来回答！
How about this... you ask the questions, I'll give the answers!
球棒浣熊，找我有什么事吗？
Baseball Raccoon, what can I do for you?
漫画看完了，游戏也打腻了，没要紧事儿的话，我们来聊聊天怎么样~
Done with my comics, bored of my games... so hey, if you're not busy, wanna chat for a bit~?
我肯定满足你的好奇心，问吧！
I'll totally satisfy your curiosity, so fire away!
看漫画嘛，除了欣赏剧情之外，人际关系也是不得不品的一环。
When it comes to reading comics, besides enjoying the plot, the relationships between characters are definitely something you gotta savor.
我一定要说，不懂列车长和杨叔的有难了。
I gotta say, anyone who doesn't get the conductor and Mr. Yang is in for a rough ride.
它，自银河中飘零而来；它，坚持开拓未知星海。美好的故事就此开始——去往未来的归途，也是彼此的救赎……
Adrift from the cosmos, it arrived... Committed to Trailblazing the uncharted sea of stars. And so begins a wondrous story. A journey toward the hereafter, and a path of mutual redemption...
Here's the pen, you draw it!
我？画画？算啦，漫画的事还是交给漫画家来做。不过，我会想办法兜售我的好点子哒！
Me? Draw? Nah, leave the comic stuff to the pros. But hey, I'll totally pitch my brilliant ideas!
I'll pass it along to Mr. Yang later.
啊…我还存了几篇精彩的小说…我这就转给你，一起带给杨叔吧！
Oh... I've got a few great novels saved up too... I'll send them to you right now, and you can take them to Mr. Yang as well!
好想快点看到绒绒号里关于二相乐园的新篇章呀…名字就叫《疯狂幻月•神位争夺篇！》怎么样？一听就能火。
I can't wait to see the new chapter about Planarcadia on The Fluffy... How about calling it Crazy Phantasmoon: Battle for Godhood!? That title's got huge hit written all over it.
上一次这么热闹的游戏…让我想想，还是上上次。
The last time a game was this wild... let me think, it was the time before last.
月亮十五年满盈了两回，还不知道这次会有什么更欢愉、更有趣、更稀奇的事情发生呢。
The moon's waxed full twice over these fifteen years, and who knows what even more joyful, more amusing, more extraordinary things might happen this time around.
说不定，阿哈已经酝酿好了祂的银河级笑话，准备让所有人目瞪口呆。
Maybe Aha has already cooked up THEIR cosmic-level punchline, ready to blow everyone's minds.
唉，但一想到会闹出来的乱子…头疼。
Ugh, but just thinking about the chaos that'll ensue... gives me a headache.
Who do you think will win?
Lean in close, I'll let you in on a secret—
不过，你大可以自信点嘛，你可是「主角」呀。
But hey, you should have more confidence in yourself. You're the 'protagonist' after all.
嗯，期待你的表现。我也会好好盯着的。
Mm, looking forward to your performance. I'll be keeping a close eye on things too.
二相乐园怪事多多，我早就习惯了，随机应变吧。
Planarcadia's full of weird stuff. I'm used to it by now. Gotta roll with the punches.
看，我腰上挂着的电子宠物蛋。哼哼…这里面可装着我养的宠物军团。
See this digital pet gadget on my belt? Heh heh... It's holding my entire pet legion.
当时在网上疯狂找攻略，带着它们去逛公园，交朋友，做甜食喂给它们吃…好怀念刚刚接触这个游戏的时光。

I was scouring the net for walkthroughs and guides like crazy back then. Taking them to the park, making friends, baking sweets to feed them... Man, I miss those early days when I first got into this game.
不过二相乐园的潮流总是一阵一阵的，这次我发现二维市新建了好几座大楼，随便一逛就吃谷吃到爽…人真的会反复爱上列车长的棉花娃娃呢！

But Planarcadia's trends come and go in waves. This time I noticed several new buildings popped up in Duomension City. Just a quick stroll, and I was drowning in merch... I swear, I fall in love with the Conductor's cotton dolls over and over again!
Ah, a true 2D fan, I see.
嘿嘿，你也可以安利我喜欢的作品呀！
Hehe, you can totally recommend stuff you like to me too!
Yeah, let's go together next time!
话说回来，真羡慕你可以搓揉帕姆，有机会我也好想试试，一定很幸福~
By the way, I'm so jealous you get to squish Pom-Pom! If I ever get the chance, I'd love to try it too. It must feel amazing~
二相乐园一天一个样，我得趁这几天去追赶一下新潮流了，回见~
Planarcadia changes every single day, so I gotta catch up with the latest trends while I can. See ya~
二相乐园一天一个样，我得趁这几天去追赶一下新潮流了，回见~
Planarcadia changes every single day, so I gotta catch up with the latest trends while I can. See ya~
Greetings, guests from the Astral Express.
请问，你有看见一只横冲直撞的像素轻脚吗？大概有两个我这么高。
Excuse me, have you seen a pixel lightpaw running amok? About twice my height.
准确地说，那是只由上百只尘灵拼凑而成的大猫。
To be precise, it was a giant cat pieced together from hundreds of wispae.
受害者称，「它」行动敏捷，热衷于追逐路边的犬类，一旦试图凑近抓捕，尘灵们便会解体，四散躲藏到各个隐蔽的角落。异常防御部负责巡逻此地的犬灵，也成了被逗弄的对象。

Victims report that "it" moves with surprising agility and has a particular fondness for chasing street dogs. Whenever anyone tries to get close enough to catch them, the wispae disassemble and scatter into every nook and cranny they can find. Even the woofae patrolling the area for the Department of Aberration Defense have become targets of their mischief.
Poor guard dogs. They have my sympathy. For a second.
尘灵本身是微小的愿望，如果一大堆「猫猫追狗」的愿望聚集，就会变成这样。
Wispae are tiny wishes to begin with, so when a whole bunch of cat-chases-dog wishes pile up together, this is what you get.
游戏期间，欢愉之月播撒至人间的愿力增幅，此类幻造种捣乱事件层出不穷，你们也多加小心。
During the event, the Moon of Elation amplifies the Wishpower it spreads to the mortal realm, and these disturbances caused by imagenae occur incessantly, so you'd better watch yourselves out there.
抱歉，光顾着说工作的事了。找我有什么事吗？
Sorry, I got carried away talking about work. What did you need?
近日广场区域由我负责巡逻，有什么异常情况需要上报吗？
I'm on patrol duty around the plaza these days. Anything unusual to report?
I want to have a chat with you.
想聊点什么？不过我正在执勤，我们尽量长话短说。
What's up? I'm on duty right now, so let's keep it quick.
What do you think of the Phantasmoon Games?
还记得游戏规则之一吗？「幻月游戏期间，谒者的所作所为，官方无权插手」。
Remember one of the game rules? "Officials have no right to interfere with a Supplicant's actions during the Phantasmoon Games."
这场以献礼星神为名的狂欢，表演者与观众都能尽兴，只有社会法规与道德约束会被弃置一旁。
In this carnival held in the name of honoring the Aeon, both performers and spectators can revel to their heart's content. Societal laws and moral restraints get tossed aside.
在此期间，治安事件明显增多：幻造种的异常创生、发狂；谒者、观众，甚至路人的意外伤亡；上一届游戏还发生了极其可怕的事……

During this period, public safety incidents spike dramatically: imagenae creating aberrations and turning frenzied, Supplicants, spectators and even passersby dying in accidents. And in the last round of games, something absolutely horrific went down...
具体细节就不说了。但无论局面如何失控，游戏仍会照常进行，这是这片欢愉之土唯一守常不变的规则。
I'll spare you the details. But no matter how uncontrollable it gets, the game goes on. That's the one constant rule in this land of Elation.
所以，一定还会有各种难以预料的情况发生。身为异常防御部的一员，我能做的只有尽己所能，保护好大家。
So there are bound to be all kinds of unpredictable situations ahead. As a member of the Department of Aberration Defense, all I can do is give it my all to keep everyone safe.
你的同事都是幻造种吗？
只是我们更擅长发掘幻造种的独特优势，辅助刑侦办案。所以除了犬灵，你能经常看到机铠、影鳄和其他幻造种治安官们，他们都是异常防御部的得力干将。

We're simply better at tapping into the unique advantages as an imagenae when it comes to supporting criminal investigations. So aside from woofae, you'll regularly see mechatrons, shadowcrocs, and other imagenae officers. They're all invaluable assets to the Department of Aberration Defense.
对了，你知道幻造种治安官们特殊的办案手法吗？
By the way, do you know about the imagenae security officers' special investigative methods?
Is that something you can reveal?
It's fine, this isn't exactly classified info.
他们有个十分高效的特性，能在二维与三维形态间自如切换，自由出入二维空间——
They have this incredibly efficient trait that allows them to switch freely between two-dimensional and three-dimensional forms, so they can slip in and out of the 2D space at will.
我们科拿得出手的经典案件有许多——比如曾经有位轻脚治安官，潜入地下团伙「黑猫凶猛」，假装派系徽标十年，最终搜获了足量关键证据，将他绳之以法。

Our department has plenty of classic cases to boast about. Like the time a lightpaw security officer went undercover in the underground syndicate "Black Cat Cutthroats," posed as a faction member for ten years, and eventually gathered enough critical evidence to bring them to justice.
That's some serious patience right there.
但如今利用这一特性，幻造种的违法犯罪活动也并不罕见，你们可以多加注意，谨慎一些总不会错。
But nowadays, criminal activities by imagenae exploiting this trait aren't exactly rare, so keep your eyes peeled. Better safe than sorry.
二相乐园有推荐的打卡地吗？
Any recommended must-see spots in Planarcadia?
鸽川区这种知名的打卡圣地你应该去过了？那里光彩陆离，拍照很好看。嗯…我想想…我最了解的还属美食店铺，你有兴趣吗？

You've probably already been to famous hotspots like Dovebrook District, right? The place is incredibly radiant and scenic, perfect for photos. Hmm... let me think... I know culinary shops the best. Interested?
我推荐生生食食融合餐厅。开店几十年来从没下过二相乐园必吃榜第一名。
I recommend the Raw 'n' Roasted Fusion Diner. It's been at the top of Planarcadia's Must-Eat List for decades straight.
工作结束后，我都会去点一碗招牌辣炒三文鱼，配上海原市特产的尖椒鸭头…鲜美极了。
After work, I always grab a bowl of their signature spicy stir-fried salmon, paired with Seafeld City's specialty spicy duck heads... absolutely divine.
据说店内原材料都是店长亲自去往各地，调研品鉴的选择，不仅幻造种们吃完大呼「愿力」满满，我也是爱极了他们的三分熟拆骨肉排。

Word is the owner personally travels far and wide to source and sample the finest ingredients. Not only do the imagenae rave about how it fills them with "Wishpower," but I'm absolutely crazy about their medium-rare boneless steak.
电视塔顶层的旋转餐厅，热门的庆生约会圣地。我个人觉得最好吃的是冻皮鳌虾，其他餐品中规中矩，但餐厅胜在能近距离观赏窗外的欢愉之月。

The rotating restaurant at the top of the TV tower is a popular spot for birthday celebrations and dates. Personally, I think the best dish is the frozen-skin lobster. The rest of the menu is pretty standard, but the restaurant's real draw is the close-up view of the Moon of Elation through the windows.
幸运的话，还能和外头的雷虬打招呼，他兴致高涨时总爱来「关心」一下人类。不过也有客人嫌他吵闹，那家伙实在太爱笑了。

If you're lucky, you might even get to say hi to the thundercoil outside. He loves to drop by and "check in" on us humans when he's in high spirits. Though some guests complain he's too noisy. That guy just laughs way too much.
改天我抽空做一份二相乐园的随吃随逛路线攻略给你吧。美食探店这一块，我确实很有自信。
I'll whip up a guide for you some other time, an eat-as-you-explore route through Planarcadia. When it comes to scoping out the finest food, I'm honestly pretty confident in my skills.
最近我能自由支配的时间确实不多…多谢你的提醒，我的确要好好安排下下班后的时刻了，让自己放松一下，劳逸结合。
Truth is, I haven't had much free time lately... Thanks for the reminder. I really should start planning my after-work hours better. You know, unwind a little and find that work-life balance.
幻月游戏期间，实在难得拥有一个完整的休息日…真怀念可以宅在家里浇浇花，看看美食吃播，就度过一天的清闲日子。
During the Phantasmoon Games, it's so rare to get a full day off... I really miss those days when I could just laze at home, water my plants, watch some food vlogs, and call it a day.
Got any food influencers to recommend?
说了你别意外——我会推荐火花。
You might be surprised, but I'd recommend Sparxie.
客观评价，她的吃播节目很优秀。虽然个子小小的，但吃什么都很香，看她的节目能让人感受到纯粹的快乐，也让人很有食欲。
Objectively speaking, her eating streams are excellent. She may be tiny, but she eats everything with such gusto. Watching her brings pure happiness and really works up your appetite.
这么说来，过去我也算半个火花的粉丝。鉴于她近来给异常防御部添的麻烦，她的吃播我应该是不会…不会天天看了。

Come to think of it, I used to be somewhat of a Sparxie fan myself. Given all the trouble she's caused the Department of Aberration Defense lately, I definitely won't be... won't be watching her eating streams every day anymore.
Got any tips for nurturing plants?
很简单，正常浇水与晒太阳，看到土壤干透了，就再用水和光喂饱它们就行。但晒多了吃撑了是很常见的事，所以需要时刻关注。

Easy peasy! Just water and sunlight as usual. When you see the soil's bone dry, give it another good drink and some rays. But it's common to overindulge them from too much sunlight, so you have to keep an eye on them.
只要你一直护着，看着，就会见到鲜花开得最盛的模样，那种不管不顾向外迸发的生命力，每一片花瓣都在用力舒展，像要把全部的能量都献给这个世界。

As long as you keep protecting and watching over it, you'll witness the flowers bloom as brilliantly as ever. That kind of raw, unstoppable vitality erupting outward, every petal stretching with all its might, like it's offering every ounce of energy into this world.
每次看到，都觉得自己的心也跟着打开了。
Every time I see that, I feel my heart blooming too.
I'll leave you to your work.
哪里的话。若有异常情况，随时联系我。
Don't mention it. If anything weird comes up, hit me up anytime.
No matter how busy you are, don't forget to eat!
谢谢关心。等下次休息，我带各位去探店。
Thanks for your concern. Next time I get a break, I'll take you all to explore some shops.
真是少见，事务所居然来生意了。咦，是你啊……
Well, well, a customer here at the agency. That's a rare sight. Oh, it's you...
重新自我介绍下吧，在下不死途。如你所见，我是一名接取各类委托的侦探。
Let me reintroduce myself. My name's Ashveil. As you can see, I'm a detective who takes on all kinds of requests.
星穹列车的大人物专程前来拜访…难不成是有什么高价委托？
A bigwig from the Astral Express came all this way to visit... Don't tell me you've got some high-paying assignment for me?
哈哈，没事就是最好的事——总之，欢迎你光顾「不死神探事务所」。不管是否带着委托来，至少…嗯，你的心情看上去不错。
Haha, no news is good news. Anyway, welcome to the Ashen Detective Agency. Whether you've got an assignment for me or not, at least... well, you seem to be in good spirits.
Assignments... How about you chat with me for a bit?
Do I get paid per sentence for this kind of gig?
开玩笑的，咨询也是侦探工作的一环。
Just kidding, consulting's part of a detective's job too.
什么时候能接到足够多的委托呢…再这样下去，这个月的冰箱电费都快拿出不来了。
When are we gonna get enough cases... At this rate, I won't even be able to cover this month's electric bill for the fridge.
Wanted to ask you about something.
有什么想了解的，随便问吧。
没错。不然怎么能确保顾客顺利找到这间二楼报社里的杂物室？更何况，来这儿的路上还可能有刁滑的狸猫敲诈过路钱。

Yup. Otherwise, how would customers find this storage room tucked away on the second floor of a newspaper office? What's more, they might run into cunning furbos looking to swindle them along the way.
我要是不守在这，他们就算到了，看到摞地的纸盒、倒下的柜子和冰箱…恐怕也会以为这是杂志社萌宠们住的小窝，而不是一个侦探事务所……

If I don't stay here and keep watch, when they show up and see cardboard boxes stacked all over the place, toppled cabinets and refrigerators... they'll probably think this is a nest for the magazine publisher's pets, not a detective agency...
选址的时候没考虑过吗？
Didn't you consider this before picking the location?
身为侦探，当然具备心思敏锐，虑无不周的素质。或许你以为我在反其道而行，但选在这里的原因只有一个……
As a detective, I naturally possess a sharp mind and meticulous consideration. You might think I'm doing the opposite, but there's only one reason I chose this place...
打算如何解决这个问题？
How do you plan to solve this problem?
解决？为什么要解决？找到问题和解决问题是两码事。
Solve it? Why would I solve it? Finding a problem and fixing a problem are two completely different things.
打个比方，侦探的工作或许包括查证与追捕，但绝不包括直接干掉凶手——那是另外的价钱。不换地址的原因很简单……

For example, a detective's job might include investigating and tracking down suspects, but it definitely doesn't include directly taking out the culprit. That's a different price tag. The reason for not changing addresses is simple...
没钱，{F#小姐}{M#兄弟}——这是一道单选题，就这么简单。
I'm broke, {F#miss}{M#buddy}. This is a single-choice question. Elementary.
除去冰箱电费，衣食花销和新鲜香蕉支出…我只能租得起这个无人问津的报社里一个犄角旮旯的空间了。
After covering the refrigerator's electric bill, food and clothing expenses, and the cost of some fresh banana... all I could afford was this cramped space in a corner of a forgotten newspaper firm.
And this person beside you is...
侦探的声音一如往常的低沉，却铿锵有力。而一份异样的情感在他心中油然而生——他不能让旁人将并肩同行的伙伴误认为是宠物了。
The detective's voice was as deep as ever, yet carried a firm resolve. A peculiar emotion welled up within him, he couldn't let others mistake his traveling companion for a pet.
嗯，如你所见，它是我的「旁白」。
Yeah, as you can see, it's my "Narrator."
为了证明同伴的重要性，也为了保护助手的自尊心，当然，也可能是台词不过脑子——侦探选择了一种暧昧的说辞。

It's all to prove the importance of his companion, and to protect his assistant's self-esteem. And of course, possibly because his mouth moves faster than his brain, the detective opted for an ambiguous answer.
老白，你今天心情很不错啊。
Mister N, you're in a pretty good mood today.
Have you two known each other long?
You two seem to get along very well.
嗯。不得不说，时间已经让咱俩无比默契了，他很懂我。
Mm. I gotta say, time's made us totally in sync. He really gets me.
「很懂」——指我能叫醒早晨睡死过去的他。之前「诗人」和「乐手」来二相乐园时，就从没叫起过他——现在他们两位，已经在其他星系养老了。

"Really gets me" means I'm the one who can actually wake him up in the morning when he's dead to the world. Back when the "Poet" and the "Musician" visited Planarcadia, they never managed to get him out of bed. Now, those two are retired and living it up in some other star system.
不死途先生总说羡慕我的口才，其实我也是师从他们两位。还有……
Mr. Ashveil always says he envies my way with words, but truth is, I learned from both of them. And also...
喂喂老白，你今天话密了。
Hey, hey, Mister N, you're being awfully chatty today.
侦探眼眸低垂，心中闪过一丝警惕…好吧抱歉，怪我今天心情太好了。
The detective's eyes narrowed, a flash of wariness flickering through his mind... Okay fine, sorry. My bad for being in such a good mood today.
总之，你大可相信我和老白的职业素养。
Anyway, you can totally trust me and Mister N's professionalism.
What do you do for work, sir?
看你问的…在你眼中，侦探难道就是个伪装身份？
For you to ask that... Do you think being a detective is just some kind of cover?
我知道你在想什么：在成为侦探之前，我应该是位诞生自「极寒之地」的圣贤，或者是看似外表普通实则心思缜密的杀人狂，再差也得是个与魔鬼签订契约的普通人…噢，漏了一个，家族被灭后韬光养晦的复仇王子……

I know what you're thinking: before becoming a detective, I must've been a Sage born in the "frozen land," or a seemingly normal person who's actually a meticulous psychotic killer, or at the very least, some average Joe who signed a contract with the devil... Oh, almost forgot one, a prince of revenge lying low after his family had been wiped out...
但我确实涉猎很广，诸如银行的押钞员，幻月游戏某分会场保镖，写字楼的维修工，也接过养老院家长们的外包儿女委托…这些事儿我统统干过。

But I've got a pretty diverse resume: cash-in-transit officer for banks, bouncer at a Phantasmoon Games venue, maintenance guy for commercial buildings, I've even taken on assignments from nursing home residents to care for them like their children... I've done it all.
淡淡的忧伤缓慢爬上男人的脸庞，那是面对岁月刀光的窘迫，是对逝去青春的回望——以往他能一天干五份活，如今他只能完成「三步将自己塞进冰箱」。

A faint melancholy slowly creeps across the man's face. The awkwardness of facing time's relentless blade, a glance back at his youth long gone. He used to juggle five jobs a day. Now, he can barely bring himself to move "three steps to stuff himself into a refrigerator."
你的生意看着有点寡淡啊……
Business is looking pretty slow, huh...
这都被你发现了，很敏锐啊。
我们也尝试过打广告，报刊上的大版位费用负担不起，就退而求其次登在最便宜的「每日幽默」栏位里，当然，结果是被人当成笑话……

We tried advertising too, but full-page spreads in the papers were way out of our budget, so we settled for the cheapest option: the "Daily Humor" section. And of course... people thought it was a joke...
侦探心下偷喜，为了追赶潮流想了好几天才想出来的一语双关的笑话，终于被他逮着机会讲了。
The detective was secretly thrilled. After racking his brain for days trying to come up with a trendy pun, he'd finally gotten the chance to use it.
也盯上过外面那家杂志社，老白趁着它们印刷新刊时偷偷将封底的照片换成了事务所的。本来是个很成功的计划……

He also had his eye on that magazine publisher outside. Mister N snuck in while they were printing a new issue and swapped out the back cover photo with one of the agency's. It was supposed to be a masterstroke...
结果那群狸猫一个比一个精明，为了省钱脸都不…封面封底都不要了，也不装订，就直接一张张地发…这跟发传单有什么区别？

Turns out those furbos are sharper than you'd think. To save some money, they didn't even care about losing face... They ditched the front and back covers, skipped the binding, and just handed out loose pages... How's that any different from handing out flyers?
你好，我是杂志社新老板。
Hey there, I'm the magazine publisher's new boss.
情报服务，寻人跟踪，推理课程——「不死神探事务所」潜力股看一看。如果以上都不符合，您要他做什么都可以。
Intelligence services, searching for missing persons, deduction courses: check out the rising star, "Ashen Detective Agency." If none of the above fit your needs, he'll do whatever you want.
也许你可以试试网络直播。
Maybe you could give live streaming a shot.
试过。可惜，事务所的卖相并不吸人眼球，我的卖相虽然勉强可用，但网络上奇人异事多了去了，对比之下我的直播就太平庸了。虽然老白安慰我说，是没找到合适的赛道。

Tried it. Unfortunately, the agency's aesthetics aren't exactly eye-catching, and while my own looks are barely passable, the internet's crawling with all sorts of wild characters and bizarre content. Compared to them, my livestreams were just too bland. Though Mister N tried to comfort me, saying I just hadn't found the right niche yet.
和猴子比挤眉弄眼，挑战睡醒后单眼皮变九眼皮，还有沉浸式睡眠…不死途先生，很遗憾地告诉你，现在的世界是以内容为王。
Making faces at monkeys, all-nighter challenges, immersive sleep experiences... Mr. Ashveil, I regret to inform you that in today's world, content is king.
好吧。我确实该迈开腿脚追一追年轻人的步伐了。
Alright. I really should get off my butt and keep up with the youngsters.
早起的老狼有肉吃，机会就在眼前。不死途先生，我们该努努力了，先从早睡早起做起。
The early wolf gets the meat, and opportunity's knocking on your door right now. Mr. Ashveil, we gotta step up our game. Start with hitting the hay early and rising with the sun.
好的。有任何委托随时找我，价格都好说。
Sure thing. If you ever need any assignments done, just hit me up! I'm flexible on the price.
现在知道你深藏不露了……
Now I see you're not one to show your hand easily...
不少委托人在亲眼见识过我的破案技巧后，都会发出类似的赞叹，你的叹服，我也接下了。
Plenty of clients have sung similar praises after witnessing my detective skills in action. I'll gladly accept your admiration as well.
Hello, leader of the Galaxy Rangers.
嘘，游侠不问出处。不过你要是坚持这么喊，之后商议的委托可得加钱了。毕竟比起「不死神探」，这个头衔很难给您打折啊——它可能会引来麻烦的回头客。

Shh, a Ranger's past is their own. Keep shouting that name, though, and my rates are going up. After all, compared to "Ashen Detective," this title doesn't exactly lend itself to discounts... It might attract certain troublesome repeat customers.
实际上我们心知肚明，那个头衔就像街边被风吹日晒的过期悬赏单，现在揭下来，也兑不了几个信用点。
Truth is, we all know deep down that title's like a sun-bleached bounty poster peeling off a wall. Even if you cashed it in now, you wouldn't get more than a handful of credits.
总之，这把老骨头也经不起大的折腾了，现在我更习惯等麻烦自己找上门，至少能省下几双鞋的钱。
Anyway, these old bones can't take much of a beating anymore. I prefer waiting for trouble to come knocking at my door these days. That way, at least it saves me a few pairs of shoes.
所以在这儿我只是个侦探，还是叫我「不死途」吧，这名字更吉利，听着就长寿。
Here, I'm merely a detective, nothing more. Just call me Ashveil. This name feels like it'd bring good luck.
拉曼查，我叫你你敢答应吗？
La Mancha, if I call your name, dare you respond?
三秒过去了，话掉地上了。侦探揉了揉眉心，看似是突发了某种古老的偏头痛，实则是在懊恼自己没能立刻想出一句搪塞对方的俏皮话。

Three seconds have passed. The ball is in his court. The detective rubs the spot between his eyebrows, seemingly struck by some ancient migraine, but really just kicking himself for not having a snappy comeback ready to fire back.
他意识到，除了《推理入门》，自己还需要进修一本《接话的艺术》。
He realizes that apart from Detective Deduction 101, he also needs to study up on The Fine Art of Small Talk.
诶。一个名字而已，又不会掉块肉。
Well, it's just a name. It won't bite.
只不过隔墙有耳，叫这个名字可能引发的代价，你未必想付，我也未必想收。还是简单点好。
You never know who's listening. The price that comes with using that name is one you might not want to pay, and one I might not want to collect. So why don't we just keep things simple?
所以，在这儿我只是个侦探，还是叫我「不死途」吧，这名字更吉利，听着就长寿。
Here, I'm merely a detective, nothing more. Just call me Ashveil. This name feels like it'd bring good luck.
好的。有任何委托随时找我，价格都好说。
Sure thing. If you ever need any assignments done, just hit me up! I'm flexible on the price.
就那欢愉之月眨眼的频率来看，今时此地，你定会出现在我的面前。
Judging by the frequency of the Moon of Elation's twinkling, I knew you'd show up here and now, right in front of me.
说说吧，想找我聊些什么？卜卦、解卦、还是八卦？
So, what brings you here? Fortune-telling, fortune reading, or just plain old gossip?
嗯…欢歌笑语也算是白噪音的一种，正适合在此磨练心性。
Hmm... Laughter and chatter can be considered a form of white noise, perfect for tempering one's mental fortitude here.
放心，愚者们可不会闲着关注我一个偶然的「外来之人」。
Relax, the Fools aren't gonna waste their time keeping tabs on some random "outsider" like me.
好了，我瞧你今日心境开阔，三分气定神闲，三分走马观花，三分想找乐子，一分闲来无事。我也正巧从一些政务琐事里偷得一刻闲散。走前咱们聊会儿天罢？

Well well, I can see you're in quite a good mood today: three parts zen, three parts leisure, three parts hunting for funsies, and one part just killing time. As it happens, I've also managed to catch a brief break from my pile of tedious administrative work. How about we chat for a bit before you go?
想知道什么尽管问，爻老板我呢，知无不言。
Ask me anything you wanna know. I'll tell you everything I know.
又被你撞到我在这儿偷闲了？
Caught me slacking off here again?
说说吧，想聊些什么？卜卦、解卦、八卦——爻老板我呢，知无不言。
So, what brings you here? Fortune-telling, fortune reading, or juicy gossip? I'll tell you everything I know.
Then I'm going to fire away.
嚯，这么认真的表情，我倒开始好奇你会问出什么有趣的问题了。
Whoa, that's a serious look. I'm actually curious what kind of interesting questions you're gonna hit me with.
I heard your divinations are insanely accurate?
准与不准，往往在于卜者捕捉到的信息是否完全，我呢，不巧能「眼」观六路。但万千事物不断变换，生变之时即在寸阴之间……

Whether a divination hits or misses often depends on how complete the information the diviner picks up is. Me? I happen to have "eyes" that see in all directions. But the myriad forms of things are constantly shifting. Change can happen in the blink of an eye...
比如有一天，我算到星神会在某一刻欣赏地瞥你一眼，谁成想祂心情不好，白了你一眼。你看，一瞬之间，阴阳交错了不是？

For instance, I could predict that an Aeon will glance at you approvingly at a certain moment, but who'd have thought THEY'd be in a bad mood and give you the stink eye instead? See? In the blink of an eye, the variables flicker and intertwine to form a disaster, right?
所以呀，卦象涨落、吉凶命数，仅是一点前路的预示，可以当作警醒。但要我说，算得准不如行动快，遇事亲自上手，也省去了瞻前顾后的工夫。

So yeah, hexagrams of divinations shift, the predictions of luck and misfortune are simply faint hints of what lies ahead, good for keeping you on your toes. But if you ask me, being quick to act beats accurate predictions any day. If you encounter anything, get moving right away. Saves you all that second-guessing too.
I wanna get my fortune told, just for a reminder.
那回我瞧了你许久，却仅仅得出个「无从卜测」的结果。卜算讲究一个天时玄妙，今日换种方式如何？来，把手给我。

Last time I observed you for quite a while, but all I got was a reading that concluded you were "impossible to predict." Divination relies on cosmic timing and mystical alignment. How about we try a different approach today? Come, give me your hand.
果然成长势头正盛啊。赠你一言：「不留今，与时变，与俗化」。保持这股冲劲继续向前吧。
You're at the peak of your growth now. Here's some wisdom for you: "Don't cling to the present, change with the times, adapt to the world." Keep up this momentum and charge ahead.
记得先前为你卜卦，结果是「无从卜测」。
I remember when I tried to read your fortune before, the result was "impossible to predict."
没有既定结果，便预示着你的未来有无穷的可能。所以，想做什么的话，放手去做就好。
To have no fixed outcome means your future is brimming with infinite possibilities. So if there's something you want to do, just go for it.
闲暇之余都做些什么呢？
What do you do in your free time?
自然是以牌会友，切磋牌技了。牌友齐聚后，先喝上一桶冰鲜柠檬青梅气泡茶清醒头脑，再算出一个必赢风水位，这点很重要。落座后，就可以血战到天亮咯。

Naturally, it's all about bonding over playing cards and sharpening our skills. Once my companions gather, first we down a bucket of iced lemon lazuli soda to clear our heads, then figure out the lucky feng shui seats. That part's crucial. Once we're seated, we can battle it out till dawn.
当然。牌桌之上，人人赛神仙，没有感情，玩的就是人情世故。平日里没处使的心眼子，到了牌桌上便是各显神通。

Of course. At the card table, everyone's a celestial being, and there's no feelings involved. It's all about playing the social game. All those schemes you can't use in daily life? At the card table, everyone shows their true colors.
多思考多观察——摸牌出牌得掐准时机，为自己谋算赢面；眼观六路耳听八方，这是察言观势；控下家、盯上家、防对家，这是统合全局。

Think hard, watch closely. Timing your draws and plays is key to creating your opportunity for victory. Keep your eyes peeled and ears open to read the situation. Control the player to your right, watch the one on your left, and guard against the one across you. That's how you dominate the game.
当然了，如果能拥有百分之九十九的运气，就再好不过了。
Of course, if I could have ninety-nine percent luck, that'd be even better.
牌类泛泛。传统的「帝垣琼玉」、煊赫一时的「掼三家」，新晋的「捉鸡二五八」，「心眼牌」…好巧不巧我均有涉及，连胜更是不在话下。

Card games in general. The traditional "Celestial Jade," the once-illustrious "Three-Man Guandan Poker," the rising "2-5-8 Tiles," "Mind's Eye"... As luck would have it, I'm well-versed in all of them, and winning streaks are a given.
师出爻老板，保你回回稳操胜券。
Under my wing, you're guaranteed a win every time.
除了青雀，还有谁是牌迷？
Besides Qingque, who else is a card game fanatic?
那是多了去了，仙舟谁还不会打牌？就说景元、飞霄、怀炎，别看他们平日里对此不露声色，真要招呼他们打牌时，那牌桌上的心眼也是多得数不清哟。

Oh, there's tons of them. Who on the Xianzhou doesn't know how to play cards? Take Jing Yuan, Feixiao, and Huaiyan, for example: they might act all calm and collected about it on the surface, but once you get them at the card table, the sheer number of tricks up their sleeves is off the charts.
好在爻老板我精通些见招拆招的本事——对青雀这样的老手，要打得明中藏暗，暗里有明，如此才有赢面。对景元就像剥洋葱，需得张张盘算，引得他把心思摊在台面上；对飞霄，要牌行险着，出奇方可制胜；对怀炎，得不停迷惑他的思路，真亦假来假亦真。

Luckily, I've got a knack for adapting on the fly. Against a veteran like Qingque, you gotta play it subtle with hidden moves wrapped in plain sight, and obvious plays hiding your real strategy. That's the only way to win. With Jing Yuan, it's like peeling an onion, you have to calculate every card, and lure him into laying all his strategy bare. Against Feixiao, you need risky plays and unexpected moves to secure victory. And with Huaiyan, you gotta keep him guessing, blur the lines between truth and bluff.
最有趣的当属我师妹，她没打过什么牌，某日被我生拉硬拽上了高手局，竟遇强则奇袭，有什么出什么，缺什么要什么，最后险胜一局，破了我的二十连胜。

The most interesting one is definitely my junior soror. She'd never really played before, but one day I dragged her kicking and screaming into a high-stakes match. Against all odds, she went on a full offense, playing whatever she had and demanding for whatever she needed. In the end, she pulled off a narrow victory that shattered my twenty-game winning streak.
牌桌上的新鲜事，怕是讲上几个日夜也难以讲完呐。
The interesting stories from the card tables? Man, I could go on for days and still not finish them all.
说得我手又痒了。前不久倒是听闻了二相乐园时兴的「银河战力党」，来都来了，改日我也要浅露一手。
Now you're making my fingers itch. I heard the Cosmicon Collective's all the rage in Planarcadia these days. Since I'm already here, I'll have to show them what I've got sometime soon.
戎韬将军——胸有甲兵，文韬武略！
Seer Strategist! Armed with military might and wisdom!
小朋友，打官腔的辞令从哪儿学的？我猜猜…这般大实话，难道是飞霄景元他们教你的？
Child, where'd you learn to spout such rigid formalities? Let me guess... such blunt honesty... Perhaps it was Feixiao or Jing Yuan who taught you that?
但本座不务空名，要论为仙舟人化险为夷、否极生泰之事，我确实做了不少。
But I live up to my title. When it comes to turning the tables for Xianzhou and creating opportunities in the worst calamities, I've definitely contributed my fair share.
譬如精准测算公司旗下各行业股价的涨落行情，狠狠从公司身上薅回来一把被他们算计走的军需资产。虽说太卜司有「三不占」的规矩，但此回例外，也算是以眼还眼咯。

For example, precisely calculating the stock price fluctuations across the IPC's various industries, and fiercely clawing back a chunk of the military assets they swindled from us. Although the Divination Commission has its "three taboos," this was an exception. You can say it was an eye for an eye.
又譬如点拨了两位有大凶之兆之人，其中一位排除万难，终是辞了医士入了云骑，另一位退休司书知难而进，圆梦当了匠作——这命路啊，就此逢凶化吉，晦而转明。

And, I advised two individuals plagued by omens of Great Woe. One overcame countless obstacles and eventually left their position as a healer to join the Cloud Knights, while the other, a retired scribe, pressed forward despite the difficulties and fulfilled their dream of becoming a craftsman. Thus, their fates turned Woe into Weal, darkness into light.
真好，只愿人人都能稳步行于自己的康庄大道上，向着未来前进。
How wonderful. May everyone walk steadily on their own path to glory, marching forward into the future.
Oh, something new? Let me see...
噢，泊地站台旁的寄存柜最右边上面一格里，有只被我解救过后又自己待进去的尘灵；二相乐园的最酸小酒馆仍在闭店整改，不知他们的「超酸无比酸酸挑战」什么时候才能报名……

Oh, there's a wispae in the top-right locker by the Perdido Platform, I rescued it once, but it just crawled right back in. The Souriest Tavern in Planarcadia is still closed for renovations, I wonder when they'll reopen the registration for their "Ultra-Mega-Super-Sour Challenge"...
嗯…也唯有那重因凶命集结而凝聚成的红色，说是比先前更甚也不为过。
Hmm... That crimson hue condensed by the convergence of misfortune and woes. It's definitely intensified compared to before.
卜筮之道有云：「易穷则变，变则通，通则久」。即便是死局，将自身命数化作变量，也能破得一线生机。

The way of the divination says: "When things are at exhaustion, changes pave a path. Through that path, they endure." Even at an impasse, by turning your own destiny into a variable, an opportunity for survival will appear.
You can still see it now?
不错。接掌将军符节后，我这双眼睛便可观众生万象，判读气运。
Indeed. After taking up the General's talisman, these eyes of mine can observe the myriad forms of all beings and divine the flow of fortune.
这处「欢愉」土地上的命兆暗流无时无刻不在提醒我，一场以生命为界限的博弈，才将将开始。
The undercurrents of fate in this land of "Elation" constantly remind me that a game with life itself on the line is only just beginning.
哼。卜筮之道有云：「易穷则变，变则通，通则久」。即便是死局，将自身命数化作变量，也能破得一线生机。

Hmph. The way of the divination says: "When things are at exhaustion, changes pave a path. Through that path, they endure." Even at an impasse, by turning your own destiny into a variable, an opportunity for survival will appear.
好了，这一趟公费造访二相乐园，可真是不白来。待回到仙舟，我可要在「孩子们最崇拜的将军」榜上，狠狠赢上一筹。
Well, this business-sponsored trip to Planarcadia was definitely worth it. When I get back to the Xianzhou, I'll crush it on the "General Most Admired by Kids" rankings.
I don't have any more questions. Thanks, Madam Yao.
希望你的疑惑都得到了解答。

没什么想问的了，谢谢爻老板。

来城里找工作这么多天，除了老哥你，我就没遇着一个好人！这样，来个笑点最高的，这瓶小弟请！
I've been lookin' for work in town for days now, and you're the only decent person I've met! Tell you what, let's have the strongest one they've got, and this one's on me!
你这样的我见多了，说真的，别焦虑，工作总会有的。
I've seen plenty of people like you. Honestly, don't stress about it. You'll find work eventually.
哎！我的母星可没有二相乐园这么复杂，来了二维市才知道什么叫花花世界迷人眼——那高楼、那广场、那火花带闪电的雷虬…我真想留下！

Hey! My home planet wasn't nearly as complex as Planarcadia. I had no idea what "dazzlin'" meant before I came to Duomension City! Those neon lights, that Plaza, those lightning-sparking thundercoil... I don't want to go nowhere!
可是大哥，我投了<unbreak>1000</unbreak>份简历，只有9个进面，奋斗至今…还是0个offer！世人都笑我，偏偏我还最好笑……
But friend, I sent out <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> resumes, only got 9 interviews, and after all that hustle... ZERO offers! Everyone's laughin' at me, I'm the biggest joke of 'em all...
欸，别这样贬低自己。你也算是…要力气有力气！要学历…有力气，要背景、要背景也有力气！
Hey, don't sell yourself short like that. I mean, you've got... strength out the wazoo! And an education... well, you've got strength! And connections? You've definitely got strength!
I'm nothin' but a musclehead! Waaah...

啊！乐子神在上，我现在笑，哈哈哈哈，千万别诅咒我呜呜……

欢迎光临克拉肯酒馆！这位客人，里边请——
Welcome to Kraken's Tavern! Right this way, please.
等等，你的装束看着很熟悉，似乎在哪见过…是啊，我怎么会忘了呢？
Wait a minute... that outfit is so familiar. I'm sure I've seen it somewhere... Ah, yes. How could I possibly forget?
Why don't you tell me who you think I am?
哈哈哈，贵客说笑了。这二相乐园，谁不知道球棒浣熊的名号？反倒是我这个迎客的，没能一眼认出您的模样，怪我，怪我啊！
Hahaha, you flatter me, my dear guest. Is there anyone in Planarcadia who doesn't know of the great Baseball Raccoon? I'm the one at fault for not recognizing you at a glance. My mistake, truly!
尝尝我亲自捕捞的海鲜吧，这可是二维市的明星餐品，霸占必吃榜数十年，保证美味！
Have a taste of the seafood I caught myself. It's the star dish of Duomension City, and it's been topping the must-try lists for decades. I guarantee you it's delicious!
But aren't you a great sea monster yourself?
I'm not so sure about entering a shop run by a monster.
哈哈哈，看到这些威武的触手了么？它们本为掀起波澜而生，在烹饪方面也不遑多让。
Hahaha, do you see these magnificent tentacles? They were born to summon the tides, and they're second to none when it comes to food.
但说来惭愧，其实，我不知道该如何兴风作浪。每次前往海边，我心中油然而生的只有一个念头——那便是为顾客带回最优质的食材。

But it's actually a bit embarrassing that I don't actually know how to command the tides. Every time I go to the sea, only one thought comes to my mind... and that is to bring back the absolute best ingredients for my customers.
或许，我根本就没有被称为海妖的资格吧？不过没关系，我会钻研烹饪之道，努力成为二维市最受欢迎的店长！
Maybe I don't deserve to be called a sea monster at all, eh? But that's okay. I'll dedicate myself to the art of cooking and strive to become the most popular shopkeeper in Duomension City!
怪物转型当店主，也挺好。
Nothing wrong with a monster starting a new career as a shopkeeper.
You don't have to feel bad about it.
有时候，客人们也会谈起我的过去，猜测我曾是叱咤星海的的大海妖。传言为小酒馆带来了人气，而我正好藉此机会，征服食客的味蕾。

Sometimes, my guests will talk about my past, speculating that I was once the great and fearsome sea monster who ruled the cosmic seas. The rumors brought in more business, and I took the opportunity to win them over with my cooking.
说到这个，哈哈…要是贵客感兴趣的话，不如来一份招牌海鲜套餐吧？
Speaking of which, haha... if you're interested, my dear guest, why not try our signature seafood set?
克拉肯饱含工作热情地接待着你，只是这亲切的话语中，再没有往日的桀骜气息。
Kraken welcomes you with all the passion they have for their work, but their cordial words no longer hold any trace of their former unruly arrogance.
你望向那对眼睛，它们曾承载某位海妖对大海的恐惧与向往，而今透出的，唯有一位店主展露厨艺时的自信与期待。

You gaze into that pair of eyes. They once carried a certain sea monster's fear of and longing for the ocean, but now all that shines through is the confidence and excitement of a shopkeeper showing off their culinary art.
好嘞，请您稍等。赌上我的店主生涯，保证能取悦您的舌头！
Coming right up! And I'll bet my entire career as a shopkeeper that it will be a delight for your taste buds!
欢迎光临克拉肯酒馆，每日海鲜不限量供应，现捞现卖，保证合您口味！
Welcome to Kraken's Tavern! We offer unlimited fresh seafood daily, caught and served on demand. I guarantee it'll be to your liking!
噢！是大名鼎鼎的球棒浣熊，贵客啊！今天想尝点什么？
Whoa! It's the one and only Baseball Raccoon! What an honor! What are you in the mood for today?
I want to chat with you...
没问题。本店长也算见多识广，常从顾客口中听来二相乐园各地的消息。贵客想聊些什么，我都奉陪！
No problem at all. I've heard a lot in my time, especially the news from all over Planarcadia that my customers bring in. Whatever you want to talk about, I'm happy to oblige!
So, how did you become the shop's owner?
说实话，我不太记得自己在经营小酒馆之前的事了，印象里，那是一段穷困潦倒的艰难岁月。
Honestly, I can't recall much from before I started running this tavern. All I remember is a vague impression of a difficult life, full of hardship and poverty.
从外形上看，我是只张牙舞爪的大海妖。可若是如此，又怎会缺乏愿力呢？随便在海上卷起风暴，就会万众瞩目吧，哈哈哈。
I may look like a ferocious sea monster, but if that were true, how could I have been so short on Wishpower? I should've been able to whip up a storm and grab everyone's attention easily, hahaha.
但我只记得自己饥寒交迫，晕倒在鸽川边，濒临消散。
All I can remember is being starved and freezing, collapsing by the Dovebrook, soon to fade from existence.
所幸一位路过的噗噜救起了我，并带到小酒馆，询问我是否愿意为它工作。
Luckily, a passing ploo rescued me and brought me to this tavern, asking if I wanted to work here.
它就是当时的店长，而小酒馆的名字，就叫「克拉肯」。
The ploo was the shop's owner at the time, and the name of the tavern was, in fact, "Kraken."
A new life, starting from the bottom.
没错。为了纪念此次新生，我便以店名作为自己的新名字。
Exactly. To commemorate this new beginning, I took the shop's name as my new name.
说来倒也巧，自从我到店里后，慕名而来的顾客越来越多。有海妖在此工作的「克拉肯」小酒馆，也算是名副其实吧。
As it happens, more and more customers were drawn to the shop after I started working here. I suppose a tavern named "Kraken" with a sea monster on staff really lives up to its name.
这个店名真的会有生意吗…
I'm surprised you get any business with a name like that...
说来倒也巧，自从我到店里后，慕名而来的顾客越来越多。有海妖在此工作的「克拉肯」小酒馆，算是名副其实吧！
As it happens, more and more customers were drawn to the shop after I started working here. I suppose a tavern named "Kraken" with a sea monster on staff really lives up to its name!
也因此，为了纪念新生，我便以店名作为自己的新名字了。
That's also why, to commemorate this new life, I took the shop's name as my new name.
但在生意日渐红火时，那位噗噜却不辞而别，只留下一封信。它说自己厌倦了开店生活，要去追求成为喜剧明星的梦想。

However, right when business was really picking up, the ploo left without any goodbyes, leaving just a letter behind. It said it was tired of running the tavern and was leaving to pursue its dream of becoming a comedy star.
于是我接过经营重担，成为顾客们熟悉的店主，直至现在。
So I took over the responsibilities of running the place and became the shopkeeper everyone's familiar with now.
小酒馆的生活忙碌而充实，我将全部心血都灌注在这份事业中。很难说究竟它是我的一部分，或者…我才是它的部分。
The tavern life is busy but fulfilling. I've poured my entire being into this work. It's hard to say if it's a part of me, or... if I'm just a part of it.
无论如何，将「克拉肯」打造成二相乐园最受欢迎的小酒馆，是我的梦想。
No matter what, it's my dream to make "Kraken" the most beloved tavern in Planarcadia.
What's the secret to running a tavern?
莫非，您想要加盟我的店铺？荣幸之至！
Are you thinking of joining my business as a franchisee? What an honor!
但实不相瞒，这经营秘诀说来简单，却也极难复制。否则我也不会每日驻守店铺、事事亲为了。
But I'll be honest, the secret is simple to explain but extremely hard to execute. If it weren't, I wouldn't be here at the shop every single day, handling everything myself.
总结起来，就是两句话：使用最好的食材，做出最棒的餐品。
It all comes down to two things: use the best ingredients, and make the best possible dishes.
Tell me more about the best ingredients.
一道鱼生的准备时间，不是从它被摆到砧板上开始计算的，而是从鱼儿诞生在大海里开始计算的。
The preparation for raw fish slices doesn't start when the fish hits the cutting board. It starts from the moment that fish is born in the sea.
烹饪方式越简单，就越需要优秀的食材。这即是厨艺的真谛——并非改造，而是呈现。
The simpler the cooking method, the more you need outstanding ingredients. That's the real essence of cooking: not the transformation of something, but presenting it at its best.
由于海妖的特性，我对水产质量极为挑剔。曾有段时间，小酒馆面临着海鲜短缺的窘境。订购生鱼难免磨损，并在储运过程中失去鲜度。

Thanks to my sea monster nature, I'm extremely picky about seafood quality. The tavern faced a shortage for a while, because ordering raw fish meant it would inevitably get damaged and lose its freshness in transit.
为此，我不得不每日深潜海底，亲自捕捞最上等的食材——没有什么诀窍，靠得便是满腔热情，与对厨艺虔诚的心。
So, I had to start diving deep into the ocean every day to catch the absolute best ingredients myself. There's no special trick to it, just a whole lot of passion and a reverent heart for cooking.
Tell me more about meal prep.
在最初，我只能笨拙地摹仿店长处理鲜鱼的动作，就像从事某种重复性的体力劳动。
Well, at first, I could only clumsily copy the owner's fish-processing technique, like I was doing some kind of repetitive manual labor.
不知是否宣传的缘故，「海妖套餐」大受欢迎。在认可与喜爱的滋养下，我的烹饪技艺突飞猛进，最后甚至获得了「神之手」的美誉。

I'm not sure if it was just good marketing, but the "Sea Monster Combo" became a huge hit. With all that praise and adoration, my cooking skills improved dramatically, and eventually I even earned the honored moniker of Hands of God.
But you don't have any... hands.
哈哈哈，这只是个比喻。我有的是手段来处理食材。
Hahaha, that's just an expression. I have plenty of ways to handle ingredients, don't you worry.
A master chef of sea monster!
愿力，很奇妙吧？只要汇聚得足够多，谁都能成就一番事业。
Wishpower is a curious thing, isn't it? If you can gather enough of it, anyone can make something of themselves.
当我完成烹饪，看到餐品迸发出光芒时，我便知道，它达到了食材能呈现出的最佳状态。可以说，在端上餐桌前，我已先一步品尝到了幸福与满足的滋味。

When I finish a dish and see it radiate light, I know it has reached the peak form its ingredients could possibly achieve. You could say I get the first taste of happiness and satisfaction, long before it's served.
嗯，希望我的分享对您有帮助。
Good. I'm glad if my story was helpful to you.
无论如何，心怀热情与敬意去做喜爱的事，就绝不会出错。
At the end of the day, you can't go wrong if you do what you love with passion and respect.
还想去看看天外的海吗？
Do you still want to see the ocean beyond the sky?
您是说…天外？我很好奇，但对我来说，这个梦想实在遥不可及。这副身躯若是离开幻月映照的范围，恐怕支撑不了多久便会消散。
Beyond... the sky? I do, but... a dream like that is completely out of reach for me. This body would probably dissipate soon after leaving the area illuminated by the Phantasmoon.
我可以只带上你的眼睛。
I can just bring your eyes with me.
感谢。不过，若真有那天，希望您带上的不是我的眼睛——
Thank you. But if that day ever comes, I hope it is not my eyes you take with you...
So you have a huge appetite.
难得出去一趟，只是逛逛未免太过可惜。何况我也尝不出味道来，哈哈哈。
It would be a waste to go on such a rare trip and only look around. Besides, I can't taste flavors that way, hahaha.
如果可以，我想把其他星球的海装进肚子里，把全星系的优质海鲜带回二相乐园。这样，二维市的顾客足不出户，便可以品尝到来自银河各地的美味食材。

If it were possible, I'd want to hold the oceans of other worlds in my belly and bring all the finest seafood in the galaxies back to Planarcadia. This way, the people of Duomension City could taste delicious ingredients from across the cosmos without ever leaving town.
不过即便如此，因为要容纳银河的缘故，需要的愿力也是个天文数字吧。
Still, the Wishpower required to contain the entire cosmos would be, well, astronomical.
所以，就当是个美丽的梦——离开二相乐园，前往天外的世界，对我们幻造种而言还是太过遥远了。
So, let's just call it a dream and leave it at that. For us imagenae, leaving Planarcadia for the world beyond the sky is still something far beyond our reach.
That's all I wanted to ask.
嗯。贵客有需要的时候，随时来找本店长就好。
Very well. If you ever need anything, don't hesitate to come find me.
I think I'll have the signature combo!
好嘞，请稍等。招牌套餐，马上就来！
You got it! Just a moment, please. One signature combo, coming right up!
I have other matters to take care of.
嗯。贵客有需要的时候，随时来找本店长就好。
Very well. If you ever need anything, don't hesitate to come find me.
嗯。贵客有需要的时候，随时来找本店长就好。
Very well. If you ever need anything, don't hesitate to come find me.
可疑的电话亭，阵阵清脆的铃声。当你满怀好奇提起听筒时——没有问候、没有抱歉、没有控诉、也没有推销——只有强劲的电流声瞬间击穿你的脑海。你的耳膜嗡嗡作响。

A suspicious phone booth, ringing with crisp, clear chimes. When you curiously pick up the receiver, there is no greeting, no apology, no accusation, no sales pitch. Just a surge of electrical current that instantly pierces through your mind. Your eardrums buzz and ring.
Is this some kind of prank?
Could this be an urban myth?
你说不准。在二相乐园，只有你想不到的，没有你见不到的。
You never know. In Planarcadia, there's nothing that's impossible to see.
事实上，这恰恰是愿力的作用原理：你甚至可以想象一块超现实的面板，调节环境音量，以防遭到历史上某位幻月游戏参赛者亡魂的袭击……

In fact, that's exactly how Wishpower works: you could even imagine a surreal control panel, adjusting the ambient volume to protect yourself from attacks by the lingering spirits of past Phantasmoon Games contestants...
…嘿，等等，听！那毫无规律的杂讯里，似乎存在着某种逻辑——某种声音——
...Hey, wait, listen! Within that chaotic noise, there seems to be some kind of logic, some kind of voice...

（电流杂讯音效）菲利普<size=28>隆巴德</size>█▄█▄▄尼<size=28>詹姆</size>斯▄█马斯<size=28>罗杰斯</size>█▄▀劳<size=28>伦</size>斯███▄贾斯丁<size=28>沃</size>格夫█▄<size=28>伊</size>凡<size=28>里</size>奇█▄▀约翰<size=28>戈</size>登▄█埃塞尔<size=28>威廉</size>亨█▄▀▄<size=28>利</size>布<size=28>洛尔</size>▄█▄▄█▀▄▄
一连串陌生的名字在浑浊的电流中浮现。电话那头的人或某物确实存在。他念出了他们。她在寻找他们。它的声音压抑、冰冷，仿佛正拖拽着生锈的病床在太平间游荡。

A string of unfamiliar names surfaced through the crackling static. There was definitely someone, or something, on the other end of the line. He recited them. She was searching for them. Its voice was oppressive and cold, as if dragging a rusty hospital bed through a morgue.
你毫无头绪，又或者头绪过于繁杂。名册还在继续延伸。十、百、千、万。他在找他们，但为什么？若她还在世，他们曾有何种交集？如果它早已不在人间，那么……

You're completely clueless, or maybe drowning in too many clues. The list keeps growing. Ten, a hundred, a thousand, ten thousand. He's searching for them, but why? If she's still alive, what connection do they share? And if it's already gone, then...
了无生气的白噪音正渐渐在狭小的电话亭里滋生一种异样的、黑暗的阴谋。冷汗。凉意。天色暗了下来。幻月还在天上吗？它在看着吗？在看哪里？他们？他？她？它？你？我？

The lifeless white noise is gradually breeding a strange, dark conspiracy in the cramped phone booth. Cold sweat. A chill. The sky darkens. Is the Phantasmoon still up in the sky? Is it watching? Watching where? Them? Him? Her? It? You? Me?
再一次。尖锐。低沉。凄厉。密集。嘶哑。短促。狰狞。沉闷。耳语。近了。越来越近。他就在附近。她在那里。它在找你。他找到了你。她在你身边。它就要开口了——

Again. Sharp. Deep. Shrill. Dense. Hoarse. Abrupt. Grotesque. Muffled. Whispers. Closer. Getting closer. He's nearby. She's there. It's looking for you. He found you. She's by your side. It's about to speak...

The IPC brought sweeping change to our World in Canvas. The ▄█Faekind Protection Act granted all imagenae the same legal and social rights as humans. We now have the right to work▄ run businesses, and participate in politics just like anyone else█▀▄█.
当然▄█许多幻造种一度不愿纡尊降贵，包括我在内█但为了获得足够生存的愿力▄█我们必须拥抱变化▄█亲手建设未来▄█这反倒让我们更能体会█人类的喜怒哀乐█▀█▄

怎么了，我亲爱的乘客朋友！请问，还有什么事情需要我的帮助吗？
What can I do for you, my dear passenger? Is there anything else you need help with?
I remember you! You're Mr. Wonton!
我不是一条猫，更不是一猫条，而是…一位猫条。希望您能记得。
I'm not a snack, and I'm certainly not a "wonton." I am... Meowton. I'd appreciate it if you could remember that.
I remember you! You're the station manager!
哈哈，您记得没错，很高兴为您服务。
Haha, that's right. It is my pleasure to be of service.
那您其实就是不记得了，我知道您平时忙，很多人想不起来情有可原。
In other words, you've forgotten. No worries at all. I imagine you meet so many people every day.
请允许我再次自我介绍一番，我是泊地站的站长——猫条。负责维系泊地站每日乘客往来交通。
Please allow me to introduce myself again. I'm the station manager of Perdido Station, Meowton. I'm in charge of the daily passenger traffic here.
如果遇到有延误的情况，欢迎您随时来找我。
If you run into any delays, feel free to come find me anytime.
对了，我还记得你们初来泊地站的情况，那些热情的粉丝可是把咱这围了个水泄不通，您还得是走咱们的「员工通道」才顺利离开。
Oh, and I remember your arrival at Perdido Station. All those enthusiastic fans had this place completely swarmed. You had to take the "staff only" route just to get out.
希望您现在能比之前轻松不少。
I hope things are much easier for you now.
Thanks again for your help last time!
哪里哪里，你们是二相乐园重要的客人，这是我作为站长应该做的，哈哈哈！
Don't mention it! For our honored guests in Planarcadia, it's all part of the service. Hahaha!
顺带一提！我是二维市第一铁道迷，你们所驾驶的星穹列车，是我心中排名历史前五的经典款列车——梦中情车停靠在月台上，其实我蛮幸运的！
