By the way! I'm the biggest train fan in Duomension City. The Astral Express you all ride is one of my top five favorite classic models. I'm so lucky to have my dream train parked at my platform!
不多说了，如果您没有别的事情，我就准备接着工作了！
Anyway, if there's nothing else, I should get back to work!
欢迎来到泊地站，亲爱的乘客{NICKNAME}。
Of course. What would you like to know?
You said you're a train geek?
纠正一下，我是二维市第一铁道迷。
Correction: I'm the number one train fan in Duomension City.
在这里，没人可以说他比猫条更懂铁道。
No one here knows more about trains than Meowton.
我拍摄过的列车可以办摄影展，我能闭着眼画出整个二相乐园的铁路线路，我还上传了铁路{RUBY_B#第一视角乘坐}POV{RUBY_E#}视频，获得很多点赞。

I've taken enough pictures of trains to fill a photo exhibit. I can draw the entire Planarcadia railway map with my eyes closed. And I've uploaded train {RUBY_B#Point-of-View}POV{RUBY_E#} videos that got tons of likes.
更绝的是什么，你知道吗？我能完整模拟列车驾驶的所有声音，包括行走音、汽笛声，以及各种报站的声音——
And you know what the best part is? I can perfectly imitate all the sounds of a train, including the chugging, the whistle, and all the different announcements—
猫条眼神锐利，似乎在暗示你让它当众表演一番。
Meowton's eyes sharpen, seeming to hint that you should ask for a demonstration.
你能演示下「满嘴跑火车」吗？
Can you show me your "train impression"?
你注意到，一名真正的铁道迷突然面色凝重，仿佛被列车神附身。
You notice the train fan's face become serious, as if the spirit of the locomotive itself has taken hold.
"Please do not rush to board the train."
*突然蒸汽迸发的声*，*明快的电子警告声*嘟嘟嘟，*列车的长笛声渐入*呜嗡——
*Sudden burst of steam* *sharp electronic warning* Beep-beep-beep *the long whistle of the train fades in* Whoooo—
*有节奏的轨道运行声*库库——库库——*激烈的风声*……
*Rhythmic sound of the moving train* Ch—Chug... ch—chug... *wind roar*...
*亲切的女性声音*「感谢您乘坐二维市地铁列车疾锋龙号，本次列车开往海原市，下一站是泊地站。」
*Pleasant female voice* "Thank you for riding the Bullet Wyrm express of the Duomension City Subway. This train is bound for Seafeld City. Next stop... Perdido Station."
*激烈的风声*，*列车减速时巨大的摩擦声*……
*Wind roar* *loud screech of the train slowing down*...
*亲切的女性声音*「请注意脚下，出口在左侧车门。」
*Pleasant female voice* "Please mind the gap. The exit is on your left."
*含糊不清、语速飞快的列车长声音*「请注意脚下，列车就要进站了」。
*Muffled, rapid-fire conductor's voice* "Please mind the gap, the train is now approaching the platform."
*有节奏的轨道运行声变慢*库、库——库、库——*像是卸掉气压的巨大摩擦声*，*明快的电子警告声*嘟嘟嘟……
*Rhythmic track sounds slows down* Chug... chug... *loud hissing sound like releasing air brakes* *sharp electronic warning* Beep-beep-beep...
*稳重的、带有回响的男性声音*「泊地站，泊地站到了。」
*Steady, echoing male voice* "We are arriving at... Perdido Station."
一人、一桌、一椅、一扇、一抚尺…啊不对，应是一人、一喇叭而已。
And then there's one person, one table, one chair, one fan, one gavel... Wait, that's not right. It's just one person and one megaphone.
My knees are knocking... I think I'd rather be leaving now!
你刚才说啥，我戴着耳机…
What did you just say? I had my headphones in...
你看见如此和善的脸上露出了一丝很容易察觉的愤怒。
You see a flash of obvious anger on their otherwise-friendly face.
不用演示了，我感受到了。
Okay, okay, I get it. You don't have to show me.
你注意到，一名真正的铁道迷满脸遗憾，它的表演欲望被压制住了。
You notice the train fan looks disappointed, their burning need to perform now extinguished.
现在，你相信我是二维市第一铁道迷了吧。
Now, do you believe that I'm the best train fan in all of Duomension City?
Could you tell me more about Perdido Station?
这是我工作的地方，也是我热爱的地方。
This is where I work, and I love it.
曾经这里被称为「幽灵车站」，原因无外乎官方线路图上没有这个站，或者是站台上空无一人，或者手机没信号……
This place was once called the "Ghost Station" for no other reason than the fact that it wasn't on the official route map. Or if there was no one on the platform, or no signal on your phone...
那时人们还将「去泊地站」叫作「前往异世界」。
At that time, people even called Perdido Station the "Gate to Another World."
是勤劳的政府，是热心的乘客，与我们携手改变了这些负面印象！如今「泊地站」一片生机勃勃、秩序井然的样子，离不开大家的帮助。
It was the hardworking government and the passionate passengers who helped turn things around! The vibrant, orderly Perdido Station you see today wouldn't exist without everyone's efforts.
最近有传言说，有不少乘客走不出8号出口。真是好笑…我们根本就没有8号出口！希望流言止于智者。
Lately, there's been a rumor going around that some passengers can't find their way out of Exit 8. Ridiculous... We don't even have an Exit 8! Let's hope the rumor stops with those who know better.
你似乎很喜欢星穹列车？
You seem to really like the Astral Express, huh?
当然，如果要我给历史所有的铁道列车排名的话，星穹列车是能够排进前五的，毫无疑问是我的梦中情车。
Of course! If I had to rank all the trains in history, the Astral Express would definitely make it into my top five. It's my dream train.
星际旅行的列车车头，采用了经典复古的造型——我认为仅凭这一点来看，「开拓」的审美就是非常在线的。
The front of this interstellar beauty carries a classic retro design. I think that alone proves the Trailblaze's aesthetic is absolutely on point.
我的评价已经非常高了。对不起，关于这点我绝不动摇。
That's already very high praise. Sorry, I won't back down on that.
Then you must envy me, huh?
我听说您在列车上还有个私人房间！你是世界上最幸福的人！
I heard you've even got a private room on the Express! You're the luckiest person alive!
谢谢，我没什么想问的了。
Thanks, I don't have any more questions.
没问题，和您聊天很愉快，有需要帮助的地方请开口。
No problem. It's been great chatting with you. If you need anything, just let me know.
谢谢，我没什么想问的了。
Thanks, I don't have any more questions.
没问题，和您聊天很愉快，有需要帮助的地方请开口。
No problem. It's been great chatting with you. If you need anything, just let me know.
欢迎乘坐疾锋龙列车「超级快」号，星穹列车的客人们。请坐稳扶好，不要乱跑！先下后上，有序乘车！
Welcome aboard Bullet Wyrm "The Superfast"! Passengers of the Astral Express, please hold tight and don't run around! Disembark first, board later! Let's keep things orderly!
I'd like to ask you something.
为乘客提供服务是我的荣幸！但请快一些，不要耽误疾锋龙列车的正常运行。
It's an honor to serve you all! But please, ask quickly. We can't hold up the Bullet Wyrm Express's schedule.
疾锋龙一族都是列车吗？
So, is every Bullet Wyrm an express car?
疾锋龙一族是列车形的幻造种，自然也大都以「列车」为天职。但并非所有疾锋龙都屈从于天职。
The Bullet Wyrms are train-shaped imagenae, so yes, most of us take "express trains" as our vocation. But not every Bullet Wyrm submits to fate.
最近刚有一位名叫「托马仕」的疾锋龙，成为了二相乐园治安局第一位疾锋龙治安官。
Recently, a Bullet Wyrm named Thomas became the first Bullet Wyrm security officer in the Planarcadia Security Bureau.
只不过托马仕的体型过于巨大，无法参与日常执勤，梦想中的火车追凶戏码也从没发生…唉，这家伙很值得敬佩，但它的追梦之路道阻且长啊！
It's just that Thomas is a bit too... well, oversized for regular duty, and his dream train-chase scenes never happened... *sigh* He's truly admirable, but his path to his dream will be a long one!
至于我嘛…哇哈哈哈，在轨道上奔驰就是我的天性，我并不打算违背它！
As for me, wahahaha! Racing along the tracks is in my nature. I have no intention of going against it!
你和星穹列车哪个比较快？
Who's faster, you or the Astral Express?
哼，听你的口气，似乎很轻视我的速度嘛～
Hmph, sounds like you're underestimating me!
你们星穹列车的跃迁能力我是比不了，但若是只比拼在轨道上奔跑的速度，我还真不一定会输！
Sure, I can't match the Astral Express's warp speed, but if it's just a race along the rails, I might just hold my own!
毕竟，虽然星穹列车是星神造物，但我们幻造种也是星神造物啊！乐子神和阿基维利谁跑得比较快？我觉得还得是我们的乐子神。
After all, while the Astral Express is an Aeonspawn, so are we imagenae! Between The Laughter and Akivili, who's faster? I'd bet on The Laughter.
把列车炸成两截之后，也没见祂被阿基维利撵上啊。
It's not like Akivili ever managed to catch THEM, even after THEY blew the Express clean in half.
不过口说无凭，等何时有时间，倒是可以找机会比试一番。哈哈哈哈！
But talk is cheap. When there's time, we should definitely have a proper race! Hahahaha!
Where do you go after work?
下班？哼，只有上班不快乐的人才想着下班！
After work? Hmph, only people who don't enjoy their jobs think about getting off work!
对我们疾锋龙而言，工作是充斥着幸福与快乐的。每时每刻，我们都被疾驰的喜悦充盈着，一点都不想下班！
For us, our work is filled with joy. It's our greatest happiness. Every moment, we're full of the exhilaration of racing at full speed. Why would we ever want to stop!?
更何况，那些在我们体内的乘客，也在持续用自己的愿力滋养着我们。
Besides, the passengers within us nourish us with their Wishpower.
当我们不早不晚，准时准点地将乘客送到目的地时，他们的幸福与快乐也会流向我们，让我们充满力量！
When we deliver them right on time, not early, not late, their joy and happiness flow into us, fueling our strength!
哼，「下班」…请别再让我听到这么没出息的词语了！
Hmph, "off work"? Don't let me hear such a phrase of losers again!
I'll leave you to your work. I must be going now.
再见！欢迎你随时搭乘疾锋龙列车「超级快」。
Goodbye! You're always welcome aboard Bullet Wyrm "The Superfast"!
I'll leave you to your work. I must be going now.
再见！欢迎你随时搭乘疾锋龙列车「超级快」。
Goodbye! You're always welcome aboard Bullet Wyrm "The Superfast"!
你好，亲爱的无名客！我是「小鳄鱼侦探俱乐部」的理事长。鄙俱乐部长期提供各种侦探服务，正适合你这种每天都在惹麻烦的无名客！

Hello there, my dear Nameless! I'm the director of Detective Croc Club. My club has long provided a variety of detective services, which are perfect for a Nameless like you who's always getting into trouble!
It's called "getting caught up in trouble," okay?
请不必在意这些细节。毕竟无论主动还是被动，「麻烦」的本质都不会变。
Potato, po-tah-to. Call it what you want. The point is, you've got troubles, and I've got solutions.
你能帮我解决什么麻烦？
So what can you do for me?
寻人、讨债、调查真相…其他侦探能做到的工作，我同样能做到。并且，我会做得比他们更加优秀～
Finding people, collecting debts, investigating the truth... Any case the other guys can take, I can crack. And I'm better than them, guaranteed~
你听说过「犯罪侧写」吗？从刚才见面起，我就一直在打量你，适当打理的灰色头发，一丝不苟又带有些许随意的穿着，如果大侦探没有推理错的话——
Ever heard of criminal profiling? I've been sizing you up ever since we met. Neatly styled gray hair, meticulous yet casually elegant attire. If this great detective's deduction is correct...
你也是「银河战力党」的玩家吧？我现在手头有很多「银河战力党」的相关商品亟需出手，又不方便找正规门店……
You're a Cosmicon Collective player, aren't you? I happen to have a lot of Cosmicon Collective merch I need to get rid of, and it's not exactly convenient to go through the proper channels...
那怎么可能呢？我这都是堂堂正正从附近小孩手里赢来的！是战利品！
Of course not! I won all this fair and square from the kids around here! They're my trophies!
这跟你的侧写有什么关系？
What's that got to do with your profiling?
诶，俗话说的好——推理模块基础，那商务模块就不能基础。你就让让我呗，卖卡嘛，不寒碜。

You know, they always say if you've got the basics down for detective work, you can't slack off on the business side either. So cut me some slack, yeah? I'm just selling cards. Nothing embarrassing about that.
总之，请记住这件事，亲爱的无名客——在二相乐园的几乎每座城市，你都能看到「小鳄鱼侦探俱乐部」的海报。只要找到那张海报，你就能找到我～
Anyway, my dear Nameless, just remember this: You can find posters for Detective Croc Club in almost every city in Planarcadia. Find the poster, and you'll find me~
无论你需要侦探服务，还是想要购买物美价廉的「银河战力党」相关商品，都可以来找我鳄鱼侦探。「小鳄鱼侦探俱乐部」一定会给到你最优质的服务。
Whether you need a detective or want to buy some quality, affordable Cosmicon Collective merch, you can always come to me. Detective Croc Club guarantees the best service you can get.
欢迎光临，亲爱的无名客！「小鳄鱼侦探俱乐部」竭诚为您服务！今天有侦探委托？还是要买点「银河战力党」的相关商品？
Welcome, my dear Nameless! Detective Croc Club is at your service! Do you have a case for me today? Or are you looking to buy some Cosmicon Collective merch?
看看你的「银河战力党」商店。
I'd like to see your Cosmicon Collective stock.
多谢惠顾，亲爱的无名客～
Thanks for your business, my dear Nameless~
你问吧。毕竟「满足好奇心」也算是侦探的使命。
Ask away. Indulging a little curiosity is part of the job for a detective.
你面前的这张海报，就是我的俱乐部。二维市的我将自己二维化，居住在这张二维的海报里。这样一来，就有了两个好处——
You're looking at it. This poster is my club. In Duomension City, I made myself 2D to live inside this poster, which brings along two great benefits.
第一，房租便宜，生活成本低。二维化的幻造种既不占地方，也不怎么消耗愿力。
First, the rent is cheap, so my living expenses are low. A 2D imagenae doesn't take up any space, and I barely use any Wishpower.
第二，我在二相乐园各处都张贴了自己的海报。这样无论你去哪座城市的哪条街道，只要找到这张海报，就能找到我鳄鱼侦探！每时每刻，都能为我的顾客服务～

Second, I've put my posters up all over Planarcadia. That means no matter what city or street you're on, if you find this poster, you've found Detective Croc! I can serve my customers anytime, anywhere~
但是也有一些坏处啦。比如这样一来，我就没办法亲赴现场调查了。
There are a few downsides, though. For one, I can't go to a scene to investigate in person.
其实我尝试过，比如把海报做成风筝，飞翔到城市上空吗，用俯瞰的方式进行流动的思考，我称之为「俯瞰流考」。
I actually tried it once. I turned my poster into a kite so I could fly over the city, letting my thoughts flow while I looked down from above. That's what I call my "Elevated Thinking."
但结果嘛…「放飞自我」的行动让我差点没把出生时的愿力都吐出来。
But as it turns out... that "letting loose" action nearly made me puke up every ounce of Wishpower I had.
所以从此以后，我决定还是安心做个「安乐椅侦探」。实在需要去现场，就委托别人替我我去吧。
So after that, I decided I was better off as an "armchair detective." If I really need someone on site, I'll just hire them to go for me.
There are a ton of detectives in this city!
是啊，二维市的「侦探」可太多了。这帮侦探甚至还组建了一个叫「二维市名侦探摸鱼潜水群」的团体，避免互相抢生意。
Yep, Duomension City is crawling with "detectives." They even formed a group called the "Duomension City Detective Slackers & Lurkers" to keep from stepping on each other's toes.
有些侦探实在太有名，甚至还有自己的粉丝团体呢！不过他们大多都是抓出轨，抓小偷小窃上不了台面的案件。
Some of them are so famous they've even got their own fan clubs! Though most of them just handle small-time stuff like catching adulterers and petty thieves, nothing exactly glamorous.
哼，依我看，这二维市的侦探千千万，能配得上「名侦探」称号的只有三位——绘世学院的「青蛙白板」、鸽川区的「不死途」以及市中心的「鳄鱼侦探」。

Hmph, if you ask me, out of all the detectives in Duomension City, only three deserve to be called a "Great Detective": Froggy Whiteboard from Graphia Academy, Ashveil from Dovebrook District, and Detective Croc from downtown.
可惜呀、可惜，青蛙白板早已退隐江湖，不死途又好逸恶劳，如今能够独挑大梁的，只剩下我鳄鱼侦探而已。
What a shame... Froggy Whiteboard retired a long time ago, and Ashveil is just plain lazy. The only one left to carry the mantle is me, Detective Croc.
你为啥在做「战力党」的生意？
Why are you dealing in Cosmicon Collective stuff?
做侦探实在太穷了…我真是因为热爱，才一直在做侦探业。要不然早就转行了！
Being a detective pays terribly... I'm only still doing it because I love it. I would've switched careers ages ago otherwise!
我是「影鳄」一族的幻造种。我们这个种族，是公司来航以后出现的新种族，诞生于二相乐园人对公司复杂的感情，
I'm a shadowcroc imagenae. We're a new race that appeared after the IPC came here, born from the complicated feelings the people of Planarcadia have for the IPC.
你应该没怎么见过影鳄吧？因为我大部分同族都选择了金融、证券或投资之类的工作，和我们生活在不同的世界。
You probably haven't seen many shadowcrocs, have you? Most of my kin went into finance, securities, or investment. They live in a totally different world from us.
不过，没有什么种族生下来就必须做什么，我们可以是任何人…所以，为了追梦，我成为了一名侦探。
But no race is born having to be something. We can be anyone we want... So to chase my dream, I became a detective.
…话虽这么说，但穷是真穷，饿也是真饿。所以最终我还是为生计做出了妥协，参与起了「银河战力党」相关的投机倒把……
Still, a man's gotta eat, and ideals don't pay the bills. Eventually, I had to get my hands dirty and get into flipping Cosmicon Collective merch...
往好处想，至少喜欢「银河战力党」的朋友找到一位可靠的卡牌商人——说话好听，长得可爱，价格实惠，还会点小推理，不是吗？

If you look on the bright side, at least fans of the Cosmicon Collective have found themselves a reliable card merchant. Sweet-talker, cute as a button, fair prices, and a knack for deduction to boot. What's not to like?
I have no other business for the time being.
亲爱的无名客，你要是听完我的心路历程，多少也有点触动的话…就请你多多照顾我的生意吧，嘿嘿。
My dear Nameless, if my heartfelt story moved you at all... then please, be a good customer, hehe.
I have no other business for the time being.
亲爱的无名客，你要是听完我的心路历程，多少也有点触动的话…就请你多多照顾我的生意吧，嘿嘿。
My dear Nameless, if my heartfelt story moved you at all... then please, be a good customer, hehe.
哎呀，小同学…看你一直*盯*着我，莫非……
Oh my, little one... You've been *staring* at me this whole time. Could it be...
在听到你的赞美后，眼前的妖怪怔住了。你仿佛看到它那仅存于设计草稿中因种种现实原因（很可能是资本）未能呈现给观众的眉毛扬了起来，恣意潇洒。

The strangeling before you freezes at your compliment. You can almost see its eyebrows, which existed only in the concept sketches and were never shown to the public due to practical reasons (capitalism, perhaps), lift with carefree grace.
在听到你的批评后，眼前的妖怪怔住了，似乎早在你开口前就已经接受了事实。它简约的瞳仁此刻仿佛就是*沉默*本身：漆黑、深邃，且都有六个。

The strangeling before you freezes at your criticism, as though it had already accepted the truth before you even spoke. Its simple eyes now seem to embody *silence* itself: dark, deep, and all six of them.
在听到「诡异」二字后，眼前的妖怪怔住了。它简约的瞳仁霎时间变得极具信息量——感性地说就是*浑浊*——随后扩张。像墨滴污染清水，直径前后变化约为<unbreak>0.75</unbreak>毫米。

At the mention of "weird," the strangeling freezes again. Its simple eyes suddenly brim with meaning: emotionally speaking, they turn *murky*, then dilate, like ink spreading through clear water, expanding by about <unbreak>0.75</unbreak> millimeters in diameter.
你知道，那是愤怒的信号。
You know that's a sign of anger.
…诡异？哦，我宁可诡异，也不愿意做二相乐园满地都是的可怜幻造种。概念无趣，相貌平平、平庸、庸俗、俗媚、媚俗、俗媚、媚……
...Weird? Oh, I'd choose "weird" any day over being one of those pitiful imagenae cluttering up Planarcadia. Boring concepts, plain faces, mediocre, tacky, vulgar, kitschy...
在一阵激烈的词语接龙后，它肉眼不可见地不再激动了。
After a sharp word chain, it becomes almost imperceptible that the creature stops being agitated.
…咳，失礼了。很高兴你也那么爱艺术并且有自己的见解。
...Ahem, sorry. I'm glad to see you love art so much and have your own unique perspective.
正式做个自我介绍吧：我是绘世学院第<unbreak>24</unbreak>届先锋艺术探索周暨二维市吉祥物大赛参展作品，视肉涂鸦。
Let me introduce myself properly: I'm Visaffiti, a piece from the <unbreak>24</unbreak>th Pioneer Art Exploration Week and the Duomension City Mascot Competition Exhibition at Graphia Academy.
如你所见，我是一件艺术品。这里是我的常设展览位，如果你喜欢小众先锋艺术，陶冶情操，欢迎随时来*欣赏*我。
As you can see, I'm a work of art. This is my permanent exhibition. If you like avant-garde art to cultivate your character. Feel free to come and *admire* me at any time.
愿我能成为你的灵感缪斯，而不是那个「诡异的涂鸦」。
I hope I can be your muse of inspiration, not that "weird graffiti."
又见面了，我就那么让你过*目*不忘吗？
We meet again. Do I really that impressive in your *eyes*?
是绘世学院第<unbreak>24</unbreak>届先锋艺术探索周暨第<unbreak>2025</unbreak>届二维市吉祥物大赛。*顾*名思义，它本该是一场先锋艺术家专属的阳春白雪，却在公司运作下成了人工智能的狂欢。

It's the 24th Pioneer Art Exploration Week and the 2025 Duomension City Mascot Competition Exhibition at Graphia Academy. As you can see, it was supposed to be an avant-garde event for elite artists, yet intervened by the IPC, it became a celebration for artificial intelligence.
哎！资本。艺术已死。「欢愉」已死。
Ah! Capitalism. Art is dead. "Elation" is dead.
Who can argue with that! I feel for you.
说真的，我一直在想：「纯美」陨落，公司也肯定脱不了干系。
Honestly, I've often thought: the fall of "Beauty," the IPC is surely behind it.
有考虑过从自己身上找原因吗？
You ever thought you might be the reason?
噢，当然。但如果这么想，一切都说不通！
Oh, of course. But if I think that way, nothing makes sense!
像我这么弱的幻造种，怎么有能力阻碍艺术的发展呢？再说了，我可是受害者，一*目*了然。
How could a weak imagenae like me ever stand in the way of art? Besides, I'm the victim here. Can't you *see* it?
你还是没解释清楚这个…大赛。
You still haven't explained this... Competition clearly.
噢，因为这不重要。所有比赛本质上都是黑幕。
Oh, because it's not important. All competitions are essentially rigged.
这么想能让很多事情变简单很多。我为艺术而生，逻辑推理不是我的强项。
Thinking this way makes things much simpler. I was born for art. Logical reasoning is not my strength.
Why do you look like this?
很多人都问过这个问题。毕竟，我这副模样在幻造种里算不上…呃，健康。
A lot of people have asked me that. After all, I'm not exactly considered... well, healthy by imagenae standards.
许多幻造种的生命走到尽头时，都会变成一坨像素，或者一滩颜料。但我恰恰相反，我天生就长这样——因为我主题如此。
When many imagenae near the end of their lives, they turn into pixels or blobs of paint. But I'm different. I've always looked like this, and that's my theme.
「《视肉涂鸦》表现了一种二相乐园、或者说画中世界视角下介于现实与梦境、新生与死亡之间的超现实境界，这无疑是一种潜意识世界的真诚反应……」
"Visaffiti represents a surreal space between reality and dreams, between life and death, viewed through the lens of Planarcadia or the World in Canvas. It's a true reflection of the subconscious..."
很可惜，我的创造者没有把这些话写在展签上——那家伙只说参考了匹诺康尼的爱德华医生，然后给我套了个和丰饶孽物一样的名字。
Sadly, my creator didn't write this on the exhibition sign. My creator was just inspired by Dr. Edward from Penacony, and gave me a name like an Abominations of Abundance.
二维市曾经风靡一时的形象大使，和我长得特别像：区别只是比我多了<unbreak>94</unbreak>只眼睛、一张嘴、一双手和一双脚。
Visaffiti was the once-popular mascot of Duomension City. It looks a lot like me, except it has <unbreak>94</unbreak> extra eyes, a mouth, hands, and feet.
说真的，我们要是放在一起，你肯定分不出谁是谁——但它就是能拿下当年的大赛冠军。
Honestly, if we were placed side by side, you wouldn't be able to tell us apart, yet it won that year's Competition.
抛开那些肮脏的交易不谈——它不懂得克制的美。
Putting those dirty deals aside, it doesn't understand the beauty of restraint.
Sounds like... there's quite a difference.
提示一下：区分我们的关键词是「克制」。
A hint: the key to distinguishing us is "restraint."
这或许就是是既*视*感吧。毕竟它和我实在是太像了，却不懂克制的美。
Maybe it's just *visual* recognition. After all, it looks so much like me, but it doesn't understand the beauty of restraint.
眼睛越多越好，颜色越亮越美，还有一大堆莫名其妙的包装：什么「百百」和一百只眼睛象征了二相乐园源远流长的历史和文化，银河无数思想的碰撞、交融……

The more eyes, the better; the brighter the colors, the more charming. And then there's all this nonsense packaging: something like "Unodred's" hundred eyes symbolize Planarcadia's long history and culture, the endless clash and fusion of thoughts across the galaxy...
不仅是这些，他甚至还有一套完整的人设！大赛评委听完都感动哭了。
And it even has a full character design! The judges were moved to tears hearing this.
后来，我的创作者也哭了——倒不是因为共情或者落选，只是语文成绩太差被劝退了。
Later, my creator cried too, not because of empathy or losing, but because his language grades were so bad he was kicked out.
那一天，身为艺术家，他成长了许多。
That day, as an artist, he grew a lot.
You know anything about Graphia Academy?
当然了解，我就在这里兼职当监控摄像头和心理疏导专家——顺便一提，主职是艺术品。
Of course I do. I work part-time here as a surveillance camera and a psychological counselor. My main job, though, is being an artwork.
想听什么八卦，我这里都有：你想听朱蒂同学和尼克同学的爱恨情仇，还是弥尔汉老师在机铠咖啡厅的兼职传闻？
Want some gossip? I've got plenty. Would you rather hear about the love-hate story between Judy and Nick, or the rumor that Professor Mirhan's working part-time at Mechatron Coffee?
当然，所以打死我也不会和你说的。
Of course, which is why I'd never tell you.
哼哼，已经有好几个学生被我折磨得抓心挠肝，一连几天没睡好了。
Heh, a few students are already losing sleep because of me, tossing and turning for days.
我想了解一点…更严肃的。
I'm hoping to learn something... a bit more serious.
校史？那你找错人了。这得找幻造课教室的<color=#dbc291ff>啵啵娃</color>老师。
The school's history? Then you've come to the wrong person. You should ask <color=#dbc291ff>Ms. Dollie</color> from the Imagenesis class.
如果是更限制级的…去找档案室的<color=#dbc291ff>青蛙白板</color>吧。我经常被它找去当*目击*证人，见过这所学校太多黑暗面……
If you're after something more... restricted, go see Froggy Whiteboard in the archive room. I've been called in as a witness by that one plenty of times, seen more of this school's dark side...
但根据劳务合同保密协议第三条<unbreak>24</unbreak>款，我不能透露任何作案方法细节，以免造成剧透。
But according to Article 3, Clause <unbreak>24</unbreak> of my labor confidentiality agreement, I can't reveal any details of those cases. Spoilers, you know.
今天的艺术欣赏就到这里了。
That's all for today's art appreciation.
已经充满灵感了吗？真可惜，我还没*看够*你呢。
Feeling inspired already? What a pity, I still haven't *seen* enough of you.
今天的艺术欣赏就到这里了。
That's all for today's art appreciation.
已经充满灵感了吗？真可惜，我还没*看够*你呢。
Feeling inspired already? What a pity, I still haven't *seen* enough of you.
需要我重复几次呢？这位同学，在学校里要保持安静！
How many times do I have to say it? This is a school, and you need to be quiet!
啊，原来这玩意会说话吗？
Whoa, so this thing can talk?
你怎么可以说是「这玩意」呢？看清楚了，我是藏在画中的妖怪！
How dare you call me a "thing"? Look closer! I am a strangeling hidden in the painting!
大家都说我是个安静{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
But everyone says I'm a quiet {F#girl}{M#boy}.
大家说的话，只是大家说的话而已。
Those are just empty words from empty minds.
我是绘世学院的教导主任海龙老师，你不认识我，我可记得你——
I am Ms. Seadrake, the Dean of Graphia Academy. You may not recognize me, but I remember you...
{NICKNAME}，你是在开学这天入学的，我记得没错吧？
{NICKNAME}, you enrolled on the first day of school, am I right?
您是在生日这天出生的吗？
And I suppose you were born on your birthday?
嗐，你以为我跟你闹着玩呢，我只是在提醒你，你应该被提醒的事情。
What, you think I'm joking with you? I am simply reminding you of that which needs reminding.
…我观察到一个现象，现在的学生都不太服从管教，多说一句都不爱听。
I've noticed a trend: Students today are not receptive to discipline. They don't want to hear a single word more than necessary.
Are you saying I'm being long-winded?
其实我也有反省过，我经常说着自己关心绘世学院的学生，但我总是在开会，让同学们感觉到有一些距离感，也是自然的。

Well, actually, I have reflected on this. I always say that I care about the students here at Graphia Academy, but I'm constantly in meetings. It's only natural that they feel a certain distance from me.
…这位同学，我也想多了解一些现在的年轻人，让我们再聊聊吧——
Hey, I do wish to learn more about the young people of today. Let us continue our conversation...
同学！有什么需要我帮助的吗？你可以完全不用客气，也就是说，你可以敞开说。
Hey there! Is there anything you need my help with? There is no need for pleasantries, which is to say, you may speak freely.
Of course, let's talk some more.
教导主任一般做什么呢？
What does a dean normally do?
通常来说是确保教学质量，教学计划、督导、研究和改革…另外就是学生的日常管理，学风建设、学生纪律等各方面都要管。

Typically, it involves ensuring the quality of education: curriculum planning, supervision, research, reform... and then there's the daily student management, which covers everything from academic conduct to student discipline.
In short, it's a lot of meetings.
并不是所有的教导主任都像我这样擅长开会的，你明白吗？在一般人看来，开会很枯燥很无聊，而在我看来，开会是一门艺术，非常先锋。
Honestly, not all teachers are quite as talented at chairing meetings as I am. Does that make sense? Most people find meetings dull and tedious, but to me, they're a form of art. Very avant-garde.
Since when did meetings need to be avant-garde?
And what's that supposed to mean, "art"?
你要我解释艺术是什么意思，这个行为本身就不够先锋。
The fact that you have to ask what that means is, in itself, not very avant-garde.
您说自己很关心年轻人？
So you wish to learn more about young people?
没错，相较雷虬这样的大妖怪，我还是个年轻人；相较于机铠们，我又是老前辈…我认为，我就像是年轻一代与年长一代之间的桥梁。

That's right. Compared to a great strangeling like thundercoil, I'm still young. But compared to the mechatrons, I'm an old-timer... I see myself as a bridge between the younger generation and the older one.
这是教学主任应该做的，为此我还学会了年轻人最喜欢的热梗和流行词——
It's what a dean should do. I've even learned all the popular slang and catchphrases the kids are using...
比如「芭比Q了」、「绝绝子」、「喜大普奔」…怎么样呢？
Like, uh, "It's cooked," "Totally slay," or "Understood the assignment"... How's that?
You need to go online... like, the internet of today...
哈哈，都怪旧新闻的信息太老了。时间过得还真是飞快呀……
Haha, that's what I get for reading old news. Time really does fly...
说起这个，我还很关心学生们未来的规划，我经常找不同的学生问他们「想象一下<unbreak>13</unbreak>年后的自己到底在做什么？」我希望他们能思考这个问题。

On that note, I'm also very concerned about my students' future plans. I often ask them, "Imagine what you'll be doing <unbreak>13</unbreak> years from now." I want them to really think about that question.
为什么要思考这个问题？
But why should they think about that?
你想想，时间会改变很多事，又有很多事不会改变，不是很神奇吗？
Well, think about it. Time changes so many things, yet some things never change. Isn't that fascinating?
就像从过去开始，我和雷虬的年纪就不断增加，但是惊人的是，我们之间的年龄差却是一点都没有变呢。
For example, thundercoil and I have been getting older since the beginning of time, but what's amazing is that the age gap between us hasn't changed at all.
我希望年轻人能够畅想未来，思考这其中的变与不变。
I wish for the young people to envision their futures, and to think about what changes and what stays the same.
没有什么特别的说法，只是我与学生的对话过程中突然福至心灵，在那思维的海洋深处，突然——
Oh, nothing special. I was just talking to a student when a sudden wave of inspiration hit me from the depths of my mind, and then...
I just saw the number "<unbreak>13</unbreak>" itself.
真的吗？没有任何实际的意义？
Seriously? It doesn't actually mean anything?
对的，没有意义构成了它震撼人心的冲击力。和年轻人说话，总是需要一些震撼人心的要素。
Exactly. The "meaninglessness" is what makes it so punchy. You've got to have that shock factor when you're dealing with the younger crowd.
您有没有觉得自己说话很绕…
Have you ever noticed that you tend to... talk in circles?
不，我不觉得自己说话很绕。
No, I don't believe I talk in circles.
我觉得我的说话都是经过思考的，是不假思索的。
I believe my words are both deliberate and spontaneous.
This right here is quite confusing...
Okay, now you've got me in the circles...
很好理解吧？最近我还参加了一场研讨会，被评价为说话一针见血。
It's easy enough to understand, isn't it? I was just at a seminar recently, and people said I really get straight to the point.
我说「学生翘课这种事，只在课堂上是抓不到人的」，在座的老师纷纷点头。
I said, "You can't catch students skipping class if you only look in the classroom," and all the teachers there were nodding along.
能不能说点大家不知道的呢？
How about telling us something we don't already know?
…呃，算了算了，你会这么觉得，只是我们之间的脑电波没有对上罢了。
Ugh... forget it. You only think that because we're not on the same wavelength.
如果还想和我交流，我随时欢迎，也就是说，你可以随时来找我。
If you want to talk again, you're always welcome. In other words, you can come find me whenever you want.
如果还想和我交流，我随时欢迎，也就是说，你可以随时来找我。
If you want to talk again, you're always welcome. In other words, you can come find me whenever you want.
诶呀，这不是姬子的伙伴吗？火花大会那件事以后，我们还没好好说过几句话呢。
Oh my, if it isn't Himeko's companion! We haven't had a proper talk since that whole business at the SparxiCon, have we?
说到那件事，我还真是要向你道歉…竟然没能看穿她的阴谋诡计。
Speaking of which, I really do owe you an apology... I totally didn't see through her schemes and tricks.
It's all Sparxie's fault. She was too cunning...
为人师表，可不能推卸责任。姬子信任我，才把面具托付给我，这件事说到底是我防范不周啊。
As her teacher, I cannot shift the blame. Since Himeko entrusted me with the mask, I should've been more careful.
It's our fault for being too late...
为人师表，可不能推卸责任。姬子信任我，才把面具托付给我，这件事说到底是我做得不妥。
As her teacher, I cannot shift the blame. Himeko entrusted me with the mask, so this was still my fault.
It's your fault for not seeing through her!
哈哈，你这话说得就很有姬子读书时的风范。确实是我的错，真抱歉。
Haha, that sounds just like something Himeko would've said back in her school days. You're right, it was my fault. I'm really sorry.
还是不谈这些了。你这次来找我，是有什么事吗？
But let's not dwell on that. So, what brings you here today?
又见面了，姬子的伙伴。今天找我有什么事吗？
It's good to see you again, Himeko's companion. Is there something you need from me today?
I'd like to have a chat with you.
当然可以。你想聊什么话题呢？
Certainly. What would you like to discuss?
姬子为什么这么信任你？
Why is it that Himeko trusts you so much?
我们算是忘年交了。在这所学校里，就属我和她关系最好了。
Our friendship transcends age. Out of everyone here at the school, she and I were the closest.
姬子在这读书的时候，性格可是相当爆炸。别说学生们了，就连老师有什么过分的言行，她都敢站出来顶撞。
Back in her student days, Himeko had quite a fiery personality. She wouldn't just stand up to students. Even teachers got called out if they went too far.
但也不知为什么，她对幻造和物理学的知识感兴趣——我以前在飞登行所之类的航天企业里干过一阵子。她总是问我星际航行相关的话题。
But for some reason, she was interested in imagenesis and physics. I used to work for a while at aerospace companies like AscendAir, and she was always asking me about interstellar travel.
时间一久，连生活里遇到的烦恼和快乐也会和我分享。你知道的，我行动不方便，只能乖乖听着她滔滔不绝地讲。
Over time, she started sharing the ups and downs of her life with me too. You know how it is. I couldn't exactly move around, so I just sat there and listened to her ramble on and on.
这大概就是她信任我的原因吧。
I guess that's probably why she trusts me.
What exactly do you learn in the Imagenesis class?
用最简单的话来讲，就是「使用愿力的技术」。
In the simplest terms, it's the craft of harnessing Wishpower.
在这个世界，不止是创造幻造种，很多事都需要使用愿力来达成。建筑、工业、医疗、农耕…「幻造」可以说是一切领域的基本原理。
In this world, it takes Wishpower to do many things, not just create imagenae. Architecture, industry, medicine, agriculture, you name it... And imagenesis is the fundamental principle behind it all.
愿力的使用绝不是只要有画笔和想像就能付诸现实的，要让幻造之物呈现符合经验认知与规律的结构，学生仍然少不了对自然科学的学习。

Using Wishpower isn't just about having a brush and imagination to make things real. If students want their imagenated creations to actually have structure that makes sense and follows the rules of reality, they've still gotta hit the books on natural sciences.
可以分享一些姬子的糗事吗？
Got any embarrassing stories about Himeko?
和别人大谈自己学生的糗事…有违老师的职业道德吧！
Gossiping about your students' embarrassing moments to other people... That's gotta violate the teacher's code of ethics, I'd say!
不过嘛…电视剧里不是常有这样的桥段吗？学生一不小心喊老师「妈妈」，引来了全班同学的哄堂大笑。
But then again... you know how there's always that trope in TV shows? The one where a student accidentally calls their teacher "Mom," and the whole class bursts out laughing?
这件事姬子也干过哦～只不过，毕竟是姬子，同学们全都噤若寒蝉，憋紫了脸也不敢笑——只有我一个人在大声嘲笑，哈哈哈哈。

Well, that happened with Himeko, too~ Except, since it was Himeko, the whole class was dead silent. They were trying so hard not to laugh that their faces were turning purple. I was the only one laughing out loud, hahaha!
后来，我被迫做了一个月她的拳击陪练，她才原谅了我。
After that, I had to be her punching bag for a whole month before she'd forgive me.
咳咳，这个话题还是到此为止吧！
Ahem... let's just leave it at that!
That's all I wanted to talk about.
有空的话，欢迎你随时来找我。
Feel free to swing by anytime you're free.
That's all I wanted to talk about.
有空的话，欢迎你随时来找我。
Feel free to swing by anytime you're free.
哔…哔哔哔_/\___/\____哔波！难怪本狸突然接收到了一串令人心潮起伏的信号，原来是浣熊大人来杂志社视察工作啵！
Zip... Zzz-zzap_/\___/\____zap! No wonder I suddenly picked up such a heart-pounding signal. It's Great Raccoon! Here to inspect our work, zip!
本狸现在一心只想和浣熊大人一起复兴杂志社，成为最可靠的狸记者！
My only mission is to revive the publishing house with Great Raccoon and become the most reliable furbo reporter ever!
听说你的本名…不叫幻太子？
So your real name... isn't Paraprince?
哔波，这是什么话，人家当然就叫幻太子。
Zap, what are you talking about? Of course my name is Paraprince.
浣熊大人一定听过百变狸猫的故事啵！狸猫一族是二相乐园的古老幻造种，能变成天上飞的疾锋龙，水里游的噗噜。

Surely the Great Raccoon has heard the stories of the Shapeshifting Furbo, right!? The furbo clan is an ancient line of imagenae in Planarcadia. We can transform into Bullet Wyrms that soar through the sky or ploos that swim in the waters.
只要想变，变成青春可爱的美少女什么的也不在话下。
We can even transform into an adorable young maiden if we so desire.
但你明明还是一只狸猫？
But you're obviously still a furbo right now?
浣熊大人看清楚啵，人家现在是<color=#dbc291ff>狸猫当中的美少女</color>！如果是要看人类眼中的美少女的话…有点可惜，浣熊大人现在积攒的愿力还不够啵！

Look closer, Great Raccoon. Right now, I'm a <color=#dbc291ff>maiden among furbos</color>! If you wanted to see a maiden by human standards... that's too bad. You don't have enough Wishpower for that yet!
I never said I wanted to see that...
哔…嘟……难道说，浣熊大人是主张狸猫不能随意变身的守旧派？正好正好，像我这样乖乖做狸猫的狸子，不多见啵！
Zip... zap... Don't tell me the Great Raccoon is one of those traditionalists who think furbos shouldn't just transform whenever they want? Perfect! A well-behaved furbo like me is a rare find!
Why do you need my Wishpower for that?
美少女的诞生来自于许下「想看美少女」的愿望的人，这很河狸。
A beautiful maiden is born from the wish of a person who wants to see one. That makes perfect sense.
哔波，被发现了！既然如此，就和浣熊大人说一说我的科学考察结果——
Zap! You noticed that, huh? Very well, I'll tell you about the results of my scientific investigation, O Great Raccoon...
经过我的研究，电视塔上的那只雷虬，一直在向二相乐园人发射不明电磁波！所以，本狸总是能听到一些神奇的电波讯号。

My research indicates that the thundercoil atop the TV tower is constantly emitting some unknown electromagnetic waves at the people of Planarcadia! That's why I'm always picking up these mysterious signals.
最神奇的是，整个二相乐园只有我能听得懂！虽然其他狸猫听不出来，但我接收到的每一句「哔波」，意思都不一样啵！
The most incredible part is, I'm the only one in all of Planarcadia who can understand them! The other furbo can't tell, but every "zip-zap" I receive has a unique meaning!
懂了，你就是传说中的电报员？
I see. So you're what they call a "telegraph operator"?
哔波，美少女狸猫幻太子电报员，参见啵！
Zip-zap! Beautiful maiden Furbo Paraprince telegraphist, reporting for duty!
哔波！太好了，浣熊大人和我对上电波了啵！
Zip! Fantastic! The Great Raccoon and I are on the same wavelength!
那你之前为什么躲着我？
Then why were you avoiding me earlier?
第一次见面，我怕生啵。当然，更怕熟——还请不要把咱做成狸猫火锅，我会好好干活的，拜托了！
I'm shy when meeting people for the first time. But getting to know them is even scarier! Please don't turn me into furbo hot pot! I'll work really hard, I swear!
哔波，浣熊大人，我会为了杂志社复兴好好干活的。
Zap! Great Raccoon, I will work my hardest for our publishing house's revival.
不管是从前，还是现在，《狸狸周刊》最可靠的狸猫记者必然都是我幻太子啵。
From the beginning until now, the most dependable furbo reporter at the Furbobo Weekly has always been me, Paraprince!
想听听杂志社从前的故事…
Tell me some stories about the publishing house's past...
知无不言，言无不尽，浣熊大人想知道什么，我一定全都告诉你。
I'll tell you anything you want to know. There are no secrets between us. Whatever Great Raccoon wants to know, I won't leave out any details.
Tell me about the last director...
哔波哔哔哔哔——特级警报触发！虚照大人特意关照过咱们，不要随便透露她的信息啵……
Zip-zip-zap-zap — Class-A alert triggered! Lady Nihilux gave us specific instructions not to reveal any information about her... zip!
你这不是说了她的名字吗？
But you just said her name, you know.
Furbulitzer already told me about her.
居然被普狸策抢了先，那…那我就斗胆和浣熊大人说一说。
Furbulitzer already spilled the beans? Th—Then I guess I can risk telling you a little bit, Great Raccoon.
说到虚照大人，本狸脑海中浮现出第一个词是：危险危险危险——
When it comes to Lady Nihilux, the first words that pop into my head are: Danger, danger, danger...
虚照大人最喜欢把「把你煮成狸猫火锅哦！」挂在嘴边，她发来的消息是一定要秒回的，但发给虚照大人的消息她是看心情回的。
Lady Nihilux's favorite catchphrase is, "I'll cook you into a furbo hot pot!" You have to reply to her messages the second you get them, but she only replies to yours when she feels like it.
大约很久很久很久以前，虚照大人还是发过薪水的…应该发过吧？记不清啵！不过大人在的时候…我们闲散啵！直到她回来的次数越来越少……
A long, long, long time ago, Lady Nihilux actually paid us... I think? It's hard to remember! But when she was here... we took it easy! Then she started coming around less and less often...
杂志社也越来越周转不开，我们斗胆汇报，只得到最后一条消息：我正在无限期休假中，接下来你们要骗、要偷袭都行，让星穹列车来的浣熊接手《狸狸周刊》吧^^

The publishing house's finances got worse and worse, so we mustered the courage to report it. All we got back was this final message: "I'm on indefinite vacation. I don't care if you have to lie, cheat, or ambush someone, just get the raccoon from the Astral Express to take over Furbobo Weekly. ^^"
于是…于是…就是浣熊大人看到的这样啵！
And so... and so... that's how things ended up this way!
哔哔，不是做局，浣熊大人是来做好事的啵！
Zap-zap, it's not a setup! The Great Raccoon is here to do something good!
So where did she go, then?
哔波！定位失败。但以我的直觉，虚照大人还会经常在某个角落看着我们啵！
Zip! Location tracking failed. But I have a gut feeling that Lady Nihilux is still watching us from somewhere!
——稳中向好，一定会稳中向好的！
It's stable and looking up! Definitely improving!
虚照大人说过：生而为人，即使身处险境，也要面带微笑、做好从容化为一锅鲜美至极的火锅的准备。抱着这样的气魄，浣熊大人必定会带着咱们复兴《狸狸周刊》啵。

Lady Nihilux once said: "Even when facing mortal danger, one must smile and be prepared to become a supremely delicious hot pot. With that kind of courage, Great Raccoon is sure to lead us to revive the Furbobo Weekly."
Did Lady Nihilux actually say that?
是我结合狸猫们的情况，添油加醋了一下啵！
I took the liberty of spicing up the story based on the other furbos!
Tell me more about the other furbos...
浣熊大人已经见过普狸策了，偷拍不好，但普狸策是为了杂志社好，笨手笨脚了点，浣熊大人别怪它啵。

Oh, you've met Furbulitzer, Great Raccoon! I know taking candid photos is bad, but he really did it for the sake of the publishing house. He can be a bit clumsy, so please try not to be too hard on him!
从前《狸狸周刊》有不少狸猫，但杂志社生意萧条以后，它们逃的逃，走的走，还有的卷走了大家压箱底的私房储蓄……
A lot of furbos used to work at the Furbobo Weekly. But after the publishing house fell on hard times... Some fled, others just left, and a few even made off with everyone's rainy-day funds...
我不怪它们，狸猫也有养家糊口的事要做。也许有一天，杂志社好起来了，它们也会回心转意，回来一起工作的。
I can't blame them, though. Those furbos have families to feed. Maybe someday, when the publishing house gets back on its feet, they'll have a change of heart and come back.
哔哔，当然，最值得托付重任的还是我幻太子！如果浣熊大人遇到了困难，就请传位于我…不，我的意思是我一定能帮浣熊大人分担啵。

Beep! Of course, the most dependable one of all is me, Paraprince! Should you ever find yourself in a pinch, Great Raccoon, feel free to hand over the reins to me... Ahem, I mean, I can definitely help you share the load!
That's all I wanted to know...
怎么才能听到哔波的信号？
How can I hear the zip-zap signal?
哔波！说到这个我就来劲了。
Zip-zap! Now you're talking! This is my favorite subject.
方法很简单，如果单凭两只耳朵听不到，在头上戴一个铝制的锅，就能接听到来自雷虬塔的神奇信号。
It's quite simple. If you can't hear it with your ears alone, just put an aluminum pot on your head. You'll be able to pick up the mystical signals from Thundercoil Tower.
从前我建议过一个噗噜这么做，但被治安官发现，勒令它摘下了啵！理由是破坏鸽川区的区容区貌。
I told a ploo to try it once, but an officer found it and made it take it off! The reason given was that it was "detrimental to the public image of Dovebrook District."
鸽川区有什么真正的区容区貌可言吗？他们放着共愿帮不管，却来管这些小事情啵。
Public image? Does Dovebrook District even have one? They let the Synwish Syndicate run wild, but get bent out of shape over trivial matters like this.
关于那位睡在隔壁的侦探…
Tell me more about the detective next door...
那位侦探，比虚照大人还神秘，本狸都不敢记住他的正脸，怕被他杀狸灭…不过，我也没机会记住，大部分时候他都在棺材里睡觉。

That detective... he's even more enigmatic than Lady Nihilux. I wouldn't dare to remember what he looks like, out of fear of being hushed... Then again, I've never really had the opportunity. He's usually asleep in his coffin.
幸好，他白天睡觉，晚上干活，和我们的工作日程不冲突啵！
Fortunately, he sleeps all day and works all night, so our schedules don't overlap!
You can do it! Drive the publishing house out of business.
哔哔！加油…不对！不能倒闭，杂志社红红火火，我们才能顿顿吃上油豆腐啵！
Zip-zip! Yeah, I can do it... No, wait! It can't go out of business! The publishing house has to be a success, or we won't get to eat fried tofu all the time!
在二相乐园，任何幻造种都可以成任何事！你也给我变——
In Planarcadia, any imagenae can be whatever they want! Now, it's your turn to transform!
进步这么大？报辅导班了？
You made so much progress? Did you get a tutor?
我爸在匹诺康尼教过我…
My dad taught me in Penacony...
Kids these days just ain't what their parents used to be...
I climbed up on the roof and everything!
I'm not some Origami Bird, tweet!
I drew a pen to do the drawing for me!
But it's even lazier than me, so...
It drew another pen to do the drawing for itself!
我都要爱上啵啵娃老师了！
I'm falling head over heels for Ms. Dollie!
If I have to repeat a year again, I'm...
No, I'm going to get an exclusive student ID number!
Another letter? How many is that this week?
你应该庆幸自己没收到…
You should be grateful you didn't get one...
Make the outline two millimeters thicker.
Do you even know how to draw...
Should be safe around here... Right?
有同学借幻造饵忘了还。
Someone borrowed imagenated bait and forgot to return it.
And then the wispae flooded the classroom.
Oh, I'd actually... like to see that!
I get it now. It was me! Kill me!
你基本可以告别推理了…
You can pretty much kiss deduction goodbye...
Come shopping with me! Pretty please!
没有你我都挤不进人群…
I couldn't even squeeze through the crowd without you...
Alright, when you get it, split it with me fifty-fifty.
I'm so done... Can someone teach me how to draw...
Let me see... Not bad at all!
Go home if you wanna sleep!
I've been having trouble sleeping lately...
Your lectures are better than sleeping pills.
In next month's School Sports Day!
Congrats! Which club was it again?
幻月游戏肯定被公关过！
The Phantasmoon Games must have been PR-managed!
Why else would it be so hilarious?
Why are you still hanging around at school?
Way to embarrass the Go-Home Club...
Student council? More trouble than it's worth.
You don't get it, it's an early-stage investment!
Time to collect last class's homework...
我作业被海龙主任吃了！
主任怎么没把你也给吃了！
How come the Director didn't eat you too!
小心踩到其他族的同学…
Watch out for students from other species...
I'm so embarrassed about my terrible grades.
现在的学生可真爱捣蛋…
Kids these days are such troublemakers...
Heh heh heh, back when you were young...
Weren't you a troublemaker yourself too?
No one can match my strength!
哈哈，我打赌你搬不动我。
Haha, I bet you can't move me!
I'm gonna be a security officer for sure!
I suggest you hit the gym for three years first.
Ugh, I'm beat, totally wiped out.
Having to use both hands and feet just to climb up a few stairs...
That show's getting crazier and crazier...
I was wondering if you'd be willing to...
Take your shift? Not a chance.
Mechatrons should be banned from arm wrestling!
Lightpaws should be banned in long jump competitions!
Why aren't we allowed to imagenate?
算了算了，不要拿命画画…
Forget it, forget it, don't risk your life for art...
Broke as hell, gonna have to fast this month.
The fitness club's looking for new members!
Join now and get free glove powder!
我更想和社长打上一场。
I'd rather have a match with the club president.
幽灵就该有幽灵的样子！
A ghost should act like a proper ghost!
This part of the chassis is just for decoration.
我要当上法人代表，改变这里！
I'm gonna become a legal representative and change things around here!
给他开场直播，当急救了。
Start streaming him, that'll be like first aid.
There can only be one queen bee in this school!
So noisy, can't a person get some sleep around here...
The PE teacher's still not here?
你们抢我的发明也没用啊…
Stealing my invention won't do you any good...
When I'm playing ball with the boss...
I can lose without even blinking!
Even if you're down in the dumps...
在鸽川区，总会有办法的。
There'll always be a way in Dovebrook District.
Treating me already? We just met!
Aw, don't be shy. Come on, let's go!
他们总算不敢招惹我了！
Finally, they know better than to mess with me!
So lonely... Time to crash someone's party.
The air in Dovebrook is so fresh.
That's right. Even the Phantasmoon over Dovebrook...
Professional carrying service for the Cosmicon Collective!
Taking you from rookie to the top of the leaderboard!
大姐头，你喝的不是冷笑话吗？
Ma'am, aren't you drinking lame jokes?
Join the Research Society of Happy Smiles!
Say goodbye to this miserable life!
给我个准信，什么时候办成？
Or maybe you'd like to know how nice and cool the bottom of the river can be?
再陪我去排队买游戏啊…
Come line up with me to buy games again...
Crowbars, ropes! Buy three and get one free!
We need to come up with a new promotional strategy.
我想到了，把门店的装潢…
I've got it. The store's decoration...
Let's change it to the Astral Express theme!
A gang's gotta look like a gang!
"How to Confess Your Love During a Gang Brawl?"
Business has been absolutely booming lately.
Out doing field research... so tired...
看看绘师的幻造直播好了…
Maybe I'll just watch an artist's imagenesis stream...
Emergency? Just how urgent can it be?
Work's done. That's a tomorrow problem.
Yeah, let's have some tea first.
站外引导图。它放在这里的目的，用正式的说法是：引导乘客前往站外目的地。用不正式的说法就是：请你速速离开。
A station guide map. Officially, its purpose is to direct passengers to their off-site destinations. Unofficially, It's basically telling you: "Please see yourself out. Promptly."
站外引导图会告诉你车站附近的主要建筑物、商场、学校、医院、公交枢纽、景点…但是它不会告诉你的是：我在泊地站很想你。
The station guide map will show you the major buildings, malls, schools, hospitals, transit hubs, attractions nearby... but what it won't tell you is: I really miss you here at Perdido Station.
突如其来的幻造种小百科——名字：疾锋龙；属性：电、龙；特性：幻造引擎；图鉴颜色：紫色；种族值总和：<unbreak>670</unbreak>。有着「认真」的性格。
Out of nowhere, imagenae mini-encyclopedia — Name: Bullet Wyrm. Type: Electric / Dragon. Trait: Imagenated Engine; Index Color: Purple. Base Stat Total: <unbreak>670</unbreak>. Has a Serious nature.
在遍布幻造的世界里，哪怕真实与虚构没有明确的界限…探索还是有「边界感」的。
In a world filled with imagenae, even if there's no clear boundary between reality and fiction... exploration still has its "limits."
激烈的撞色、富有张力的构图，夸张的速度线特效，共同营造出一种真实动感的视觉效果——它竟然只是一个空位待租的招商广告？
Bold color contrasts, dynamic composition, exaggerated speed-line effects, all creating this intense, kinetic visual impact. And yet it's just an ad for a vacant rental slot?
「快速、安全、便捷、环保——欢迎乘坐全银河最安全的疾锋龙列车」。显然使用「最」字违反了广告法要求，再说了，星穹列车的帕姆肯定不会同意……

"Fast, safe, convenient, and eco-friendly: Welcome aboard the safest express in the galaxy, the Bullet Wyrm Express." Obviously using the word "safest" violates advertising regulations, and besides, Pom-Pom from the Astral Express would definitely disagree...
但说真的，星穹列车的运行方式真的安全吗？这里，我们不妨留下一个悬念。
But seriously, is the way the Astral Express operates really safe? Well, let's leave that question hanging.
某些狂热的疾锋龙粉丝会对着墙上的海报痴笑，你可千万不要这样做啊。
Some overzealous Bullet Wyrm fans grin like idiots at posters on their walls. Whatever you do, don't you ever do that.
克拉肯名下的餐厅分店，鲜花、画架和颜料罐为这里平添了一丝高雅的艺术气息。
A branch of the Kraken restaurant chain. The flowers, easels, and paint cans lend the place a sophisticated, artistic vibe.
在「手机先吃」的时代，相比餐品本身，精致的摆盘和浪漫的环境似乎才更能满足摄像头的胃口。
In this "cameras eat first" age, fancy plating and a romantic setting seem more likely to satisfy a phone's appetite than the actual meal.
触目可及都是高雅的艺术作品，等待高雅人士品鉴。
Sophisticated works of art fill the view, just waiting for refined individuals to come and admire them.
海报的滚动频率被精准地调试过——让人刚好不能完整阅读一页内容，所以有时候为了看完海报的信息，不得不把所有海报都浏览一遍。

The scrolling speed of the posters has been precisely calibrated, just fast enough that you can't read a full page, so sometimes you have to go through all the posters just to catch the complete information.
一般来说，投放广告的位置要与目标用户高度重合，那么…玩具广告、游戏广告、甜品店的广告都在这里，它的目标用户究竟是谁？
Usually, ads are placed where they overlap heavily with the target audience, so... ads for toys, games, and desserts are all here. Just who exactly is their target demographic?
据说现代人类每天要接收<unbreak>5000</unbreak>条以上的广告，所以…你完成了今日目标吗？
They say modern humans are exposed to over <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> ads every day, so... have you hit your daily quota yet?
星穹列车俨然成为了二相乐园最热门的网红打卡点，或许，列车长该考虑收费参观了…你默默在星穹列车的账本上又记下了一笔。
The Astral Express has become Planarcadia's hottest viral tourist spot. Perhaps the conductor should consider charging for tours... You silently add another entry to the Astral Express's ledger.
这些家伙是怎么爬上这么高的车头的，还在上面乱踩乱跑，不知道去一趟洗车星要花多少信用点吗？你默默在星穹列车的账本上又记下了一笔。

How did these guys manage to climb up on such a high locomotive, running and stomping all over it? Don't they know how many credits a trip to Washtopia costs? You silently add another entry to the Astral Express's ledger.
看着星穹列车，你还记得踏上旅途那天的回忆——小三月趴在车窗上，向黑塔空间站的朋友们告别，而你也收获了全新的身份。

Looking at the Astral Express, you recall the day your journey began: March pressed against the window, bidding farewell to her friends at the Herta Space Station, while you also stepped into a brand-new identity.
「Oh～We will see，Come with me take the journey～」
"Oh~ We will see, come with me take the journey~"
「可燃垃圾、有害垃圾、可回收垃圾」。你为标准众多的垃圾分类感到疑惑。
"Combustibles, hazardous waste, recyclables." You're puzzled by the numerous waste sorting standards.
无论是各自有着怎样的面貌与经历，在严格的垃圾桶分类面前，都会自己找到入口。
No matter what appearances and experiences one has, when it comes to strict waste sorting, everyone will find their own way in.
我的国王，自你抵达二维市的那一天起，整个垃圾桶界都在低语着你的名字：{NICKNAME}。
My king, since the day you arrived in Duomension City, your name has been whispered throughout the trashcan realm: {NICKNAME}.
你注意到一个特别的分类提示：不好笑的笑话也是不可燃的垃圾…真是太贴心了。
You notice a special sorting hint: "Unfunny jokes are also non-combustible waste"... How thoughtful!
看见垃圾桶总是有一种亲近感，就像是在异国他乡见到了老友，即便它已经是别的形状了。
Seeing a trashcan can always inspire a sense of familiarity, like running into an old friend in a foreign land, even if it looks different now.
你注意到了，明明是科技如此发达的二相乐园，在很多小地方却尤其复古…比如说这种款式的自行车，说不定已经有数百年的历史了。

You've noticed it too. Despite being so technologically advanced, Planarcadia is surprisingly retro in details... Like this style of bicycle, which probably has hundreds of years of history behind it.
最朴实无华的交通工具，绝对节能环保，百公里只需消耗两个面包（仅理论值）。
The most down-to-earth mode of transportation, absolutely eco-friendly and energy-efficient. It only consumes two breads per <unbreak>100</unbreak> kilometers (theoretical value only).
曾有部电影作品讲述了，一个小孩和特殊幻造种骑着自行车，飞到了幻月上——电影大热之后，为了避免市民效仿危险驾驶，全面取消了前车筐。

There was once a movie about a kid and a special imagenae who rode a bicycle and flew to Phantasmoon. After the film became a huge hit, front bike baskets were completely banned to prevent citizens from attempting such dangerous riding.
嘤嘤嘤~在遍布幻造的世界里，哪怕真实与虚构没有明确的界限…探索还是有「边界感」的，不可以继续往前咯～
Snrk-snrk~ In a world filled with imagenae, even if there's no clear boundary between reality and fiction... exploration still has its "limits," so we can't go any further~
这干净的水口、光泽的漆面、严丝合缝的合模线，简直像从动画里直接开出来的…已经能够猜到杨叔走不动道的理由了。
The pristine water inlet, the glossy finish, the flawless mold lines, it looks like it came straight out of an cartoon... I can already tell why Mr. Yang can't move.
「请勿触摸机铠，任何损害公司资产的行为都需照价赔偿」。你看了看这些精美的包装盒，上面没有标价，是不是意味着摸了也是零赔偿？

"Do not touch the mechatron. Any damage to IPC assets will require full compensation." You glance at these exquisite display boxes. There's no price tag on them. Does that mean touching them equals zero compensation?
不同的机铠将头部与身体分离，然后头部会接上新的身体…合理推测，机铠脖子（如果那里能被称为「脖子」）以下的部分属于公共租赁范畴。

Different mechatrons can separate their head from their body, then attach the head to a new body... It's reasonable to assume that everything below the mechatron's neck (if you can even call it a "neck") falls under public rental territory.
机铠，屹立于大地之上。曾经机铠被当作是公司带来的异星文化…而现在，它已经是能够代表二相乐园的文化符号了——时代总是在不停地变化。
The mechatron stands tall upon the Earth. Once seen as an alien culture brought by the IPC... now it has become a cultural symbol that represents Planarcadia. Times are always changing.
你与二次元的世界，仅仅只隔了一层玻璃。只要、只要能够打破这最后的阻碍，你…就会被得到蓄意破坏财产相关的处罚。
The cartoon world is just a pane of glass away from you. If only... if only you could break through this final barrier, you'd... get charged with intentional property damage.
橱窗中的漫画角色来自《我们仍未知道那天于群星熄灭之时在熵增尽头歌唱的愚者与他那永无止境的最后一程忘记过去只记得自己是招财猫》。

The comic character in the display window is from We Still Don't Know What Happened When the Stars Went Dark That Day as the Fool Sings at the End of Entropy on His Endless Final Journey Forgetting the Past Only Remembering He's a Lucky Cat.
希望催更《苍天航路绒绒号》的粉丝能够搞清楚，这位「招财猫」不是模糊二维马老师。模糊二维马老师要是有招财的本事，她不会画漫画。
Fans pestering for Fluffy Across the Blue updates should realize this "fortune cat" isn't Blurry_QR_Colt. If she actually had the power to bring in money, she wouldn't be a comic artist.
随着黑白漫画向彩色漫画转型，这家漫画店也迎来了第二增长曲线。事实证明，人类的目光还是更容易被彩色吸引。
With the shift from black-and-white to color comics, this shop found its second wind, a proof that humans are naturally drawn to a bit of color.
大吃一惊！大惑不解！大惊失色！这是「BOOK-ON！」的三大经营宗旨，意在为读者带来意料之外的情感体验。
Shock! Confusion! Astonishment! These are the three pillars of BOOK-ON!, all designed to give readers an emotional experience they never saw coming.
招牌使用了特殊光栅工艺，转换角度便能看出裸眼景深效果。所以在招牌前摇头晃脑的游客并不是脖子不舒服。
This sign uses a special light barrier technique to create a 3D effect without glasses. So don't worry, the tourists bobbing their heads in front of it aren't having neck spasms.
「本店隆重推出诺布莱斯虫粘液特调，欢愉您的味蕾！」，听起来是可以和苏打豆汁儿坐一桌的饮品。
"We proudly present our special blend of Noblesse Worm mucus, a delight for your taste buds!" Sounds like something that can be placed on the same table with mung bean soda.
海报下面写这一行警示语：「禁止偷吃海报上的饮品！」看起来二维化的幻造种，有自己独特的觅食技巧。
Below the poster, there's a warning that reads: "DO NOT drink the beverages shown on this poster!" Looks like these 2D imagenae have their own unique feeding habits.
这家咖啡店的饮品都绿绿的，和你认知中的「咖啡」相去甚远。但如果这是姬子理解中的咖啡，那很多事就说得通了。
All the drinks in this coffee shop are green, far from what you'd normally think of as "coffee." But if this is what Himeko considers coffee, then a lot of things suddenly make sense.
二相乐园的人们非常热爱排队。也许因为排长队才得到的东西，会让人有一种历尽千帆的满足感吧。
The people of Planarcadia really love queuing. Maybe it's because getting something after waiting in a long line gives you that satisfying feeling of having gone through an epic journey.
人为什么要排队？因为队就在那里。
Why do people stand in line? Because the line is right there.
队伍缓慢行进，似乎永无尽头。搞不好这些正在排队的人，都已经不知道自己在排什么了。
The line inches forward at a snail's pace, seemingly endless. For all we know, these people in line might've already forgotten what they're even queuing for.
景观设计师计划用四季常青的绿树装点河岸。当他被确诊色盲时一切都已经晚了。
The landscape architect intended to line the river with evergreens. Unfortunately, by the time his color blindness was diagnosed, it was too late to change anything.
眼前的几棵树在「二相乐园年度风云树木」评比中包揽了前三名。
These trees right here took the top three spots in the Planarcadia Annual Tree of the Year awards.
灿黄的落叶缓缓飘落，像思念。
Bright yellow leaves drift down slowly, like memories of someone far away.
在二相乐园，商家并不需要费心回收这些玻璃瓶交还给供应商，它们会自己回到指定的箱子中。幻造艺术，很神奇吧？
In Planarcadia, shopkeepers don't need to bother returning glass bottles to suppliers, for they magically find their way back to designated boxes on their own. Imagenesis, pretty neat, huh?
每到幻月游戏期间，各类汽水饮料的需求量总是会暴增。看起来大家都喜欢一边喝汽水一边看热闹。商家也会抓住这数年一遇的良机，推出各种促销活动。

During the Phantasmoon Games, the demand for all kinds of carbonated drinks always skyrockets. Seems like everyone loves to have soda while watching the festivities. Merchants also seize this rare opportunity that comes only once every few years, rolling out various promotional campaigns.
前些年，曾有玻璃瓶团结起来争取劳动权益。因此现在饮料厂商大幅改进了饮料箱的设计，确保每个玻璃瓶都能在里面居住得舒心。

A few years ago, glass bottles united in solidarity to fight for their labor rights. As a result, beverage manufacturers have greatly improved their crate designs to ensure every glass bottle can live comfortably inside.
「我们不生产家具，我们只是家具的搬运工。」海报上如此写道，其实你对它也没有更多的期待。
"We don't make furniture. We just move it." So says the poster, and you honestly didn't expect much more than that.
要添购些家具吗？星穹列车在天上期待地看着你。
Thinking of buying some furniture? The Astral Express is watching you from above with high hopes.
听说有人在家具城里能够以一挡百。如果有机会，你不介意也试试。
Word is someone in the furniture store can single-handedly take on a hundred opponents. If the opportunity arises, you wouldn't mind putting that to the test.
该路段正在紧急修复中，修复时间未定，请千万不要耐心等待。
This section is under emergency repairs with no estimated time of completion. Please do NOT wait around!
有些人说「世上没有错误的道路」。他们错了，显然有。这不就是吗？它都报错了。
Some people say, "there are no wrong paths in the world." They're wrong, and obviously there are. Just look at this one, an Error Pop-up on the road.
拦住你道路的是名为「错误弹窗」的幻造种。这一种族数量稀少、沉默寡言、社会职能单一，很多人都不知道它们竟然也是智慧生命。
Blocking your path is an imagenae known as "Error Pop-up." This rare species is quiet and reserved, with a singular social function, so much so that many don't even realize they're sentient beings.
温馨提示：在二相乐园，随意询问店家「这里是否销售猫屎咖啡？」有可能构成「骚扰罪」，最严重可被判处6个月社区劳动。如果你一定想问，请确保店员不是轻脚族。

A friendly reminder: Asking for "civet coffee" in Planarcadia might count as harassment, potentially earning you six months of community service in severe cases. If you absolutely have to ask, make sure the staff member isn't a lightpaw.
二相乐园的「咖啡」并非依靠「咖啡因」，而是依靠其中「想要清醒」的愿望。采集这种愿望，会导致被采集愿望的幻造种赖床不起。很残忍吧？没有买卖就没有赖床。

The "coffee" in Planarcadia doesn't contain "caffeine," but rather the desire to "stay awake" within it. Harvesting this desire causes the imagenae whose wishes are harvested to oversleep. Cruel, isn't it? No trading, no oversleeping.
二相乐园的「咖啡」与银河社会普遍理解中的「咖啡」根本不是同一种饮品，只是口感相似而已。而这里正是列车咖啡杀手姬子出生长大的地方…哦…你逐渐理解了一切。

The "coffee" in Planarcadia is a completely different drink from what's commonly known as "coffee" in the cosmic society. They just happen to taste similar. And this is where Himeko, the Express Coffee Killer, was born and raised... Oh... now you're starting to understand everything.
「伊磨吉」也是一种「文字」。只不过它们不负责传达任何具体的信息，而专门被用于传达情绪。
"Emotis" are also a form of text. They just don't convey any specific information, but are purely used to convey emotions.
这些的对话框的飞行速度相当快，因此也被当地人称为「弹幕」。二维市的医院每年都会收治不少被「弹幕」撞伤的患者。
These dialogue boxes fly at quite a high speed, which is why locals call them "bullet comments." Duomension City's hospitals treat numerous patients knocked and injured by them every year.
在二相乐园，人们在交流中越来越依赖于「伊磨吉」。年轻人更倾向于进行纯粹的情绪表达，因为已经很难再靠讨论具体的信息得出任何共识了。

In Planarcadia, people have become increasingly reliant on "emotis" to communicate. Young people tend to express pure emotions, as it has become nearly impossible to reach any consensus through discussing concrete information.
前方并没有任何事物正在被加载。这个转来转去的圈圈只是装饰。
Nothing is actually loading ahead. This spinning circle is just for decoration.
据说盯着这个转来转去的加载动画，会被催眠。仔细盯着它看，你会感到自己很困…很困…很困…然后，你会感到自己充满自信、无所不能、永远不会被困难打败！

They say staring at this spinning loading animation can hypnotize you. Keep your eyes on it, and you'll feel sleepy... sleepy... sleepy... and then, you'll feel full of confidence, omnipotent, and invincible!
很好奇这背后藏着什么？请相信，这里面什么东西都没有。至少没有你会感兴趣的事物。
Curious about what's hidden behind this? Trust me, there's nothing in here. At least nothing you'd be interested in.
绘制着「怪盗变化狸」的海报。追随者眼中济富济贫的侠盗，治安官案卷中的愿力小偷。
A poster of the Phantom Furbomorph. A heroic rogue to their fans, but just another Wishpower thief to the security officers.
怪盗变化狸虽已不在江湖，但江湖依然流传着它们的传说。
The Phantom Furbomorph may have retired from the world, but its legend lives on.
怪盗变化狸在作案时真的会摆出如此摇滚的手势吗？至少它们的粉丝是如此坚信着。
Do they really strike such rock-and-roll poses while on the job? Their fans certainly seem to think so.
你看出来了吗？我是幻月同款，请叫我「小月月」。
Can't you tell? I'm styled after the Phantasmoon itself. You can call me "Moonie."
干脆我也办个「小幻月游戏」吧，胜者可以成为一分钟的伊磨吉。
Why don't I just host my own "Mini Phantasmoon Games"? The winner gets to be an emoti for a whole minute.
在二相乐园，任何幻造种都可以成任何事！你也给我变——
In Planarcadia, any imagenae can be whatever they want! Now, it's your turn to transform!
狸狸通信杂志社的狸猫有一个习惯——即便办公室有一台二手咖啡机，但是大家还是会下单点外送的咖啡，到底是为什么呢？
The furbos at Furbobocom Magazine have a weird quirk. Even with a perfectly good second-hand coffee maker in the office, they still insist on ordering delivery. I wonder why?
「欢迎收听校园杂谈频道♪我是你们亲爱的广播先生——」热情的嗓音伴随每次课间铃声准时响起，回荡在室内每个角落，「接下来是最新校园消息……」

"Welcome to Campus Talk Radio ♪ This is your beloved Radio Host..." The enthusiastic voice rings punctually with every class break bell, echoing through every corner of the room, "And now for the latest campus news..."
作为公告栏主持人，广播先生有着无可摘指的工作热情与素养；但很可惜，很多事情并不是只要努力就够了——音量槽上大大小小、深浅不一的指印早已说明了一切。

As the bulletin board host, Mr. Broadcast had an impeccable work ethic and professionalism. Unfortunately, effort alone isn't always enough, as evidenced by the countless finger marks of varying sizes and depths on the volume slider.
「广播先生有三好：声大、话痨、关不掉。」
"Mr. Broadcast has three wonderful traits: Loud, chatty, and impossible to turn off."
该公告栏常以新闻形式，播报校内重大消息，包括但不限于：活动通知、批评通报、失物招领，奖学金名单……

The bulletin board regularly broadcasts important campus news in a newsletter format, including but not limited to: Event announcements, disciplinary notices, lost and found items, scholarship recipient lists...
这个公告栏常年由「电视妹妹」负责播报。全校师生都很喜欢「电视妹妹」，但竟然没有一个人记得她是何时入职的。
This bulletin board has always been managed by Ms. Telly. Everyone at school loves her, but surprisingly, no one remembers when she was actually hired.
许是你的目光在屏幕上驻留太久，大厅上空的纸鹤们突然纷纷转向你，随即带着电流的声音幽幽响起：「你…想上电视吗？」

Perhaps because your gaze lingered too long on the screen, the paper cranes floating above the hall suddenly all turned to face you. Then, with an eerie electrical crackle, they spoke: "Would you... like to be on TV?"
当你看到这段话，请提醒自己去喝杯水。记得不要总喝含糖饮料哦。
When you see this message, remember to drink some water. And don't forget, try not to drink too many sugary beverages!
饮水机上的眼睛滴溜溜地转动着。它是绘世学院的健康饮水监督员。
The eyes on the drinking station swiveled around playfully. It's the healthy hydration monitor of Graphia Academy.
水灵灵的眼睛滴溜溜地转动着。这可能是你见过最水灵灵的眼睛。
The bright, sparkling eyes swiveled around playfully. These might be the most crystal-clear, lively eyes you've ever seen.
七步洗手法：第一步，揉搓；第二步，交叠揉搓；第三步，缠绕交叠揉搓；第…好吧，你编不下去了——这不就是两条触手扭来扭去相互缠绕吗！

Seven-step hand washing: Step 1, rub. Step 2, overlap and rub. Step 3, intertwine, overlap and rub. Step... oh forget it. You can't make anything else up. Anyway, it's just two tentacles twisting and wrapping around each other!
你不知道它究竟有没有洗干净，但你知道自己现在很饿，想吃海鲜。
You're not sure if it's properly cleaned, but you know you're hungry and craving seafood.
或许对于某些希望回归大海的人而言，这幅海报上的画面堪称赏心悦目——但很可惜，你并不在此列。
For some individuals keen on returning to the ocean, this poster might be a feast for the eyes, but unfortunately, you're not one of them.
绘世学院优秀毕业生——姬子。
Himeko, Outstanding Graduate of the Graphia Academy.
这是姬子小时候的样子？她真好看。
Is this what Himeko looked like when she was young? She's so pretty.
哇！姬子竟然还有这么年轻的时候？总感觉她从一出生开始就是可靠的领航员了。
Wow! So Himeko was actually this young once? I always thought she was born as a reliable Navigator!
姬子小姐年轻时，果然也是飒爽的模样。
Miss Himeko must have been quite stylish in her younger days.
年轻时的姬子啊…唉，突然有些莫名地怀念起…不，虽然容貌相似，也同样是了不起的人物，但那并不是她，不可混淆。
Young Himeko... *sigh* I suddenly feel rather nostalgic... No, although they look similar and are both remarkable people, that's not her. I mustn't confuse them.
Ah... why is this thing still here?
星穹列车的领航员，似乎早在青葱岁月就是个光彩夺目的人。
The Navigator of the Astral Express seems to have been a dazzling figure since her youth.
若是你坐上了乐园首席执行官的位置，你也可以在不同学校的校长办公室中有一幅自己的画像。
If you ever became the CEO of Arcadia, you'd probably have your portrait hanging in every principal's office, too.
别吃我，我保证不拖稿了还不行吗？！ ——小田田•走路菇
Don't eat me! I'll stop missing deadlines, alright!? — Paddy the Walking Mushroom
任何照片挂在这里，都像是名人；任何句子写在这里，都像是名言。——无名氏
Any photo hung here looks like a celebrity portrait. Any sentence written here sounds like a famous quote. — Nameless
此处怕是全校最地位分明的地方——最大的金杯站C位，银杯负责侧光补亮，奖状与照片循规蹈矩地蜗居相框里，无声充当着背景板。

This must be the place with the clearest hierarchy in the whole school: The biggest gold trophy commands the center stage, the silver trophy provides supporting lighting from the sides, while certificates and photos dutifully huddle in their frames, silently serving as the backdrop.
对周围的异样视而不见，此乃成熟的标志——别误会，说的是那边的奖杯。
Turning a blind eye to oddities around you is a sign of maturity. Don't get me wrong, I'm talking about that trophy over there.
请听题——什么东西既在这里，又不在这里？锵锵～答案当然是——「桌上量子奖杯」！这种家中常备妙妙道具，应该很容易想到吧？

Pop quiz time! What's something that's both here and not here? Ta-da~ The answer is, of course, the "Quantum Trophy on the Table"! It's such a common household gadget, you must've figured it out right away, right?
除去普通的行政管理、学术科研、学生信息等，还收录各种版本的校园传说。但这不是重点，重点是：这些档案都是活的，偶尔还会去老饕小巷团建。

Besides the usual administrative stuff, academic research, and student info, it also contains various versions of campus urban legends. But that's not the kicker. Here's the real deal: These files are alive, and they occasionally go for team outings in Yum Yum Alley!
某些特殊档案的查询遵循「等价交换」原则：比如当试图查找某位老师的黑历史时，你的挂科成绩单有概率出现在校园公告栏上——请谨慎借阅。

Accessing certain special files follows the "Quid Pro Quo" principle. For instance, when attempting to dig up dirt on a professor, your failed grades might mysteriously appear on the campus notice board. Please borrow with caution.
据说其中大部分档案都由旁边自称名侦探的*被诅咒之物*「青蛙白板」整理而成——某种意义上，比起名侦探，档案管理员这个职业似乎更适合他。

Rumor has it that most of these archives were organized by the self-proclaimed detective, cursed object Froggy Whiteboard, nearby. In a sense, an archive administrator might be a more fitting path for him than a detective.
咯咯咯，你听说过「细长鬼影」吗……
Hehehe... have you heard the legend of the "Slender Man"?
《覆世沧浪图》，绘世的遗作。她就是历史上，「幻造」出一个完整的位面，将整个二相乐园收入画中的绘师。
Worldbreaker Waves, the final masterpiece by Graphia. She's the legendary artist who managed to imagenate an entire dimension, capturing all of Planarcadia within her work.
「引鸽川之水抹消错笔，不意呈浪花之形，遂挥毫作此景画，以诠物形之妙。」
"While using Dovebrook water to erase a mistake, it unexpectedly formed the shape of waves, so I wielded my brush to create this scene, illustrating the wonders of natural forms."
每届新生入学时，总被叮嘱要对着最高的浪头行礼——据说曾有位学长虔诚一拜，第二天庭中浪花就洒到试卷上，帮他答对了三道选择题。

Every year, freshmen are told to bow to the highest wave. Legend has it that when a senior student once made a sincere bow, water droplets from the courtyard splattered onto his exam paper the next day, helping him get three multiple-choice questions right.
作为专业的「学力测试之眼」，其通常能精确测试出学生资质与成绩变化趋势，出具《学习潜力报告》。但偶尔会将通宵打游戏的亢奋误判成了学习潜力。

As a professional-grade Eye of Academic Assessment, it can usually accurately measure students' aptitude and academic performance trends, producing Academic Potential Reports. However, it occasionally misinterprets the excitement from pulling all-nighters gaming as learning potential.
镜片具有扫描功能，能够实时读取学生的脑电波，锁定每个在课堂上开小差的家伙，并在镜片上投影其姓名学号。
The lenses have a scanning function that can read students' brainwaves in real-time, lock on to anyone daydreaming in class, and display their names and student IDs right on the lens display.
学生间流传的反测试秘诀：考前对着它疯狂眨眼，《学习潜力报告》会自动生成「此子必成大器」或「此子必成大患」…但这样的行为，只不过是掩耳盗铃罢了。

There's this anti-test "hack" that students pass around: Frantically blink at it before exams, and the Academic Potential Report will automatically generate either "This one's destined for greatness" or "This one's destined for trouble"... but that's just burying their heads in the sand.
二相乐园的每所高校都存在这种「不良少年之顶点」的王座。但绘世学院的校风很好，所以顶点的争霸战烈度也很低。
Every school in Planarcadia has a throne for the "King of Delinquents." But since Graphia Academy has such a good school culture, the fights for the seat aren't exactly intense.
据说学生间会定期举办擂台赛，以争夺该王座的使用权——人称：「王座保卫战」。而对应的擂主，也被称为「王座级强者」。
Word has it that students regularly hold tournaments to compete for the right to use this throne. They call it the "Throne Defense Wars," and the winner is crowned a "throne-tier warrior."
校园论坛上有一则「巅峰王座使用指南」，核心内容是教人如何用体操动作从摇晃的椅子上安全着陆——比物理课受力分析实用多了。
There's a Apical Throne Manual on the campus forum, mainly teaching readers how to safely land from a rocking chair using gymnastics moves. Way more practical than force analysis in physics class.
校方为了鼓励学生全面发展、充分培养个人兴趣所举办的活动之一。但据说比起书法，参与者们更感兴趣的其实是报名后奖励的学分。

One of the activities organized by the school to encourage students' well-rounded development and cultivate their personal interests. However, it's said that participants were more interested in the course credits awarded after registration than the actual calligraphy.
有些书法作品或许需要借助想象力，才能知道上面究竟写了什么。你只觉得它们看起来像是鬼画符，或者心电图。
You might require some imagination to figure out what's actually written on some of these calligraphy works. They look like paranormal scrawling or an electrocardiogram reading to you.
你很好奇：其中有多少笔走龙蛇的作品，其实是学生们交作业前一晚疯狂赶稿的产物。
You wonder: how many of those masterful strokes were actually the results of students' frantic, last-minute cram on the night before assignments were due.
「有一条狗来到酒馆，说：『我什么也看不见。我猜我要打开这个。』」这是人类最古老的笑话之一，但已经没有人知道它好笑在哪里了。（推测可能是谐音梗或双关语。）

"A dog walks into a tavern and says, 'I can't see anything. Guess I should open this.'" It's said to be one of the oldest human jokes, but no one remembers why it was funny anymore. (Presumably it involved a pun or wordplay.)
现在，来试试创作符合这个时代的笑话吧！请在空白处填写你认为好笑的回答：「有一条狗来到酒馆，说：『我什么也看不见。』酒保说：『_______________』」

Now, let's try creating a joke that fits this era! Fill in the blank with what you think would be funny: "A dog walks into a tavern and says: 'I can't see anything.' The drinksmith goes: '_______________'"
「有一条狗来到酒馆，说：『我什么也看不见。』酒保说：『我去！这条狗怎么会说话！』」好吧，这个应该没有你想出来的好笑。
"A dog walks into a tavern and says, 'I can't see anything.' The drinksmith goes, 'Holy cow! A talking dog!'" Yeah, yours will probably be way funnier than that.
这些酒桶中的佳酿正在发酵中，现在还只是酸涩的果汁。
The wine in these barrels is still fermenting. Right now, it's just sour fruit juice.
愚者们每天都要对着这些酒桶讲笑话。据说发酵时听到的笑话越好笑，酿成的佳酿就会越带劲。
The Fools tell jokes to these barrels every day. Rumor says the better the jokes heard during fermentation, the better the wine kicks.
偶尔会有悲悼伶人潜入进来，对着酒桶开始发了狂似地伤春悲秋。这样酿成的醋质量也很高，仙舟人很喜欢，蘸饺子蘸包子都很好吃，拿来做锅包肉更是一绝。

Sometimes, Mourning Actors sneak in to weep over the barrels. It turns out that much sorrow makes for top-tier vinegar. Xianzhou folks love that stuff for their dumplings and buns, and it's downright divine on sweet-and-sour pork.
告示牌上用不容置疑的口吻写道：「阿哈、悲悼伶人，禁止入内！」
The sign states in an unequivocal tone: "No Entry for Aha and Mourning Actors!"
同一个桶里似乎同时存在着红葡萄佳酿、白葡萄佳酿和不含葡萄的葡萄佳酿。不合逻辑？拜托…这可是假面愚者的酒窖！
Red wine, white wine, and even "grape-less" grape wine all seem to come from the same barrel. Doesn't make sense? Well, this is a Masked Fool's cellar, after all!
你隐约记得，花火把桑博的愚者面具藏在了这的酒桶里。（注：详见《假面双人舞》。）说不定还有哪个酒桶中也藏着点宝贝？
You vaguely remember that Sparkle hid Sampo's Fool's Mask in one of these wine barrels. (Note: See Masquerade Duet.) Who knows, maybe there are more treasures tucked away here?
笑话与佳酿都能让人沉醉，但它们之间亦有区别：酿好的原浆要进行陈酿，写好的笑话却要趁着新鲜讲出。
Jokes and alcohol can both intoxicate, but here's the difference: unfiltered beer needs aging, while a good joke needs to be told while it's fresh.
镜子里映不出你的面庞——因为你太完美了，你的魅力无法被一面无趣的镜子所体现。绝对不是因为我们技术上做不到低场景性能消耗的真镜面反射。绝对不是。

The mirror can't reflect your face, because you're too perfect, your charm simply can't be captured by a boring old mirror. It's definitely not because we technically can't handle real-time mirror reflections without tanking the performance. Definitely not.
水龙头搭载了「情绪感应系统」，能根据使用者当时的心情流出与之对应的液体，包括但不限于：汽水、清酒、麦茶、辣椒油……
The faucet is equipped with an "emotion Sensing System" that dispenses liquids corresponding to the user's current mood, including but not limited to: soda, sake, barley tea, chili oil...
愚者们从一位求药使那里买来了这里的洗手液，代价是帮助他对付自己那凶暴的老丈人。这种绿色的洗手液不但能疗伤止血，就连断肢再生也不在话下。

The Fools bought this hand sanitizer from an Elixir Seeker, in exchange for helping him deal with his ferocious father-in-law. This green hand sanitizer not only heals wounds and stops bleeding, but can even regenerate severed limbs like it's no big deal.
出淤泥而不染，濯清涟而不妖。
Like a lotus rising from the mud, untainted. Bathed in clear ripples, yet natural and pure.
假面愚者有自己的园林艺术。
The Masked Fools have their own art of gardening.
品味独特的WIFI热点装置，可通过有序按压后方冲水键，进行网络连接。
A uniquely stylish Wi-Fi hotspot device that connects to the network by pressing the rear flush buttons in the correct sequence.
在酒馆里怎么会有个办公室？难道这帮人喝完佳酿以后还要加班？那也太惨了吧！
Why is there an office in the tavern? Don't tell me these folks have to work overtime after drinking! That's just too sad!
屏幕上正在运行一款帝垣琼玉游戏、一款挂机经营游戏、《银河战力党Online》、以及《折纸小鸟对对碰》…到底什么神人能同时玩这么多游戏？
The screen's running a Celestial Jade game, an idle management game, Cosmicon Collective Online, and Origami Bird Clash... Who on the cosmos can play this many games at once?
据说有些愚者来到这里，假装进行「严肃」「正常」的工作来作为休闲。看来，任何「欢愉」一旦成为了日常生活，也就和「加班」没啥区别了。

Word has it that some Fools come here pretending to do "serious" and "normal" work as a form of recreation. Well, it seems once any Elation becomes part of daily life, it's no different from overtime.
这是什么？折纸小鸟！没想到在匹诺康尼梦境之外的地方，竟然还能见到这些小东西。
What's this? An Origami Bird! Never thought I'd see these little things outside of Penacony's dreamscape.
酒馆内算是个版权的法外之地，你能看到各种盗版制品，这些折纸小鸟也不例外。最好不要把它们带出酒馆，会给你带来法律上的麻烦。

The tavern is pretty much a copyright-free zone, where you'll find all sorts of bootleg goods, and these Origami Birds are no exception. Better not take them outside the tavern, though, or you might find yourself in some legal hot water.
为了你的听力健康，不建议与之进行对话：因为假面愚者量产版折纸小鸟的叫声不是「啾啾啾~」，而是「呀啊哈哈哈哈哈——（约<unbreak>110</unbreak>分贝）」

For the sake of your hearing health, conversation is not recommended: because the mass-produced Masked Fool Origami Birds don't go "tweet tweet tweet~," they go "NYAHAHAHAHAHA——(approx. <unbreak>110</unbreak> decibels)"
你能肉身接黄泉一刀？焚风都不能肉身接黄泉一刀。你比焚风都牛█。
You can take Acheron's blade head-on? Even Zephyro can't take Acheron's blade head-on. You're even more bad█ss than Zephyro.
May life be eternal and prosperity flourish.
Too much wisdom leads to sorrow.
从祂响起的那刻起，你的一天就被毁灭了。
From the moment THEY rang out, your day was doomed.
如果第一幕出现了一把枪，那么第三幕就要击发它。
If a gun appears in the first act, it must be fired by the third.
先射箭再画靶子，何尝不是一种百发百中？
If you shoot first and then draw the bullseye around the arrow, you'll never miss, right?
Truth is the daughter of Memory.
一副异常精美的画作，细节精细度似乎已经超出了这个宇宙的限度。很多愚者光是凝视这幅画，就陷入了疯狂，口中还念念有词：「█海市█汇区█林街道█林路███号█！」

An exceptionally exquisite artwork, with a level of detail that seems to transcend the limits of this universe. Many Fools who merely gazed at this painting descended into madness, muttering incessantly: "█Grand Fair█ District█ Forest Street█ Forest Road███ No.█!"
你靠近这散发无上威光的宝座，毫无疑问，它是纯金的。
You draw near the throne that is radiating an aura of supreme power. It's unquestionably made of solid gold.
构成它的每一颗原子曾来自中子星的碰撞、超新星的爆发…但假面愚者却将星星们珍贵的泪水锻造成了承接人类烦恼的器皿。也许在他们眼中，这样便幽了宇宙一默。

Every one of its atoms was born from colliding neutron stars and exploding supernovas... Yet the Masked Fools have forged these precious tears of the stars into a receptacle for humanity's woes. Perhaps, in their eyes, this is their way of telling the universe a joke.
你之前的经历当真只是个废弃的荒诞剧本？但你分明能从眼前的马桶身上，看到那身为帝皇的威仪。
Was your experience really just some discarded absurd script? Yet you swear you see the majesty of an emperor in this toilet.
高档VIP包间，仅供身份最尊贵的客人使用。
A premium VIP suite, reserved only for the most distinguished guests.
你总觉得，刚才打开的那个东西，似乎不是一个通常意义上的「宝箱」。
You can't shake the feeling that whatever you just opened definitely wasn't a "chest" in the traditional sense.
宝箱！我们是宝箱！我们终于变成宝箱啦！耶！
Chest! We're chests! We finally turned into treasure chests! Woohoo!
你个傻子，我们明明是宝箱怪！
没有区别！但是这样比较*怪*！
No difference! But it's just cooler this way!
这个电话亭紧锁着门。在门框上不起眼的某处，贴着一块小小的告示「此『时间和空间相对维度』正在维修中，请勿擅自使用。」

The phone booth's door is locked tight. In an inconspicuous spot on the doorframe, there's a small notice: "This 'Time and Spatial Relative Dimension' is currently under maintenance. Unauthorized use prohibited."
这间电话亭的内部空间远大于外部，据说其中有一半是冰柜。毕竟时空旅行者们经常会去往一些荒芜的位面，这时就要确保充足的炸鱼薯条供应。

The interior of this phone booth is far larger than its exterior, and rumor has it that half of it is a freezer. After all, time travelers often venture into desolate dimensions, so they need to ensure an adequate supply of fish and chips.
模因病毒？这么危险的东西为什么会出现在这里…假面愚者怎么什么东西都敢拿来当玩具？
A memetic virus? Why would something this dangerous be here... Is there anything the Masked Fools wouldn't turn into a plaything?
掀开松垮垮的盖子，只见空桶中央，正端坐着一只被涂花脸的花火娃娃，前方还摆了张画有笑脸的纸条——「诚挚感谢花火小姐帮忙『保管』我的面具，来日必将涌、泉、相、报。」

Lifting the flimsy lid reveals a Sparkle Doll with a painted face, sitting upright in the center of the empty barrel. In front of it is a note with a smiley face drawn on it: "My sincerest thanks to Miss Sparkle for 'keeping' my mask. I shall one day return the favor... in full."
"A barrel with the scent of Sparkle"
二相乐园的一项社会学研究显示，娱乐室的数量与当地犯罪率呈负相关，你明白了吗？娱乐室是民事调解的中坚力量。
A sociological study in Planarcadia found that the more game rooms an area has, the lower its crime rate. Do you get it? Game rooms are the core of settling civil issues.
据说店内挂着历史上著名业内大神们的肖像画，也不知道其中有没有青雀。如果没有，那你显然很难认可这个名人堂的含金量。
They say portraits of legendary players hang inside, but you wonder if Qingque made the cut. If not, you can't really take this hall of fame's lineup seriously.
输了一晚上的人总爱发誓「再也不来了」，但第二天又准时出现，仿佛娱乐室有种魔力，能把昨天的记忆变成今天的筹码。
A person who loses all night will swear "never again," but they're always back the next day. It's as if the room has a magic that turns the memory of a loss into the stake for the next game.
昏暗压抑的灯光、堆积如山的卷宗、错综复杂的线索板、喝了一半的提神饮料——完美符合侦探事务所的刻板印象。
Dim lighting, mountains of case files, a tangled web of clues on the wall, and half-empty energy drinks everywhere... a perfect match for the stereotypical image of a detective agency.
海报上戴眼镜的中年男人双手十指交叉，眼镜片反射出冷峻的光芒审视着你，下书一行小字：「坏家伙最严厉的父亲。」好像是不死途心目中的自己。

On the poster, a middle-aged man in glasses clasps his hands, his lenses glinting coldly as he sizes you up. The caption reads: "The sternest father a villain could ask for." This seems to be how Ashveil sees himself.
屏幕没有关，虽然窥屏是不好的习惯，但你还是「不小心」瞥到了一眼，上面是侦探社本季度的营收情况。省流：纯亏损。
The screen is on. And while snooping is a bad habit, you "can't help" but glance at it. It's the agency's financial report for the quarter. Long story short: It's all red.
门口贴着这样的标语：「给我一根球杆，我能撬动整个二相乐园」。
A sign at the entrance reads: "Give me a pool cue, and I can rock the foundations of Planarcadia."
曾经有两位科学家在这里重复进行了五次击球实验，得出了一个物理学上的基本定律：想要赢球，就要把球打进袋口。
Two scientists are said to have repeatedly conducted five-shot experiments here, leading to a fundamental law of physics: To win the game, one must sink the balls into the pockets.
这是一家无限制桌球店，所谓无限制，就是在传统的桌球游戏中，增加了技能。最近这家店有点转向综合格斗馆的趋势。
This is a no-holds-barred pool hall. "No-holds-barred" means that on top of the traditional game, you now have abilities. The place is slowly turning into more of an MMA gym.
眼前的海报虽然精美，但和杰帕德的艺术创作比起来，还是欠缺了一些灵魂。
This poster is exquisitely designed. But compared to the artistic creations of Gepard, it's missing a certain something.
红粉灰绿棕，绒绒号的主要角色生动形象且各具特色，简直可以直接拿去做什么运动会的吉祥物。列车欢迎你，为你开天辟地。

Red, pink, grey, green, brown. The Fluffy main cast are so lively and distinct, they could easily be mascots for some sports event. Byline: The Express welcomes you, trailblazing a path to the future.
你的浣熊形象身居C位，你很高兴；你的黑眼圈画得过重了，你不喜欢。
You're happy to see your raccoon persona taking the center spot. You're less happy about how heavy they went with the dark circles under your eyes.
这张海报上的帕姆看起来小小一只，但这只是近大远小的原理。它其实和动物塑的你们差不多高，相当之高大威猛。
The Pom-Pom on this poster looks tiny, but that's just forced perspective. Pom-Pom is actually as tall as the rest of you in your animal forms: tall and mighty.
海报上的标语写着：「随光开拓未知是方向，继承阿基维利的愿望」。
The poster's slogan reads: "Follow the light and trailblaze the unknown. Inherit the will of Akivili."
你发现画面中有一处细节不甚合理——列车高速行驶的时候严禁打开远光灯，否则会晃瞎对向飞船驾驶者的眼睛。
You spot a minor inaccuracy in the image: It's strictly forbidden to turn on the high beams while the Express is in motion, as it would blind the pilots of any oncoming vessels.
狸狸通信杂志社有着全行业首屈一指的福利待遇，比如这个无限供应饮料和小吃的零食角——想必有一名财大气粗的社长在撑腰吧。
Furbobocom Magazine offers some of the best perks in the business, like this snack corner with its endless supply of drinks and treats... They must have a pretty loaded president behind their back.
出于员工身体健康的考虑，狸狸通信杂志社曾经短暂地将所有饮料小吃都换成了低愿力浓度版本，但最终因零食角变得无人问津而作罢。
Out of concern for employees' health, Furbobocom Magazine once briefly switched everything to low-Wishpower versions. They had to abandon the plan when no one went to the snack corner anymore.
虽然马赛克级别的贴图精度让这些食物看起来没有那么美味，但是请相信我，它们真的很好吃。
The pixelated, low-res textures might not make the food look very appetizing, but trust me, it's actually delicious.
这些伊磨吉一幅幅可怜巴巴的样子，似乎是遭到遗弃了。可惜你没条件收养伊磨吉，只能祈祷它们能遇到愿意收养的好心人。
These poor emotis look so miserable, as if they've been abandoned. Unfortunately, you're in no position to adopt one. You can only hope they find a kind soul to take them home.
从纸盒的磨损程度看，这群伊磨吉已经在在此处生活很久了。也不知道二相乐园有没有野生伊磨吉收容中心。
