From the state of the cardboard box, this group of emotis has been here for a very long time. You wonder if there's a wild emoti rescue center anywhere in Planarcadia.
面对困境，伊磨吉表现出不同的人生态度，有人抓狂、有人崩溃，也有人微笑面对。
Faced with their predicament, the emotis are showing different attitudes. Some are freaking out, some are having a complete breakdown, but a few are managing to smile through the pain.
也许这幅涂鸦表达的含义是：「当画笔接触干枯的手指，后者将变得鲜活起来。」啊…原来是美甲店的广告，那没事了。
Maybe this graffiti means, "When a brush touches a withered hand, it springs back to life." Oh... it's just an ad for a nail salon. Never mind.
当心，别靠太近，楼上有两个伊磨吉。「被滚落的伊磨吉砸中」是二相乐园相当常见的受伤原因，这些小家伙还挺重的，
Watch out, don't get too close. There are two emotis up there. "Struck by a falling emoti" is a surprisingly common cause of injury in Planarcadia. Those little guys are heavier than they look.
二相乐园对街头艺术极其包容，法律允许创作者在任何公共区域创作涂鸦。但是画得太烂是违法行为，最高可判处「强制绘艺补习」。

Planarcadia is exceptionally tolerant of street art. The law allows artists to create graffiti in any communal area. However, creating terrible art is a punishable offense, with a maximum sentence of "mandatory art tutoring."
你所看到的是街头涂鸦作品《以我残躯化作炽火》。
The piece of street art before you is titled Don't Fear the Reaper.
画中人是一位摇滚巨星「强尼猫手」，他的歌曲以叛逆精神鼓舞着一代人，最终因试图爆破珠星财团而被捕入狱。
The man in the painting is rock legend "Johnny Cathand," whose songs of rebellious spirit inspired an entire generation. He was eventually imprisoned for attempting to blow up the Pearluxe Corp HQ.
作者在这幅作品中注入了不少愿力，所以当你把耳朵贴在涂鸦上的时候，还能听到画中乐手低哑的嘶吼。
The artist poured a significant amount of Wishpower into this work. So if you put your ear to the wall, you can still hear the musician's raw, raspy howls.
其实伊磨吉并不适合玩棋牌类游戏，因为从他们的脸上就能直接看出手中牌的好坏。
Emotis aren't really suited for tile games, because you can tell whether their hand is good or bad just by looking at their faces.
法律规定，只有球体直径大于半米的伊磨吉可以进入娱乐室。但如果直径大于一米，那往往又会被禁止入内，因为会撞到其他顾客。

The law stipulates that only emoti with a diameter of over half a meter may enter a game room. But if their diameter exceeds one meter, they're usually barred from entry because they tend to bump into other customers.
伊磨吉看起来憨态可掬，但滚起来风驰电掣。曾有打输牌的伊磨吉为了赖账，与治安官们进行了一场紧张刺激的公路追逐，骨碌骨碌骨碌。
Emotis may look harmless, but when they get rolling, they're lightning-fast. Once, an emoti tried to dash after losing a game, leading the officers on a high-speed chase. Roll, roll, roll...
怪不得大佬们都喜欢把办公室设在大楼顶层，站在这里往下眺望，确实有种睥睨天下、掌控世界的感觉。
No wonder the bigwigs love having their offices on the top floor. Standing here looking down, you really do get the feeling that you're the king of the world.
远处万家灯火，天上点点星光，而你孤独的站在诺大的豪华办公室，有那么点高处不胜寒。
The city lights twinkle in the distance, mirroring the stars above. And you stand alone in this massive, luxurious office. It feels a little lonely at the top.
据说月亮的运行规律深刻影响着人类的情绪，幻月离二相乐园如此之近，也难怪这里的人们情绪充沛、思如泉涌。

The lunar cycle is said to have a profound effect on human emotion. With the Phantasmoon this close to Planarcadia, it's no wonder the people here are so full of feeling and brimming with inspiration.
不知哪里飘荡来的音乐：「Fly me to the stars，And let me play among the  light」。
Music drifts in from out of nowhere: "Fly me to the star, and let me play among the light."
在某个遥远的星系，那里的人类试图用行星发动机推走他们的「月球」，不过因为一点小意外，「月球」最后被炸成了碎片。
In a distant planetary system, its inhabitants once tried to propel their "moon" away with planetary engines. But due to a minor accident, it ended up being blown to bits.
伊磨吉的外壳由愿力组成，但内部却是空的。这座城市中的大部分生物都差不多，外表坚硬，内心却只有空洞。
An emoti's shell is formed from Wishpower, but it's empty inside. It's the same for most creatures in this city: a hard exterior with nothing but a hollow heart.
辅助驾驶技术的普及让伊磨吉也有了驾驶汽车的资格，不过紧急情况下它们可没有脚踩刹车。
With assisted driving becoming widespread, emotis now qualify to drive cars as well. Problem is, they can't hit the brakes with their feet in emergencies.
伊磨吉过马路的时候一定要飘得高一些，这样做可以大幅降低被车撞的风险。
When crossing the road, emotis should float a bit higher. Doing so greatly reduces the risk of getting hit by cars.
一般上了年纪的人总喜欢培养点烧钱的爱好，比如钓鱼和摄影。共愿帮的大佬们最热衷于文玩收藏，似乎因为这样比较容易让人看出来。

Older folks usually pick up pricey hobbies like fishing or photography. The big bosses of the Synwish Syndicate, though? They're all about collecting flashy fandangles, mostly so everyone can see how rich they are.
一幅噗噜贵族的画作吸引了你的目光，水平相当之高，是共愿帮成员哈耶克的杰作。此人亦是「乐园三大肖像画家」之一，但因为没人见过它的脸而鲜少提及。

A painting of a ploo noble caught your eye. It's actually a masterpiece by Hayek, a Synwish Syndicate member. He's one of the arcadia's top three portrait artists, though people rarely talk about him since nobody knows what he looks like.
这是冰柜，不是时间停止柜，食物放久了也会坏，希望每个人都能养成定期清理的习惯。
This is a freezer, not a time-stopping cabinet. Food will still go bad if it sits here for too long, so I hope everyone can develop a habit of cleaning it out regularly.
据说某些餐厅只招两种员工，冰柜管理员和微波炉使用师，如果你两者都会，那你就是首席大厨了。
They say some restaurants only hire two types of staff members: freezer managers and microwave operators. If you can do both, then congratulations, you're the head chef.
在没有发明冰柜之前，食物放不了太久，所以餐厅必须现炒现做。
Before freezers were invented, food couldn't be stored for long, so restaurants had to cook everything fresh to order.
害怕被打进洞的伊磨吉
Emoti Afraid of Being Punched Into a Pocket
伊磨吉的成长过程充满了艰辛，在它们直径增长的过程中，可能会不断地充当成乒乓球、桌球、高尔夫球、棒球、篮球……
The growth of an emoti is full of hardships. As their diameter increases, they often end up serving as ping-pong balls, billiard balls, golf balls, baseballs, basketballs...
虽然每个伊磨吉看起来都差不多圆，但总有一些比另一些更圆。
Although every emoti looks more or less round, some are definitely rounder than others.
桌球老手都喜欢挑选比较年轻的伊磨吉做击发母球，因为这样的伊磨吉还心怀梦想，情绪波动大，爆发力更强。
Pool sharks prefer picking younger emoti as their cue ball, since younger ones still have dreams, stronger emotional swings, and pack a stronger punch.
标语上写着：「现磨咖啡，极致醇香，一口上头。」
The sign reads: "Freshly ground coffee, rich and irresistible, one sip gets you going."
一家以「航天员」为主题的咖啡店，店员会穿着航天服，在模拟无重力的特殊包厢用软铝管喂你咖啡。
An astronaut-themed coffee shop where the staff wears spacesuits and feeds you coffee through soft aluminum tubes in special zero-gravity simulation booths.
广告上的人物是咖啡店的招牌特调师「超级梦幻」，无人知道她的真实姓名，只因她调制的咖啡有梦幻般的香气而得名。
The person in the advertisement is the café's star barista, "Super Dreamy." No one knows her real name. She earned this nickname because the coffee she brews has a magical, dreamy aroma.
许多小吃店都以「阿哈品尝后开怀大笑」为卖点。一位星神的胃口这么好，不禁让人怀疑来的到底是欢愉还是贪饕。
Many snack shops boast that "Aha bursts into laughter after tasting." With an Aeon having such a big appetite, one can't help but wonder if it's Elation or Voracity that stopped by.
曾经锅气缭绕的平价美食街，自从公司引入「高效餐饮供应链管理」的理念后，开始出现越来越多的预制菜。
The once-bustling food street filled with the aroma of sizzling woks has seen more and more pre-made meals ever since the IPC introduced their concept of "efficient food supply chain management."
这条街每隔不久就会出现一家网红店，今天也许是「狮子头哥」，明天也可能「鲷鱼烧姐」，说不上多么好吃，但就是有很多人排队。
New trendy shops pop up on this street every other week. It's "Meatball Man" one day and "Sweetfin Waffle Lady" the next. The food isn't even that great, but people just love to wait in line.
据说这家诊所专门服务不敢或不能去正规医院接受治疗的病人。不过即使是罪大恶极之人，也应该先治好病再接受审判。这样想来，这家诊所倒也算在做好事。

It's said that this clinic specializes in treating patients who are too scared or unable to go to regular hospitals. But even the worst criminals deserve medical care before facing judgment. In that sense, this clinic is doing some good after all.
这家诊所的医生会选择一些看起来很恐怖但莫名有效的激进疗法，实在有点「但管人直，不管人死」的意思。
The doctors at this clinic tend to use some terrifying yet mysteriously effective radical treatments. Their approach is basically: "As long as it fixes your problem, who cares if you die?"
招牌上的广告词：「<unbreak>24</unbreak>小时营业，除了感情不治，其他什么都治」。
Their sign reads: "Open <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7. We cure everything except broken hearts."
有那么多地方可以约会，电影院、咖啡厅、水族馆、游乐场，这对伊磨吉却选择了最浪漫的水泥管。
With so many places available for a date, such as the cinema, a café, the aquarium, and an amusement park, this pair of emotis chose the most romantic location: the concrete pipe.
这两个家伙干脆原地结婚算了，要不让后面那只伊磨吉当你们的证婚人吧。
These two might as well get married right here and now. Hey, why not have that emoti behind them be their wedding officiant?
两只沉浸在爱河里的伊磨吉，完全没有注意到另一头还蹲着一位伤心人。
The two love-struck emotis were so lost in their own little world that they completely failed to notice another heartbroken soul crouching on the other side.
也许它应该在车底，而不应该在管里。
Maybe it was never meant to be here at all...
听人说，水泥管与失恋是一对绝配。
People say that concrete pipes and heartbreak are a match made in heaven.
在爱中失落的伊磨吉到处有，眼前只是其中一个。
Heartbroken emotis are everywhere, and the one in front of us is just one of many.
也许你会好奇，这只伊磨吉没有手，是怎么举起水壶的？答案是愿力，我的朋友。
You might wonder, how does this handless emoti lift the watering can? The answer is Wishpower, my friend.
宅邸里的盆栽之所以打理得井井有条，都归功于这只勤劳的小家伙。
The mansion's potted plants are kept in such pristine condition thanks to this diligent little fellow.
伊磨吉高高举起水壶，水流不急不慢地灌进花盆，稳、准、狠。之所以能如此熟练，无他，唯手熟尔。
The emoti lifts the watering can high, letting the water pour into the pot in a steady, precise, almost surgical stream. Such mastery came from nothing more than long, diligent practice.
伊磨吉钻进了姬子的雕像，变成了——伊磨姬！
An emoti wriggled into Himeko's statue and turned into... Himeti!
写实的头发配合一张卡通的脸，乍一看格格不入，但新的艺术风格往往脱胎于打破常规。
Realistic hair paired with a cartoonish face might seem jarring at first, but new artistic styles often emerge from breaking conventions.
这伊磨吉到底是怎么钻进去的？这个迷题像「石狮子嘴里的石头是怎么塞进去的」一样令人费解。
How did this emoti even get in there? It's as confusing as the old riddle of "how the stone got into the stone lion's mouth."
没想到二相乐园也有人热爱杂技这门传统手艺，可以通知桂乃芬来这边开拓市场了。
Who knew people in Planarcadia were into traditional acrobatics? Someone should tell Guinaifen. She'd have a field day expanding her audience here.
正常来说，杂技也是要先从「胸口碎大石」练起，再练头部这么危险的部位。但伊磨吉全身上下都属于「头部」，实在没法练胸口碎大石，就只能苦一苦脑壳了。

Normally, acrobatic training starts with "Smashing Boulder on Chest" before moving on to more dangerous areas like the head. But since an emoti is basically all "head," there's no chest to practice boulder-smashing on. It has no choice but to toughen up its poor skull instead.
正所谓台上一分钟，台下十年功，碎了一地的啤酒瓶和砖头便是这句话最好的证明。
As they say, one minute on stage takes ten years of practice, and the shattered beer bottles and bricks scattered all over the floor are living proof of that.
这里是「乐园好声音」的海选舞台，只要你对自己的嗓音有自信，随时都能上去嚎两下。
This is the stage for "The Voice of Arcadia" auditions. If you're confident in your vocals, feel free to step up and belt one out!
其实这是一支4人乐队，看到墙上那支话筒了么，它就是乐队的主唱。
Actually, this is a 4-member band. See that microphone on the wall? That's the lead singer.
虽然台下只有你一名观众，但是伊磨吉们依旧在卖力的表演，也许这就是热爱的力量吧。
Even though you're the only one in the audience, the emotis are still giving it their all on stage. Perhaps this is what you'd call the power of passion.
一般酒吧门口的保安都是高大威猛的欧克，这家店却雇了一只人畜无害的伊磨吉。老板的理由是，担心门口的保安反而吓跑客人，反正现在治安也不错，还不如放个可爱的。

Usually, bars hire big, tough orch as bouncers, but this place has an adorable emoti. The owner was afraid a scary bouncer would drive people away. Since the neighborhood is safe, he figured "cute" was the way to go.
酒吧招牌上的影鳄女子，并不是酒吧的服务员，而是二相乐园的酒吧业大亨「鳄荣」小姐。全国有3成酒吧都是她的产业。
That shadowcroc girl on the sign isn't a waitress. She's Miss Glory Croc, the bar industry mogul of Planarcadia. She owns about thirty percent of all the bars nationwide.
阶梯尽头是一家神秘的酒吧，从来没有人从这道门进去过，但夜幕降临后里面就会传出劲歌热舞的喧闹声——可能这扇门也「无法从这一侧打开」吧。

At the top of the stairs sits a mysterious lounge. No one has ever entered through this door, but after nightfall, the sounds of pulsing music and dancing spill out from within. Perhaps this is another door that simply "cannot be opened from this side."
伊磨吉是中空的，它们根本没有心。但即便是空心者，也会有心碎的时刻。「当我爱你时，我便有了心。当你离开时，你便摔碎了你赠给我的心。」
Emotis are hollow, they have no heart at all. But even those without hearts can feel heartbreak sometimes. "When I loved you, I grew a heart. When you left, you shattered the very heart you gave me."
那只伊磨吉的脸上掺杂了泪水、口水和酒水，再也没有一只伊磨吉比它更能传达伤心欲绝。
That emoti's face was smeared with tears, drool, and booze. No other emotis could ever express such heartbreak more vividly than this one.
失恋是不幸的事，但幸运的是，它还有朋友陪在身边。
Breakups suck, but hey, at least they've got friends by their side.
简介：游侠的影子里都藏了什么？嫉恶如仇、爱憎分明、和浓墨一样的孤独。
Description: What lies in a Ranger's shadow? A fierce hatred for evil, clear boundaries between love and hate, and a loneliness as dark as ink.
简介：即便只有7秒，也想要游过银河的每个角落。
Description: Even if I only have 7 seconds, I want to explore every corner of the cosmos.
简介：是谁拆了我的典藏版手办？！别让我逮到那兔崽子！！！
Description: Who broke my limited-edition figure!? Just wait till I get my hands on that little punk!!!
简介：铃声响起的那一刻，世界突然有了色彩。
Description: The moment the bell rang, the world suddenly burst into color.
简介：「祂今天晚上不来啦，可是明天晚上准来。」
Description: "THEY won't come tonight, but THEY'll definitely come tomorrow night."
简介：创作不增实体，创作只是阿哈说：要有乐子。
Description: Creation adds no substance. Creation is merely Aha saying: let there be fun.
简介：就这样，他们被丢进欢乐的海洋。
Description: And just like that, they were thrown into an ocean of joy.
简介：音符们沉醉在自己谱就的乐章里，永无休止地翩翩起舞。
Description: The musical notes, intoxicated by the melodies they compose, dance endlessly in an eternal waltz.
简介：哦，乐子神在上——今天又有什么新玩意！
Description: Oh, by The Laughter, what new shenanigans do we have today?
简介：所谓漫长的一生，不过是无数切片串起的幻灯片。
Description: What we call a long life is nothing but a slideshow strung together from countless moments.
简介：摇摆！大家来一起摇摆！
Description: Let's dance! Come on everybody, let's groove!
简介：「你的礼貌呢？」「你不就是吗？」
Description: "Where are your manners?" "Aren't you one yourself?"
简介：「可以和我组一辈子的乐队吗？拜托了！」
Description: "Can you be in a band with me for life? Pretty please!"
室中幽暗，昏昧灯光无法给人带来任何暖意，反倒格外唤起心中的不安感。
The room is dim, its murky light bringing no warmth, instead stirring up an unsettling feeling deep within.
不知为何，架子上除了涉及秘密的书籍、卷轴之外，竟然还能找到几本禁忌之爱的漫画——确实是禁书。
Oddly enough, besides the secret books and scrolls, there were even a few comic books about forbidden romance on the shelf. Well, they are forbidden books, I guess...
据说这些写满秘密的泛黄纸制品会自动筛选读者，未经允许的阅读者只能看到…某本禁忌之爱漫画的最后一话。
Legend has it, these yellowed pages filled with secrets automatically filter their readers. Unauthorized readers can only see... the final chapter of a certain forbidden romance comic.
只是一间平平无奇的普通教室。
教室窗外夕阳西下，永远停留在放学的时刻。但有些孩子再也没能放学回家。
Outside the classroom window, the sun sets in the west, forever frozen in the moment classes are dismissed. But some children never made it home from school.
教室的装潢维持在<unbreak>15</unbreak>年前的状态，似乎有人想铭记些什么。
The classroom's decor remains frozen in time, just as it was <unbreak>15</unbreak> years ago, as if someone wanted to preserve a memory.
「绘世学院第<unbreak>233</unbreak>届最强二次元选举大赛——扫码即可为你的心选贡献珍贵的一票！」
"Graphia Academy's <unbreak>233</unbreak>rd Ultimate Animation Fan Contest! Scan the code and cast your vote for your favorite!"
打开「最强二次元选举大赛」投票界面的一瞬间，各种拉票广告以排山倒海之势扑面而来，可谓大型二次元修罗场。

The moment you opened the voting interface for the "Ultimate Cartoon Election," various campaign ads poured out like an avalanche, creating what could only be described as a massive cartoon pandemonium.
海龙教导主任的票数一骑绝尘。果然人在恶作剧时是不会嫌累的。
Seadrake, the Dean of Academic Affairs, left everyone in the dust in the vote count. People sure don't get tired when it comes to pranks.
海报上的角色是「鬼小黑」，来自某个著名的推理漫画。鬼小黑有着「百分百被误认为凶手」的特殊体质，却以此为优势进行推理、寻找真相。

The character on the poster is "Onyx Ogre," from a famous detective comic. Despite having a peculiar condition where he's mistaken as the culprit <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of the time, Onyx Ogre turns this disadvantage into a strength as he conducts investigations and searches for the truth.
「鬼小黑」在青少年群体中人气很高，也因此成为了校园公益海报的代言人。
"Onyx Ogre" is hugely popular among teenagers, and thus he became the ambassador on campus public welfare posters.
这张海报的内容是：「鬼小黑提醒你！必须每天认真刷牙，才能拥有我这样洁白的牙齿哦！」不过囿于印刷效果，他的牙似乎是黄的。

The poster's message reads: "Onyx Ogre's here to remind you! You must brush your teeth diligently every day to have pearly whites like mine!" Though due to the printing quality, his teeth appear rather yellow.
一张高大威猛的幻造种画像，似乎是某位校领导。你非常确信这位校领导不长这样。看来某些学生实在是太想进步了。

A portrait of a majestic imagenae, who is apparently a certain school official. You're positive the actual official doesn't look like that. Seems like some students are clearly trying a bit too hard to score brownie points.
《鸭的报恩》，二相乐园经典漫画，迄今为止已连载三十年。
The Duck's Gratitude, a classic Planarcadia comic. It's been running for thirty years and counting!
由于漫画家习惯性不定期拖稿，这部漫画位居「读者和作家比命长」系列榜首。
Due to the comic artist's habitual irregular delays, this comic tops the "Readers and Authors: Who Will Live Longer?" series chart.
毕业生中流传着如此传言：离校前若在海报前合影，则将有几率梦见它更新。
There's a rumor among graduates: If you take a photo in front of the poster before leaving campus, you might dream of it being updated.
教室守则第一条：禁止携带橡皮、修改带等危险物品！
Classroom Rule #1: No dangerous items allowed, including erasers, correction tapes, and other hazardous materials!
据说如果能和教室里的对话框搞好关系，它们会很乐意替你签到和答题。
Word on the street is, if you get on good terms with the dialogue boxes in the classroom, they'll be happy to help you check in and answer questions.
多彩的闯入者与黑白的教室，竟显得如此格格不入。你仿佛能听到对话框们的小声吐槽：不合群的家伙！
The colorful intruder stands out awkwardly against the black-and-white classroom. You can almost hear the dialogue boxes whispering their snide remarks: "What an outcast!"
提琴先生，以疾世愤俗和野兽派歌喉闻名校园，首位被投票逐出音乐活动室的乐器。
Mr. Cello, notorious across campus for his cynical worldview and beastly singing voice, is the first instrument to be voted out of the music room.
提琴先生的实验音乐并非一无是处。最近，它的噪音音乐专辑《宇宙脱█天才狂剧团》被治安局买下版权，用于镇压灾异。
Mr. Cello's experimental music isn't completely useless. His noise album, Cosmic Off-The-█████ Genius Madhouse, was just licensed by the Security Bureau to help suppress aberrations.
据说这位提琴先生的梦想是找人组一辈子的乐队…或许可以把匹诺康尼的自动乐器介绍给他？
I heard Mr. Cello's dream is to form a band that'll last a lifetime... Maybe we should introduce him to Penacony's automated instruments?
体型高大，身体细长，穿着全黑色的正装，背后有很多触手。细长鬼影不仅会跟踪猎物，还会折磨猎物，是十分恐怖的传说怪物……

Tall and lanky, dressed in all-black formal wear, with countless tentacles writhing from its back. This slender phantom not only stalks its prey, but tortures them as well. A truly terrifying creature of legend...
咯咯咯，如果你见到它，就别说你见过我，我害怕。啊，别怕，我不是细长鬼影。
Hehehe, if you see it, don't mention you've seen me. I'm scared. Oh, don't worry, I'm not the lanky, ghostly phantom.
据说是学校方便同学们临时储物而设立的公用置物柜，但是鲜少有同学将私人物品放在柜子里——据说，这里已经成为了校园指定非正式树洞。

Supposedly a public storage cabinet set up by the school for students' temporary storage needs, but few actually keep personal belongings in it. Rumor has it that it's become the campus's designated unofficial confessional.
让我们看看有些什么热心学生留言——「不准在这里传小纸条」。树洞到此结束。
Let's see what enthusiastic students have left us here. "No passing notes in this spot." End of the confessions board.
思考空柜子里应该放什么，也是一种填空题。
Pondering what to put in an empty cabinet is a fill-in-the-blank question in its own right.
课堂上不该出现的东西常常在这里汇总——新发售的《苍天航路绒绒号》，星际和平公司发布的通缉令，以及隆介校长的黑料…等等，黑料？

Things that shouldn't show up in class often get pooled here: the newly released Fluffy Across the Blue, wanted posters issued by the Interastral Peace Corporation, and dark rumors about Dean Ryusuke... Wait, dark rumors?
为了老师、同学、校长以及大家都好，我劝你不要深究下去了。
For the sake of the teachers, students, the dean, and everyone else involved, I'm telling you: drop it.
据说，擅长推理的人能够通过细枝末节的物件陈设能推断出许多隐藏的信息…比如现在——通过这些看似毫无关系的物件，你断定这就是*教师*的办公桌。

They say people skilled in deduction can piece together tons of hidden information from the tiniest details and objects... Like right now, through these seemingly unrelated items, you determine this is the teacher's desk.
作为体育馆的储物室，除了常规的运动用品之外，你还会发现很多文艺社团的杂物——不同社团在校园中的权力落差可见一斑。

As the gym's storage room, aside from the usual sports equipment, you'll also find a bunch of random junk from the arts and culture clubs, a clear sign of the power gap between different clubs on campus.
在影视作品中，体育馆内总是人声鼎沸，而储物室就像是适合对话的私密孤岛——有什么话不能到学校广播室里对着大家说呢？

In movies and TV shows, the gymnasium is always bustling with noise, while the storage room feels like a private island perfect for heart-to-hearts. But hey, why not just say it to everyone over the school broadcast system instead?
你找了一圈，没有发现羽毛球相关的器材放在这里，真是太可惜了。说真的，这项运动应该更流行一些，不是吗？
You looked around and didn't find any badminton equipment stored here. What a shame. Seriously though, this sport should be way more popular, don't you think?
Madam Pearl, am I interrupting anything?
没有。我在等你，方才已收到你进入珠星大厦、前来此处的知会。
Not at all. I've been expecting you. Just got word that you entered the Pearluxe Tower and were on your way here.
真珠女士，我想跟你学画画。
Madam Pearl, I want to learn painting from you.
这个请求有些突然，不过，我可以教你。
That's a bit out of the blue, but sure, I can show you how.
在开始习作前，你需要三样东西：像素级别的观察力，对失败笔触的宽容，以及可以连续<unbreak>108</unbreak>个系统时不眠的续航能力——你察觉到了，这是个玩笑。

Before you start practicing, you'll need three things: pixel-perfect observation skills, tolerance for botched brushstrokes, and the stamina to stay awake for <unbreak>108</unbreak> system hours straight. And yes, I'm joking.
听说真珠女士休息时也看《绒绒号》？
I heard you watch The Fluffy when you're off the clock?
是的。和其他读者喜爱它的原因一样：《绒绒号》的角色设计非常可爱。
Yes. Same reason everyone else loves it: The Fluffy has the most adorable character designs.
虽然称不上狂热，但若计算我私人账户里的支出，在它的相关刊物及其衍生产品里累积的「投资」应也不下数百万。
I wouldn't call myself a maniac, but if you calculate the expenses in my personal account, my cumulative "investment" in it and its derivative products should be in the millions.
还是说正事吧。我的判断：你突然前来，应是有些想另外向我了解的事？恰好我休息片刻，可以放松闲谈一会。
Now, to the matter at hand. I take it your sudden visit means there's something else you'd like to ask me? I'm actually on a short break right now, so we can have a little chat.
我在等你，方才已收到你进入珠星大厦、前来此处的知会。恰好我休息片刻，也适合放松闲谈一会。
I've been expecting you. Just got word that you entered the Pearluxe Tower and were on your way here. I was taking a short break anyway, so this is a good time to relax and chat for a bit.
Let's have a small chat then!
Do you have any hobbies in your spare time?
我长久浸润于解析与临摹不同门类的艺术臻品，水彩的氤氲，油艺的肌理，版画的刀痕，就像用不同的语言翻译世界：精准，却又有言外之味。

I've spent so much time analyzing and recreating various masterpieces. The fluidity of watercolor, the rich texture of oils, the sharp cuts of a print... it's like translating the world into different languages. It's precise, yet it speaks volumes beyond words.
画布之外拣选、采购旧货杂店里的物品也是另一番意趣，里面往往藏着比崭新商品更动人的色泽，能给予我意外的灵感。

Outside of painting, browsing and picking up items from secondhand shops is a whole different kind of fun. They often hide colors and textures more captivating than brand-new goods, which gives me unexpected inspiration.
星际和平娱乐预售的新系列盲盒，我也预订了百来盒——我想你理解：随机性带来的期待、惊喜与失落，令人着迷。

I also pre-ordered about a hundred boxes from Interastral Peace Entertainment's new blind box series. I'm sure you understand: the anticipation, the surprises, the disappointments that come with randomness... it's utterly captivating.
但纵然是为了享受不确定性的美，买得也有些多了。我也知会财团的专员们，若是有人想在工作之余体验一把心跳与未知，可随时同我来取。

But even if it's all in the name of savoring the beauty of uncertainties, I may have gone a tad overboard with my purchases. I've already informed the Corp specialists that if anyone is in the mood for a little unknown excitement during their downtime, they're welcome to swing by and grab one from me.
我可以当你的速写模特吗？
Can I be your sketch model?
可以。我有信心：对于人体，我的解析会比你想象中更精密。做好准备的话，随时找我。
Of course. I'm confident my analysis of the human body will be more precise than you'd expect. Come find me whenever you're ready.
我也收藏了很多垃…旧物。
I've also got quite the collection of tras— traditional items myself.
据公示的监控数据表明：你更享受畅游在旧物间无序的探索，不另求所得。
According to the public surveillance data, you derive more enjoyment from aimless exploration amongst old items, seeking nothing in particular.
老板，珠星财团还招人吗？
Boss, is Pearluxe Corp still hiring?
话里有话的表达：你并非真的想工作。但我可以承诺：盲盒发货后赠予星穹列车一份。
There's more to it than it sounds: You don't actually want to do the work. But I can promise you once the blind boxes ship, I'll send one to the Astral Express as a gift.
What is art, in your opinion?
很直接的提问。这几乎是一个需要通览人类文明才能解明一二的问题。
A straightforward question. This is practically something that requires a comprehensive survey of human civilization to even begin answering.
如果抽象概述，我的理解：一种人性计量里的「误差」，一个在数据模型中难以被归纳的「异数」，一颗在理性的逻辑链条上随机崩裂的「火星」。它在我的世界里，要么从不存在，要么遍地可见。

If I were to put it in abstract terms, here's how I understand it: An "error" in the calculation of human nature, an "anomaly" that's difficult to capture in any data model, a "spark" that randomly causes a rupture in the chain of rational logic. In my world, it either doesn't exist at all... or it's everywhere.
或者，你是否会有有机生命普遍的好奇：智械是否理解艺术，又能否创作艺术？
Or perhaps, you share the curiosity common among organic life: Can Intellitrons understand art, and more importantly, create art?
Actually, I do have an answer for that.
那么，可以分享我的观察和推演：当有机生命开始集体思考「智械能否…」的问题时，议论延伸的过程，本身也能成立为一个答案——质疑，交流，理解。

Then, allow me to share my observation and extrapolation: When organic life begins collectively contemplating questions like "Can Intellitrons...?" The very process of that discussion unfolding becomes an answer in itself. That is, doubt, communication, and understanding.
我的观察和推演：当有机生命开始集体思考「智械能否…」的问题时，议论延伸的过程，本身也能成立为一个答案——质疑，交流，理解。

My observation and extrapolation is that when organic life begins collectively contemplating questions like "Can Intellitrons...?" The very process of that discussion unfolding becomes an answer in itself. That is, doubt, communication, and understanding.
以宇宙的尺度，观望一个文明的兴盛与衰亡就像昙花一样绚烂，短暂，不期而至的{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}暴风雨{RUBY_E#}总会加速它们的凋零。

On a cosmic scale, watching a civilization rise and fall is like witnessing a blooming Queen of the Night, brilliant yet fleeting. And the unexpected {RUBY_B#Destruction}storm{RUBY_E#} always hasten their withering.
「诸世界重建计划」首先是一笔绝佳的投资，打捞那些被毁灭的、无主的文化遗产，于公司而言价值无可估量。
The Worlds Reborn Initiative is first and foremost an excellent investment, since salvaging cultural heritage from worlds destroyed and left unclaimed has immeasurable value to the IPC.
我个人的想法，可以开门见山：我不愿见到那些已逝文明独有的笔触，就此沉没于虚无。
I'll cut right to the chase with my personal view: I can't stand to see the unique voices of lost civilizations sink into the nothingness.
当我触碰过宇宙遗落之物的余温，亲手拼合文明的碎片，市场上那些仿造品在我眼中，就如同拙劣的涂鸦一样显眼——这让我在艺术考古投资市场里，几乎从未失手。

When I felt the lingering heat of relics lost to the universe, pieced together the fragments of civilizations with my own hands, those knock-offs on the market stick out like amateur graffiti. That's why I've got a near-perfect track record in the market of art archaeology investment.
What have the Ten Stonehearts been up to lately?
「石心十人」的动向一向会引起不必要的关注，但基于你与其中几位过往的交集，猜测：你在表达自己的关心。
The Ten Stonehearts' movements always attract unwanted attention, but given your past dealings with a few of them, I'd wager you're expressing concern.
但我们没有互相汇报行程的惯例，不过，同僚的一些趣闻偶尔会以意外的方式让我知悉。
But we don't have a habit of reporting our schedules to each other. That said, I do occasionally catch wind of some amusing tidbits about my colleagues through unexpected channels.
一份几十页的报销单，引起了财务部门的讨论，我恰好在现场，告知了他们那符合他的手笔。推测：要么接手了符合他审美的项目，要么是他把出差当作度假了。

A reimbursement form running dozens of pages sparked quite a discussion in the Finance Department. I happened to be there and confirmed it had his signature style all over it. My guess: Either he took on a project that matched his tastes, or he treated that business trip like a vacation.
与她交往就像绘制工笔，优雅，细腻——没有即兴的泼墨，自然也没有意外的痕迹。唯一称得上趣闻的，大概是：她曾公开给龙晶汇款过一笔「精神抚慰金」。

Being with her is like painting with a fine brush, elegant, refined, with no room for improvised ink splatters or unexpected marks. The only interesting thing is probably when she once publicly transferred Obsidian a sum of money labeled "emotional distress compensation."
之前帮助照料账账时，它格外青睐于我，袒露肚皮的同时，不经意也会暴露一些它与主人之间相处的习惯与秘密。但既然是秘密，就不要让第三个人知道了。

Once when I helped take care of Numby, it took quite a liking to me. While rolling over and showing its belly, it inadvertently exposed some habits and secrets about how it gets along with its master. But since they're secrets, let's just keep this between us.
什么时候能再见到其他几位？
When will I ever get to see the others again?
据我所知：其他几位同僚对再次亲自同你和星穹列车合作皆有不同程度的兴趣。
From what I've gathered, several of my colleagues have expressed varying degrees of interest in collaborating with you and the Astral Express again this time.
不过，以我的了解：相较于由公司牵头，依计而行的会面，他们会更期待和你意外邂逅。
However, from what I understand, they'd much rather prefer a chance encounter with you compared to a meeting arranged by the IPC.
好。如有其他重要事宜，再随时联系。
No problem. If anything important comes up, feel free to reach out anytime.
除却雕版浮彩，近来也偏爱人物速写。尝试：不再是面对已定格的完美作品，而是面对生命本身。
Beyond printmaking, I've recently found myself drawn to character sketches. It's an attempt to stop focusing on "perfect," static works and start engaging with life itself.
好。如有其他重要事宜，再随时联系。
No problem. If anything important comes up, feel free to reach out anytime.
这不是天才漫画家模糊老师的年度巨作，《苍天航路绒绒号》里球棒浣熊的原型，大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}吗？
Wait, isn't this the legendary {NICKNAME}, the inspiration behind Baseball Raccoon from Fluffy Across the Blue, the annual masterpiece by that genius artist, Blurry_QR_Colt?
你的到来使鄙社蓬荜生辉，比电灯还亮…普狸策？幻太子？随便哪只小狸猫都行，把灯关掉吧，省点电费。

You showing up really brightens this humble place, even brighter than electric lights... Furbulitzer? Paraprince? Any little furbo will do. Just turn off the lights and save us some on the electric bill.
好了，我们来聊正事——商务合作请扣1，八卦投稿请扣2，陪你聊天请扣3，讨债寻仇请挂机~
Alright, let's get down to business. Press 1 for business inquiries, press 2 for juicy gossip submissions, press 3 for casual chat, and if you're here to collect debts or settle scores, please hold~
Oh, if it isn't our generous sponsor.
IP联动、漫画出版、广告植入、商单约稿都有可谈空间。当然，我们也可以先简单聊一下——按字数计费就行，给你打折，这句不算。

Brand collaborations, comic publications, ad placements, and commissioned work are all on the table. Of course, we could also just have a small talk first. I'll charge by the word and give you a discount. Oh, this line's on the house.
本社成文规定：将八卦传扬四海，一路生财，需要一笔登上热搜的启动资金。
Company policy states: To spread gossip far and wide and rake in the profits, you need startup capital that'll get you trending.
当然，我们也可以先简单聊一下，增进对彼此的了解，按字数计费就行——给你打折，这句不算。
Of course, we could always start with some small talk first, get to know each other better. I'll charge by the word and give you a discount. Oh, this line's on the house.
有格局！但话说在前头，陪你聊天所产生的情绪劳动难以估值，我们可以按字数计费——给你打折，这句不算。

How generous of you! But just so we're clear upfront, the emotional labor involved in chatting with you is pretty hard to put a price on. So I'll charge by the word and give you a discount. Oh, this line's on the house.
恭喜你，触发了隐藏选项，陪我聊天！按字数计费，性价比超高——给你打折，这句不算。
Congrats! You've unlocked a hidden option, that is, to chat with me! Charged by the word, super value for money. Here's a discount for you, and this line's on the house.
以我对星穹列车的了解，你的生活费应该挺充裕？来，我们展开聊聊。
From what I know about the Astral Express, you should have a pretty comfortable allowance, yes? Come on, let's talk specifics.
想打听《绒绒号》的制作内幕，还是想了解模糊老师的独门创作绝技？或者是对我本人很好奇？
Looking to dig up some behind-the-scenes secrets on The Fluffy, or maybe learn about Blurry_QR_Colt's exclusive creative techniques? Or are you just curious about me personally?
都能聊，按字数计费就行——给你打折，这句不算。
We can talk about anything. Just so you know, I charge by the word. I'll give you a discount, and this line's on the house.
That's quite generous of you! Please, go ahead.
还我《苍天航路绒绒号》版权！
Give me back the rights to Fluffy Across the Blue!
呀，别生气。我承认，起初我只是想蹭蹭你们的知名度，但现在不同了……
Whoa, don't be mad! Okay, it's true that I just wanted to ride on your coattails at first, but things are different now...
星穹列车的冒险旅程、《绒绒号》的销量和模糊老师每月的生活费——三者已经紧密地联系在一起了…可以说，我们现在就是同一根绳子上的蚂蚱！
The Astral Express's adventures, The Fluffy's sales numbers, and Blurry_QR_Colt's monthly living expenses... All three are now tightly bound together... You could say we're all on the same boat now!
作为列车的远房表客，从今往后我会继续向「开拓」看齐，将《苍天航路绒绒号》这个IP发扬光大——动画、潮玩、偶像养成企划…一个都不会少！

As a distant cousin of the Express, from this day forward I'll continue to follow the Trailblaze and take Fluffy Across the Blue to new heights! Animation adaptations, trendy toys, idol training programs... You name it, and we'll do it all!
动画预告前段时间已经发布啦，冲浪如你，应该已经欣赏过了吧？至于第一季多久能推出……
The animation trailer dropped a while back. A savvy user like you probably already caught it, didn't you? As for when season 1 actually launches...
如果模糊老师有八只手就好了，刷刷刷地帮他们画咯。现在嘛，只能相信珠星娱乐了。
If only Blurry_QR_Colt had eight hands, she could whip up drawings in a flash! But for now, we'll just have to trust Pearluxe Entertainment to handle it.
I wanna buy some trendy toys!
每次更新我都能看到评论区高楼——「新形态什么时候出啊」，思来想去，出潮玩联名最能安抚民心。

Every update, I see comment sections flooded with the same question: "When's the new edition coming out?" After mulling it over, I figured a designer toy collab was the best way to keep everyone happy.
我都不敢想把整个《苍天航路绒绒号》做成盲盒系列能有多赚——列车日常系列、海岛假日系列、特工乔装系列、神秘穿搭系列、决战大君系列、星神佩服系列……

I can't even imagine how much money we'd rake in turning the entire Fluffy Across the Blue into a blind box series: Express Daily, Island Vacation, Secret Agent Disguise, Mysterious Fashion, Overlord Showdown, Aeon Admiration...
我的愿景，就是让可爱的小动物们统治二相乐园，打造全人类愿意生活其中的动物世界！
My vision is for adorable critters to rule Planarcadia and create an animal paradise that all of humanity would be happy to call home!
「我们致力于全民偶像化，在绒绒号的世界观里——你就是自己的偶像！这里没有竞赛，拒绝排名，赢就是输，输就是赢。没有剧本，没有剧情，欢愉无界——你就是主角！」

"We're all about universal idolization. In the world of The Fluffy, YOU are your own idol! There's no competition here, no rankings. Winning is losing, and losing is winning. No scripts, no storylines, only boundless Elation where YOU'RE the star of the show!"
招募口号都想好了，蹲一个投资方。
I've even got the pitch ready. Just need an investor to make it happen.
当然，所有期待都基于作品够硬——这方面你就相信模糊老师吧，我已经有无数个点子，就等把它们画下来了。

Of course, all these expectations hinge on the work itself being solid. On that front, just have faith in Blurry_QR_Colt! I've already got tons of ideas cooking, just waiting to put them down on paper.
不过具体怎么画嘛，还得看漫画原型如何发挥咯。{NICKNAME}，你们一定要努力抵达有趣的结局呀！
But as for how it'll actually play out, well, that depends on what happens to the real-life version down the line! So, {NICKNAME}, hope you guys can make it to an interesting ending!
介绍一下你的其它作品吧。
Tell me about your other works.
我果然没看错人。多少才华被埋没的多栖作者就差这么一个好人追问这个问题：「你还有其他作品吗？」
I knew I was right about you. So many talented multi-hyphenate creators have been buried in obscurity, all because no one bothered to ask them the simple question: "Do you have any other works?"
《绒绒号》的火爆虽然让我喜得「喜剧界神笔良马」的称号，但也带来许多质疑，比如「二维马也就到这了」。但在活成现实取材派之前，我也有很多艺术野心的……

Sure, The Fluffy's massive success earned me the title of "Comedy's Touch of Gold," but it also brought plenty of doubts like, "Guess that's all Blurry_QR_Colt can do." Thing is, before I went for real-life inspiration, I had some serious artistic ambitions once...
我的出道作《悲喜冤家》——讲述了假面鱼人和悲悼幽灵视彼此为灵魂伴侣，却因欲望无度而阴阳两隔的故事。
My debut work, Tragicomedic Couple, tells the story of a masked fishman and a mourning ghost who saw each other as soulmates, ultimately got separated by life and death due to insatiable desires.
热评说这对苦命鸳鸯让人笑得肚子疼，又哭得脑仁疼，情绪体验直接拉满……
Some of the top comments say this star-crossed pair had them laughing till their stomach hurt, then crying till their head throbbed. Talk about an emotional rollercoaster...
可我是从什么时候开始笑不出来也哭不出来的呢？是漫画因为太过猎奇，结局BE，销量垫底的时候？
But since when did I stop being able to laugh or cry? Was it when my works got too edgy, ended with a downer ending, and flopped in sales?
唉，曾经求新立异不甘无名，奈何市场风向瞬息万变，名声、存款一无所得。如今一部《绒绒号》终于是让我赶上时代热潮了。赞美「开拓」，赞美星穹列车。

*sigh* I used to chase every new trend, desperate to make a name for myself. But the market changed so fast, I ended up with no fame and no money. Now this time, The Fluffy is my shot at catching up with the times! Praise the Trailblaze, praise the Astral Express.
Have you tried drawing other subjects?
《致我们终将寂静的黄昏》——穿越加校园，复合题材，一听就能火是不是？结果同期有部《那些年之秘密逆流成河但我不能说的这件小事》，校园、穿越、悬疑、奇幻、火葬场…直接霸榜。而我才连载十章就被熔断了……

To Our Eventually Silent Twilight — Reincarnation plus school setting, a fusion genre combo. Sounds like a hit, right? But then this other series called Those Secret Years: The River of Regret Behind My Unspoken Story drops at the same time. It mixed different genres like school, reincarnation, mystery, fantasy, regret, and it straight-up dominated the charts. Meanwhile, my story got axed after just ten chapters...
还有我久经沉淀的心理恐怖大作——《沉默的贪吃蛇》…结果出版社一笑置之，以缺少视觉爆点为由拒绝了我…不是，十八个蛇头还不够视觉奇观吗？

And then there's my signature work of psychological horror that I've been refining for ages: The Silence of the Snake... But the publisher just laughed it off and rejected it for lacking visual thrills... I mean, come on! Aren't eighteen snake heads spectacular enough!?
当然也试过奇幻题材——《嘘，树有秘密》，或许在其他地方能火，但在二相乐园嘛…这里的生活已经够奇幻了，谁还会关注一棵树呢。
Sure, I tried my hand at fantasy too. Hush, Secret of the Tree, maybe it'd be a hit somewhere else, but in Planarcadia? Life here's already fantastical enough. Who's gonna care about a tree?
你能想到的我都画过，要不是造化弄人…别问了，差点把我说哭了，哭了你可承受不起我的眼泪。
I've drawn everything you can think of. Too bad life had other plans... Don't ask anymore, you're about to make me cry, and trust me, you can't handle my tears.
Ever thought about leaving this business?
还真想过，说出来就怕你不信——我以前是一名「悲悼伶人」，看起来就很有格调对吧？
Sure I did. You probably won't believe me, but I used to be a Mourning Actor. Pretty classy, don't you think?
但没有贬低任何行业的意思啊，我赤胆忠心地发誓要成为一名合格伶人的时光，也是我最狼狈的日子——
But hey, I don't mean to belittle any profession! I mean, when I swore with all my heart to become a proper Actor, things became pretty rough for me at the time.
你见过凌晨四点的地下剧团吗？即便没有观众他们也义无反顾地坚持排练，这就是他们的生物钟，他们的悲剧美学……
Ever seen an underground theater troupe at 4 AM? Even without an audience, they still gave it their all in every rehearsal. That's their life, the beauty of tragedy...
当然，我也想过跳槽「假面愚者」，毕竟他们更受欢迎，酒馆的营业时间看上去也还算正常作息。但他们格局太小，到处贬低我们伶人的哭戏没讲笑话有技术含量。

Of course, I've thought about jumping ship to the Masked Fools. After all, they're way more popular, and the tavern hours seem pretty reasonable. But they're so narrow-minded! They go around trashing us Actors, saying our crying scenes aren't as technically demanding as their joke-telling.
还好我有一双妙笔生花的手，这不就干起了漫画。而且画漫画一样经常画到凌晨四点，我也不用另外适应行业作息……

Lucky for me, I've got these magic hands that just make inspiration strike, so I pivoted to comics, which also requires pulling all-nighters till 4 AM. That means I didn't even need to adjust my work schedule...
先把拖欠狸猫们的工资结了。
Pay the furbos their overdue wages now.
你先别急，听我解释——想听官方声明版，还是怪谈谣传版？
Hold your horses, let me explain. Do you want the official statement version or the spooky rumor mill version?
尊敬的读者粉丝，针对近期关于本社狸猫员工的舆论，特此声明如下——本社部分狸猫确系出身于「怪盗」的幻造种，治安局相关通报中，记载了「怪盗变化狸」凭借敏捷身法与刁滑口才，犯下的诸多狸谱奇案。

Dear readers and fans, regarding the recent public discourse concerning our furbo employees, we hereby issue the following statement: Some of our furbo staff are indeed imagenae descended from the "Phantom Thieves." Security Bureau records document numerous bizarre furbo-related cases committed by the "Phantom Furbomorph" through their nimble agility and cunning silver tongues.
如藏在售货机里装智能工人，一爪拿钱一爪交货；三只成组叠穿斗篷，开办腹部狸语非法教培；变装为小浣熊骗吃骗喝……

For example, hiding inside vending machines to pretend intelligent workers to take the money inserted with one paw and delivering the goods with the other, groups of three stacking up in cloaks to secretly run an illegal ventrifurboquism cram school, and disguising themselves as a raccoon to mooch food and drinks...
所幸，本社长秉持着狸本主义关怀，以和平手段力将它们收编为本社{RUBY_B#苦力}正规军{RUBY_E#}。如今狸猫们既已从良——
Fortunately, we uphold a furbo-centered approach and managed to recruit them peacefully as our {RUBY_B#grunt}official staff{RUBY_E#}. Now that the furbos have engaged in legitimate professions...
那就别谈发工资了，我没收为它们洗白的公关费、手续费已经很好了！
Then forget about their wages! The fact that I didn't charge any PR or handling fees is generous enough as it is!
很久很久以前，在二相乐园还不叫二相乐园的时候…有一群诞生于无名，流落街头，愿力稀薄的幻造种。
Once upon a time, long before Planarcadia was even called Planarcadia... there was a group of imagenae born into obscurity, wandering the streets with hardly any Wishpower to their name.
为了活着，它们只能通过一些不太正当的手段收集愿力与愿宝，勉强过活——比如半夜光顾便利店，偷盗「再来十瓶」的饮料瓶盖再高价倒卖；在身上涂满防水漆，假装许愿池精灵……

To make a living, they had to resort to some dishonest methods to scrape together Wishpower and Wishbae, like raiding convenience stores at midnight to swipe "Ten More Bottles" prize-winning bottle caps and scalp them for profit, or slathering themselves in waterproof paint to masquerade as wishing fountain sprites...
所幸姐姐我正义心善收留了它们，给了小狸猫们一个温暖的家。至于拖欠工资什么的…家人之间，谈钱简直是伤感情狸！
Luckily, as a kind and loving lady, I took them in and gave these little furbos a home. As for unpaid wages and all that... talking money between family would just hurt our feelings, don't you think?
Whatever, I'm not buying any of it.
小狸猫们身世坎坷…它们感激我给了它们一份正经工作，一处避风港。但我清楚，孩子大了，也想自己闯荡一番……
The little furbos have had rough lives... They're grateful I gave them honest work, a safe harbor. But I know that they want to strike out on their own when they grow up...
我不辞辛劳地磋磨它们，离开它们…不仅是以身作则，帮助它们自食其力，更是为了激发它们寻找新老板的主动性——杂志社要紧跟时代，新益求新，这才是它们立足社会的本钱呀。

I pushed them hard and then stepped back. It's not just about setting an example so they can stand on their own two feet. It's about getting them to take the initiative to find a new boss! A publishing house's gotta keep up with the times, always chasing the next big thing. That's how they stay relevant in this world.
所以——正义心善的球棒浣熊！你就是这段成长旅程中不可或缺的一环！
And so... righteous and kindhearted Baseball Raccoon! You're an essential part of this journey of growth!
还有事要忙，下次再聊吧。
I've got stuff to do. Catch you later!
确定不再聊个五信用点的？
Are you sure you don't wanna continue the chat for another 5 credits or something?
好吧，要走也拦不住你。下次我多备几杯茶，欢迎您来。
Well, I can't stop you if you're set on leaving. I'll have extra tea ready next time. You're always welcome here.
还有事要忙，下次再聊吧。
I've got stuff to do. Catch you later!
聊个五信用点的也好呀。
Even chatting for another five credits would be nice!
好吧，要走也拦不住你。下次我多备几杯茶，欢迎您来。
Well, I can't stop you if you're set on leaving. I'll have extra tea ready next time. You're always welcome here.
不过是小小黄金裔，且看我凯妮斯大人……
A mere Chrysos Heir. Just you watch as I, the great Lady Caenis...
当然是真的…你是来找我拍照…我去！「无名客」？！
Of course I'm real... Are you here to take a photo... Wait! A Nameless!?
Villain, say hello to my baseball bat!
停、停停——你先别动！保持距离！听我约法三章：第一，禁止辱骂角色！第二，禁止攻击COSER本人！！第三，间接攻击也不行！！！

Stop stop, stop! Hold it right there! Keep your distance! Listen up, I've got three rules: First, no insulting the character! Second, no attacking the cosplayers!! Third, no indirect attacks either!!!
明白了就点点头，否则别怪我活用举报，咱们治安局见！
Nod if you get it, or don't blame me for pulling the report card. We can hash it out at the Security Bureau!
不然还是凯妮斯本人吗？算了，就当你在夸我了…你可以叫我「凯妮斯SP」。
What do you think? How on earth could I be the real Caenis? Never mind, I'll just take that as a compliment... You can call me "Caenis (Alt)."
...Why are you so good at this?
唉，别提了，问就是我COS的功夫过于出神入化…你可以叫我「凯妮斯SP」。
Ugh, don't even ask... Let's just say my cosplay skills are a little too convincing. You can call me "Caenis (Alt)."
咳、总之不是来「伸张正义」的就好…别怪我反应激烈啊，毕竟出「无名客」的基本都是主角厨。喏，你看，我现在身上还没干透呢——

Ahem, anyway, as long as you're not here to "serve justice," we're good... Don't blame me for being touchy, okay? After all, anyone who goes around here as the Nameless is basically a total protagonist fan. See? I'm still not dry yet...
刚有个「阿那克萨戈拉兔」拿枪呲了我一脸水就跑…边跑边放声大笑，嚷嚷着什么「世间真理，我已解明」，身后还追着好几个满身是水的「阿鸽莱雅」……

Just now, some Anaxagorabbit squirted water in my face with a gun and bolted... cackling like a maniac as he ran, shouting something about "I have deciphered the truth of this world!" And a bunch of soaking wet "Aglazy" were chasing after him...
那刻夏风评被害的一集…
One more nail in the coffin for Anaxa's public image...
哦，你怕是不知道他那张「想骂谁就骂谁」的表情包现在有多火。
Oh, you probably don't know how viral his "say what's on your mind with no filter" sticker has become.
Aren't you even mad about that?
这要是换了别人，我早就跟着追上去骂了，但偏偏那家伙COS的是「那刻兔」…可恶，我甚至不能说他OOC了！
If it were anyone else, I'd have chased them down and given them a piece of my mind, but of all things, that guy was cosplaying Anaxagorabbit... Ugh, I can't even blame him for ruining the character!
更何况还有个「白鹅」紧随其后，一边道歉一边给我猛猛塞无料，我也不好说什么…唉，疯狂的薄荷兔，心机的大白鹅，还有万恶的糖衣炮弹……

Not to mention that "Painon" hot on my heels, apologizing profusely while shoving freebies at me left and right... What am I supposed to say to that? *sigh* A manic green rabbit, a scheming blue-black-and-white goose, and those evil candy bombs...
总之，虽然那姑且能算是漫展体验的一环吧，但短时间内，我可是不想再体验一遭了——所以，小「无名客」，互动拍照欢迎，人身攻击禁止，OK？

Anyway, although I guess you could call that a part of the convention, I'm NOT looking to go through that again anytime soon. So, little Nameless, interactive photo ops are welcome, personal attacks are not, understand?
天外之客啊，来此所为何事？切莫告诉我，你也信了那些黄金裔的逐火邪说……
Visitor from beyond the sky, what brings you here? Please don't tell me you've fallen for the Flame-Chase heresy of those Chrysos Heirs...
Do you have time for a chat?
既是贵客，自然应当以礼相待…但元老院素来事务繁忙，请长话短说罢。
As our honored guest, you naturally deserve a warm welcome... but the Council of Elders is always swamped with business, so let's keep this short.
Why are you cosplaying as Caenis?
这个啊…当然是因为喜欢，为爱发电呗。不然你以为就这种冷门小反派，难道还有什么商单可接吗？
Well... It's 'cause I love it! Labor of love, you know? Otherwise, you think a niche little villain like her would be getting sponsorship deals or something?
可不是嘛，从出场到炮灰，加起来总共不到十页…但即便如此，依旧拉得一手好仇恨。
That's right. From appearance to cannon fodder, barely ten pages total... but even so, they still managed to rack up some serious hate.
You've got some pretty unique tastes.
嗯哼~人的爱好是自由的。
Mm-hmm~ People have their own hobbies.
好吧，我也知道这个角色不招人待见，但没办法，我就是对COS反派情有独钟——
Well, I know this character isn't exactly popular, but what can I say? I've just got a soft spot for cosplaying villains—
唉，像你这种主角控永远理解不了，每当看到别人对着我扮演的角色咬牙切齿、却又无可奈何的时候，那种酸爽的心情…啧啧。
Ugh, a protagonist groupie like you could never understand the absolute rush I get when people are gritting their teeth at the character I'm playing, totally helpless to do anything about it... Tsk.
不过要说起来，果然还是隔壁的来古士更「反派」一些。可惜我不好覆面系这口，不然这次出的就是那位了。
That said, though... Lygus next door is definitely more of a "villain" type. Too bad I'm not into the masked hero thing, or I would've featured him this time around.
你为什么喜欢这个角色？
Why do you like this character?
一代枭雄、却因时代传承的执念疯魔，终究走向末路——哇，我就爱这种调调，多有意思！
A legendary hero driven mad by his obsession with the inheritance of his era, ultimately meeting his dead end. Wow, I just love this kind of vibe! How fascinating!
而且在虚构作品中，坏人经常比好人更让人印象深刻。
Besides, in fiction, the bad guys are often way more memorable than the good guys.
如果你走马观花地看一遍《如我所书》，可能都记不住很多正派角色的名字。但一提到「凯尼斯」…嘿嘿，谁不恨得牙根痒痒？
If you just skim through As I've Written, you probably won't even remember most of the good guys' names. But mention "Caeneus"... heh, who doesn't want to grind their teeth in exasperation?
当然，我还是要叠个甲啊！我喜欢这个反派，和我觉得这个反派应当被碎尸万段，是完全不冲突的两件事！
Of course, I still gotta cover my bases here! Loving this villain and thinking they deserve to be torn limb from limb are two entirely different things!
You're gonna get in trouble cosplaying her, aren't you?
那可就好比欧洛尼斯帷幕上的星星——数不胜数喽。远了不说，就在上个月的仙舟ONLY，我出了「幻胧胧」，结果差点被某个「狂热停云粉」扇了巴掌。

That'd be like counting the stars on Oronyx's curtain. There are way too many to count. Just last month at a Xianzhou-Only convention, I cosplayed as Phanty, and I nearly got slapped by some hardcore Tingyun fan.
但没关系啦，这说明什么？说明我演技好啊！绝灭大君的气势，可不是任谁都能演好的。
But that's totally fine! You know what that means? It means I'm a great actress! Not just anyone can pull off the presence of Lord Ravager, you know.
不过演绝灭大君实在没啥意思。性格都太极端，我装得疯狂一点就行。
Playing Lord Ravager is pretty boring, though. Their personalities are all way too extreme, so I just have to act a little unhinged and call it a day.
还是凯尼斯这种复杂的反派得我心。坏，但不仅仅是坏，这演起来才有意思呢～
It's complex villains like Caeneus that really get me. Evil, but not just evil. Now that's what makes playing the role fun~
好嘞拜拜~咳…既然你决意与那群黄金裔沆瀣一气，那么下次见面，我定不会手下留情…你且走吧，行路之时留心阴影。
Alrighty then, bye-bye~ Ahem... Since you've decided to throw your lot in with those Chrysos Heirs, the next time we meet, I won't be holding back... Off you go then. Watch the shadows on your way.
Nothing much, just dropping by to say hi.
哦？你可是代表黄金裔，前来挑衅于我的吗……
Oh? So you've come here on behalf of the Chrysos Heirs... to challenge me?

哦，那个啊，是等身立牌啦，我特意花大价钱定制哦。当然，是非卖品~
Oh, that? It's a life-size standee! I had it custom-made at a pretty penny, too. And of course, it's not for sale~
诶呀，看你对这些制品不是很了解的样子，需要我为你推荐一下吗？比如这个——

「奇美古士」系列盒蛋，每套十二款，不同造型，可随机抽取。直接端盒的话，还赠送第十三款隐藏款哦~

普通款的造型可以参考盒子上的例图，包括：西装、礼服、研究服、女仆装、泳装、魔法少女制服……
Normal outfits can reference the examples on the box, including: suits, formal wear, lab coats, maid outfits, swimsuits, magical girl uniforms...
Wait, wait, wait— What the heck are these!?
…好吧，这位朋友，看来你对我推的印象不太正面…那么请先容许我叠个甲：个人喜好并无高低贵贱之分，请勿随意打骂厨子。

...Alright, friend, I can tell you're not exactly thrilled with my recommendation... So let me get this out there first: everyone's got their own tastes, no judgment here. So please, no flaming the fans, okay?
当然，如果你真的不喜欢，我也不会强行向你推荐什么，你只需要转身离开就行了。
Of course, if you're really not into it, I won't force anything on you. Just turn around and walk away.
但如果你稍微有那么一点兴趣，那么随时欢迎相互交流学习，毕竟我的摊位就是为此而存在的——就当是满足一下好奇心，总没坏处嘛~

But if you're even a teensy bit interested, feel free to swing by anytime for some mutual exchange of ideas. After all, that's what my stall is here for! Think of it as satisfying your curiosity. Nothing wrong with that~

Hey there~ Welcome to {RUBY_B#Lygus ONLY Booth}"Lygus Made Just for You"{RUBY_E#}.
Do you have time for a chat?

Of course, friend! Are you here to hear about my idol? Because if so, I'm suddenly wide awake!
What do you even see in him...
诶呀，这个角色很有魅力嘛——曾经「第一位天才」以人类的知识创造了神明，而作为本体的残片，他以神礼观众之名，静待千百万次轮回，只为走上弑神之路……

Oh wow, now this is a character with some serious presence. Once the "First Genius," he used human knowledge to create a deity, and as a fragment of that original form, he bore the name of Theoros and waited through countless cycles of reincarnation... all for the chance to walk the path of deicide...
哇，这什么美惨强的悲情剧本！当然…除此之外，馋他身子也是真的啦~
Wow, what a beautifully tragic backstory! Though... I'll admit, being into his body is also totally a thing~
是的你没听错。讲真，你难道不觉得来古士很可口吗？明明设定上严肃又端庄，气质也非常冷淡禁欲，但你看他的外形……

Yep, you heard that right. Real talk, don't you think Lygus is totally scrumptious? I mean, he's supposed to be all serious and dignified, with this whole cold and ascetic vibe going on, but just look at him...
哇，那腰、那腿、那线条——吸溜吸溜，这种反差感可真是张力爆表，简直人外控狂喜！而且还是覆面系！*乐园吉祥话*覆面系啊！！！
Wow, that waist, those legs, that figure... *slurp* The contrast is absolutely off the charts! A dream come true for monster lovers! And he's masked! *arcadian words of fortune* MASKED!!!
天呐！牢古，你简直就像一块香香甜甜的蓝莓慕斯小蛋糕……
Oh my gosh! Lygus, you're like a sweet, scrumptious little blueberry mousse cake...
而且我跟你讲，来右的CP都很美味的！尤其是赞达尔x来古士——水仙了解一下！简直超绝的好吗！！！
No but listen. Bottom Lygus feeds me! Especially Zandar x Lygus — Hello? It's selfcest! It's peak fiction!!
咳…不好意思，刚刚稍微有点激动。要是感兴趣的话，你可以看看我摊子上的本子，各种类型都有，质量保证哦~
Ahem... Sorry about that, got a little carried away there. If you're interested, feel free to check out the works at my stall. I've got all kinds of genres, quality guaranteed~
Where'd you get all these... products?
当然是我自己为爱发电喽。别看我这样，好歹也算是文画兼修的一体机——毕竟圈子太冷，只能自己做饭嘛。
Obviously, it's my own passion. Anyway, I can still write and paint.... When the fandom's this niche, you gotta create your own fan works, you know?
我摊子上这些，基本都是自己画柄图，然后找厂家生产的。讲真，要不是平时接稿赚了不少，光靠本职那点工资，可真都不我挥霍的。

Most of the stuff at my booth here, I basically drew the designs myself and then had them manufactured. To be honest, if it weren't for all the commission work, there's no way my day job salary alone could fund this hobby.
当然啦，总吃自己的腿肉也会腻的，所以我偶尔还是会约约稿——反正只要价钱到位，冷不冷门根本无所谓~
Of course, even I get tired of enjoying my own work all the time, so I do commission work once in a while. As long as the pay's right, I don't care if it's niche or not~
而且作为这几个月以来努力扩圈的成果，我推最近也渐渐开始有其他人产粮了，超~幸福的！
And as a result of all my hard work expanding the fandom these past few months, other people are finally starting to create content too. I'm so~ happy!

什么推销…这叫「发展同好」啦！不过是的，我平时会在各种平台上发表作品，有相关的展子也基本都会去。
What pitch... It's called building a fanbase! But yeah, I post my work on all kinds of platforms, and I pretty much hit up every relevant exhibition.
虽然我推真的很冷，但你要知道，无论产品是否逆天，只要制品足够精美，就总能吸引到一些路人粉。智慧生命嘛，不管是人类还是幻造种，都是视觉动物啦~

不信你瞧，我摊子上的无料不就发得很快嘛！

（我的天啊，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？我命也太好了，刚来就遇到了主推。）
(Wow, is that {NICKNAME}!? I'm so lucky to have run into my idol right after I got here.)
那个…{NICKNAME}，请问可以和你聊几句吗？
Um... {NICKNAME}, may I have a chat with you?
啊，你也是我的粉丝吗？当然可以，你要聊什么？
Oh, you're a fan of mine too? Of course! What would you like to talk about?
还能看到捉鬼小队的新节目吗？
Will we get to see a new episode from the ghost-hunting squad?
怪我太忙了。有机会的话，还是希望能再出点节目。别担心，我们四个…五个吧，平时关系好得很，一直都在群里聊天的。
It's just that I'm too busy. If I get the chance, I'd still love to do more shows. Don't worry, the four of us... well, five of us, we're super tight. We're constantly chatting in the group.
你竟然是捉鬼小队的粉丝啊…我还以为这里只有《绒绒号》的粉丝呢。
Wait, you're actually a fan of the ghost-hunting squad...? I thought everyone here was only into The Fluffy.
有谣传说尾巴大爷是虚构角色。
There's a rumor going around that Mr. Tail is a fictional character.
啊？哪里来的谣传？我们虚构它干什么？
Huh? Where'd that rumor even come from? Why would we make up something like that?
哈哈哈，我也不相信，就是想和当事人确认一下是假的。至于为什么，我等一下再细细给你讲。
Haha, I didn't believe it either. I just wanted to confirm it was just a rumor with the person involved. As for why, I'll fill you in on the details in a bit.
桂乃芬她哥怎么不出镜？
How come Guinaifen's brother never shows up on screen?
你问郎世乐？他是海盗出身，有很多犯罪记录，算劣迹人物，出现在直播间会被限流的。
You're asking about Langshile, huh? He's an ex-pirate, and he has a lot of criminal records. Totally bad news. If he showed up on a livestream, we'd get shadowbanned.
Thanks, let's catch up another time.
嗯，拜拜，下次再聊吧…啊等等，不对不对不对，怎么感觉我变成常驻NPC了？
Yeah, bye-bye, let's chat again next time... Wait, no, no, no. Why do I feel like I've turned into a regular NPC?
Regular NPC? What do you mean?
怎么跟你解释呢…一般情况下，都是我拿着一大堆莫名其妙的话题去骚扰别人，今天怎么变成别人拿着一堆话题来和我聊了？
How do I put this... Usually, I'm the one bombarding people with a bunch of random topics, so how come today someone's coming at me with a ton of stuff to chat about?
瞧你说的，我这也就是遇到喜欢的主播，有点兴奋了。你别生气呀！
Hey, come on! I just got a little excited because I ran into a streamer I really like. Don't be mad!
没事，我没生气，就是觉得这事有点倒反天罡。稍等，我想办法调整一下。
It's fine, I'm not mad. Just feels like the whole situation turned upside down here. Hang on, let me see if I can adjust this.
呼…这下舒服多了。咱们继续聊吧！
Phew... Much better! Now, where were we?
你舒服了就好…刚才我们聊到哪里来着？
Well, as long as you're happy... Now, where were we?
又见面了，{NICKNAME}。有什么想聊的吗？
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. What's on your mind?
I'd like to chat with you.
那当然欢迎啦！我可是你的粉丝，求之不得能和你多聊几句呢。
Sure thing! I'm a huge fan of yours. I'd be thrilled to chat with you more!
You a fan of the ghost-hunting squad?
哈哈，在这个展会是不是有点小众？但我真的很喜欢捉鬼小队，现在回想起来追看捉鬼小队的日子，都觉得特别幸福。
Haha, I know it's a bit niche for this exhibition, but I'm a huge fan of the ghost-hunting squad! Those days when I used to follow their adventures, those really were some happy times.
唉，可惜，你常年不在罗浮，剩下几位成员工作也很忙，想看到你们再聚首，应该是遥遥无期了。
Ah, what a shame. You're hardly ever on the Luofu, and the other members are all swamped with work... Getting you all back together again? That's looking like a distant dream at this point.
但其实这也是件好事。粉已经解散的团体，就完全不用担心塌房。
But honestly, that's a good thing. When you're a fan of a group that's already disbanded, you never have to worry about them having a scandal.
唉…就当是在自我安慰吧，哈哈。
Ugh... I guess I'm just trying to make myself feel better, haha.
你之前说的谣言是怎么回事？
What's the deal with that rumor you mentioned earlier?
哈哈哈，其实就是随处可见的阴谋论者啦。
Hahaha, just those run-of-the-mill conspiracy theorists, really.
我总觉得这帮人本质上是做题爱好者，总要捕风捉影解开一些根本不存在的谜团。
I can't shake the feeling that these guys are basically puzzle junkies, always chasing shadows and trying to crack mysteries that don't even exist.
这群人有个理论，说尾巴大爷是特效做的，为了丰富团队人设，捏造出来的角色。
They have this theory that Mr. Tail is all CGI, a made-up character to spice up the crew's image.
最有力的证据就是，尾巴大爷说话的声音，和星际和平公司的主持人叽米简直一模一样。
The most compelling evidence? Mr. Tail's voice sounds exactly like Owlbert, the IPC's host.
他们就因此认定，是你们请了叽米给这个虚拟角色配音——可是在演武仪典上，这两个人明明一起出现过啊！
So they jumped to the conclusion that you guys hired Owlbert to voice this virtual character. But how do they explain both of them being at the Wardance together?
总之当个乐子听就好，千万别放在心上。主要是你也说服不了这群人。
Just take it as a joke and forget about it. Besides, there's no convincing these people anyway.
就算你拿出多少如山铁证，这帮阴谋论者上来一句「都是伪造的」，你就直接哑火了。哈哈，就让他们在自己的信息茧房里逻辑自洽吧！

No matter how much ironclad evidence you pile up, these conspiracy theorists just hit you with a "It's all fake!" and leave you speechless. Haha, just let them stay in their little echo chambers where everything makes perfect sense to them!
捉鬼小队里你最喜欢谁？
Who's your favorite in the ghost-hunting squad?
唔…你是我的主推啦！我入坑《绒绒号》也是因为真的很喜欢你。剩下全体成员并列第二吧～
You're my ultimate bias! I joined the The Fluffy fandom just for you. The rest of the crew are all tied for second place~
至于嗑CP，我只嗑你和尾巴大爷的CP，嘿嘿。
As for shipping, you and Mr. Tail are my OTP only, hehe.
Forget the exhibit. Go see a doctor.
嘿嘿嘿，你就让我偷偷嗑吧！我不会舞到正主面前的～
Pretty please? Let me have this as my little secret. I promise to keep it on the down-low!~
Okay, let's catch up another time~
Okay, let's catch up another time~
「这么近，那么美，度假到贝城」，请大家支持贝洛伯格文旅，谢谢喵。
"Nothing beats a Belobog holiday!" Please support Belobog's culture and tourism! Thank you, meow!
这位朋友，想了解下贝洛伯格文旅套餐么，现在针对外星游客开放了<unbreak>108</unbreak>系统时免签喵！
Hey there, friend! Interested in learning about our Belobog travel packages? We're now offering visa-free entry for off-world tourists for up to <unbreak>108</unbreak> system hours, meow!
没关系，我们马上要上线一批全新游览项目。而且针对您这样的回头客，还能享受八折门票优惠喵！
No worries! We're about to launch a whole bunch of brand-new attractions. Plus, for returning tourists like yourself, you can enjoy a <unbreak>20%</unbreak> discount on tickets, meow!
你这宣传口号不押韵啊。
哈哈，确实不押韵，但是足够好记，毕竟银河里有这么多星球，让别人记住才是最重要的喵。
Haha, yeah, it doesn't rhyme, but it's easy to remember. And in a cosmos with so many planets, what really matters is making people remember you. Don't you agree, meow?
你为什么每句话带个喵？
Why do you end every sentence with "meow"?
这不是入乡随俗么，听本地人说，在句尾加上「喵」，就会显得比较可爱，喵。
Just following local customs. Apparently, putting "meow" at the end of sentences is considered cute here, meow.
欸？你看起来有点眼熟啊，灰发，球棒，坚定的眼神，我想起来了！您就是那个…就是那个！
Huh? You look kinda familiar... Gray hair, a bat, that determined look in your eyes... Wait, I remember now! You're that...!
那个词怎么说来着…哦对！COSER！
What's the word again... oh right! Cosplayer!
您就是那个「球棒浣熊」的COSER吧，我也看过一点《苍天航路绒绒号》，您这身装扮还真像喵。
You're cosplaying the "Baseball Raccoon," right? I've watched a bit of Fluffy Across the Blue myself, and your costume really nails the look.
啊！我突然想到，或许可以面向《苍天航路绒绒号》的粉丝，办个贝洛伯格打卡活动喵。
Oh! I just thought of something. Maybe we could set up a Belobog check-in event for Fluffy Across the Blue fans, meow.
回头就和布洛妮娅大人提交这个建议！这位COSER，到时候请一定要来参加喵！
I'll get this suggestion to Lady Bronya straight away! And you, cosplayer, we'll count on you to be there, meow?
「这么近，那么美，度假到贝城」，欢迎大家来贝洛伯格旅游喵！
"Nothing beats a Belobog holiday!" Welcome, everyone, to Belobog tourism, meow!
I'd like to ask about something.
Feel free to ask away, meow.
为什么在观览云岛站宣传？
Why are you advertising at Lookout Cloud station?
但是这里可是「星铁FES」的展会现场啊，全银河热爱《苍天航路绒绒号》的粉丝都汇聚于此喵。
Well, this is the Star Rail FEST exhibition. Fans of Fluffy Across the Blue from all across the cosmos have gathered here, meow!
这可是人气角色「球棒浣熊」的原型，{NICKNAME}伟大征程的第一站喵！
Presenting now is the prototype of the beloved "Baseball Raccoon," the first stop on {NICKNAME}'s grand journey, meow!
你作为「球棒浣熊」的COSER，不会不知道吧？你该不会是个假粉丝吧？
You're cosplaying the Baseball Raccoon and you don't even know that? Are you for real?
哈哈，开玩笑的喵，你这服装这么用心，肯定是真粉丝。贝洛伯格文旅局最近正在开发「绒绒号小三只冒险专线」，有兴趣的话，你也可以来看看喵～

Haha, just kidding, meow! I mean, with a costume that detailed, you must be a die-hard fan. Speaking of which, Belobog's Department of Tourism is actually working on a "Fluffy Trio Adventure Line." If you're interested, you should totally check it out, meow~
文旅套餐包含哪些项目？
What's included in the travel package?
我们的项目可多了，让我来给您列一列喵。
We've got tons of projects! Allow me to run through the list for you, meow.
首先是最具贝洛伯格特色的「大冰雪世界」，我们有专业向导带领游客畅游雪原，体验雪地露营，探索旧世界遗址喵。
First up is the signature "Rimeworld," Belobog's pride and joy! With our pro guides, you can trek across the Snow Plains, camp in the snowfield, and explore Old World ruins, meow!
还可以参观「冬城博物馆」，感受贝洛伯格悠久的历史和独特的文化。
You can also visit the Everwinter Museum to experience Belobog's rich history and unique culture.
哦对，最近卢卡先生不是在银河格斗界很火吗？磐岩镇的拳馆也成了热门景点，经常一票难求呢喵！
Oh right, Mr. Luka's been totally blowing up in the cosmic fighting scene lately, hasn't he? The boxing gym in Boulder Town's become the hotspot. It's next to impossible to get tickets these days.
顺便还带红了另几个本地的格斗家，连「贝洛伯格式拳击」都跟着火了起来。大守护者刚批了一笔专款，安排几个拳手去千星城开了第一家武馆喵。

They also shot a few local fighters to fame in the process, and even "Belobogian Boxing" caught fire as a result. The Supreme Guardian just approved a special fund to send a few boxers to open the first martial arts school in Astropolis, meow!
…其实本来要去罗浮开第一家武馆的，被他们天舶司的大人给劝住了，说罗浮本地武术文化太浓厚，外来武术贸然进来很可能吃不开，确实是有道理的喵。

...I was all set to open my first martial arts school on the Luofu, but the bigwigs at the Sky-Faring Commission talked me out of it. They said the local martial arts tradition is like a wall you can't climb, an outsider trying to break in would probably get nowhere. Hard to argue with that, meow.
总之还是那句话，「这么近，那么美」，贝洛伯格一定能带给你一次难忘的旅行体验喵。
Anyway, like I said, "Nothing beats a Belobog holiday!" Belobog promises a journey you'll be talking about for years, meow!
去贝洛伯格旅游的人多么？
Are there a lot of tourists visiting Belobog?
现在每个月的入境旅客数量都在创新高，虽然和匹诺康尼那样的热门旅游星球没法比，但也算取得了一点成绩了喵。
Every month we're breaking new records for incoming visitors. Sure, we may not be a giant like Penacony, but we're making solid progress, meow!
不过现在文旅业的竞争很激烈，我们贝洛伯格还是有许多软硬件短板要补齐喵。
But the tourism industry's super competitive right now, and we still have a ton of gaps to fill, meow.
好在我们的守护者大人非常重视文旅业，不仅出台了多项利好政策，前不久还亲自到二相乐园洽谈旅游开发项目喵。

Fortunately, our Madam Guardian takes the tourism industry super seriously. Not only has she rolled out a bunch of pro-business policies, but she even personally made a trip to Planarcadia not too long ago to discuss tourism development projects, meow.
唉，一想到守护者大人为贝洛伯格付出了这么多，我要更加卖力的宣传喵。
Just thinking about how much Madam Guardian has done for Belobog... I've gotta work even harder to spread the word, meow!
那回头见，还请记得支持贝洛伯格文旅喵！
Take care! And don't forget to support Belobog's culture and tourism, meow!
All good, you do your thing.
那回头见，还请记得支持贝洛伯格文旅喵！
Take care! And don't forget to support Belobog's culture and tourism, meow!
大哥，再多讲讲吧！你是俺那些同乡里，在二相乐园混得最好的人了！
Boss, tell me more! You're the legend from our hometown who's made it big in Planarcadia!
回家吧孩子，回家吧…这里不是你想象的样子。
Turn back, child. Go home... This place isn't what you think it is.
如今的就业市场可是很残酷的，没有豁出去的野心，就别想在这生存。
The job market these days is cutthroat. Without the guts to go all-in, you won't last a second out here.
想当初我小帅，也是因为在酒馆遇到了贵人才有现在的机缘。
You know, back in the day, I only got my big break after meeting the right person at a tavern.
他见我找不到工作，不仅安抚我的情绪，让我闭嘴别哭，还让我抱紧马桶边笑边喊「马咪马咪——桶！」破除就业诅咒……

When he saw I couldn't find a job, he didn't just tell me to calm down and stop crying. Instead, he made me hug the toilet while laughing and shouting "MAMMA MIA — Toilet!" to break the unemployment curse...
这下居然真灵了，隔天我那段视频就在网上爆火！你说不准都刷到过。
And wouldn't you know it, it actually worked! The next day, my video blew up online! You've probably even scrolled past it yourself.
评论里人人都在嘲笑我，但那又怎么样？没人比我更争气，因为我马上就被公司聘用成了「寰宇马桶宣传大使」！
Everyone in the comments was laughing at me, but so what? Nobody's more successful than me, because I just got hired by the IPC as their "Universal Toilet Ambassador!"
听听我念广告词：「琥珀王马桶，给脆弱的你最<size=28>坚墙</size>的托举！」
Listen to my ad pitch: "Amber Lord Toilets. When you're at your most vulnerable, we offer the most <size=28>unshakable</size> support!"
你跟当初的我真像啊…咱们都很天真，特别天真！
You remind me so much of how I used to be... We're both naive, super naive!
可是在这个时代，这个地方，老实没用，咱们只比谁更拉得下脸，谁更能让人笑出声。
But these days, in this place, playing it straight gets you nowhere. It's all about who can swallow their pride faster and who can get the biggest laugh.
这、这怎么跟俺在学校里学的不一样？
Huh? This ain't what I learned in school!
你学的都是上个琥珀纪的老古董了。醒醒吧孩子，那个欢愉上行、人们因热爱而聚集的美好旧日时光…早就回不去了。
What you know is ancient history from the last Amber Era. Wake up, kid. Those beautiful old days when Elation was on the rise and crowds came from real passion... are long gone.
不准哭！不准向这个残酷的世界暴露你的脆弱。来，跟着我学哈哈大笑，只要笑起来，一切问题都会解决！
No crying! Don't expose your vulnerability to this cruel world. Come on, laugh with me. Hahaha! As long as you're laughing, everything will work itself out!
乐子神在上，哈哈哈哈，哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
好、好，俺笑哈哈哈哈…俺这样就能找到工作，在这里留下了吗哈哈哈哈……
O-Okay, hehe... hahaha... So this is how I land a job and stay here for good? Hahaha...
诶？这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你也来逛漫展呀？
Ah, if it isn't {NICKNAME}. You're here at the con too?
还不错啦～《麦卡托事件簿》卖得很好，最近也在商量动画化的事。我们两个椅子的日子呀，也是越过越好了。
Not bad, actually~ The Mercator Files is selling like hotcakes, and we're even in talks about an animated adaptation. Life's been looking up for the two of us chairs.
椅子斯基现在很开心。每天就是做饭、看书、和我开剧本会、画漫画，没什么心理压力，又吃胖了些。

Chairsky's pretty happy lately. Her days are filled with cooking, reading, co-writing scripts with me, and comic drawing. As a result, she's totally stress-free and has even gained a bit of weight back.
说起来，最近我和薇克丝的关系也越来越好了。其实主要是和她儿子的关系越来越好了，哈哈哈。
Speaking of which, Vexis and I are on better terms now. Well, more accurately, it's her boy that I've been clicking with. Haha.
她儿子特别喜欢坐在我身上，让我载着他到处飞。每次都笑得很开心。
Her boy can't get enough of riding on my back while I zoom around. It never fails to get those huge belly laughs.
有时候闯了祸，还会让我带着他逃走，躲避他妈妈的追捕。
Sometimes when he gets into trouble, he drags me along on his great escape from his mom's wrath.
但薇克丝是何许人物？每次都能迅速抓到我们，然后劈头盖脸一顿训——说实话，我觉得她对这母子猫鼠游戏有点乐在其中。
But Vexis is on another level. She always catches us in seconds, followed by the full lecture. I'm starting to think she actually gets a kick out of this mother-son chase.
大家现在都很幸福啦！我们两把椅子现在的使命，就是好好画完《麦卡托事件簿》，让麦卡托也获得幸福，属于名侦探的幸福。
Everyone's happy now! And the mission for us two chairs is to finish drawing The Mercator Files and bring that happiness to Mercator, the kind of happiness a great detective deserves.
I've got other stuff to handle. Let's talk later.
没问题，下次再聊～你一定要顺利呀！
No problem, catch you later~ You got this!
哎，好讲究的扮装，你扮的是仙舟将军吗？能集邮吗？
Whoa, that's some fancy cosplay! Are you dressed as a Xianzhou General? Can I take a photo with you?
你搞错了，我是普通仙舟人，耳朵也是真的。
You've got it all wrong. I'm just a normal Xianzhou citizen, and these ears are real.
啊——不好意思！那这边扮演年轻老奥帝的这位呢？
Ah... my bad! So, what about the one playing the young Old Oti over here?
…我就只是普通的皮皮西人，不如说我挺佩服你的想象力的。
...I'm just a normal Pepeshi, honestly. If anything, I'm impressed by your imagination.
哎，对不起对不起，第一次来展会，太兴奋了。
Oh gosh, my apologies! I'm super new to this and just got overeager.
And what about this one dressed like {NICKNAME}?
这个你应该没认错…应该是专业Coser吧？
You probably didn't mistake this one... Has to be a professional cosplayer, huh?
就快排到了，就快排到了…为了这次签售，我可是专门买了初版印刷的绒绒号第一卷。
Almost there, almost there... I specifically bought a first edition print of The Fluffy Volume 1 just for this signing!
我也是，太激动了，马上就能看到模糊二维马老师本尊了……
Same here! I'm so hyped. I'm about to meet the one and only Blurry_QR_Colt in the flesh...
各位排队等待签售的粉丝，实在不好意思，模糊老师说球棒浣熊要借走她一阵，有急事要谈，因此签售会要延期几个小时。

Attention, everyone waiting for the signing. We sincerely apologize, but Ms. Blurry is needed for an urgent matter with Baseball Raccoon. Therefore, the signing session will be postponed for a few hours.
算了，我们都排了十七个系统时了，也不差这一会。
Ah well, we've already been waiting for seventeen system hours. What's a little longer?
就是就是，还是{NICKNAME}的事情更重要！
你再好好看看，那只是位专业Coser吧！
Take another look. That's just a professional cosplayer!
「不想成为魔法少女的末日兽不是好反物质军团」的场贩，是在这排队吗？
Is this the line for the merch booth for "A Doomsday Beast That Doesn't Want to Be a Magical Girl Isn't a Proper Antimatter Legion Member"?
你来晚了，到我这刚好是最后一本。
Ah, you just missed it. This one right here is the last copy.
什么？这只是我排的第二个摊位啊，这也没赶上吗？
What? This is only the second booth I've lined up for, and I still missed out?
幻之作者的人气如此。其实你还算幸运，只要在这支个帐篷睡到明天，就能有新货。不如听听这位朋友的故事吧——

Such is the popularity of this mystery author. But hey, you're in luck. If you don't mind camping out here until tomorrow, there'll be a fresh batch. Now, why not listen to this friend's story while you wait?
（嘟囔）…单推画师，十点开展，九点五十八分售罄…如果我是治安官，一定要把所有倒卖者抓进去…
(Muttering) ...My one favorite artist's merch, booth opens at ten, sold out by 9:<unbreak>58</unbreak>... If I were a security officer, I'd throw every scalper in the slammer...
Oh wow, you're right! They really nailed it!

New issue on sale! Come check it out!
